title: Patchwork: A compact representation for 3D polygonal shapes
summary: We introduce Patchwork, a new general-purpose shape representation capable of modeling 2D and 3D geometry with a small number of parameters. Patchwork is grounded in a rigorous mathematical framework, providing provable complexity bounds and the ability to approximate arbitrary shapes with arbitrary precision in any dimension. We propose an efficient gradient-based optimization scheme to fit Patchwork representations to 2D and 3D data, along with a novel regularization loss that progressively prunes redundant elements, yielding high compactness after convergence. Our approach offers fast fitting performance, a fraction of the required parameters compared to existing alternatives, and native support for inside-outside classification, making it a versatile and compact representation for geometric learning and reconstruction tasks, with future potential for 3D generation. Our implementation is available at: https://github.com/Ankbzpx/patchwork-experiment.

AI.tldr: Patchwork is a novel, compact, mathematically grounded shape representation for 2D/3D geometry, enabling high-precision approximation with few parameters, efficient gradient-based fitting, automatic pruning via regularization, and native inside-outside classification.
AI.motivation: Existing shape representations often suffer from high parameter counts, lack of theoretical guarantees, or limited support for geometric tasks like inside-outside classification; there is a need for a compact, provably sound, and versatile alternative.
AI.method: Introduces Patchwork—a parametric shape representation based on a rigorous mathematical framework—and proposes a gradient-based optimization algorithm with a novel progressive pruning regularization loss to fit it to 2D/3D data.
AI.result: Patchwork achieves fast fitting, uses far fewer parameters than alternatives, supports native inside-outside classification, and yields highly compact models after convergence.
AI.conclusion: Patchwork is a general-purpose, compact, and theoretically justified shape representation suitable for geometric learning, reconstruction, and potentially 3D generation.

title: Conformal tubular parameterization and toroidal bending of tube-like surfaces
summary: Tube-like surfaces are widely encountered in geometry processing, engineering structures, and medical anatomy, yet their intrinsic longitudinal and circumferential topology is not well preserved by conventional planar annular or rectangular parameterization domains. In this work, we propose a conformal parameterization framework for open tube-like surfaces with two boundary components. The proposed method first constructs a fixed-boundary tubular parameterization by cutting the input mesh, computing a disk-to-rectangle conformal map, and lifting the result to a three-dimensional tubular domain. To reduce residual distortion introduced near the cut seam, we further introduce a localized quasi-conformal correction scheme formulated on an annular domain, which improves conformality while leaving regions away from the seam unchanged. To handle noisy or irregular input boundaries, we also develop a free-boundary variant based on boundary extension and cycle-Laplacian smoothing, allowing the prescribed boundary constraints to be imposed on artificial outer rings rather than directly on the original surface. Finally, we derive two conformal toroidal bending maps that transform the tubular parameterization into toroidal geometries while preserving the underlying tube topology. Experiments on synthetic tube meshes and real vascular surfaces demonstrate that the proposed framework produces low-distortion parameterizations, effectively mitigates seam-induced artifacts, improves robustness for boundary-noisy inputs, and provides flexible tubular and toroidal target domains for downstream surface processing tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对具有两个边界分量的开管状曲面的保角参数化框架，通过固定边界与自由边界两种策略提升保角性与鲁棒性，并扩展至环面弯曲映射，有效降低失真与接缝伪影。
AI.motivation: 传统平面环形或矩形参数化域难以良好保持管状曲面固有的纵向与周向拓扑结构。
AI.method: 构建固定边界管状参数化（切网格→盘到矩形保角映射→提升至三维管域）；引入基于环形域的局部拟保角校正以减小接缝畸变；设计自由边界变体（边界延拓+环路拉普拉斯平滑）以应对噪声/不规则边界；推导两种保角环面弯曲映射。
AI.result: 在合成管状网格与真实血管表面实验中，该框架实现了低畸变参数化，显著缓解接缝伪影，提升了对边界噪声输入的鲁棒性，并支持灵活的管状与环面目标域。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架为管状曲面提供了兼具保角性、鲁棒性与拓扑一致性的参数化方法，适用于下游几何处理任务。

title: UVTran: Accurate Hole-Filling Parameterization with Transformers
summary: In industrial design, N-sided hole filling is typically formulated as the construction of a single trimmed B-spline surface by minimizing a fairness energy subject to geometric boundary constraints. This formulation requires an accurate parameter-space representation of the trimming curve on the filling surface. Most existing methods project the hole boundary onto a nearby plane or polygon to establish correspondence; however, they often neglect boundary heterogeneity, which can yield biased mappings, degrade fairness, and even cause filling failures. We propose UVTran, a transformer-based framework that predicts an auxiliary projection surface better to capture the geometric characteristics of the hole boundary. Exploiting B-spline locality, we design a cross-attention mechanism that biases each surface control point toward the nearby hole boundary, preserving local geometric detail. We voxelize control-point coordinates and formulate the fitting problem as a classification task, which reduces the model's sensitivity to small numerical perturbations and noise. We adopt a progressive-resolution training strategy that injects controlled discretization errors at coarse resolutions to mimic distribution shifts, thereby mitigating overfitting and improving generalization at high resolution. On our benchmark, UVTran outperforms both industrial and academic baselines: the tolerance-satisfaction rate improves by $12\%$, and it consistently produces fair filled surfaces even under complex hole boundary conditions. These results suggest that UVTran yields more faithful correspondences and fairer trimmed surfaces across a wide range of N-sided holes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出UVTran，一种基于Transformer的N边孔洞填充方法，通过预测辅助投影曲面、设计跨注意力机制、体素化控制点坐标及渐进式分辨率训练策略，显著提升孔洞填充的精度、公平性与鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有N边孔洞填充方法常将边界投影到平面或简单多边形，忽略边界异质性，导致映射偏差、光顺性下降甚至填充失败。
AI.method: 提出UVTran框架：1）用Transformer预测更贴合边界的辅助投影曲面；2）设计利用B样条局部性的跨注意力机制，使控制点偏向邻近边界；3）体素化控制点坐标，将拟合建模为分类任务；4）采用渐进式分辨率训练以增强泛化能力。
AI.result: 在自建基准上，容差满足率提升12%，在复杂边界条件下仍能稳定生成高光顺性填充曲面。
AI.conclusion: UVTran能建立更保真的参数映射，生成更公平的修剪曲面，适用于广泛类型的N边孔洞。

title: Conformal Geometric Algebra as a Symbolic Interface for LLM-Driven 3D Scene Editing
summary:
What symbolic format should an LLM emit for reliable 3D scene editing from natural language, and does algebraic structure help beyond compact syntax? We evaluate Conformal Geometric Algebra (CGA) as a compact symbolic interface against a verbose Euclidean 4$\times$4 matrix baseline and a non-CGA Compact SE3 control in a natural-language 3D editing pipeline with controlled prompting and deterministic geometric execution.
  Our primary result is compositional fidelity under sequential instruction chains. In a sequence-stress protocol (20 templates, 6 trials each; $\texttt{n=120}$ outputs per method), Simple CGA and Compact SE3 both achieve 100% parse validity, but Simple CGA preserves exact ordered operation chains more reliably (97.5% vs 90.0%, two-proportion $\texttt{p=0.016}$) with lower completion-token cost (112.6 vs 133.6 tokens). This pattern is consistent with algebraic expression form supporting compositional faithfulness beyond compactness alone.
  A second result is confirmatory in the powered hard semantic suite ($\texttt{n=100}$ per method): compact representations (Simple CGA 45.0%, Compact SE3 42.0%, Shenlong 44.0%) all exceed the Euclidean 4$\times$4 baseline (24.0%). Simple CGA vs Euclidean is +21 pp ($\texttt{p=0.0028}$) and Compact SE3 vs Euclidean is +18 pp ($\texttt{p=0.0103}$), while Simple CGA vs Compact SE3 is statistically close ($\texttt{p=0.7755}$). Separating parse validity from geometric correctness reveals substantial optimization headroom invisible to syntax-only metrics.
  Overall, compact symbolic interfaces appear to drive reliability-cost gains, with CGA motor composition providing an additional advantage on ordered instruction chains. These findings inform real-time natural-language editing in immersive and interactive 3D environments.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在自然语言驱动的3D场景编辑中，何种符号表示（特别是共形几何代数CGA）能提升LLM输出的可靠性与组合保真度，并验证了代数结构本身对语义执行的增益不仅限于紧凑性。
AI.motivation: 探索适合LLM输出、能支撑可靠且可组合的3D场景编辑的符号格式；检验代数结构（如CGA）是否在语法紧凑性之外，还能提升几何操作的忠实性与执行鲁棒性。
AI.method: 对比评估三种符号接口：Simple CGA（基于共形几何代数）、Compact SE3（非CGA紧致SE(3)表示）和Euclidean 4×4矩阵基线；在控制提示与确定性几何执行的自然语言3D编辑流程中，通过序列压力测试（n=120）和硬语义基准（n=100）量化解析有效性、操作链保真度、token开销及几何正确率。
AI.result: 1）Simple CGA在序列指令链中实现97.5%有序操作保真率（显著优于Compact SE3的90.0%，p=0.016），且token成本更低（112.6 vs 133.6）；2）三者几何正确率均显著超越基线（CGA 45.0% vs 基线24.0%，p=0.0028），但CGA与Compact SE3间无显著差异（p=0.7755）；3）解析有效率均为100%，表明语法正确性不反映几何正确性，存在优化空间。
AI.conclusion: 紧凑符号接口可兼顾可靠性与效率；而CGA凭借其代数结构，在需严格顺序组合的任务中提供额外优势；该发现为实时、交互式3D环境中的自然语言编辑提供了接口设计依据。

title: A Production-Ready RL Framework for Personalized Utility Tuning with Pareto Sweeping in Pinterest Recommender Systems
summary: Large-scale recommenders encode multi-objective trade-offs by combining multiple predicted outcomes into a single utility score. Although this utility layer can be updated independently of the ranker, weight tuning remains largely manual, globally applied, slow to adapt to changing environments and business needs, and hard to govern as priorities shift. We propose PRL-PUTS, a Production-ready, ranker independent RL framework for Personalized Utility-weight Tuning with Pareto Sweeping. We cast utility tuning as a one-step, value-based RL problem: given request context, an agent selects a utility-weight vector that re-weights ranker predictions to maximize request-level engagement rewards. To visualize performance across the trade-off spectrum and allow decision makers to update the deployed operating policy instantly, we adopt an inference-time Pareto frontier sweeping via a scalarization parameter, producing a family of policies and an empirical Pareto frontier used as a governance artifact for operating policy selection. PRL-PUTS runs in parallel with ranking inference without adding serving latency. We validate PRL-PUTS with offline analysis using unbiased exploration logs and online experiments on Pinterest Homefeed where PRL-PUTS showed significant increases in engagement compared to baseline such as +0.13\% increase in successful session, a core metric for user engagement.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PRL-PUTS框架，一种生产就绪、与排序器无关的强化学习方法，用于个性化效用权重调优，并通过帕累托前沿扫描实现灵活、可解释、低延迟的多目标权衡治理。
AI.motivation: 现有大规模推荐系统中效用层权重调优依赖人工、全局固定、响应慢、难治理，难以适应动态业务需求和目标变化。
AI.method: 将效用权重调优建模为一步值函数强化学习问题：基于请求上下文，智能体选择效用权重向量以最大化请求级参与度奖励；引入推理时帕累托前沿扫描（通过标量化参数），生成策略族与经验帕累托前沿作为治理依据；整个框架与排序推理并行运行，零服务延迟。
AI.result: 在Pinterest首页流线上线实验显示，相比基线，成功会话率提升+0.13%；离线使用无偏探索日志验证有效。
AI.conclusion: PRL-PUTS实现了高效、可解释、可治理且低延迟的个性化效用权重自动调优，显著提升用户参与度，已在生产环境部署。

title: GRASP: Graph Agentic Search over Propositions for Multi-hop Question Answering
summary: Agentic retrieval improves multi-hop question answering by giving language models autonomy to iteratively gather evidence. Recent work augments these systems with knowledge graphs for structured traversal, but this combination introduces significant cost: expensive graph construction at index time and compounding token usage at inference time. We introduce Graph Agentic Search over Propositions (GRASP), an agentic system that simultaneously optimizes for high accuracy and minimal token usage in multi-hop question answering. Rather than executing a rigid, singular query, GRASP actively coordinates its retrieval strategy by decomposing multi-hop queries into dependency-aware plans. This enables GRASP to dynamically scale the number of sub-agents according to the complexity of the problem. Each sub-agent resolves its single-hop query by exploring a novel three-layer hierarchical graph of entities, propositions, and passages, using the entity layer for targeted traversal and the proposition layer for high-recall passage retrieval via reciprocal-rank voting. We evaluate GRASP on MuSiQue, 2WikiMultihopQA, and HotpotQA under two settings: open-corpus retrieval and extended context reasoning (LongBench). GRASP achieves the highest QA accuracy in the open retrieval setting on MuSiQue and 2Wiki while using 40-50 percent fewer tokens than IRCoT+HippoRAG2. Furthermore, GRASP leads on EM and F1 across all three datasets in the LongBench setting while using 30 percent fewer tokens than the next most accurate method. Finally, we introduce success economy - the amortized token cost per correct answer, weighted by difficulty - and advocate for efficiency-aware evaluation as a standard practice for agentic QA.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GRASP系统，通过分层图结构和动态子代理协调，在多跳问答中实现高准确率与低token消耗的平衡，并引入'成功经济'作为效率评估新标准。
AI.motivation: 现有基于知识图谱的智能体检索方法在索引时构建图开销大、推理时token消耗高，亟需兼顾准确率与效率的新方案。
AI.method: GRASP将多跳查询分解为依赖感知的计划，动态调整子代理数量；每个子代理在实体-命题-段落三层图上检索，利用实体层定向遍历、命题层通过倒排秩投票实现高召回段落检索。
AI.result: 在MuSiQue和2WikiMultihopQA开放检索设置中准确率最高且token用量减少40–50%；在LongBench扩展上下文设置中EM/F1均领先且token用量减少30%；提出‘成功经济’评估指标。
AI.conclusion: GRASP证明了动态规划与分层图检索可有效提升多跳问答的准确-效率权衡，倡导将效率纳入智能体问答的标准评估体系。

title: Haptic Rendering of Fractional-Order Viscoelasticity: Passivity and Rendering Fidelity
comment: Under review for publication in IEEE Transactions on Robotics
summary: Haptic rendering of viscoelastic materials that exhibit creep and stress relaxation is crucial for many applications, such as medical training with realistic biological tissue models. Fractional-order viscoelastic models provide an effective means of describing intrinsically time-dependent dynamics with few parameters, as these models can naturally capture memory effects. In this study, we present analyses of passivity and rendering performance for fractional-order viscoelastic models under finite-memory discretization. We derive closed-form expressions to ensure the passivity of haptic rendering with a fractional-order (FO) standard linear solid (SLS) model based on Grunwald-Letnikov derivative under short-memory discretization. We also provide symbolic expressions for the effective stiffness and damping of such FO-SLS models. The resulting passivity conditions constitute a unified framework that generalizes previously reported results for integer-order Kelvin-Voigt, Maxwell, and SLS models, since these results are special cases of the newly derived condition. Furthermore, we provide experimental validations of the theoretical passivity bounds and human-subject evaluations of perceived realism of FO-SLS models. Overall, this study establishes a unified theoretical framework and experimental evaluations for FO viscoelastic rendering under short-memory discretization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于分数阶标准线性固体（FO-SLS）模型的触觉渲染方法，分析了其在有限记忆离散化下的无源性与渲染性能，并推导出保证无源性的闭式条件，统一推广了整数阶模型的结果，同时通过实验验证了理论边界与感知真实性。
AI.motivation: 触觉渲染具有蠕变和应力松弛特性的粘弹性材料（如生物组织）对医学训练等应用至关重要；分数阶模型能以较少参数自然刻画记忆效应，但其无源性与实时渲染性能需系统分析。
AI.method: 基于Grunwald-Letnikov导数和短记忆离散化，对分数阶SLS模型进行无源性分析，推导闭式无源条件及等效刚度/阻尼的符号表达式，并开展实验验证与人因评估。
AI.result: 得到了保证分数阶SLS触觉渲染无源性的统一闭式条件，该条件涵盖并推广了整数阶Kelvin-Voigt、Maxwell和SLS模型的已有结果；实验验证了理论无源边界，并证实FO-SLS模型具有更高感知真实性。
AI.conclusion: 本研究建立了分数阶粘弹性触觉渲染在短记忆离散化下的统一理论框架与实验评估体系，为高保真、稳定、实时的生物组织触觉仿真提供了坚实基础。

title: The Scaling Laws of Skills in LLM Agent Systems
summary: As agent systems scale, skills accumulate into large reusable libraries, yet their scaling laws remain poorly understood. Across 15 frontier LLMs, 1,141 real-world skills, and over 3M routing or execution decisions, we identify two coupled laws. Routing law: single-step routing accuracy decays logarithmically with library size ($R^2{>}0.97$ for all models), with errors progressing from local skill competition to cross-family drift and capture by overly general "black-hole skills". Execution law: before state realization, joint routing is approximately multiplicative, whereas correct execution can improve difficult downstream decisions by about $4{\times}$. A single parameter, the routing logarithmic decay slope $b$, couples the two laws: routing-side fits predict execution-side rescue across models, showing that the same library property controls both pre-execution collapse and downstream recoverability. The laws are actionable: law-guided optimization raises held-out routing accuracy from 71.3% to 91.7%, reduces hijack from 22.4% to 4.1%, and transfers directionally to downstream ClawBench and ClawMark execution settings, improving mean pass rate from 49.3% to 61.6% on ClawBench and from 28.4% to 34.5% on ClawMark. These results show that agent performance depends not only on model capability, but also on the structure, granularity, and exposure policy of the skill library.

AI.tldr: 本文发现了代理系统中技能库规模扩展时的两个耦合定律：路由定律（单步路由准确率随技能库大小对数衰减）和执行定律（联合路由近似乘法，正确执行可提升下游决策约4倍），并证明这两个定律由一个参数——路由对数衰减斜率b耦合；基于该规律的优化显著提升了路由准确率、降低了技能劫持率，并在下游基准测试中取得性能提升。
AI.motivation: 随着代理系统规模扩大，技能库不断积累，但其扩展规律尚不明确，亟需量化理解技能库规模对路由与执行性能的影响机制。
AI.method: 在15个前沿大语言模型、1141个真实世界技能及超300万次路由或执行决策上进行大规模实证分析，拟合路由准确率与技能库规模的关系，建模路由与执行的耦合机制，并基于发现的定律开展优化实验。
AI.result: 发现路由准确率随技能库规模呈对数衰减（R²>0.97），错误类型从局部竞争演变为跨家族漂移和‘黑洞技能’捕获；执行前联合路由近似乘法，正确执行可使困难下游决策成功率提升约4倍；单一参数b可同时刻画路由衰减与执行恢复能力；律引导优化使路由准确率从71.3%升至91.7%，劫持率从22.4%降至4.1%，ClawBench和ClawMark平均通过率分别提升12.3%和6.1%。
AI.conclusion: 代理系统性能不仅取决于模型能力，更受技能库结构、粒度和暴露策略等库级属性的深刻影响；所揭示的两个耦合定律为可扩展代理设计提供了可量化、可优化的基础规律。

title: Systematic Optimization of Real-Time Diffusion Model Inference on Apple M3 Ultra
summary: While real-time image generation using diffusion models has advanced rapidly on NVIDIA GPUs, systematic optimization research on non-CUDA platforms such as Apple Silicon remains extremely limited. In this study, we conducted comprehensive optimization experiments across 10 phases targeting the Apple M3 Ultra (60-core GPU, 512 GB unified memory) with the goal of achieving real-time camera img2img transformation. We explored a wide range of techniques including CoreML conversion, quantization, Token Merging, Neural Engine utilization, compact model exploration, frame interpolation, kNN search-based synthesis, pix2pix-turbo, optical flow frame skipping, and knowledge distillation, quantitatively evaluating the effectiveness of each approach. Ultimately, by combining CoreML conversion of the distillation-specialized model SDXS-512 with a 3-thread camera pipeline, we achieved real-time camera img2img transformation at 22.7 FPS at 512x512 resolution. The primary contribution of this work is the systematic demonstration that optimization insights established for CUDA are not necessarily effective on Apple Silicon's unified memory architecture. We reveal an optimization landscape fundamentally different from that of NVIDIA GPUs -- including the absence of speedup from quantization, the ineffectiveness of parallel inference, and the unsuitability of the Neural Engine for large-scale models -- and provide practical guidelines for diffusion model inference on Apple Silicon.

AI.tldr: 本文系统性地优化了扩散模型在苹果M3 Ultra芯片上的实时图像生成性能，通过10阶段实验探索多种技术，最终实现512×512分辨率下22.7 FPS的实时相机img2img转换，并揭示了Apple Silicon与NVIDIA GPU在优化策略上的根本差异。
AI.motivation: 尽管扩散模型在NVIDIA GPU上的实时图像生成已快速发展，但在非CUDA平台（如Apple Silicon）上的系统性优化研究仍极为匮乏。
AI.method: 在Apple M3 Ultra上开展10阶段综合优化实验，涵盖CoreML转换、量化、Token Merging、神经引擎利用、紧凑模型探索、帧插值、kNN合成、pix2pix-turbo、光流跳帧及知识蒸馏等技术，并定量评估各方法效果。
AI.result: 结合CoreML转换的蒸馏专用模型SDXS-512与3线程相机流水线，在512×512分辨率下实现22.7 FPS的实时相机img2img转换。
AI.conclusion: CUDA平台上的优化经验不适用于Apple Silicon的统一内存架构；量化无加速效果、并行推理无效、神经引擎不适用于大规模模型；本文提供了面向Apple Silicon的扩散模型推理实用指南。

title: AgentWall: A Runtime Safety Layer for Local AI Agents
comment: 16 pages, 2 figures, open-source implementation at https://github.com/agentwall/Agentwall
summary: The safety of autonomous AI agents is increasingly recognized as a critical open problem. As agents transition from passive text generators to active actors capable of executing shell commands, modifying files, calling APIs, and browsing the web, the consequences of unsafe or adversarially manipulated behavior become immediate and tangible. Existing AI safety work has focused primarily on model alignment and input filtering, but these approaches do not address what happens at the moment an agent's intent becomes a real action on a real machine. This gap is especially acute in local environments, where developers run agents against their own filesystems, credentials, and infrastructure with little runtime control. This paper introduces AgentWall, a runtime safety and observability layer for local AI agents. AgentWall intercepts every proposed agent action before it reaches the host environment, evaluates it against an explicit declarative policy, requires human approval for sensitive operations, and records a complete execution trail for audit and replay. It is implemented as a policy-enforcing MCP proxy and native OpenClaw plugin, working across Claude Desktop, Cursor, Windsurf, Claude Code, and OpenClaw with a single install command. We present the design, architecture, threat model, and policy model of AgentWall, and demonstrate 92.9% policy enforcement accuracy with sub-millisecond overhead across 14 benchmark tests. AgentWall is open-source at https://github.com/agentwall/Agentwall.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AgentWall，一种面向本地AI智能体的运行时安全与可观测性层，通过拦截、策略评估、人工审批和执行追踪来保障智能体行为安全，支持多平台且开源自用。
AI.motivation: 随着AI智能体从被动文本生成转向主动执行真实操作（如shell命令、API调用等），其在本地环境（如开发者本机）中可能引发即时、严重的安全风险；而现有对齐与输入过滤方法无法覆盖‘意图转为动作’这一关键环节。
AI.method: 设计并实现AgentWall：一个基于策略的运行时拦截层，作为MCP代理和OpenClaw插件，对所有拟执行动作进行声明式策略检查、敏感操作人工审批，并完整记录执行轨迹；支持Claude Desktop、Cursor等主流工具。
AI.result: 在14项基准测试中达到92.9%的策略执行准确率，平均延迟低于1毫秒。
AI.conclusion: AgentWall填补了本地AI智能体运行时安全的关键空白，提供轻量、可扩展、跨平台的安全控制与审计能力，已开源。

title: Noise2Params: Unification and Parameter Determination from Noise via a Probabilistic Event Camera Model
comment: Main paper: 29 pages, 18 figures; Supplemental Information: 22 pages, 15 figures
summary: Accurate, unified models for event cameras (ECs) remain elusive, hampering calibration and algorithm design. We develop a foundational probabilistic model for EC event detection, grounded in photon statistics, that unifies the description of static scene noise events and step response curves (S-curves) within a single analytical framework. Three formulations of the probability distributions are derived, spanning all intensity regimes: exact Poisson, saddle-point, and Gaussian. The model reveals the underlying connection between these otherwise disparate EC behaviors and clarifies the interpretation of S-curves, which we show is more nuanced than selecting a fixed probability threshold. Based on this model, we propose Noise2Params, a method for determining camera-specific values of the log-contrast threshold $B$, the lux-to-photon conversion factor $α$, and the leakage term $θ$ (found to be intensity dependent), via error minimization against observed noise-event distributions. Noise2Params requires only recordings of static, uniform scenes, offering an experimentally accessible alternative to approaches that demand specialized dynamic light sources. We further support the validity the model by training convolutional neural networks (CNNs) on synthetic noise images generated from our distributions and evaluating their ability to reconstruct static scenes from experimental data. We further demonstrate the utility of our model by showing that CNNs incorporating synthetic data outperform those trained solely on experimental data. Our framework provides a quantitative foundation for EC calibration, noise-aware algorithm design, and applications in photon-limited regimes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于光子统计的事件相机（EC）事件检测概率模型，统一描述静态噪声事件与S型响应曲线，并推导出适用于全亮度范围的三种概率分布形式（泊松、鞍点、高斯）。基于该模型，作者提出了无需动态光源的标定方法Noise2Params，用于估计关键参数B、α和θ，并通过合成噪声图像训练CNN验证模型有效性，显著提升了静态场景重建性能。
AI.motivation: 事件相机缺乏准确统一的建模，制约了标定精度与算法设计；现有对S曲线和噪声事件的理解割裂，缺乏理论统一框架。
AI.method: 构建基于光子统计的事件检测概率模型，推导泊松、鞍点近似和高斯三种分布形式；提出Noise2Params方法，通过最小化静态均匀场景下的观测噪声事件分布误差来标定B、α、θ参数；利用该模型生成合成噪声图像训练CNN，并在实验数据上评估重建性能。
AI.result: 揭示了噪声事件与S曲线的内在联系，澄清S曲线并非简单固定阈值响应；Noise2Params仅需静态均匀场景即可完成标定；合成数据增强的CNN在静态场景重建任务中优于纯实验数据训练的CNN。
AI.conclusion: 所提概率模型为事件相机提供了坚实的理论基础，支持更精准的标定、噪声感知算法设计及低光子条件下的应用。

title: Generative 3D Gaussians with Learned Density Control
summary: We present Density-Sampled Gaussians (DeG), a novel 3D representation designed to bridge the gap between adaptive rendering primitives and scalable generative modeling. Unlike existing approaches that constrain 3D Gaussians to fixed voxel grids or arrays, DeG models Gaussian centers as samples from a learnable probability density function defined over an octree. This formulation provides a rigorous mathematical framework for adaptive density control: by jointly optimizing the spatial density and Gaussian attributes under rendering supervision, our model naturally concentrates primitives in regions of high geometric complexity. We achieve this via a new render loss contribution gradient that serves as a fully differentiable analogue to the discrete densification and pruning heuristics used in standard Gaussian Splatting. The resulting representation is highly flexible, supporting variable-resolution decoding from a single latent code by simply adjusting the sampling budget. To enable generative synthesis, we train a latent diffusion model on DeG. We identify a critical challenge in applying diffusion to unordered set-structured latents, which can significantly slow convergence, and propose VecSeq, a canonical re-indexing mechanism that anchors latent tokens to a deterministic 3D Sobol sequence. This transforms the ambiguous set-generation problem into a robust sequence modeling task. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our pipeline achieves state-of-the-art quality in single-image-to-3D generation, combining the structural adaptivity of unstructured primitives with the training stability of grid-based methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Density-Sampled Gaussians（DeG），一种基于可学习密度函数采样的自适应3D高斯表示方法，并结合潜变量扩散模型实现高质量单图生成3D内容。
AI.motivation: 现有3D高斯表示受限于固定网格或数组，难以兼顾自适应渲染与可扩展生成建模；需在保持几何复杂区域高密度采样的同时支持生成式训练。
AI.method: 将高斯中心建模为八叉树上可学习概率密度函数的样本；引入可微渲染损失梯度替代传统离散致密化/剪枝；设计VecSeq机制对无序集合型潜变量进行Sobol序列标准化重索引，以适配扩散模型训练。
AI.result: 在单图像到3D生成任务中达到SOTA质量，兼具非结构化原语的结构自适应性与基于网格方法的训练稳定性。
AI.conclusion: DeG为3D生成提供了一种数学严谨、灵活可扩展且训练稳定的新型表示范式，统一了自适应渲染与生成建模的需求。

title: LARGER: Lexically Anchored Repository Graph Exploration and Retrieval
summary: Repository-level coding agents must first localize the files and symbols relevant to a task; failures at this stage can cascade across downstream objectives ranging from patch generation to test writing and codebase question answering. Existing agents navigate repositories primarily through lexical search, often missing structural relations such as imports, call chains, type hierarchies, and code-test links. Graph-based retrieval can recover such dependencies, but existing approaches often require separate graph tools or traversal stages that fragment the agent's interaction loop. We formalize repository context localization as Lexically Anchored Structural Localization, where success depends on turning lexical matches into high-precision structural entry points and exposing the most useful confidence-filtered local neighborhoods within the agent's existing search loop. We introduce LARGER (Lexically Anchored Repository Graph Exploration and Retrieval), a lexically anchored active-set retrieval framework that starts from lexical matches, aligns them to graph anchors, and performs confidence-filtered local expansion within the agent's existing search loop. LARGER integrates directly into existing CLI coding agents without requiring external graph databases or specialized graph interfaces. Across four benchmarks spanning localization, test generation, and codebase understanding, LARGER improves file-level Acc@5 on LocBench by +13.9 points with tuned hyperparameters and still gains +11.8 points with fixed hyperparameters over the strongest baseline, while delivering consistent gains on MuLocBench, SWE-Atlas Test Writing, and SWE-Atlas Codebase QA.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LARGER框架，通过将词汇匹配转化为高精度结构入口点，并在代理现有搜索循环内进行置信度过滤的局部扩展，实现仓库级代码上下文定位。该方法无需外部图数据库或专用图接口，显著提升了多个基准测试中的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有仓库级编码代理主要依赖词法搜索进行文件和符号定位，容易忽略导入、调用链、类型层次结构和代码-测试链接等结构性关系，导致下游任务失败；而基于图的检索方法又常需独立图工具或遍历阶段，破坏代理交互闭环。
AI.method: 提出词法锚定的结构化定位（Lexically Anchored Structural Localization）形式化定义，并设计LARGER框架：从词法匹配出发，对齐到图锚点，并在代理现有搜索循环内执行置信度过滤的局部图扩展。LARGER可直接集成到现有CLI编码代理中，无需外部图数据库或专用图接口。
AI.result: 在LocBench上文件级Acc@5提升+13.9分（调优超参）和+11.8分（固定超参）；在MuLocBench、SWE-Atlas测试生成和代码库问答任务中也取得一致提升。
AI.conclusion: LARGER有效弥合了词法搜索与结构化依赖之间的鸿沟，在不增加系统复杂性的前提下，显著提升了仓库级编码代理的上下文定位能力，并为多任务场景提供通用且即插即用的增强方案。

title: Dynamic Deployment of Mobile Charging Trucks During Natural Disaster Evacuation: An Offline-to-Online Framework
summary: During large-scale evacuations, concentrated electric vehicle (EV) charging demand can overload fixed charging stations (FCSs), leading to prolonged waiting time and increased risk exposure. To address this challenge, this study proposes dynamically deploying mobile charging trucks (MCTs) to complement FCSs, and develops an Adaptive Risk-aware MCT Deployment (ARMD) framework for real-time operation. It divides the MCT deployment into two problems: risk-aware allocation of MCTs among FCSs and dynamic routing of MCTs to the assigned FCSs, and solves them under an offline-to-online paradigm. The resource allocation problem is formulated as a decentralized partially observable Markov decision process, and a multi-agent proximal policy optimization (MAPPO)-based policy is developed to coordinate multiple MCTs under decentralized observations. The policy is pre-trained offline in an evacuation simulator and adaptively refined online according to current evacuation context. For routing, a spatio-temporal travel time predictor is developed to support rolling-horizon route updates. The proposed framework is evaluated in a simulated hurricane evacuation environment built using real-world data from Hillsborough County, Florida. Experiments show that ARMD consistently outperforms offline optimization, online heuristic dispatch, and rolling-horizon optimization in reducing risk exposure. For demand perturbation scenarios, ARMD reduces average risk exposure by up to 71.1%, relative to the baseline without MCTs. In the case of fixed e-vehicle charging infrastructure or road link failures, ARMD achieves 39.3% to 60.5% reduction in average risk exposure, with its advantages becoming more pronounced as the severity of disruption increases. These results demonstrate the effectiveness and robustness of ARMD in enhancing mobile charging operations for realistic scenarios of uncertain evacuation conditions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自适应风险感知的移动充电车（MCT）部署框架（ARMD），用于在大规模疏散中动态补充固定充电站，以降低电动汽车集中充电引发的风险暴露和等待时间。该框架结合离线预训练与在线自适应的多智能体强化学习（MAPPO）进行资源分配，并融合时空行程时间预测实现滚动式路径规划，在真实飓风疏散模拟中显著优于多种基线方法。
AI.motivation: 大规模疏散期间，电动汽车集中充电易导致固定充电站过载，造成长时间等待和更高的风险暴露，亟需灵活、实时、鲁棒的移动充电支援策略。
AI.method: 提出ARMD框架，将问题分解为风险感知的MCT分配（建模为去中心化部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程，采用MAPPO算法离线预训练+在线自适应优化）和动态路由（基于时空旅行时间预测器支持滚动路径更新）。
AI.result: 在佛罗里达希尔斯伯勒县真实数据驱动的飓风疏散仿真中，ARMD相较基线方法平均风险暴露降低最高达71.1%；在基础设施或路网故障场景下降低39.3%–60.5%，且故障越严重优势越明显。
AI.conclusion: ARMD框架具备强实时性、风险感知能力与环境扰动鲁棒性，可有效提升不确定疏散条件下的移动充电运营效能。

title: OrbiSim: World Models as Differentiable Physics Engines for Embodied Intelligence
summary: We present OrbiSim, a novel robotic simulation paradigm that redefines world models as a fully differentiable physics engine for embodied intelligence. Unlike prior world models that focus on unconstrained imagination in latent or visual domains, OrbiSim establishes a unified, physically-grounded pathway that bridges structured scene assets, neural dynamics, and downstream reinforcement learning. By enabling end-to-end differentiability throughout the entire simulation loop -- spanning from explicit state transitions to visual observation generation -- OrbiSim supports tasks traditionally intractable for classical simulators, such as differentiable contact modeling, gradient-based policy optimization under sparse rewards, and intuitive physical inference. Empirical results demonstrate that OrbiSim significantly outperforms state-of-the-art world models in both predictive fidelity and control performance. Furthermore, its consistent responsiveness to asset configurations and physical parameters suggests its potential as a differentiable tool for enhancing robot simulation and policy training.

AI.tldr: OrbiSim是一种新型的可微分机器人仿真范式，将世界模型重构为面向具身智能的全可微物理引擎，支持端到端梯度传播，显著提升预测精度与控制性能。
AI.motivation: 传统世界模型多聚焦于潜在或视觉空间中的无约束想象，缺乏物理一致性；而经典仿真器不可微，难以支持基于梯度的策略优化和物理推理。
AI.method: 提出OrbiSim，构建统一、物理 grounded 的仿真框架，实现从显式状态转移到视觉观测生成的全链路端到端可微性，整合结构化场景资产、神经动力学与强化学习。
AI.result: 在预测保真度和控制性能上显著超越现有最先进世界模型；支持可微接触建模、稀疏奖励下的梯度策略优化及直观物理推断；对场景资产与物理参数具有稳定响应性。
AI.conclusion: OrbiSim为机器人仿真与策略训练提供了一种高效、可微、物理一致的新工具，推动具身智能中仿真-学习闭环的发展。

title: PQR: A Framework to Generate Diverse and Realistic User Queries that Elicit QA Agent Failures
summary: Evaluating LLM-based agents remains challenging because identifying meaningful failure cases often requires substantial human effort to design realistic test scenarios. Prior works primarily focus on automatically discovering agent failures induced by adversarial users, while overlooking queries with real user intents that also trigger agent failures. We introduce PQR, a framework that not only surfaces agent failures with respect to specific objectives (e.g., helpfulness, safety, etc.) but also resembles real users' intents. PQR operates through an iterative interaction between two complementary modules. The query refinement module performs rewrites to explore diverse query variations, while the prompt refinement module uses prior feedback to derive new objective-violating strategies and realism policies for refining prompts, which in turn generate failure-triggering yet realistic queries. We evaluate PQR on detecting an e-commerce QA agent's unhelpful responses. Our method uncovers 23% - 78% more unhelpful responses, and our generated queries are more diverse and realistic compared to previous methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PQR框架，通过查询和提示精炼模块的迭代交互，自动发现LLM代理在真实用户意图下的失败案例，显著提升检测效果与查询真实性。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM代理评估方法依赖人工设计测试场景，且多关注对抗性用户触发的失败，忽视真实用户意图下引发的失败，导致评估不全面。
AI.method: 提出PQR框架，包含查询精炼模块（生成多样化查询变体）和提示精炼模块（基于反馈推导违反目标策略与真实性策略，生成既触发失败又贴近真实意图的查询）。
AI.result: 在电商问答代理评估中，PQR比先前方法多发现23%–78%的无帮助响应，生成的查询更具多样性与真实性。
AI.conclusion: PQR能有效、自动化地识别LLM代理在真实用户意图下的失败，提升评估的实用性与覆盖度。

title: Mirror Descent-Type Algorithms for the Variational Inequality Problem with Functional Constraints
summary: Variational inequalities play a key role in machine learning research, such as generative adversarial networks, reinforcement learning, adversarial training, and generative models. This paper is devoted to the constrained variational inequality problems with functional constraints (inequality-type constraints). We propose some mirror descent-type algorithms that switch between productive and non-productive steps depending on the values of the functional constraints at iterations, with many different step size rules and stopping criteria. We analyze the proposed algorithms and prove their optimal convergence rate to achieve a solution with desired accuracy, for problems with bounded and monotone operators and Lipschitz convex functional constraints. In addition, we propose a modification of the proposed algorithms by considering each functional constraint in the calculation when we have a productive step, as well as the first constraint that violates the feasibility. This modification can save the running time of algorithms when we have many functional constraints. In addition, we provide an analysis of the proposed algorithms for $δ$-monotone operators, allowing us to apply the proposed algorithms, as a special case, to constrained minimization problems when we do not have access to the exact information about the subgradient of the objective function. Numerical experiments that illustrate the work and performance of the proposed algorithms are also given.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对带函数约束（不等式约束）的变分不等式问题的镜像下降类算法，通过区分有效步与无效步、多种步长规则和停止准则，并分析了其在单调算子和Lipschitz凸约束下的最优收敛速率；还扩展至δ-单调算子情形，适用于次梯度信息不精确的约束优化问题，并通过数值实验验证有效性。
AI.motivation: 变分不等式在生成对抗网络、强化学习、对抗训练和生成模型等机器学习任务中起关键作用，但现有方法对带函数约束的变分不等式问题缺乏高效且理论保证良好的求解算法。
AI.method: 提出基于镜像下降的自适应算法，根据约束函数值动态切换 productive / non-productive 步；引入多种步长规则与停止准则；进一步改进算法，在 productive 步中仅考虑当前违反最严重的约束，以提升多约束场景下的效率；并推广至 δ-单调算子情形以处理次梯度不精确的约束优化。
AI.result: 证明了所提算法在有界单调算子和Lipschitz凸约束下达到最优收敛率；改进版显著降低多约束时的运行时间；扩展版本适用于 δ-单调算子，从而覆盖次梯度信息不精确的约束最小化问题；数值实验验证了算法的有效性与优越性。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的镜像下降类算法为带函数约束的变分不等式问题提供了兼具理论收敛保证与实用效率的新工具，拓展了其在机器学习中不精确优化场景的应用边界。

title: ANNEAL: Adapting LLM Agents via Governed Symbolic Patch Learning
summary: LLM-based agents can recover from individual execution errors, yet they repeatedly fail on the same fault when the underlying process knowledge--operator schemas, preconditions, and constraints--remains unrepaired. Existing self-evolving approaches address this gap by updating prompts, memory, or model weights, but none directly repair the symbolic structures that encode how tasks are executed, and few provide the governance guarantees required for safe deployment. We introduce ANNEAL, a neuro-symbolic agent that converts recurring failures into governed symbolic edits of a process knowledge graph without modifying foundation model weights. Its core mechanism, Failure-Driven Knowledge Acquisition (FDKA), localizes the responsible operator, synthesizes a typed patch through constrained LLM generation, and validates the proposal via multi-dimensional scoring, symbolic guardrails, and canary testing before commit. Every accepted edit carries full provenance and deterministic rollback capability. Across four domains and 27 multi-seed runs, ANNEAL is the only evaluated system that commits persistent structural repairs--strong baselines such as ReAct and Reflexion achieve high episodic recovery yet retain 72-100% holdout failure rates on recurring faults, whereas ANNEAL reduces these to 0% in the tested recurring-failure settings. Ablation confirms that removing FDKA eliminates all structural repairs and drops success rate by up to 26.7 percentage points. These results suggest that governed symbolic repair offers a complementary paradigm to weight-level and prompt-level adaptation for persistent fault elimination.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ANNEAL，一种神经符号代理，通过Failure-Driven Knowledge Acquisition（FDKA）机制，将重复失败转化为受控的符号化过程知识图谱编辑，实现对任务执行结构的持久修复，而无需修改基础模型权重。实验表明，其在多个领域中可将重复故障率降至0%，显著优于ReAct和Reflexion等基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM代理虽能从单次执行错误中恢复，但因底层过程知识（如操作符模式、前提条件和约束）未被修复，导致对相同故障反复失败；且当前自演化方法缺乏对符号结构的直接修复及安全部署所需的治理保障。
AI.method: 提出ANNEAL系统，核心为Failure-Driven Knowledge Acquisition（FDKA）：定位致错操作符、通过带约束的LLM生成类型化补丁、并经多维评分、符号护栏与金丝雀测试验证后提交；所有编辑均具完整溯源与确定性回滚能力。
AI.result: 在四个领域、27次多种子实验中，ANNEAL是唯一实现持久结构性修复的系统；ReAct与Reflexion等强基线虽具高单次恢复率，但在重复故障场景下仍保留72–100%的遗留失败率，而ANNEAL将其降至0%；消融实验显示移除FDKA会使结构性修复完全消失，成功率下降最高达26.7个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 受控的符号化修复为消除持久性故障提供了一种区别于权重级和提示级适应的新范式，兼具安全性与可解释性。

title: StrLoRA: Towards Streaming Continual Visual Instruction Tuning for MLLMs
summary: Continual Visual Instruction Tuning (CVIT) enables Multimodal Large Language Models to incrementally acquire new abilities. However, existing CVIT methods operate under a restrictive task-incremental setting, where each training phase corresponds to a single, predefined task. This does not reflect real-world conditions, where data arrives as a continuous stream of interleaved and dynamically evolving tasks. To bridge this gap, we introduce Streaming CVIT (StrCVIT), a more general and realistic setting where models learn from a stream of data chunks containing a dynamic mixture of tasks. In StrCVIT, a model must simultaneously acquire new abilities, reinforce recurring abilities, and mitigate forgetting. Existing CVIT methods fail here as they cannot reliably distinguish or adapt to the heterogeneous task samples within each chunk. We therefore propose StrLoRA, a regularized two-stage expert routing framework. StrLoRA first performs task-aware expert selection using the textual instruction to activate a sparse subset of relevant experts, reducing cross-task interference. It then applies token-wise expert weighting within this subset, where contribution weights are computed via cross-modal attention between local visual tokens and the global instruction representation. To maintain stability across the non-stationary stream, a routing-stability regularization aligns current routing distributions with a historical exponential moving average reference. Extensive experiments on a newly developed StrCVIT benchmark show that StrLoRA substantially outperforms existing methods, effectively enhancing model's abilities from continuously evolving data streams.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Streaming CVIT（StrCVIT）这一更贴近现实的持续视觉指令微调新范式，并设计了StrLoRA方法，通过任务感知专家选择、token级加权与路由稳定性正则化，在动态混合任务流中实现能力持续获取、强化与抗遗忘。
AI.motivation: 现有CVIT方法局限于任务增量式设定，无法应对真实场景中交错、动态演化的连续任务流；需构建更通用、现实的持续学习设定并解决其中的任务混杂、区分难与遗忘问题。
AI.method: 提出StrCVIT设定和StrLoRA框架：1）任务感知稀疏专家选择，基于文本指令激活相关专家；2）token级跨模态注意力加权，融合局部视觉token与全局指令表示；3）路由稳定性正则化，对齐当前与历史路由分布的指数滑动平均。
AI.result: 在新构建的StrCVIT基准上，StrLoRA显著超越现有CVIT方法，有效支持模型从持续演化的数据流中增强多任务能力。
AI.conclusion: StrLoRA为动态任务流下的持续视觉语言学习提供了可扩展、鲁棒且实用的解决方案，推动CVIT向真实部署场景迈进。

title: Ordered Front-to-back Any-Hit Traversal in RTX
summary: We look at the problem of Ordered Front-To-Back Any-Hit Traversal (FTB); i.e., a traversal that iterates through successive hits along a ray in a guaranteed front to back-sorted order, and without skip- ping any intersections even if they occur at the same distance. We describe multiple different ways of solving this problem within the constraints of the existing ray tracing pipeline, and evaluate the different realizations.

AI.tldr: 本文研究有序前到后任意命中遍历（FTB）问题，提出多种在现有光线追踪管线约束下实现该遍历的方法，并进行了评估。
AI.motivation: 解决光线追踪中按前到后顺序遍历所有交点（包括相同距离的交点）的问题。
AI.method: 提出了多种在现有光线追踪管线约束下实现有序前到后任意命中遍历的方法。
AI.result: 对不同实现方式进行了评估。
AI.conclusion: 提供了多种可行方案以满足有序前到后遍历需求，并分析了其在现有管线中的适用性。

title: The Impact of AI Search on the Online Content Ecosystem: Evidence from Google and Reddit
summary: Search engines traditionally complement online content platforms by directing users seeking information to external websites. The emergence of generative AI search tools that summarize answers directly on the results page may disrupt this relationship by making visits to source platforms optional. We study this question using Google AI Overviews and Reddit, one of the largest online discussion platforms. Our identification exploits Google's content moderation policy: Safe-for-Work (SFW) Reddit communities are indexed by Google organic search and surfaced in Google AI Overviews, while Not-Safe-for-Work (NSFW) communities, though indexed by organic search, are prohibited from being referenced in AI Overview summaries. Using a difference-in-differences design, we find that AI Overviews increase engagement in SFW communities: daily comments rise by 12.0 percent and the number of commenting users by 12.3 percent relative to NSFW communities. The effects are concentrated in experience-based discussions (opinions, advice, and personal experiences) rather than fact-based information. However, the subsequent introduction of Google AI Mode, which allows users to interact conversationally with the AI summary, largely eliminates these gains in experience-based content. These results suggest that the effects of AI search depend critically on interface design and types of content.

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨了生成式AI搜索工具（如Google AI Overviews）对在线内容平台（如Reddit）用户参与度的影响，发现其初期提升了SFW社区的互动，但后续AI Mode的引入削弱了该效应，表明AI搜索影响高度依赖界面设计与内容类型。
AI.motivation: 生成式AI搜索工具可能改变传统搜索引擎引导用户跳转至源平台的模式，从而影响平台流量与参与度；需实证检验其实际效应及边界条件。
AI.method: 采用双重差分法（difference-in-differences），利用Google对SFW/NSFW Reddit社区在AI Overviews中是否被引用的政策差异作为准自然实验；对比两类社区在AI Overviews上线前后的日评论数与评论用户数变化，并进一步按内容类型（经验型 vs 事实型）和AI Mode上线前后进行异质性分析。
AI.result: AI Overviews使SFW社区日评论量和评论用户数分别提升12.0%和12.3%（相对于NSFW社区）；效应主要集中于经验型讨论（意见、建议、个人经历），而非事实型信息；但Google AI Mode上线后，上述增长基本消失。
AI.conclusion: AI搜索对源平台的影响并非单向促进，而是高度依赖具体交互设计（如是否支持对话式追问）和内容性质；政策与产品迭代会显著调节其外部性。

title: Lifelong LaCAM with Local Guidance for Lifelong MAPF
summary: Local guidance has recently proven to be a powerful driver of empirical performance in real-time, suboptimal multi-agent pathfinding (MAPF), improving the scalable configuration-based solver LaCAM. By injecting informative spatiotemporal cues around each agent, local guidance mitigates congestion, reduces waiting, and remains scalable enough even with tight time budgets, yielding state-of-the-art performance for one-shot MAPF. This study asks whether the same benefits can be lifted to the lifelong setting (LMAPF), where tasks arrive continuously and improvements in per-step plans can increase task completion throughput over long horizons. We propose LLLG, a Lifelong version of LaCAM enhanced with Local Guidance, which employs a receding-horizon windowed planning framework and warm-starts guidance from the previous solution at each timestep. Our method scales effectively, maintains high throughput even in compact, dense environments, and surpasses existing planners, thereby pushing the frontier of real-time, lifelong MAPF.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LLLG，即具有局部引导的LaCAM终身版本，用于解决持续到达任务的多智能体路径规划问题（LMAPF），通过滚动时域窗口规划和热启动引导策略，在密集环境中保持高吞吐量并超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 探索局部引导在终身多智能体路径规划（LMAPF）中是否同样有效，以提升长期任务完成吞吐量。
AI.method: 提出LLLG方法，是LaCAM在LMAPF场景下的扩展，采用滚动时域窗口规划框架，并在每一步利用前一解进行引导热启动。
AI.result: LLLG在紧凑、密集环境中仍能有效扩展并维持高吞吐量，性能超越现有终身MAPF规划器。
AI.conclusion: 局部引导策略成功迁移到LMAPF场景，显著推动了实时终身多智能体路径规划的前沿发展。

title: Support-Safe Variational Hybrid Filtering for Contact-Mode and Sparse-Law Recovery
summary: Contact-rich robot dynamics are hybrid: a single observation can match several latent states and contact regimes (free, impact, stick--slip). A standard amortized filter that places no probability on a feasible contact transition will permanently lose the branch the robot actually follows. We introduce VHYDRO, a variational hybrid dynamics learner that prevents this branch loss. At each step, VHYDRO mixes the learned proposal with a feasible transition law before sampling and importance weighting, ensuring that every transition retained by the model-feasible carrier remains covered. VHYDRO jointly infers a continuous latent state and a discrete contact mode, and fits a sparse port-Hamiltonian law to each recovered regime. On top of this, three guarantees connect: support coverage stabilizes filtering, the stabilized filter concentrates the discrete contact posterior on coherent regimes, and mode-pure segments admit sparse port-Hamiltonian recovery. The recovery error separates cleanly into filtering, derivative, mode-impurity, and physics-residual parts. Three empirical findings track the same mechanism. Under heavy occlusion the support-safe filter stays usable while a non-defensive proposal collapses. On ManiSkill demonstrations and on four Sawyer/BridgeData task families the discrete state forms temporally coherent contact-regime segments that the discrete state yields a stronger joint profile across ARI, change-point F1, and segment purity than post-hoc and mode-free baselines. On hybrid systems with known equations the mode-conditioned sparse fit recovers the active physical terms; purely predictive baselines do not.

AI.tldr: 本文提出VHYDRO方法，用于解决接触丰富机器人动力学中因标准滤波器忽略可行接触转换而导致的分支丢失问题。该方法通过混合学习建议与可行转换律，在每步采样和重要性加权前确保所有模型可行的转换均被覆盖，并联合推断连续隐状态和离散接触模式，同时对每个恢复的模式拟合稀疏端口哈密顿定律。
AI.motivation: 标准摊销滤波器在面对接触丰富的机器人动力学时，可能忽略某些可行的接触转换，从而导致永久性分支丢失，影响状态估计准确性。
AI.method: VHYDRO是一种变分混合动力学学习器，它在每一步将学习到的建议分布与可行转换律混合，再进行采样和重要性加权；联合推断连续隐状态与离散接触模式，并为每个恢复的接触模式拟合稀疏端口哈密顿动力学模型。
AI.result: 实验表明：1）在严重遮挡下，支持安全滤波器仍保持可用，而无防御机制的建议则崩溃；2）在ManiSkill和Sawyer/BridgeData任务中，离散状态形成时间上连贯的接触模式段，在ARI、变点F1和段纯度指标上优于后处理及无模式基线；3）在已知方程的混合系统中，模式条件下的稀疏拟合能准确恢复活跃物理项，而纯预测基线不能。
AI.conclusion: VHYDRO通过保障支持覆盖、稳定滤波、提升离散接触后验一致性以及实现模式纯净段的稀疏物理建模，有效解决了接触丰富动力学中的分支丢失问题，并在多个基准上验证了其优越性。

title: Scaling Accessible Mathematics on arXiv: HTML Conversion and MathML 4

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了arXiv HTML Papers项目自2023年启动以来的最新进展，重点包括用户驱动的HTML保真度提升、大规模论文转换以提高错误率、MathML 4意图标注支持无障碍语音输出，以及LaTeXML向Rust迁移以降低成本并加速预览。
AI.motivation: 提升arXiv论文的可访问性、可读性与渲染质量，满足读者对现代Web标准、无障碍支持及高效服务的需求。
AI.method: 通过社区反馈驱动改进、大规模批量转换优化、引入MathML 4 Intent标注、将LaTeXML重写为Rust语言等技术手段推进HTML Papers建设。
AI.result: 截至2026年初，HTML错误率从初始水平降至75%，目标为90%；约半数用户报告问题已解决；初步实现MathML 4 Intent支持；Rust版LaTeXML正在开发中，预期降低计算成本并加快预览速度。
AI.conclusion: arXiv HTML Papers虽仍属实验性项目，但正逐步成熟，体现出对用户需求与新兴技术（如新Web标准、Rust、AI）的积极适应。

title: Reducing Credit Assignment Variance via Counterfactual Reasoning Paths
summary: Reinforcement learning for multi-step reasoning with large language models (LLMs) often relies on sparse terminal rewards, leading to poor credit assignment conditions where the final feedback is evenly propagated across all intermediate decisions. This results in high gradient variance, unstable training, and numerous ineffective updates, ultimately causing the model to fail and preventing sustained improvement. We introduce a counterfactual comparison-based credit assignment framework, which samples multiple reasoning trajectories under the same input. By treating their differences as an implicit approximation of alternative decisions, we construct an implicit process-level advantage estimator that transforms sparse terminal rewards into step-sensitive learning signals. Based on this, we propose Implicit Behavior Policy Optimization (IBPO), which significantly improves training stability and performance upper bounds on mathematical and code reasoning benchmarks, pointing to a promising direction for unlocking the performance potential of LLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于反事实比较的信用分配框架及隐式行为策略优化（IBPO）方法，以解决大语言模型在多步推理中因稀疏终端奖励导致的信用分配困难、训练不稳定等问题。
AI.motivation: 强化学习在大语言模型多步推理中常依赖稀疏终端奖励，导致信用分配差、梯度方差高、训练不稳定、无效更新多，最终模型难以持续提升。
AI.method: 提出基于反事实比较的信用分配框架：对同一输入采样多个推理轨迹，将其差异视为隐式替代决策，构建隐式过程级优势估计器，将稀疏终端奖励转化为步骤敏感的学习信号；并在此基础上提出隐式行为策略优化（IBPO）算法。
AI.result: IBPO显著提升了数学与代码推理基准上的训练稳定性与性能上限。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为释放大语言模型性能潜力提供了有前景的新方向。

title: From Prompts to Protocols: An AI Agent for Laboratory Automation
summary: Automating science laboratories enables faster, safer, more accurate, and more reproducible execution of protocols, accelerating the discovery and testing of new materials, drugs, and more. However, setting up and running autonomous labs requires coordinating numerous instruments and robots, forcing scientists to write code, manage configuration files, and navigate complex software infrastructure. We present an AI agent architecture that integrates large language models with laboratory orchestration, enabling scientists to interactively create and monitor automated lab protocols using natural language. Integrated into the Experiment Orchestration System (EOS), the AI agent operates under an agentic loop with automated validation and error correction, and supports the complete experimental lifecycle: creating protocols, running and monitoring both protocols and closed-loop optimization campaigns, and analyzing results. A visual graph editor renders protocols as interactive node-based diagrams synchronized with the AI agent's protocol representation, enabling seamless alternation between AI-assisted and manual protocol construction. Evaluated on three simulated automated labs spanning chemistry, biology, and materials science, the AI agent achieves a 97% first-attempt protocol generation success rate and an order of magnitude reduction in required interface actions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合大语言模型与实验室编排的AI智能体架构，使科学家能通过自然语言交互式创建、运行和监控自动化实验协议，并支持完整实验生命周期。
AI.motivation: 自动化科学实验室虽能提升实验效率与可重复性，但现有系统需要科学家编写代码、管理配置文件并处理复杂软件基础设施，门槛高、操作繁琐。
AI.method: 设计了一个集成大语言模型的AI智能体架构，嵌入Experiment Orchestration System（EOS），采用具身式智能体循环，具备自动验证与错误修正能力；同时开发可视化图编辑器，实现协议的节点式交互编辑与AI表征同步。
AI.result: 在化学、生物与材料科学三个模拟自动化实验室中评估，AI智能体首次生成协议成功率高达97%，界面操作次数减少一个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 该AI智能体显著降低了自动化实验的操作门槛，提升了协议构建效率与可靠性，推动了AI驱动的自主科学发现。

title: How Many Visual Tokens Do Multimodal Language Models Need? Scaling Visual Token Pruning with F^3A
summary: Vision-language models improve perception by feeding increasingly long visual token sequences into language backbones, but the resulting inference cost raises a basic scaling question: as multimodal models grow, how many visual tokens are actually needed, and how should they be allocated under a fixed visual token budget? Existing training-free pruning methods typically answer this with one-shot proxies such as decoder attention, visual similarity, or conditional diversity. We argue that visual token pruning is better viewed as task-conditioned evidence search, especially under aggressive compression and across model scales. We propose F^3A, a training-free router for visual token pruning that operates before the language model consumes image tokens. F^3A builds lightweight question-conditioned cues, matches them to visual-grid tokens through frozen sparse sensing heads, and allocates a fixed vision token budget via coarse evidence localization, local refinement, coverage-preserving competition, and recovery of under-covered regions. It requires no model training, no extra LLM forward pass and preserves the original multimodal prompting and decoding pipeline.

AI.tldr: 本文提出F^3A方法，一种无需训练的视觉令牌剪枝路由器，在语言模型处理图像令牌前工作，通过轻量级问题条件线索和冻结稀疏感知头匹配视觉网格令牌，在固定视觉令牌预算下实现粗略证据定位、局部细化、覆盖保护竞争及未覆盖区域恢复。
AI.motivation: 随着多模态模型增长，如何在固定视觉令牌预算下确定所需视觉令牌数量及其分配方式成为关键问题；现有无训练剪枝方法通常采用单次代理（如解码器注意力、视觉相似性或条件多样性），而本文认为视觉令牌剪枝应视为任务条件下的证据搜索。
AI.method: 提出F^3A，一种无需训练的视觉令牌剪枝路由器，其包含轻量级问题条件线索构建、冻结稀疏感知头匹配、粗略证据定位、局部细化、覆盖保护竞争和未覆盖区域恢复等步骤。
AI.result: F^3A无需模型训练、无需额外LLM前向传播，并保持原有图文提示与解码流程。
AI.conclusion: F^3A将视觉令牌剪枝建模为任务条件证据搜索，显著提升压缩效率与跨模型尺度鲁棒性，同时保持推理流程简洁性与兼容性。

title: Genflow Ad Studio: A Compound AI Architecture for Brand-Aligned, Self-Correcting Video Generation
comment: 6 pages, 2 figures, 2 tables. Accepted to the ACM Conference on AI and Agentic Systems (CAIS '26). Includes demo video and code repository links
summary: Recent advancements in generative video models demonstrate high visual fidelity, yet their integration into enterprise environments is restricted by temporal inconsistencies and severe brand misalignment. Current monolithic architectures struggle to enforce rigid brand constraints, frequently hallucinating unapproved visual assets. We introduce Genflow, a Compound AI System designed to enforce brand consistency in generative media production. Our architecture integrates a retrieval-based 'Brand DNA' extraction module to parameterize generation according to established corporate identity guidelines. Furthermore, we implement an Adversarial Multi-Agent Quality Control (QC) loop. Instead of a single-pass generation, this pipeline employs evaluator agents to iteratively critique generated frames against the extracted parameters, prompting generator models to refine outputs until a deterministic consensus is reached. By transitioning to a multi-stage, self-correcting pipeline, Genflow improved the yield of brand-compliant video generations from 42% to 89%, establishing a robust framework for scalable, enterprise-grade generative systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Genflow，一种用于生成式媒体生产的复合AI系统，通过品牌DNA提取模块和对抗性多智能体质量控制循环，显著提升企业级视频生成的品牌一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有生成式视频模型虽具高视觉保真度，但在企业环境中受限于时间不一致性和严重品牌错位问题，单体架构难以强制执行严格的品牌约束。
AI.method: 引入Genflow系统，包含检索式'品牌DNA'提取模块以参数化生成过程，并设计对抗性多智能体质量控制（QC）循环，通过评估智能体迭代批评与生成模型反复优化，直至达成确定性共识。
AI.result: Genflow将品牌合规视频生成成功率从42%提升至89%。
AI.conclusion: Genflow构建了可扩展、企业级的生成式系统框架，解决了品牌一致性与生成质量之间的关键矛盾。

title: LERA: LLM-Enhanced RAG for Ad Auction in Generative Chatbots
summary: The integration of advertising auction mechanisms into large language model (LLM)-based chatbots presents a significant opportunity for commercialization, yet poses unique challenges in balancing relevance, efficiency, and user experience. Recently, Feizi et al.~\citep{feizi2023online} and Hajiaghayi et al.~\citep{hajiaghayi2024ad} outlined a retrieve-then-generate paradigm that decouples retrieval and generation, offering lightweight ad insertion and payment determination. However, current retrieval relies solely on text embedding similarity, which may lead to commercial misinterpretation and issues such as repetitive insertions. In this paper, we propose LERA, a two-stage retrieve-then-generate auction framework tailored for LLM chatbots. In the first stage, embedding-based coarse filtering pre-selects a small set of candidate advertisers. In the second stage, the LLM itself is queried with a carefully designed prompt to produce logits over candidates, which serve as refined organic relevance scores. These scores are combined with bids, and a critical-value payment rule accounts for both the coarse-filtering and fine-ranking thresholds, ensuring truthfulness for utility-maximizing advertisers. The framework naturally extends to multiple ad insertions within dynamic dialogue flows and long responses. Experiments on a synthetic advertiser-query benchmark show that LERA substantially improves ad selection accuracy and insertion diversity while incurring only controllable latency overhead.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LERA框架，一种专为LLM聊天机器人设计的两阶段检索-生成广告拍卖机制，通过嵌入粗筛与LLM细排结合提升广告相关性与多样性，并保证拍卖真实性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于文本嵌入相似度的广告检索易导致商业误读和重复插入，难以在LLM聊天场景中兼顾相关性、效率与用户体验。
AI.method: 提出两阶段LERA框架：第一阶段用嵌入进行粗筛；第二阶段用LLM对候选广告打分（logits作为有机相关性得分），结合出价与考虑双阈值的关键值支付规则实现真实拍卖。
AI.result: 在合成广告主-查询基准上，LERA显著提升了广告选择准确率与插入多样性，且延迟可控。
AI.conclusion: LERA为LLM聊天机器人中的广告集成提供了一种高效、真实、可扩展的拍卖解决方案，支持多广告插入与动态对话流。

title: PyraVid: Hierarchical Multimodal Memory for Long-Horizon Video Reasoning
summary: Memory has become an increasingly important component of agentic systems, as these systems are expected to reason over long-term experience. However, prior work has largely focused on unimodal memory, leaving multimodal memory relatively underexplored despite its central role in real-world applications. Compared with unimodal settings, multimodal memory introduces additional challenges, including heterogeneous input integration, person-centric information alignment, and evidence aggregation across different granularities. We present PyraVid, a hierarchical multimodal memory framework inspired by Event Segmentation Theory from cognitive science. PyraVid organizes long videos into a coarse-to-fine pyramid structure, enabling structured memory access and effective evidence aggregation. It further supports structure-guided memory expansion with pruning, allowing the retrieval of related events with strong causal connectivity but low semantic similarity while reducing noise. Experiments on multiple long-video understanding benchmarks show that PyraVid consistently improves performance across datasets, model scales, and question types, highlighting the effectiveness of hierarchical multimodal memory for long-horizon reasoning.

AI.tldr: PyraVid提出一种受认知科学事件分割理论启发的分层多模态记忆框架，用于长视频理解，通过金字塔结构实现结构化记忆访问与证据聚合，并支持结构引导的记忆扩展与剪枝，显著提升长时程推理性能。
AI.motivation: 现有工作多聚焦于单模态记忆，而多模态记忆在真实场景中至关重要却研究不足；多模态记忆面临异构输入融合、以人为中心的信息对齐及跨粒度证据聚合等挑战。
AI.method: 提出PyraVid框架：基于事件分割理论构建粗到细的视频金字塔结构；支持结构引导的记忆扩展与剪枝，以检索高因果关联但低语义相似的事件并抑制噪声。
AI.result: 在多个长视频理解基准上，PyraVid在不同数据集、模型规模和问题类型下均一致提升性能。
AI.conclusion: 分层多模态记忆能有效支撑长时程推理，PyraVid为多模态具身智能系统的记忆建模提供了新范式。

title: SCAR: Self-Supervised Continuous Action Representation Learning
summary: Despite the central role of action in embodied intelligence, learning transferable action representations from visual transitions remains a fundamental challenge, particularly when world models must generalize across embodiments under limited data. We argue that action is not merely an auxiliary conditioning signal, but a distinct representational factor that decouples the controllable change from embodiment-specific actuation. In this work, we propose SCAR, a joint inverse-forward dynamics framework for learning unified action representations across embodiments from visual transitions. Built on a pretrained generative backbone, SCAR uses an inverse dynamics model (IDM) to infer latent actions from latent observation pairs and a forward dynamics model (FDM) to predict future dynamics conditioned on them. To make the latent space transferable rather than a generic visual bottleneck, we regularize the latent action posterior toward a standard Gaussian prior to limit arbitrary visual encoding, and introduce adversarial invariance to suppress embodiment- and environment-specific nuisance factors. Experiments on the Procgen and Robotwin dataset show that the learned unified latent action representation serves as a stronger conditioning interface for world modeling than embodiment-specific raw actions, yielding improved cross-embodiment low-data adaptation and cross-task transfer. Taken together, these results suggest that action can be learned as a shared representation of controllable change across embodiments, providing an interface for more transferable and generalizable world models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SCAR框架，通过联合逆向-前向动力学建模，从视觉状态转移中学习跨形态的统一动作表征，强调动作作为可控制变化的独立表示因子，并在Procgen和Robotwin数据集上验证其提升世界模型泛化与低数据适应能力。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以从视觉状态转移中学习可迁移的动作表征，尤其在世界模型需跨不同形态泛化且数据有限时；作者认为动作不应仅是辅助条件信号，而应是解耦可控变化与形态特异性执行的独立表示因子。
AI.method: 提出SCAR框架：基于预训练生成主干网络，结合逆动力学模型（IDM）从隐空间观测对推断隐动作，以及前向动力学模型（FDM）以该隐动作预测未来动态；引入标准高斯先验正则化隐动作后验分布，并采用对抗不变性抑制形态与环境相关干扰因素。
AI.result: 在Procgen和Robotwin数据集上实验表明，所学统一隐动作表征比形态特异性原始动作更优地作为世界建模的条件输入，显著提升跨形态低数据适应与跨任务迁移性能。
AI.conclusion: 动作可被学习为一种跨形态共享的可控变化表征，为构建更具迁移性与泛化性的世界模型提供新接口。

title: Beyond Sentiment Classification: A Generative Framework for Emotion Intensity Evaluation in Text
summary:
We introduce a novel approach to emotion modeling that shifts the focus from
  identification to evaluation, addressing the limitations of discrete classification in
  applied domains such as finance. By constructing a dataset of emotional intensity
  scores and fine-tuning open-weight generative language models to output continuous
  values from 0-100, we demonstrate a more expressive, generalizable framework for
  sentiment and emotion analysis. Our findings not only outperform classification
  baselines but also reveal surprising generalization capabilities and transfer effects
  to related constructs such as sentiment and arousal. This work contributes to the
  interdisciplinary recontextualization of NLP by introducing emotion intensity
  evaluation as an alternative to classification, arguing that this shift better aligns
  with the needs of domains--such as finance--where the degree of emotional content is
  central to interpretation and decision-making.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的情绪建模方法，将焦点从情绪识别转向情绪强度评估，通过构建情绪强度评分数据集并微调开源大语言模型输出0-100连续值，在金融等应用领域展现出比离散分类更优的表达力和泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 离散情绪分类在金融等实际应用领域存在局限性，难以刻画情绪程度对解释和决策的关键作用。
AI.method: 构建情绪强度评分数据集，并对开源生成式语言模型进行微调，使其输出0-100范围内的连续情绪强度值。
AI.result: 新方法不仅超越了传统分类基线，还展现出对情感、唤醒度等相关构念的意外泛化与迁移能力。
AI.conclusion: 情绪强度评估可作为分类的替代范式，推动NLP在跨学科应用中更贴合实际需求，尤其适用于情绪程度至关重要的领域（如金融）。

title: SignMuon: Communication-Efficient Distributed Muon Optimization
summary:
Distributed training of large neural networks is bottlenecked by full-precision gradient communication and by coordinatewise optimizers that ignore the matrix structure of weight tensors. We propose Sign-Muon, a 1-bit, matrix-aware optimizer that combines majority-vote sign aggregation from signSGD with the polar-step framework of Muon. Each worker forms a Muon-style direction by taking the polar factor of its momentum via a Newton--Schulz iteration, transmits only the entrywise signs, and aggregates by majority vote; an optional local polar step further enforces orthogonality at no extra communication cost.
  Under spectral-norm smoothness and bounded-variance stochastic gradients, the spectral-norm normalized sign step yields an $\mathcal{O}(1/\sqrt{T})$ nonconvex rate for an $\ell_1$-based stationarity measure. With unimodal symmetric noise, majority vote across $M$ workers cuts the stochastic term by $1/\sqrt{M}$, matching signSGD. In the $α$-$β$ model, distributed Sign-Muon needs only one integer sum-allreduce per iteration; all orthogonalization is local, giving a $32\times$ bandwidth reduction over float32 ($4\times$ for int8).
  Across 330 CIFAR-10/ResNet-50 configurations Sign-Muon attains the best validation accuracy (92.15\%); its 4-GPU majority-vote variant reaches 92.02\% with 37\% less training time at matched effective batch. On nanoGPT, Sign-Muon achieves lower perplexity and better anytime performance than other sign-based baselines, with favorable weak-scaling up to 16 GPUs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Sign-Muon，一种1比特、矩阵感知的分布式优化器，结合signSGD的符号聚合与Muon的极分解思想，在保持通信高效性的同时提升优化性能。
AI.motivation: 分布式训练大型神经网络受限于全精度梯度通信开销及忽略权重张量矩阵结构的传统坐标式优化器。
AI.method: Sign-Muon每个worker通过Newton-Schulz迭代计算动量的极因子（矩阵正交方向），仅传输符号（1-bit），并以多数投票方式聚合；可选本地极步进一步增强正交性，且不增加通信开销。
AI.result: 理论证明其在非凸情形下达到O(1/√T)收敛率；实验表明在CIFAR-10/ResNet-50上取得最高验证准确率（92.15%），4-GPU版本提速37%；在nanoGPT上优于其他符号优化器，弱扩展性达16 GPU。
AI.conclusion: Sign-Muon在显著降低通信带宽（float32下32倍）的同时，兼顾优化质量与训练效率，验证了矩阵感知与1比特通信协同设计的有效性。

title: Skim: Speculative Execution for Fast and Efficient Web Agents
summary: Skim is a speculative execution framework for web agents that exploits the predictable structure of purpose-built websites. Today's web-agent expense is not intrinsic to the tasks but a property of how agents are composed: frontier-model inference, browser rendering, and ReAct-style planning are applied to every step of every task regardless of complexity. Skim's key observation is that websites enforce stable URL patterns, answer formats, and task-to-trajectory mappings across queries of the same type, so most queries can bypass these heavyweight components entirely. An offline profiler captures these patterns once per site. At runtime, Skim matches each query to a template, synthesizes the destination URL, and extracts the answer with a small model. A lightweight verifier gates each fast-path output against the query and schema; rare misspeculations cascade to the full agent, warm-started by the fast path's final URL to preserve upstream trajectory progress. Across standard web-agent benchmarks paired with three backboneagents (WebVoyager, AgentOccam, BrowserUse), Skim reduces median per-task cost by 1.9x and latency by 33.4% with no accuracy loss.

AI.tldr: Skim是一种面向网页代理的推测执行框架，利用专用网站结构的可预测性，通过离线建模和在线快速路径匹配，在不损失准确率的前提下显著降低推理成本与延迟。
AI.motivation: 当前网页代理的高开销并非任务本身固有，而是源于对每个步骤都重复调用大模型推理、浏览器渲染和ReAct式规划等重型组件，缺乏对网站结构规律性的利用。
AI.method: Skim首先通过离线分析器捕获网站稳定的URL模式、答案格式和任务到轨迹映射；运行时将查询匹配至模板，直接合成目标URL并用小模型提取答案；再以轻量验证器校验结果，失败则回退至完整代理（且以快速路径得到的URL热启动）。
AI.result: 在多个标准网页代理基准上，结合WebVoyager、AgentOccam和BrowserUse三种主干代理，Skim将中位单任务成本降低1.9倍、延迟降低33.4%，且准确率无损。
AI.conclusion: 网站结构的高度规律性可被系统性利用以实现高效推测执行，Skim证明了在保持精度前提下大幅削减网页代理资源消耗的可行性与有效性。

title: Fre-Res: Frequency-Residual Video Token Compression for Efficient Video MLLMs
summary: Video MLLMs face a persistent tension between spatial fidelity and temporal coverage: preserving fine-grained visual details requires many spatial tokens, while capturing short-lived events requires dense temporal sampling. We propose \textbf{Fre-Res}, a budget-adaptive dual-track video-token compression framework that separates these two forms of evidence. Fre-Res preserves sparse high-fidelity spatial anchors and represents dense temporal evolution through compact residual-frequency tokens. Specifically, it applies temporal 1D-DCT to inter-frame residual trajectories in vision-latent space, where we observe strong low-frequency concentration. To align frequency-domain dynamics with native visual embeddings, Fre-Res introduces a Spatial-Guided Absorber that injects temporal residual information into spatially corresponding anchor tokens. Across fine-grained short-video and long-video reasoning benchmarks, Fre-Res achieves a favorable accuracy--efficiency trade-off, matching or approaching full-token performance while substantially reducing visual-token length. Extensive ablations further show that temporal-frequency residuals preserve causal transition cues, while spatial anchors remain essential for fine-grained object and layout reasoning.

AI.tldr: Fre-Res是一种预算自适应的双轨视频标记压缩框架，通过分离空间保真度与时间覆盖需求，在保持高精度的同时显著减少视觉标记数量。
AI.motivation: 解决视频多模态大语言模型中空间保真度与时间覆盖率之间的固有张力：高空间细节需大量空间标记，而捕捉瞬时事件需密集时间采样。
AI.method: 提出Fre-Res框架：保留稀疏高保真空间锚点，并利用视觉隐空间中帧间残差轨迹的一维离散余弦变换（1D-DCT）生成紧凑的残差频率标记；引入空间引导吸收器（Spatial-Guided Absorber）将频率域时序信息注入对应空间锚点。
AI.result: 在细粒度短/长视频推理基准上，Fre-Res在准确率-效率权衡上表现优异，达到或接近全标记性能，同时大幅缩短视觉标记长度；消融实验证明残差频率成分保留因果过渡线索，空间锚点对细粒度物体与布局推理不可或缺。
AI.conclusion: Fre-Res有效解耦时空建模，为视频MLLM提供高效且语义完整的压缩范式。

title: QuadLink: Autoregressive Quad-Dominant Mesh Generation via Point-Relation Learning
summary: The generation of production-ready quad-dominant meshes is a cornerstone of modern 3D content creation. Generating anisotropic quad-dominant meshes from point clouds is challenging, as existing methods are typically limited to producing either pure triangular meshes or pure quadrilateral meshes with isotropic densities. In this paper, we present QuadLink, a unified framework consisting of three stages for quad-dominant mesh generation by linking points into structured faces. QuadLink formulates polygonal mesh generation as a hybrid centroid-conditioned vertex linking model: it first predicts a unified set of anchors (vertices and face centroids), then learns centroid-conditioned links that associate vertices with face centroids, and finally assembles polygonal faces with a quad-first strategy guided by robust geometric verification strategies. This link-based formulation enables efficient generation of sparse and anisotropic quad-dominant meshes with coherent edge flow and meanwhile supporting hybrid polygonal topology. To construct training data for this model, we further introduce a Tri-to-Quad Operator that converts artistic triangle meshes into quad-dominant training data via global merge selection. Extensive experiments show that QuadLink produces production-ready quad-dominant meshes from point clouds and achieves improved geometric fidelity and topological quality compared to prior baselines. Our method natively supports hybrid polygonal topology, generalizing to arbitrary n-gon meshes without architectural changes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出QuadLink框架，通过三阶段链接点生成四边形主导网格，支持各向异性与混合多边形拓扑，显著提升几何保真度与拓扑质量。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以从点云生成生产就绪、各向异性的四边形主导网格，通常仅能生成纯三角或各向同性四边形网格。
AI.method: 提出QuadLink统一框架：1）预测顶点与面中心锚点；2）学习以面中心为条件的顶点链接关系；3）采用‘四边形优先’策略并结合几何验证组装面；同时引入Tri-to-Quad算子构建训练数据。
AI.result: 在点云上生成高质量、稀疏、各向异性且具有连贯边流的四边形主导网格，几何保真度与拓扑质量优于基线方法，并原生支持任意n边形混合拓扑。
AI.conclusion: QuadLink为点云到四边形主导网格的生成提供了高效、灵活且鲁棒的新范式，适用于实际3D内容生产。

title: Policy-Grounded Dynamic Facet Suggestions for Job Search
summary: Job seekers often initiate search with short, underspecified queries. At LinkedIn, over 80% of job-related queries contain three or fewer keywords, making accurate user intent inference and relevant job retrieval particularly challenging. We present dynamic facet suggestion (DFS), an interactive query refinement mechanism that facilitates intent disambiguation by surfacing personalized semantic attributes conditioned on the joint user-query context in real time. We propose a policy-grounded, retrieval-augmented ranking framework for facet suggestion, comprising offline taxonomy curation, embedding-based retrieval of top-K candidates, and distilled small language model (SLM) based candidate scoring. The system is optimized for real-time serving via pointwise single-token scoring with batching and prefix caching. Offline evaluation demonstrates high precision for generated suggestions, and online A/B tests show significant improvements in suggestion engagement and job search outcomes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出动态面建议（DFS）机制，通过实时个性化语义属性推荐来帮助求职者在简短查询下明确搜索意图，提升职位检索效果。
AI.motivation: 求职者常使用简短（三词以内）且信息不足的查询，导致意图推断和相关职位召回困难；LinkedIn中此类查询占比超80%。
AI.method: 提出基于策略引导、检索增强的面建议排序框架，包括离线分类体系构建、嵌入式检索Top-K候选、蒸馏小型语言模型（SLM）打分，并采用单token点式评分、批处理与前缀缓存优化实时服务性能。
AI.result: 离线评估显示建议精度高；线上A/B测试显著提升了建议点击率及职位搜索效果（如申请转化等）。
AI.conclusion: DFS机制能有效支持短查询下的意图细化，结合检索与轻量语言模型，在保证实时性的同时显著改善用户搜索体验与结果质量。

title: Multi-LLM Systems Exhibit Robust Semantic Collapse
comment: 64 pages, 8 figures, 7 tables; includes Supplementary Information
summary: Whether machines can originate novel content has been debated for nearly two centuries, from Lovelace's assertion that no engine can "originate anything" to Turing's question of whether a machine can amplify ideas brought in from outside. Multi-large language model (LLM) systems, increasingly deployed for autonomous generation, reopen this question empirically. Here we show that such systems, operating in closed loops, exhibit semantic collapse: systematic convergence in semantic representations despite apparent lexical variation. Across model families, extended simulations of 200 to 1,000 rounds, the pattern remains consistent. Twelve intervention strategies, spanning decoding parameters, prompt design, agent composition, activation engineering, and reinforcement learning, fail to restore semantic diversity. Mechanistic analyses suggest that semantic collapse is not explained by alignment or conformity biases, but is consistent with intrinsic properties of autoregressive generation. Our results point to fundamental constraints in the ability of multi-LLM systems to sustain open-ended knowledge production in closed-loop settings.

AI.tldr: 本文研究多大型语言模型（LLM）系统在闭环自主生成中是否能持续产生新颖语义内容，发现其普遍存在‘语义坍缩’现象——即尽管词汇表面多样，语义表征却系统性趋同；多种干预策略均无法缓解该问题，表明这是自回归生成的内在限制，对AI驱动的开放知识生产构成根本约束。
AI.motivation: 探讨机器能否真正原创内容这一经典问题在多LLM闭环系统中的实证表现，回应Lovelace与Turing关于机器创造力的长期争论。
AI.method: 通过跨模型家族的长周期（200–1000轮）闭环模拟实验，系统观测语义表征演化；测试12类干预策略（解码参数、提示设计、智能体架构、激活工程、强化学习等）；结合机制分析排除对齐/从众偏差，聚焦自回归生成本质。
AI.result: 所有实验均一致出现语义坍缩：语义多样性随迭代急剧下降，而词汇变化掩盖了深层同质化；12种干预均无效；机制分析表明该现象源于自回归建模的固有缺陷，而非外部偏差。
AI.conclusion: 多LLM闭环系统存在根本性局限，难以支撑可持续的开放知识生产；语义坍缩是自回归生成的内在属性，提示需重新思考AI原创性的理论边界与系统设计范式。

title: MR-SLAM: Immersive Spatial Supervision for Multi-Robot Mapping via Mixed Reality
comment: Accepted to ICRA 2026 Workshop "MM-SpatialAI Workshop: Multi-Modal Spatial AI for Robust Navigation and Open-World Understanding"
summary: Operating a multi-robot fleet for simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) in applications such as building inspection or warehouse-aisle monitoring requires the operator to maintain spatial awareness of each robot's position and mapping state, a task that scales poorly on conventional 2D interfaces. We present MR-SLAM, a mixed reality (MR) system in which an operator wearing a Meta Quest 3 headset teleoperates three simulated TurtleBot3 robots through a passthrough view with real-world occlusion, while spatially anchored dashboard panels report mapping progress in situ. Each robot runs an independent SLAM Toolbox instance whose occupancy grid is merged in real time on a Robot Operating System 2 (ROS 2) back end. Across five 9-minute evaluation sessions, the system delivered scans at 8.83 +/- 0.16 Hz, mapped 17.9 +/- 0.8 m^2 of merged occupancy, and reached 94.7 +/- 0.5% cross-instance occupancy consistency across robot pairs. An additional session recorded 6.3 ms median transform jitter and 26.7 m^2 coverage of a 41 m^2 grid. We position MR-SLAM as a reference implementation for combining passthrough mixed reality supervision with multi-robot SLAM on consumer hardware.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MR-SLAM系统，利用Meta Quest 3头显实现多机器人SLAM的混合现实远程监控与操作，通过空间锚定仪表板实时显示各机器人建图状态，并在ROS 2后端融合多机器人SLAM结果；实验表明其具备高帧率扫描、良好地图一致性与低延迟变换性能。
AI.motivation: 传统2D界面难以支持操作员对多机器人SLAM系统的空间态势感知，尤其在建筑巡检或仓库通道监测等场景中扩展性差。
AI.method: 开发基于Meta Quest 3的混合现实系统MR-SLAM，采用直通式（passthrough）视图并支持真实世界遮挡；三台仿真TurtleBot3各自运行独立SLAM Toolbox，其占用栅格地图在ROS 2后端实时融合；仪表板以空间锚定方式在MR中显示建图进度。
AI.result: 五次9分钟评估中，系统扫描频率达8.83±0.16 Hz，融合建图面积17.9±0.8 m²，机器人两两间占用一致性达94.7±0.5%；另一次测试中变换抖动中位数为6.3 ms，覆盖41 m²区域中的26.7 m²。
AI.conclusion: MR-SLAM是首个在消费级MR硬件上融合直通式混合现实监督与多机器人SLAM的可复现参考实现，验证了该范式在实际部署中的可行性与性能优势。

title: SKG-Eval: Stateful Evaluation of Multi-Turn Dialogue via Incremental Semantic Knowledge Graphs
summary: Evaluating multi-turn dialogue systems remains challenging because response quality depends not only on the current prompt, but also on previously established entities, claims, and conversational commitments. Existing automatic evaluators, including LLM-as-a-judge frameworks and embedding-based metrics, largely rely on flat or turn-isolated representations, making them less effective at detecting long-range issues such as contradiction, topic drift, and entity inconsistency. To address this, we propose SKG-Eval, a quasi-deterministic and interpretable framework that models dialogue as an evolving Semantic Knowledge Graph (SKG) of entities, relations, and commitments across turns. The framework incrementally updates the graph through structured triple extraction and computes three complementary signals: (i) local relevance, measuring alignment with the current prompt and optional reference; (ii) historical consistency, evaluating how newly introduced information connects to prior conversational context using graph-based and embedding-driven signals; and (iii) logical coherence, assessed by a geometric contradiction engine that detects cross-turn conflicts without relying on NLI models or LLM judges. These signals are adaptively fused and aggregated into a length-invariant session score via recency-weighted trend analysis. Across multiple benchmarks, SKG-Eval achieves higher correlation with human judgments and substantially improves detection of long-range inconsistencies in extended conversations. In addition, the framework produces explicit contradiction certificates and deterministic scores for fixed inputs, enabling reproducible and auditable evaluation. Overall, our results suggest that structured externalized state tracking through semantic knowledge graphs provides a scalable alternative to implicit reasoning in LLM-based dialogue evaluators.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SKG-Eval框架，通过构建并动态更新语义知识图谱（SKG）来评估多轮对话系统，从局部相关性、历史一致性与逻辑连贯性三方面量化响应质量，显著提升对长程不一致（如矛盾、话题漂移、实体冲突）的检测能力，并支持可解释、可复现的评估。
AI.motivation: 现有自动评估方法（如LLM-as-a-judge、嵌入式指标）多基于扁平化或单轮建模，难以有效捕捉多轮对话中的长程问题（如跨轮矛盾、话题漂移、实体不一致）。
AI.method: 提出SKG-Eval：将对话建模为动态演化的语义知识图谱（SKG），通过结构化三元组抽取增量更新图谱；计算三个互补信号——（i）局部相关性、（ii）历史一致性（结合图结构与嵌入）、（iii）逻辑连贯性（基于几何矛盾引擎）；最后通过时效加权趋势分析融合为长度无关的会话级分数。
AI.result: 在多个基准上，SKG-Eval与人工评分相关性更高，显著提升长程不一致检测能力；生成明确的矛盾证明和确定性分数，支持可复现、可审计评估。
AI.conclusion: 利用外部化、结构化的语义知识图谱进行状态跟踪，是替代大模型隐式推理的一种可扩展、可解释的对话评估新范式。

title: When Actions Disappear: Adversarial Action Removal in Self-Play Reinforcement Learning
summary: We study adversarial action masking in self-play reinforcement learning: an attacker selectively removes legal actions from a victim's action set. Unlike observation or action perturbations, removal eliminates decision options before the agent acts. Across poker games scaling from 6 to 5,531 information states and two non-poker domains, learned masking causes substantially more damage than random masking and learned perturbation baselines. The attack persists across Q-learning, PPO, NFSP, neural NFSP, and DQN victims; transfers across agents; is amplified by self-play; and shows no recovery under extended masked training. Mechanistically, the adversary targets high-value decision points, captured by reach-weighted contingent action capacity (CAC$_w$) and a value-weighted refinement CAC$_v$. These results identify action availability as a distinct robustness surface in self-play RL.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了自博弈强化学习中的对抗性动作掩蔽攻击，即攻击者选择性地从受害者动作集中移除合法动作，从而在智能体决策前就消除其可选动作。实验表明，该攻击比随机掩蔽和扰动基线造成更大损害，并具有跨算法、跨智能体、自博弈增强及难以通过再训练恢复等特性；机制分析揭示攻击聚焦于高价值决策点，提出可达加权与价值加权的动作容量指标（CAC_w 和 CAC_v）刻画该现象。
AI.motivation: 动作可用性是自博弈强化学习中一个被忽视但关键的鲁棒性维度，现有对抗攻击多关注观测或动作扰动，而动作掩蔽直接剥夺决策选项，需系统研究其威胁性与机制。
AI.method: 设计并训练对抗性动作掩蔽器，在自博弈RL中对受害者智能体（如Q-learning、PPO、NFSP等）动态移除合法动作；引入reach-weighted CAC_w和value-weighted CAC_v量化关键决策点，分析攻击机制；在扑克（6–5531信息状态）及两个非扑克领域进行泛化性与鲁棒性验证。
AI.result: 学习到的掩蔽攻击显著劣于随机掩蔽与扰动基线；攻击效果跨多种RL算法、不同智能体间可迁移；在自博弈中被放大；延长掩蔽下训练无法恢复性能；机制上精准定位高价值决策点。
AI.conclusion: 动作可用性构成自博弈RL中一个独立且关键的鲁棒性表面，对抗性动作掩蔽是一种新型、强效且难以防御的威胁，需在算法设计与评估中显式考虑。

title: Scalable Uncertainty Reasoning in Knowledge Graphs
comment: 14 pages. Preprint of a paper accepted at the ESWC 2026 PhD Symposium
