summary: Knowledge Graphs are pivotal for semantic data integration. The real-world data they model is often inherently uncertain. Within knowledge graphs, uncertainty manifests in three distinct levels: imprecise attribute values, probabilistic triple existence, and incomplete schema knowledge. However, current Semantic Web standards lack native support for reasoning over such uncertainty, and naïve extensions often incur computational intractability. In this thesis, I aim to develop a modular framework that addresses each level through tailored techniques: (1) defining probabilistic literals and a corresponding query algebra for continuous attributes; (2) a compilation-based framework transforming SPARQL provenance into tractable probabilistic circuits for uncertain triples; and (3) topology-aware geometric embeddings for statistical schema reasoning. The central hypothesis is that specialized reasoning mechanisms, namely algebraic, logical, and geometric approaches, can reconcile semantic precision with computational tractability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个模块化框架，针对知识图谱中三种不同层次的不确定性（属性值模糊性、三元组存在概率性、模式知识不完整性）分别设计代数、逻辑和几何方法进行推理，以兼顾语义精确性与计算可行性。
AI.motivation: 现实世界数据固有的不确定性在知识图谱中表现为三个层次，而当前语义网标准缺乏对不确定性的原生支持，简单扩展又易导致计算难解。
AI.method: 采用模块化策略：(1) 定义概率字面量及对应连续属性查询代数；(2) 基于编译的框架，将SPARQL溯源转化为易处理的概率电路以处理不确定三元组；(3) 拓扑感知的几何嵌入用于统计模式推理。
AI.result: 构建了一个能分别应对三类不确定性的可扩展、可追踪且计算可行的推理框架。
AI.conclusion: 针对不同层次的不确定性采用专门化的代数、逻辑与几何推理机制，可在保持语义精度的同时实现计算上的可处理性。

title: GeoSym127K: Scalable Symbolically-verifiable Synthesis for Multimodal Geometric Reasoning
summary: Large Multimodal Models (LMMs) often struggle with geometric reasoning due to visual hallucinations and a lack of mathematically precise Chain-of-Thought (CoT) data. To address this, we propose the GeoSym Engine, an automated and scalable neuro-symbolic framework. By leveraging a type-conditional grammar and an analytic SymGT Solver, it derives exact symbolic ground truths and seamlessly integrates with a robust rendering pipeline to produce high-precision geometric diagrams. Using this engine, we construct GeoSym127K, a difficulty-stratified dataset featuring 51K high-resolution images, 127K questions with symbolic ground truths, and 55K answer-verified CoT QA pairs. We also introduce GeoSym-Bench, an expert-curated suite of 511 complex samples for rigorous evaluation. Through extensive supervised fine-tuning (SFT), we demonstrate that GeoSym drives concentrated improvements specifically on diagram-dependent and multi-step geometry tasks. Our Qwen3-VL-8B model gains an absolute +22.21% on the MathVerse Vision-Only subset and reaches 61.52% (+6.19% improvement) on WeMath, mitigating long-horizon logic fragmentation and outperforming advanced closed-source models like Doubao-1.8. Furthermore, applying Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) via GRPO reveals that initializing from structural SFT checkpoints substantially elevates the performance ceiling over zero-shot RL. Driven by deterministic exact-match signals, this showcases the robust scaling potential of our verifiable reasoning synthesis. Datasets and code are available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/Tomie0506/GeoSym127K and https://github.com/Tomie56/GeoSym127K.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GeoSym Engine，一种自动、可扩展的神经符号框架，用于生成高精度几何图表和符号真值数据集GeoSym127K及评测基准GeoSym-Bench；通过监督微调与可验证奖励强化学习（RLVR），显著提升大模型在几何推理任务上的性能，尤其在多步、图依赖任务中效果突出。
AI.motivation: 大型多模态模型（LMMs）在几何推理中常因视觉幻觉和缺乏数学精确的思维链（CoT）数据而表现不佳。
AI.method: 提出GeoSym Engine，结合类型条件语法与解析式SymGT求解器生成符号真值，并集成高精度渲染管线；构建分层难度的GeoSym127K数据集（含图像、问题、符号答案与验证CoT）和专家设计的GeoSym-Bench评测集；采用监督微调（SFT）与基于GRPO的可验证奖励强化学习（RLVR）进行模型优化。
AI.result: Qwen3-VL-8B模型在MathVerse Vision-Only子集上绝对提升+22.21%，WeMath上达61.52%（+6.19%）；RLVR以结构化SFT检查点初始化后性能上限显著提高；验证了确定性精确匹配信号驱动的可验证推理合成具备强扩展潜力。
AI.conclusion: GeoSym Engine及其配套数据集与训练范式有效缓解了几何推理中的视觉幻觉与长程逻辑碎片化问题，为LMMs的数学推理能力提供了可验证、可扩展的神经符号增强路径。

title: A Single Atlas is All You Need: Decoder-Side Gaussian Splatting for Immersive Video
summary: Immersive video delivery is bottlenecked by pixel-rate constraints, making the transmission of high-resolution depth maps or explicit 3D volumetric data expensive. Decoder-Side Depth Estimation (DSDE) shifts depth computation to the client, but struggles with complex geometries, inter-view flickering, and non-Lambertian reflections. Conversely, 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) offers state-of-the-art view synthesis, but transmitting splats (or their projected 2D maps) incurs prohibitive bandwidth costs and is poorly aligned with standard video codecs. We propose Decoder-Side Gaussian Splatting (DSGS), a framework that natively replaces the depth-estimation stage of DSDE with feed-forward 3DGS inference, optimizing volumetric scenes entirely on the decoder side from compressed textures and metadata. A central, counterintuitive finding is that lossy compression acts as an implicit low-pass filter stabilizing feed-forward splat prediction: compressed bitstreams exceed lossless quality while shrinking tenfold. Under extreme view sparsity (one 2D atlas comprising 4 input views), DSGS achieves a +5.79 dB BD-PSNR and +0.054 BD-SSIM gain over the DSDE anchor while reducing maximum inter-view Delta IV-PSNR from 17.2 dB to 6.4 dB, minimizing the domain shift between transmitted and virtual viewports.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Decoder-Side Gaussian Splatting（DSGS），将3D高斯泼溅（3DGS）推理迁移至解码端，替代传统解码端深度估计（DSDE），利用压缩纹理与元数据在客户端重建高质量视图；意外发现有损压缩可作为隐式低通滤波器提升预测稳定性，使压缩码流质量反超无损，并显著改善视图一致性与合成质量。
AI.motivation: 解决沉浸式视频传输中因像素率限制导致的高分辨率深度图或体素数据传输开销大问题；同时克服DSDE在复杂几何、跨视图闪烁和非朗伯反射上的缺陷，以及3DGS因传输开销大、难适配标准视频编码而难以实用的瓶颈。
AI.method: 提出DSGS框架，在解码端直接进行前馈式3D高斯泼溅推理，以替代DSDE中的深度估计模块；输入为标准视频编码压缩后的纹理和轻量元数据，端到端优化体场景重建；利用有损压缩的隐式低通滤波效应提升预测鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在极稀疏视角（仅4个输入视图构成1个2D图集）下，相比DSDE基线，BD-PSNR提升+5.79 dB，BD-SSIM提升+0.054，最大跨视图Delta IV-PSNR从17.2 dB降至6.4 dB；压缩码流质量反超无损，体积缩小十倍。
AI.conclusion: DSGS实现了高质量、低带宽、编解码友好的沉浸式视频新范式，验证了解码端执行复杂3D渲染推理的可行性与优势，尤其适用于极端视角受限与带宽敏感场景。

title: RAPT: Retrieval-Augmented Post-hoc Thresholding for Multi-Label Classification
summary: Industrial multi-label document understanding pipelines score candidate labels and threshold or rank them to form a label set per document. This early selection step directly affects the accuracy of downstream information extraction from the document, as well as the associated verification effort. In practice, OCR noise, label imbalance, instance-dependent label cardinality, and asymmetric error costs make global score thresholds brittle and hard to maintain as document formats evolve. We present RAPT, a deployment-oriented retrieval-augmented score thresholding wrapper, applied post-hoc to improve label set selection without retraining the underlying classifier. RAPT is a model-agnostic wrapper: any predictor that provides document representations for similarity search and per label confidence scores can be used, including metric learning encoders and fine-tuned transformer classifiers. For each query document, given a classifier's score vector, RAPT retrieves similar document thresholding situations (cases) and adapts the query's label set selection threshold using their outcomes. The adaptation selects the final label set by locally aggregating neighbour solutions (e.g. average label count, cutoff calibration). Evaluation compared multi-label classifiers (metric learners and transformers) combined with RAPT against global and label-wise thresholding baselines, and against few-shot LLMs. Across an industrial dataset and six public benchmarks, RAPT consistently outperformed global and label-wise static thresholding baselines. In the industrial setting, RAPT achieved its best predictive performance with metric learners, reaching 0.87 Macro-F1, while fine-tuned transformer variants on average achieved 0.775 Macro-F1, outperforming fewshot LLM baselines (K = 5) by 2x and requiring at least 115x less inference time and 13.5x less GPU memory.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RAPT，一种无需重训练即可改进多标签文档理解中标签集选择的检索增强型分数阈值调整方法，通过检索相似文档的阈值情况并局部聚合邻居解来动态调整查询文档的标签选择阈值，在多个基准上显著优于静态阈值方法和少样本LLM。
AI.motivation: 工业多标签文档理解中，OCR噪声、标签不平衡、实例依赖的标签基数及非对称错误代价使全局分数阈值脆弱且难以维护，亟需一种灵活、部署友好的阈值优化方案。
AI.method: RAPT是一种模型无关的后处理包装器：对每个查询文档，利用分类器输出的分数向量与文档表征，检索历史中相似的文档阈值案例，再基于邻居案例的结果（如平均标签数、截断校准）自适应调整当前文档的标签选择阈值。
AI.result: 在工业数据集和六个公开基准上，RAPT持续超越全局与逐标签静态阈值基线；工业场景下，结合度量学习编码器达0.87 Macro-F1，Transformer变体平均0.775 Macro-F1，性能为5样本LLM的2倍，推理时间减少115倍，GPU显存降低13.5倍。
AI.conclusion: RAPT提供了一种高效、可部署、免重训练的多标签阈值优化范式，显著提升下游信息抽取准确性并降低人工验证成本，尤其适用于动态演化的工业文档场景。

title: Bimodal Synchronization Performance: Why Noise and Sparse Connectivity Can Improve Collective Timing
summary: Pulse-coupled oscillator models inspired by firefly synchronization are widely used to study decentralized time coordination in distributed systems. We analyze a discrete-time, discrete-phase firefly-inspired synchronization model and show that collective synchrony emerges only near a critical balance between the quorum threshold (fraction of pulsing neighbors required to trigger a phase update) and the pulse duration (how long agents remain detectable to others). Within this parameter region, the system exhibits bimodal performance: it either reaches near-perfect synchronization or becomes trapped in stable multi-cluster states, where symmetrically phase-offset subgroups mutually reinforce one another and prevent global synchrony. Our analysis shows that reducing connectivity or introducing noise suppresses these low-performance states by breaking such symmetric interactions, indicating that highly connected or noiseless systems are not necessarily optimal for collective synchronization.

AI.tldr: 本文分析了一种受萤火虫同步启发的离散时间、离散相位脉冲耦合振荡器模型，发现集体同步仅在群体阈值与脉冲持续时间的临界平衡附近出现，并表现出双模态性能：要么接近完全同步，要么陷入由对称相位偏移子群相互强化导致的稳定多簇状态；降低连通性或引入噪声反而可通过破坏对称相互作用来抑制低性能状态，表明高连通性或无噪声系统未必最优。
AI.motivation: 理解分布式系统中去中心化时间协调的机制，特别是受生物同步（如萤火虫）启发的脉冲耦合振荡器模型中同步产生的条件与限制。
AI.method: 理论分析一种离散时间、离散相位的火蝇启发式同步模型，重点研究群体阈值与脉冲持续时间参数空间中的动力学行为，包括同步态、多簇态及其稳定性，并考察网络连通性与噪声的影响。
AI.result: 发现同步仅在群体阈值与脉冲持续时间存在临界平衡时出现；系统呈现双模态性能——近乎完美同步或稳定多簇态；降低连通性或加入噪声可抑制多簇态、提升同步概率。
AI.conclusion: 高度连通或完全确定性的系统并不利于集体同步，适度的结构或动态扰动（如噪声、稀疏连接）反而有助于打破对称性陷阱、促进全局同步，这对设计鲁棒分布式协调协议具有重要启示。

title: Hierarchical Two-Stage Framework for Environment-Aware Long-Horizon Vessel Trajectory Prediction
summary: Long-horizon vessel trajectory forecasting under real ocean conditions is critical for collision avoidance, traffic management, and route planning. However, achieving accurate predictions is challenging due to long-range temporal dependencies and dynamic environmental factors such as currents, wind, and waves. To address these issues, we propose a hierarchical two-stage framework that combines a coarse long-term predictor with a grid-aware short-term predictor through a hierarchical fusion mechanism. The short-term branch leverages a Spatio-Temporal Graph Transformer on discretized maritime cells to capture localized dynamics, while the long-term branch encodes overarching navigational intent. An integrated environmental module incorporates oceanographic parameters, including surface currents, wind vectors, and significant wave height, using cross-modal attention and feature-wise modulation for adaptive response to varying sea conditions. Additionally, a learnable Savitzky-Golay smoothing layer enhances temporal coherence in fused trajectories. We evaluate our approach on Australian Craft Tracking System (CTS) data from the North West region, aligned with Copernicus Marine Service products, using a 3-hour input and a 10-hour prediction horizon. Experimental results show that our framework outperforms the state-of-the-art by 25% in Average Displacement Error (ADE) and 17% in Final Displacement Error (FDE). Ablation studies further validate the contribution of each component.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种分层两阶段框架，用于在真实海洋环境下进行长时程船舶轨迹预测，结合了粗粒度长期预测与网格感知的短期预测，并引入环境模块和可学习平滑层，显著提升了预测精度。
AI.motivation: 长时程船舶轨迹预测对避碰、交通管理和航线规划至关重要，但受长程时间依赖性和动态海洋环境（如海流、风、浪）影响，准确预测困难。
AI.method: 提出分层两阶段框架：1）粗粒度长期预测器建模航行意图；2）基于时空图Transformer的网格化短期预测器捕捉局部动态；3）集成环境模块通过跨模态注意力与特征调制融合海洋参数；4）可学习Savitzky-Golay平滑层增强轨迹时间一致性。
AI.result: 在澳大利亚西北部CTS数据集（匹配Copernicus海洋服务产品）上，3小时输入、10小时预测任务中，平均位移误差（ADE）和最终位移误差（FDE）分别优于SOTA 25%和17%；消融实验验证各模块有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架有效融合航行意图、局部动态与实时海洋环境，在真实复杂海况下实现了更鲁棒、精确的长时程船舶轨迹预测。

title: A Scalable Tool for Measuring Manner and Result Verbs in Developmental Language Research
summary: Manner and result verbs encode different aspects of event structure and have been discussed in developmental work as a potentially informative distinction for studying early verb learning. However, this distinction remains difficult to measure at scale because large annotated resources for manner and result classification are not currently available. We present a computational approach for identifying manner and result verbs in sentence context. Using linguistically informed prompts, we generate sentence-level annotations with large language models over data drawn from MASC and InterCorp, extending coverage from previously annotated portions of VerbNet to 436 classes. We then train a RoBERTa-based classifier on these annotations and evaluate it on three held-out gold-standard datasets, including previously annotated items and a new expert-annotated set. Across these evaluations, the model shows promising performance, with average accuracy up to 89.6%. We present this work as a scalable measurement tool that can support future research on verb semantics in developmental and other language datasets, while noting that further validation is needed for borderline cases, mixed manner/result verbs, and downstream developmental applications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于大语言模型和RoBERTa分类器的计算方法，用于在句子语境中自动识别方式动词（manner verbs）和结果动词（result verbs），扩展了VerbNet的标注覆盖范围，并在多个黄金标准数据集上取得最高89.6%的准确率，为动词语义与发展语言学研究提供了可扩展的测量工具。
AI.motivation: 方式与结果动词在事件结构中表征不同语义维度，是研究早期动词习得的重要切入点；但因缺乏大规模人工标注资源，该区分难以规模化测量。
AI.method: 首先利用语言学启发的提示词，借助大语言模型对MASC和InterCorp语料中的动词进行句子级方式/结果标注，将VerbNet已有标注扩展至436类；随后基于这些标注训练RoBERTa分类器，并在三个留出的黄金标准数据集（含新专家标注集）上评估。
AI.result: 模型在多个评估集上表现良好，平均准确率最高达89.6%；验证了该方法作为可扩展测量工具的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为动词语义研究（尤其发展语言学）提供了一个实用、可扩展的自动化标注工具，但仍需进一步验证其在边界案例、混合型动词及下游发展应用中的鲁棒性。

title: A Structural Threshold in Decision Capacity Governs Collapse in Self-Play Reinforcement Learning
summary: We show that a threshold in decision capacity determines whether self-play reinforcement learning agents collapse under asymmetric rule perturbations. Across poker variants, matrix games, a dice game, and multiple learning algorithms, eliminating all positive-reach contingent decisions causes rapid convergence to a deterministic exploitation attractor, a fixed point at near-maximal loss. Preserving even a single positive-reach contingent decision point prevents this collapse. A frozen baseline and fixed-opponent control confirm that the mechanism is co-adaptation under constraint, not the perturbation itself. The phenomenon is timing-invariant, fully reversible upon action restoration, and intensifies under function approximation. These results establish a sharp threshold at zero reach-weighted contingent action capacity, with severity scaling continuously via reach-weighted capacity in the tested domains.

AI.tldr: 本文发现，在自博弈强化学习中，决策能力的阈值决定了代理在不对称规则扰动下是否会崩溃：当所有正可达性条件决策被消除时，系统迅速收敛到一个确定性的剥削吸引子；而只要保留一个正可达性条件决策点即可防止崩溃。
AI.motivation: 理解自博弈强化学习代理在规则扰动下的鲁棒性与崩溃机制，揭示其内在决策结构对稳定性的影响。
AI.method: 在多种博弈环境（扑克变体、矩阵博弈、骰子游戏）和多种学习算法中，系统性地消除或保留正可达性条件决策点，并引入冻结基线和固定对手控制实验以验证共适应机制。
AI.result: 发现存在一个严格的阈值——零可达加权条件动作容量；低于该阈值即发生崩溃，且崩溃严重性随可达加权容量连续变化；现象具有时序不变性、完全可逆性，并在函数逼近下加剧。
AI.conclusion: 自博弈强化学习的稳定性高度依赖于极少量的条件决策能力，揭示了智能体策略空间中一种脆弱但关键的结构性临界点。

title: Counterparty Modeling is Not Strategy: The Limits of LLM Negotiators
summary: Negotiation requires more than inferring what the other side wants: it requires using that information to make advantageous offers and counteroffers over multiple turns. We study whether large language model (LLM) agents do this in a controlled multi-attribute bargaining environment. We find that current LLM agents can model a counterparty's preferences, but do not reliably turn that knowledge into strategic bargaining. When given negotiating partner preference information, agents model it accurately and early in their reasoning traces, yet this does not reliably improve outcomes for the informed side. Turn-level analyses show why: agents often respond to what they believe the counterparty values, but do not consistently pair those moves with gains on their own high-value attributes. Sellers are more accommodating overall, and in asymmetric-information conditions, the informed side often makes the more weakly compensated concessions. Because agents fail to leverage this underlying utility structure for strategic advantage, their final agreements are heavily dictated by surface-level opening anchors rather than actual utility weights. Finally, requiring agents to explicitly state concession-for-reciprocity trades before making an offer makes individual turns look more strategic, but ultimately fails to improve the efficiency of the final agreements.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了大型语言模型（LLM）代理在多属性讨价还价任务中是否能将对对方偏好的推断有效转化为战略性出价与还价；结果表明，尽管LLM能准确建模对方偏好，却难以据此优化自身效用，最终协议仍主要受初始锚点影响，而非真实效用权重。
AI.motivation: 探讨LLM代理是否具备将对手偏好建模能力转化为多轮战略性谈判行为的能力，而不仅停留在静态偏好推断层面。
AI.method: 在受控的多属性议价环境中，通过提供/不提供对手偏好信息、分析推理轨迹、逐轮响应行为、引入显式互惠让步声明等方法，系统评估LLM代理的谈判策略性。
AI.result: LLM能准确建模对手偏好，但无法稳定将其转化为自身效用最大化行为；卖方更易让步；信息优势方常做出补偿不足的让步；最终协议高度依赖初始锚点；强制显式声明互惠让步可提升单轮表观策略性，但不提升整体协议效率。
AI.conclusion: 当前LLM代理缺乏将隐含效用结构内化为动态、自利谈判策略的能力，暴露了其在复杂社会交互中从理解到行动转化的关键缺陷。

title: SwordBench: Evaluating Orthogonality of Steering Image Representations
summary: Steering or intervening on model representations at inference time to correct predictions is essential for AI interpretability and safety, yet existing evaluation protocols are limited to ambiguous language modeling tasks. To address this gap, we introduce SwordBench, a benchmark for steering image representations of vision models across multiple backbones and concept removal tasks. Beyond a unified benchmarking suite, we propose new evaluation notions that uncover the second-order effects of orthogonalization among concept activation vectors for pragmatic steering. Specifically, cross-concept robustness measures the stability of concept detection performance across inputs orthogonalized against alternative concepts, and collateral damage quantifies whether steering inadvertently affects model performance on a downstream task for inputs lacking the bias. We find that although a linear support vector machine exhibits superior separability and orthogonality, it fails to achieve zero collateral damage, often trailing sparse autoencoders. In simpler regimes, both standard baselines and optimization-based methods fail to achieve perfect steering. The source code will be made available soon on GitHub.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了SwordBench，一个用于评估视觉模型表征引导（steering）效果的新基准，聚焦于概念移除任务，并引入了交叉概念鲁棒性和附带损害两个新评估指标；实验表明线性SVM虽在可分性和正交性上表现好，但无法实现零附带损害，而稀疏自编码器更优；简单场景下现有方法仍难以实现完美引导。
AI.motivation: 现有模型表征干预评估局限于模糊的语言建模任务，缺乏针对视觉模型表征引导（尤其是概念移除）的系统性、可比性基准和评估标准。
AI.method: 构建SwordBench基准，涵盖多种视觉主干网络与概念移除任务；提出‘交叉概念鲁棒性’（衡量正交化后对其他概念检测的稳定性）与‘附带损害’（衡量引导是否损害无偏见样本的下游任务性能）两个新评估维度；对比线性SVM、稀疏自编码器及优化方法在不同设定下的引导效果。
AI.result: 线性SVM在概念可分性与激活向量正交性上最优，但附带损害不为零，表现逊于稀疏自编码器；在较简单设置下，各类基线与优化方法均无法实现完美概念引导。
AI.conclusion: 当前视觉表征引导方法存在根本性局限，需更精细的评估视角（如二阶效应）与更具鲁棒性的干预机制；SwordBench为该方向提供了统一基准与新分析框架。

title: Topo-GS: Continuous Volumetric Embedding of High-Dimensional Data via Topological Gaussian Splatting
summary: Dimensionality reduction algorithms map high-dimensional data into visualizable 2D or 3D spaces, but traditionally rely on a discrete point-cloud paradigm. This discrete abstraction is susceptible to visual occlusion and artificial discontinuities, often failing to represent the continuous density of the underlying manifold. To address these limitations, we introduce Topo-GS, a framework that repurposes 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) to cast multidimensional projection as a meshless volumetric reconstruction process. Instead of standard photometric losses, Topo-GS is driven by local geometric constraints. By solving orthogonal Procrustes targets, the optimization enforces an As-Rigid-As-Possible prior while explicitly aligning the spatial covariance of each Gaussian to the local tangent space. Recognizing that unrolling data of varying intrinsic dimensionalities requires distinct spatial treatments, we utilize a topology-aware strategy that tailors the loss formulation to preserve either continuous 1D trajectories or cohesive 2D surfaces. Quantitative and visual evaluations demonstrate that Topo-GS successfully transforms discrete scatter plots into continuous volumetric representations, where inherent projection distortions explicitly manifest as observable geometric variations, while preserving local topological fidelity comparable to discrete baselines.

AI.tldr: Topo-GS是一种新颖的降维框架，将3D高斯泼溅技术用于连续流形可视化，通过几何约束而非光度损失实现拓扑保真、无网格的体积化投影。
AI.motivation: 传统降维方法基于离散点云，易受遮挡和人为不连续性影响，难以表征数据流形的连续密度。
AI.method: 提出Topo-GS框架，将多维投影重构为无网格体素重建过程；采用正交Procrustes目标优化，施加类刚性先验，并使每个高斯的空间协方差对齐局部切空间；引入拓扑感知策略，按数据本征维度（1D轨迹或2D曲面）定制损失函数。
AI.result: 定量与可视化评估表明，Topo-GS能将离散散点图转化为连续体素表示，投影失真以可观察的几何变化显式呈现，同时保持与离散基线相当的局部拓扑保真度。
AI.conclusion: Topo-GS突破了传统点云范式，为高维数据可视化提供了兼具几何解释性与拓扑一致性的连续体积化新路径。

title: UniER: A Unified Benchmark for Item-level and Path-level Exercise Recommendation
summary: Personalized exercise recommendation dynamically aligns pedagogical resources with individual knowledge mastery, which is crucial for satisfying students' dynamic learning needs in modern education. The field is currently driven by two dominant paradigms: Item-Level Exercise Recommendation (ILER) optimizes for immediate single-step state transitions, while Path-Level Exercise Recommendation (PLER) constructs coherent learning paths to maximize cumulative gains. Despite sharing the same ultimate objective, disparate evaluation setups have kept these two lines of research isolated, hindering unified benchmarking and fair comparison. To fill the gap, in this paper, we present a Unified Benchmark for Exercise Recommendation (UniER), a comprehensive evaluation framework that unifies ILER and PLER. Specifically, we introduce Weighted Cognitive Gain (WCG) as a unified metric to measure cross-paradigm algorithmic performance. Our benchmark encompasses 9 datasets spanning four generation methods, facilitating the comparison of 18 representative ILER/PLER methods. Through multi-dimensional analyses covering effectiveness, generalizability, robustness, and efficiency, our results reveal the systematic dominance of PLER and expose the pedagogical failure of ILER's fragmented recommendations under extreme sparsity and noise. Furthermore, we provide an open-source codebase of UniER to foster reproducible research and outline potential directions for future investigations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出统一的练习推荐基准UniER，通过加权认知增益（WCG）指标统一评估项目级（ILER）和路径级（PLER）推荐方法，揭示PLER在有效性、鲁棒性等方面系统性优于ILER，并开源代码以促进可复现研究。
AI.motivation: 现有练习推荐研究中，项目级（ILER）和路径级（PLER）两类范式因评估设置不一致而长期割裂，缺乏统一基准导致难以公平比较与协同进步。
AI.method: 构建统一基准UniER，提出跨范式评价指标Weighted Cognitive Gain（WCG），整合9个涵盖4种生成方式的数据集，对18种代表性ILER/PLER方法进行多维（有效性、泛化性、鲁棒性、效率）评估，并开源代码。
AI.result: 实验表明PLER在各项指标上系统性优于ILER；ILER在极端稀疏与噪声场景下出现教学失效；WCG能有效支撑跨范式性能衡量。
AI.conclusion: 统一基准UniER弥合了ILER与PLER的研究鸿沟，验证了路径级建模的教学合理性与实用性，为未来练习推荐研究提供了标准化评估基础与开源工具支持。

title: Human-Flow Digital Twin for Predicting the Effects of Mobility Introduction on Visitor Circulation
comment: An accepted paper at the 27th IEEE International Conference on Mobile Data Management (MDM 2026). Project page: https://mc.net.ist.osaka-u.ac.jp/en/activity/wakayama-castle-mobility_2023/
summary: We propose a framework for predicting the effects of mobility introduction measures using a human-flow digital twin. This digital twin incorporates a multi-agent simulator that can represent how visitors choose destinations depending on factors such as their current location and the attractiveness of spots. We extract data on how visitors selected destinations with respect to measured pre-intervention human-flow data, inter-spot distances, spot attractiveness, and travel volumes, and use these data to train each agent's decision model of this simulator. The trained decision model is a function that takes a visitor's current state and surrounding environmental information as input and outputs which spot the visitor will move toward next. By expressing mobility introduction measures as changes to inter-point distances or to spot attractiveness, the framework can reproduce human flows with mobility introduction in the multi-agent simulator and thereby quantify effects such as changes in visitor counts and circulation. We evaluated the proposed method using human-flow data measured with and without introducing mobility within Wakayama Castle Park in Japan. When reproducing flows with mobility introduction using a multi-layer perceptron decision model, the cosine similarity of the spatial population distribution exceeded 0.7, confirming that the approach can replicate the flow changes caused by the mobility introduction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于人流数字孪生的框架，用于预测交通引入措施对游客流动的影响。通过多智能体仿真器建模游客目的地选择行为，并利用真实人流数据训练个体决策模型；将交通措施建模为点间距离或景点吸引力的变化，从而量化其对游客数量和流动路径的影响。在和歌山城公园的实际验证中，空间人口分布的余弦相似度超过0.7，证明方法有效。
AI.motivation: 准确预测交通引入措施（如新增接驳车、步行道等）对游客流动模式的影响，以支持城市与景区可持续规划与管理，但传统模型难以刻画个体异质性与环境动态交互。
AI.method: 构建基于多智能体的人流数字孪生框架：1）从干预前实测人流数据中提取游客目的地选择规律；2）结合景点吸引力、点间距离、旅行量等特征，训练每个智能体的决策模型（如MLP）；3）将交通措施编码为环境参数（距离/吸引力）变化，在仿真中重现实有人流并评估影响。
AI.result: 在和歌山城公园实证中，使用多层感知机（MLP）作为决策模型时，仿真所得空间人口分布与实测分布的余弦相似度 > 0.7，表明该框架能较准确复现交通引入引起的人流变化。
AI.conclusion: 所提数字孪生框架能有效建模并预测交通干预对游客流动的影响，为景区与城市交通优化提供可解释、可量化的仿真工具；其核心在于将政策转化为可计算的环境参数变更，并通过数据驱动的个体决策模型保障仿真真实性。

title: No Plan, Yet Human: A Reactive Robotics Model Predicts Human Planning Failures on a Clinical Task
summary: Understanding why some sequential planning problems are harder than others requires models that go beyond average performance. They should capture the specific pattern of which problems are hard, and ideally fail in the same way people do when planning capacity is reduced. We apply AICON, a reactive gradient-descent framework developed for robotic manipulation, to the Tower of London test, a cognitive test used to assess planning in Parkinson's disease, mild cognitive impairment, and stroke. Without any lookahead planning or knowledge of human cognition, AICON reproduces the fine-grained human difficulty ordering across 24 problems better than structural task parameters and generalizes to held-out problems in a leave-two-out evaluation. Crucially, AICON outperforms a planning baseline for groups with reduced planning capacity while the planning baseline better captures healthy controls. This dissociation was predicted by the original AICON paper, which noted that the model's failure modes resemble those of Parkinson's patients who struggle with goal hierarchies but not move counts. This suggests that as planning capacity is reduced, human behavior shifts toward the reactive mode AICON models. The finding extends a broader pattern: AICON, originally built for robotics, now captures aspects of biological behavior across perception, eye movements, and sequential planning, suggesting its core abstraction reflects something real about how biological systems are organized.

AI.tldr: 本文将AICON（一种用于机器人操作的反应式梯度下降框架）应用于认知测试“伦敦塔”，发现其无需前瞻规划或人类认知先验，即可比结构化任务参数更准确地复现人类在24个问题上的精细难度排序，并在留二法评估中泛化良好；关键发现是AICON在规划能力受损群体（如帕金森病患者）上表现优于传统规划基线，而后者更适合健康对照组，表明人类规划能力下降时行为向AICON所建模的反应模式转变；该结果支持AICON的核心抽象可能反映了生物系统组织的真实原理。
AI.motivation: 理解为何某些序列规划问题比其他更难，需要超越平均性能的模型，能刻画具体难题模式，并在规划能力受限时表现出与人类相似的失败方式。
AI.method: 将AICON——一种无需前瞻、无认知先验的反应式梯度下降框架——应用于伦敦塔测试（ToL），评估其在24个问题上的难度排序拟合能力及留二法泛化性能，并与规划基线模型在不同临床群体中对比行为预测效果。
AI.result: AICON在复现人类细粒度难度排序上优于结构任务参数和规划基线；在规划能力受损群体中AICON表现更优，而规划基线更适合健康对照；该分离现象与AICON原论文对帕金森病患者失败模式的预测一致。
AI.conclusion: 当人类规划能力下降时，行为趋向AICON所建模的反应式模式；AICON不仅适用于机器人，还能跨领域（感知、眼动、序列规划）捕捉生物行为特征，暗示其核心抽象可能揭示了生物系统组织的真实原理。

title: CHI-Bench: Can AI Agents Automate End-to-End, Long-Horizon, Policy-Rich Healthcare Workflows?
summary: End-to-end automation of realistic healthcare operations stresses three capabilities underrepresented in current benchmarks: policy density, decisions must be grounded in a large library of medical, insurance, and operational rules; Multi-role composition: a single task requires the agent to play multiple roles with handoffs; and multilateral interaction: intermediate workflow steps are multi-turn dialogs, such as peer-to-peer review and patient outreach. We introduce $χ$-Bench, a benchmark of long-horizon healthcare workflows across three domains: provider prior authorization, payer utilization management, and care management. Each task hands the agent a clinical case in a high-fidelity simulator of 20 healthcare apps exposed via 87 MCP tools, which it must drive to a terminal status through tool calls and writing the role's artifacts, guided by a 1,290+ document managed-care operations handbook skill. Across 30 agent harness/models configurations, the best agent resolves only 28.0% of tasks, no agent clears 20% on strict pass^3, and executing all tasks in a single session slumps the performance to 3.8%. These results raise the hypothesis that similar gaps are likely to surface in other policy-dense, role-composed, irreversible enterprise domains.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了χ-Bench，一个面向真实医疗健康长周期工作流的基准测试，强调政策密集性、多角色协作与多方交互三大挑战；实验表明现有端到端智能体表现极差，揭示了当前AI在高政策密度、多角色、不可逆企业场景中的根本性能力缺口。
AI.motivation: 现有基准未能充分覆盖真实医疗健康运营中所需的三大关键能力：高政策密度（需依据大量医疗/保险/运营规则决策）、多角色协同（单任务需切换多个角色并交接）、多边交互（如同行评审、患者沟通等多轮对话式中间步骤）。
AI.method: 构建χ-Bench基准，涵盖三大医疗领域（医疗机构事前授权、保险方使用管理、照护管理），每个任务在高保真模拟环境中提供20个医疗应用和87个MCP工具接口，并要求智能体依据超1290份管理式医疗操作手册执行长周期工作流，生成角色专属文档并调用工具达成终端状态。
AI.result: 在30种智能体配置下，最优智能体仅完成28.0%的任务；无一智能体在严格pass³指标下超过20%；单会话执行全部任务时性能骤降至3.8%。
AI.conclusion: 当前端到端智能体在政策密集、多角色协同、不可逆的企业级任务中存在显著能力瓶颈，该问题很可能也存在于其他类似高约束、高协作性的真实世界领域。

title: Investigating Action Encodings in Recurrent Neural Networks in Reinforcement Learning
comment: Published in TMLR in 2023, https: // openreview. net/ forum? id= K6g4MbAC1r .Transactions on Machine Learning Research (2023)
summary: Building and maintaining state to learn policies and value functions is critical for deploying reinforcement learning (RL) agents in the real world. Recurrent neural networks (RNNs) have become a key point of interest for the state-building problem, and several large-scale reinforcement learning agents incorporate recurrent networks. While RNNs have become a mainstay in many RL applications, many key design choices and implementation details responsible for performance improvements are often not reported. In this work, we discuss one axis on which RNN architectures can be (and have been) modified for use in RL. Specifically, we look at how action information can be incorporated into the state update function of a recurrent cell. We discuss several choices in using action information and empirically evaluate the resulting architectures on a set of illustrative domains. Finally, we discuss future work in developing recurrent cells and discuss challenges specific to the RL setting.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在强化学习中如何将动作信息融入循环神经网络（RNN）的状态更新函数，以提升策略和价值函数的学习效果，并通过实验评估了不同动作信息整合方式在典型任务上的性能。
AI.motivation: RNN在强化学习中被广泛用于构建状态，但许多影响性能的关键设计细节（如动作信息如何参与状态更新）常未被充分报告，亟需系统性研究。
AI.method: 聚焦于RNN状态更新函数中动作信息的整合方式，提出并比较多种动作输入策略（如拼接、门控等），并在多个典型强化学习环境中进行实证评估。
AI.result: 不同动作信息整合方式对性能有显著影响，某些设计在特定任务上明显优于基线；实验揭示了动作嵌入时机与方式对长期依赖建模的重要性。
AI.conclusion: 动作信息的合理融入是提升RNN-based RL智能体性能的关键因素之一；未来需设计更适配RL特性的专用循环单元，并解决训练稳定性、信用分配等挑战。

title: PRISMat: Policy-Driven, Permutation-Invariant Autoregressive Material Generation
comment: 10 pages, 8 figures, Under Review at Neurips 2026
summary: Rapid identification of candidate materials with target properties has become a key task in materials science. Machine learning has emerged as an alternative to physics-based simulation, offering a faster and cheaper way to filter materials based on their stability and other target properties, reducing the number of candidates that reach the costly synthesis stage. Recently, Large Language Models (LLMs) have been applied to this role, but these models are parameter-heavy and computationally expensive both during training and at inference time, making them unsuitable for high-throughput tasks. This inefficiency stems from both the large over-parameterization of language models and the difficulty of framing material generation as a sequence learning problem. In this paper, we present PRISMat, a cost-effective, permutation-invariant model, which addresses these limitations. We show that PRISMat, despite taking less time for inference, is able to outperform LLMs in generating crystal slabs conditioned on critical materials' surface properties. In targeted material discovery, we achieve mean absolute errors of 0.188 eV/A$^2$ and 2.79 eV for cleavage energy and work function tasks, respectively, reducing the error of the next best model by 4$\times$.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PRISMat的轻量级、排列不变模型，用于高效生成满足特定表面性质（如解理能和功函数）的晶体表面结构，相比大型语言模型（LLMs）显著降低计算开销并提升预测精度。
AI.motivation: 传统物理模拟耗时昂贵；LLMs虽被尝试用于材料筛选，但参数量大、推理慢，难以支撑高通量材料发现任务。
AI.method: 提出PRISMat模型——一种轻量、排列不变、专为材料表面性质条件生成设计的神经网络架构，避免将材料生成建模为序列学习问题。
AI.result: 在解理能和功函数预测任务中，PRISMat分别达到0.188 eV/A²和2.79 eV的平均绝对误差，较次优模型误差降低4倍，且推理速度更快。
AI.conclusion: PRISMat在保持高预测精度的同时大幅降低计算成本，为高通量、目标导向的材料发现提供了更实用的机器学习方案。

title: Cross-Source Supervision for Bone Infection Segmentation in Dual-Modality PET-CT
summary: Early and accurate diagnosis and lesion localization of bone infections are crucial for clinical treatment. PET-CT integrates anatomical information from CT with metabolic information from PET, making it an important imaging modality for diagnosing bone infections. However, accurate lesion segmentation remains challenging due to indistinct lesion boundaries and inconsistencies in annotations generated by different experts or automated systems. In this work, we investigate multimodal segmentation of bone infections under annotation discrepancy. We develop a bimodal end-to-end segmentation framework that integrates PET metabolic signals and CT bone-window anatomy through an early-fusion multimodal representation.To mitigate performance inflation caused by inter-slice correlation in small datasets, this study discards traditional two-dimensional evaluation methods and implements a rigorous patient-level 3D volumetric evaluation and cross-validation. Furthermore, instead of forcing a singular consensus, we propose a decoupled dual-source learning framework where parallel models are trained on independent expert annotations driven by high-sensitivity and high-specificity clinical intents. Experimental results objectively report performance variations at the patient level (Mean + SD and Mean - SD), demonstrating the effectiveness of multimodal PET-CT fusion. The cross-evaluation matrix quantitatively reveals how models successfully internalize distinct expert diagnostic philosophies, providing a robust, diversity-preserving paradigm for clinical AI deployment in bone infection segmentation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于骨感染PET-CT双模态分割的端到端框架，通过早期融合PET代谢信号与CT骨窗解剖信息，并采用患者级3D体积分割评估与解耦双源学习策略，以应对专家标注差异问题，提升了临床AI在骨感染定位中的鲁棒性与多样性。
AI.motivation: 骨感染的早期精准诊断与病灶定位对临床治疗至关重要，但现有PET-CT影像中病灶边界模糊、不同专家或自动系统标注不一致，导致分割困难。
AI.method: 构建双模态端到端分割框架，实现PET与CT骨窗图像的早期融合；摒弃传统二维评估，采用患者级3D体积分割与交叉验证；提出解耦双源学习框架，分别基于高敏感性与高特异性临床目标训练并行模型。
AI.result: 实验在患者层面报告了性能波动范围（均值±标准差），验证了多模态融合有效性；交叉评估矩阵定量揭示模型对不同专家诊断理念的学习能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为骨感染分割提供了兼顾鲁棒性与多样性的临床AI部署新范式，有效应对标注差异挑战。

title: VoxScene: Anchor-Conditioned Voxel Diffusion for Indoor Scene Arrangement
summary: We present VoxScene, a novel anchor-conditioned voxel diffusion framework tailored for 3D scene synthesis. Current data-driven layout generation techniques typically rely on bounding proxies or implicit representations, which overlook volumetric structures. This geometric blindness inevitably leads to severe physical collisions and structural entanglement, particularly in densely populated environments. To overcome these limitations, we shift the paradigm to an explicit, object-centric voxel representation. Our pipeline sequentially synthesizes discrete volumetric occupancies conditioned on prior anchors and local context. By exploiting the mutually exclusive nature of discrete voxels, our approach eliminates spatial ambiguities and guarantees collision-free arrangements, even in highly complex environments. Furthermore, the synthesized high-fidelity voxel grids serve as discriminative geometric queries for downstream asset retrieval. Extensive experiments demonstrate the universality of our method, achieving state-of-the-art physical plausibility and unlocking shape diversity compared to existing layout planners.

AI.tldr: VoxScene是一种基于锚点条件的体素扩散框架，用于3D场景合成，通过显式、物体中心的体素表示避免碰撞和结构纠缠，并提升布局合理性与形状多样性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于数据驱动的布局生成方法依赖边界代理或隐式表示，忽视体素结构，导致物理碰撞和结构纠缠，尤其在密集环境中严重。
AI.method: 提出VoxScene框架，采用显式、物体中心的离散体素表示，按序合成体素占据率，以先验锚点和局部上下文为条件；利用体素互斥性消除空间歧义，保证无碰撞布局。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在物理合理性上达到SOTA，并提升了形状多样性；生成的高保真体素网格可作为下游资产检索的判别性几何查询。
AI.conclusion: VoxScene通过转向显式体素表示，有效克服了传统方法的几何盲区，显著改善复杂3D场景布局的质量与实用性。

title: Echoes in Filter Bubble: Diagnosing and Curing Popularity Bias in Generative Recommenders
summary: Recently, Generative Recommenders (GRs), characterized by a unified end-to-end framework, have exhibited astonishing potential in transforming the recommendation paradigm. Despite their effectiveness, we recognize that GRs are still susceptible to the long-standing issue of popularity bias that has pervaded the recommendation community. Although a few studies have attempted to extend traditional debiasing methods to GRs, their effectiveness is marginal, and the fundamental reason why GRs suffer from popularity bias remains under-explored. To bridge this gap, this study focuses on two core aspects in GRs: the optimization of generative framework and the item tokenization based on semantic index. Based on theoretical analyses, we identify that the severe popularity bias emerges from the confluence of a token-level optimization flaw and the undifferentiated property of item tokenization. Accordingly, this study develops a novel generative recommender system, called Ghost, by designing the asymmetric unlikelihood optimization and the skeleton-founded tokenization. Extensive empirical evaluations across three datasets, alongside multiple SOTA baselines, reveal that Ghost substantially alleviates popularity bias and promotes fairer recommendations, while incurring slight degradation to the overall recommendation utility.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Ghost的新生成式推荐系统，通过非对称不似然优化和骨架驱动的物品分词方法，有效缓解了生成式推荐中的流行度偏差问题，在保证推荐公平性的同时仅轻微牺牲整体效用。
AI.motivation: 生成式推荐器（GRs）虽有潜力，但仍受长期存在的流行度偏差问题困扰；现有去偏方法效果有限，且其根本原因尚未被深入探究。
AI.method: 从生成框架优化和基于语义索引的物品分词两个核心角度出发，提出非对称不似然优化（asymmetric unlikelihood optimization）与骨架驱动分词（skeleton-founded tokenization）方法。
AI.result: 在三个数据集上对比多个SOTA基线，Ghost显著缓解流行度偏差、提升推荐公平性，仅带来轻微的整体效用下降。
AI.conclusion: 流行度偏差源于生成式推荐中词元级优化缺陷与物品分词缺乏区分性；Ghost通过两项创新设计有效应对该问题，为公平生成式推荐提供了新思路。

title: Reservation Based Smart Parking Management
comment: 6 pages, accepted at the IEEE WETICE 2026 Conference
summary: In the framework of Smart Cities and Intelligent Transportation Systems (ITS), efficient parking management is essential to reduce urban congestion and emissions. However, current reservation-based systems often encounter a scenario in which users find their reserved slot occupied by a previous occupant who failed to vacate on time ("No PARK" situation). This paper introduces a dual-mechanism architecture designed to enhance system reliability. A Reservation Module uses a dynamic size buffer of non-reservable slots to grant parking availability. A reputation-based Reward System exploits a "star-based" metric to incentivize punctual departures through financial penalties and access restrictions. The simulations conducted with the SUMO urban simulator are promising, showing that the dynamic buffer strategy provides a better tradeoff between parking availability and reservation success. By progressively adapting to users behavior, the proposed system mitigates "NO PARK" instances and improves resource utilization, significantly enhancing urban viability. Index Terms-Smart City, Intelligent transportation systems, Parking, Reservation systems, V2I, Reputation-based mechanisms, Smart Parking

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种双机制智能停车管理系统，通过动态缓冲区预留模块和基于声誉的奖惩系统，缓解'已预约但车位被占（NO PARK）'问题，提升停车可用性、预约成功率与资源利用率。
AI.motivation: 现有基于预约的停车系统常出现用户预约成功后却因前一用户未按时离开而无法停车（'No PARK'）的问题，影响城市交通效率与用户体验。
AI.method: 设计双机制架构：1）Reservation Module采用动态大小的不可预约缓冲区来保障预约可靠性；2）Reputation-based Reward System引入'星评'机制，结合经济惩罚与访问限制激励准时离场。实验基于SUMO城市交通仿真平台进行。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，动态缓冲策略在停车可用性与预约成功率之间取得更优权衡；系统能自适应用户行为，显著降低'NO PARK'发生率并提升资源利用率。
AI.conclusion: 所提双机制架构有效提升了智能停车系统的鲁棒性与实用性，对智慧城市场景下的交通可持续性具有积极意义。

title: A Mechanistic Model for Collective Motion from Sensorimotor Regularities
summary: Collective behavior in animals has long been modeled through self-propelled particle models, which reproduce striking group-level phenomena through abstract interaction forces. Yet these models are fundamentally descriptive: they leave open the question of how collective behavior is actually produced. Recent empirical work makes this gap concrete: locusts do not align with neighbors, sensory and cognitive mechanisms mediate interaction instead. A mechanistic model must therefore operate at the sensorimotor level, grounded in what individual organisms can actually perceive, estimate, and physically execute. We present such a model based on a modeling framework from robotics, extended here to collective motion. Each agent perceives neighbors through bearing and apparent-size cues within a limited field of view, maintains uncertain internal state estimates, and selects actions through gradient descent on a desired social distance -- without any prescribed interaction forces. This simple model produces diverse collective behaviors including polarized motion, milling, ring formations, and subgroup fragmentation. A global sensitivity analysis shows that behavioral transitions are governed by sensorimotor parameters corresponding to measurable biological quantities: field of view geometry, sensory noise, turning agility, and memory. Collective behavior can therefore be understood as the emergent outcome of interacting sensorimotor regularities, and differences across species as the emergent outcome of differences in embodiment and environment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于传感器-运动控制（sensorimotor）机制的集体行为模型，摒弃传统自驱动粒子模型中的抽象对齐力，转而模拟个体真实感知（方位角、视尺寸）、状态估计不确定性及基于期望社交距离的梯度下降动作选择；该模型无需预设交互力即可复现多种集体行为，并揭示其由可测量的生物传感器运动参数（如视野几何、感觉噪声、转向敏捷性、记忆）调控。
AI.motivation: 传统自驱动粒子模型仅描述性地再现群体现象，却未解释集体行为如何由个体真实感知与行动机制产生；新实证发现（如蝗虫不直接对齐邻居）要求模型必须扎根于个体实际可感知、可估计、可执行的传感器-运动层面。
AI.method: 借鉴机器人建模框架，构建基于传感器-运动控制的个体智能体模型：每个智能体在有限视野内通过方位角和表观尺寸感知邻体，维持不确定的内部状态估计，并通过梯度下降优化期望社交距离来选择动作，全程不引入任何预设交互力。
AI.result: 该简单模型成功复现极化运动、绕圈、环形结构及子群分裂等多种集体行为；全局敏感性分析表明，行为相变由视野几何、感觉噪声、转向敏捷性、记忆等可测量的传感器运动参数主导。
AI.conclusion: 集体行为是多个个体传感器运动规律相互作用的涌现结果；物种间行为差异源于其具身性（embodiment）与环境差异，而非抽象交互规则。

title: Language Acquisition Device in Large Language Models
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) remain substantially less data-efficient than humans. Pre-pretraining (PPT) on synthetic languages has been proposed to close this gap, with prior work emphasizing highly expressive formal languages such as $k$-Shuffle Dyck. Inspired by the Language Acquisition Device (LAD) hypothesis, which posits that innate constraints preemptively restrict the learner's hypothesis space to natural-language-like structure, we propose LAD-inspired PPT: pre-pretraining on MP-STRUCT, a formal language whose strings encode hierarchical composition, feature-based dependencies, and long-distance displacement via MERGE, AGREE, and MOVE. A brief 500-step PPT with MP-STRUCT matches strong formal-language baselines in token efficiency while additionally imparting a human-like resistance to structurally implausible languages (e.g., REVERSE). Analyzing simplified variants, we find that MP-STRUCT CORE outperforms $k$-Shuffle Dyck despite not being definable in C-RASP (a formal bound on transformer expressivity), challenging the prior hypothesis that effective PPT languages must be both hierarchically expressive and circuit-theoretically learnable. We show that functional landmarks, which reduce dependency resolution ambiguity, are a key driver, suggesting that effective PPT design depends not only on expressivity but also on the accessibility of dependency resolution.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种受语言习得机制（LAD）启发的预预训练（PPT）方法，使用MP-STRUCT形式语言进行短时预预训练，显著提升大语言模型的数据效率和对非自然语言结构的鲁棒性，并指出功能标记（functional landmarks）在依赖解析中的关键作用。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型（LLMs）相比人类在数据利用效率上存在明显差距；受语言习得装置（LAD）假说启发，作者试图通过引入更贴近自然语言结构约束的形式语言进行预预训练，以提升模型的数据效率与结构鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出LAD-inspired PPT方法，采用MP-STRUCT形式语言（基于生成语法操作MERGE、AGREE、MOVE建模层级组合、特征依赖与长距离位移）进行仅500步的预预训练；对比k-Shuffle Dyck等基线，并分析其简化变体MP-STRUCT CORE及功能标记的作用。
AI.result: 仅500步MP-STRUCT PPT即可匹敌强形式语言基线的token效率，并赋予模型对结构不合理语言（如REVERSE）的人类式抵抗能力；MP-STRUCT CORE虽不可被C-RASP定义（即超出Transformer电路理论可表达范围），却仍优于k-Shuffle Dyck，表明功能标记降低依赖解析歧义是关键因素。
AI.conclusion: 有效的预预训练语言设计不仅需高表达力，更需支持清晰、易学的依赖解析路径；功能标记是提升PPT效果的关键机制，挑战了此前‘有效PPT语言必须兼具层次表达性与电路可学习性’的假设。

title: Forecasting Medium-Horizon Alzheimer's Disease Progression: Residual Gap-Aware Transformers for 24-Month CDR-SB Change from ADNI Clinical and Biomarker Histories
comment: Preprint; includes appendix, 4 figures, and 6 tables
summary: Medium-horizon Alzheimer's disease progression prediction is difficult because future clinical scores can remain tied to baseline severity, while biomarker histories are irregular and incompletely observed. We develop an anchor-based analysis of 24-month Clinical Dementia Rating Sum of Boxes (CDR-SB) change using harmonized Alzheimer's Disease Neuroimaging Initiative (ADNI) tables. Each labeled sample is anchored at a mild cognitive impairment visit, uses only clinical and biomarker history observed at or before that anchor, and defines the response as CDR-SB at the future visit closest to 24 months within an 18--30 month window minus anchor CDR-SB. The analytic cohort contains 2,600 labeled anchors from 858 participants and 7,276 longitudinal rows. We propose a residual gap-aware transformer that combines a mixed-effects statistical reference with transformer-based residual learning from pre-anchor clinical and biomarker histories. The model uses participant-level random intercepts in the mixed-effects reference, observation-level triplet tokenization for irregular histories, and a learned nonnegative time-gap penalty inside self-attention. We compare the proposed model with a Bayesian-information-criterion-selected linear mixed-effects baseline, GRU-D, and STraTS under repeated participant-level train--test splits. Across five participant-level random seeds, the proposed model achieves the best mean test performance across all reported metrics, reducing MSE by 13.1% and increasing prediction--observation correlation by 26.4% relative to the mixed-effects baseline. It also improves over both GRU-D and STraTS in mean error and correlation. These results show that statistical anchoring and gap-aware residual learning provide a useful structure for medium-horizon Alzheimer's disease progression prediction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于锚点和残差学习的Transformer模型，用于中程（24个月）阿尔茨海默病进展预测，结合混合效应统计基准与不规则生物标志物时序建模，在ADNI数据上显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 中程阿尔茨海默病进展预测困难，因未来临床评分仍依赖基线严重程度，且生物标志物随访不规则、缺失严重。
AI.method: 提出残差间隙感知Transformer模型：以轻度认知障碍就诊为锚点，构建24个月CDR-SB变化预测任务；采用含受试者随机截距的混合效应模型作为统计基准；对不规则临床与生物标志物历史使用三元组标记化，并在自注意力中引入可学习非负时间间隔惩罚。
AI.result: 在ADNI数据（2600个锚点，858名受试者）上，该模型相较线性混合效应基线，MSE降低13.1%，预测-观测相关性提升26.4%；且优于GRU-D和STraTS。
AI.conclusion: 统计锚定策略与间隙感知残差学习能有效提升中程阿尔茨海默病进展预测性能。

title: TTE-Flash: Accelerating Reasoning-based Multimodal Representations via Think-Then-Embed Tokens
summary: Recent research has demonstrated that Universal Multimodal Embedding (UME) benefits significantly from Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning. In this paradigm, a generative model produces explicit reasoning traces for a multimodal query, with the final representation extracted from an <eos> embedding token attending to both the query and the reasoning. Despite its effectiveness, the computational overhead of generating explicit CoT traces is often prohibitive. In this work, we propose replacing explicit CoT with latent think tokens, which are interpreted as latent variables that can produce explicit CoT traces as observed variables. By optimizing think tokens using CoT generation loss and subsequent embedding tokens using contrastive loss, we produce high-performance, reasoning-aware representations at a constant inference cost. Our study investigates two key architectural designs: 1) how think and embeddings tokens should be extracted from the same LLM backbone. 2) how the tokens should be trained as two dependent tasks. We introduce TTE-Flash-2B, a reasoning-aware multimodal representation model that outperforms its explicit-CoT counterpart on the MMEB-v2 benchmark, while producing latent think tokens that are interpretable both textually and visually. Furthermore, zero-shot evaluation across 15 video datasets reveals scaling behavior as the number of think tokens increases, and motivating a pilot study of adaptive think budget allocation based on task requirements.

AI.tldr: 本文提出用隐式‘思考token’替代显式的思维链（CoT）生成，以降低计算开销，同时保持甚至提升多模态表征性能；所提模型TTE-Flash-2B在MMEB-v2上超越显式CoT方法，并展现出文本与视觉可解释性及随思考token数量增加的零样本泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 显式思维链（CoT）虽能提升通用多模态嵌入（UME）性能，但其推理开销大、效率低，亟需一种轻量且高效的替代方案。
AI.method: 引入隐式‘思考token’作为潜在变量，通过CoT生成损失优化思考token，通过对比损失优化嵌入token；设计统一LLM主干中思考token与嵌入token的提取方式，并联合训练二者作为两个依赖任务。
AI.result: TTE-Flash-2B在MMEB-v2基准上超越显式CoT方法；隐式思考token具备文本与视觉可解释性；在15个视频数据集上的零样本评估显示性能随思考token数量增加而提升，并启发了基于任务需求的自适应思考预算分配研究。
AI.conclusion: 隐式思考token是一种高效、可解释、可扩展的替代显式CoT的方法，为构建轻量级、推理感知的多模态嵌入模型提供了新范式。

title: StreamPro: From Reactive Perception to Proactive Decision-Making in Streaming Video
summary: Proactive streaming video understanding requires models to continuously process video streams and decide when to respond, rather than merely what to respond. This naturally introduces a decision-making problem under partial observations, where models must balance early prediction against sufficient evidence. However, existing benchmarks largely follow a "see-then-answer" paradigm, where responses are triggered only after explicit evidence appears, effectively reducing proactive reasoning to delayed perception. As a result, they fail to evaluate a model's ability to make timely and reliable decisions under incomplete observations. Moreover, training proactive models is inherently challenging due to the extreme imbalance between silence and response signals in streaming trajectories, as well as the need to jointly optimize response correctness and timing. To address these challenges, we introduce StreamPro-Bench, a new benchmark that evaluates streaming models from three complementary perspectives: Perception Understanding, Temporal Reasoning, and Proactive Agency, where the last measures a model's ability to make early yet reliable decisions under partial observations. We further propose StreamPro, a two-stage training framework for proactive learning. First, we introduce CB-Stream Loss to mitigate the severe supervision imbalance during supervised fine-tuning (SFT). Then, we apply Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) with a multi-grained reward design that involves both turn-level and trajectory-level rewards. Experiments show that StreamPro significantly improves proactive performance. On StreamPro-Bench, it achieves 41.5, substantially outperforming the previous best (10.4), while also maintaining strong performance on real-time streaming benchmarks, achieving 78.9 on StreamingBench-RTVU.

AI.tldr: 本文提出StreamPro-Bench新基准和StreamPro两阶段训练框架，以解决流式视频理解中模型需在不完整观测下及时可靠决策的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有基准采用‘先看后答’范式，无法评估模型在部分观测下的主动决策能力；且主动模型训练面临响应信号极度不平衡及响应正确性与时机需联合优化的难题。
AI.method: 提出StreamPro-Bench基准（涵盖感知理解、时序推理、主动代理三维度）；设计StreamPro两阶段训练框架：第一阶段用CB-Stream Loss缓解监督不平衡，第二阶段用多粒度奖励（回合级+轨迹级）的Group Relative Policy Optimization（GRPO）进行优化。
AI.result: StreamPro在StreamPro-Bench上达41.5分，远超此前最佳10.4分；在StreamingBench-RTVU实时基准上达78.9分，保持强性能。
AI.conclusion: StreamPro-Bench和StreamPro有效推动了流式视频主动理解的研究，显著提升了模型在不完整观测下早期、可靠决策的能力。

title: Self-Improving CAD Generation Agents with Finite Element Analysis as Feedback
summary: Computer-aided design (CAD) is the backbone of modern industrial design, yet learned CAD generators still fall short of real engineering pipelines: they neither iterate like engineers nor evaluate what engineering requires. Prior work has treated CAD generation as two disjoint steps, part synthesis and assembly, where the former is graded by proximity to a gold reference and the latter, when handled at all, is reduced to a separate constraint solving step. In this work, we introduce a more industry-native task formulation that requires a model to produce a fully assembled multi-part STEP file from a free-form engineering brief, which is then validated via finite element analysis (FEA). FEA validation reveals that Codex (GPT-5.5) and Claude Code (Opus-4.7) agents do not produce a single strict-passing artifact in the main first-attempt sweep, with the best configuration meeting only about 20% of typed requirements on average. Moreover, we introduce two additional supervision signals, a novel text-only blueprint schema and a 21-view image renderer that aids the agent's visual inspection, that better align the generation loop with how engineers iterate in practice. On S2O and Fusion360, the same feedback tools improve geometric reconstruction, with GPT-5.5/xhigh rising from 0.444 to 0.592 Box-IoU on S2O and from 0.397 to 0.505 on Fusion360. Together these signals move CAD programs toward artifacts that are not only visually plausible but also checked against physical and structural requirements.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种更贴近工业实践的CAD生成任务范式，要求模型根据自由形式的工程简报生成完整装配的多部件STEP文件，并通过有限元分析（FEA）进行验证；实验发现现有大模型代理（如Codex、Claude Code）首次生成即严格达标率为零，引入新型文本蓝图模式和21视图图像渲染器作为监督信号后，几何重建性能显著提升。
AI.motivation: 现有学习型CAD生成器无法模拟工程师的实际迭代与工程验证流程，且传统两阶段（零件合成+装配）方法脱离真实工程需求，缺乏对物理与结构可行性的评估。
AI.method: 提出端到端生成完整装配STEP文件的新任务设定；引入有限元分析（FEA）作为核心验证手段；设计新型文本-only蓝图schema和21-view图像渲染器作为辅助监督信号，以增强模型的工程迭代能力。
AI.result: Codex（GPT-5.5）与Claude Code（Opus-4.7）在首次生成中无一例通过严格FEA验证；加入新监督信号后，GPT-5.5/xhigh在S2O和Fusion360数据集上的Box-IoU分别从0.444提升至0.592、从0.397提升至0.505。
AI.conclusion: 仅依赖视觉相似性或参考匹配的CAD生成不可靠；融合物理验证（FEA）与多模态反馈（文本蓝图+多视角图像）是推动CAD生成迈向真正工程可用的关键路径。

title: Unlocking Biological Workflows for Robust Protein-Text Question Answering: A Dual-Dimensional RAG Framework
summary: Protein-Text Question Answering (QA) is crucial for interpreting biological sequences through natural language. The integration of Large Language Models (LLMs) with Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) that efficiently leverages biological databases and facilitates reasoning offers a potent approach for it. However, constrained by the standard RAG pipeline, these models often rely on curated, static datasets instead of expert-proven biological workflows, lacking the fine-grained information processing and struggling to generalize to novel (OOD) proteins. To bridge this gap, we propose 2D-ProteinRAG, a novel framework that empowers LLMs to operate within the gold-standard biological research workflow (BLAST). To further extract high-quality information from noisy retrieval contexts, we introduce a dual-dimensional (2D) filtering strategy following the expert analytical paradigms. Horizontal Fine-grained Attribute Alignment utilizes a lightweight, intent-aware discriminative filter to prune irrelevant metadata and align database entries with specific user queries. Vertical Homology-based Semantic Denoising resolves functional contradictions and redundancy across multiple homologs via hierarchical clustering. Extensive evaluations on both In-Distribution and diverse biological OOD benchmarks demonstrate that 2D-ProteinRAG consistently achieves state-of-the-art performance, outperforming fine-tuned baselines and other RAG methods. Our results validate the framework's robustness and scalability, providing a practical solution for interpreting protein functions in real-world scientific scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出2D-ProteinRAG框架，将LLM嵌入标准生物研究流程（如BLAST），并设计双维度过滤策略（水平细粒度属性对齐+垂直同源语义去噪），显著提升蛋白质文本问答在分布内与OOD场景下的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于RAG的蛋白质文本问答方法依赖静态数据集，脱离真实生物工作流，缺乏细粒度信息处理能力，难以泛化到新蛋白质（OOD）。
AI.method: 提出2D-ProteinRAG框架：1）将LLM集成至BLAST等金标准生物分析流程；2）引入双维度过滤策略——水平方向使用轻量级意图感知判别过滤器对齐查询与数据库条目，垂直方向通过同源序列分层聚类实现语义去噪。
AI.result: 在多种分布内及OOD生物学基准测试中，2D-ProteinRAG持续超越微调基线与其他RAG方法，展现出强鲁棒性与可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: 2D-ProteinRAG为现实科研场景中的蛋白质功能解读提供了实用、可靠的新范式。

title: The Dynamics of Policy Gradient in Social Dilemmas with Partner Selection
summary: In social dilemmas self-interested learning agents face the choice between the societal benefit of cooperation and the immediate reward of defection. Significant evidence exists on the benefits of assortment mechanisms such as partner selection for the emergence of cooperation, but this is largely available through agent-based simulations. In this paper, we provide an analytical solution to the problem, studying the policy-gradient dynamics in a multi-agent environment with partner selection. We show how partner selection changes the opponent distribution and hence the reward landscape, and prove this promotes cooperation under simple rules known from the literature. In particular, we find that population variance is a necessary condition for cooperation to emerge. Using a two-dimensional Wiener process, we extend the dynamics to capture the stochastic effects of partner selection and the resulting opponent distribution. We derive a sufficient condition for the population to be cooperation-promoting and prove the existence of a stationary distribution. Simulations confirm that the stochastic model accurately captures the policy-gradient dynamics and clarifies how the learning rate affects the emergence of cooperation.

AI.tldr: 本文通过分析多智能体环境中伙伴选择机制下的策略梯度动力学，提供了社会困境中合作涌现的解析解，证明了种群方差是合作出现的必要条件，并推导出合作促进型种群的充分条件及平稳分布的存在性。
AI.motivation: 现有大量基于仿真的证据表明伙伴选择等分组机制有助于合作涌现，但缺乏解析理论支持。
AI.method: 采用策略梯度动力学建模，结合两维Wiener过程刻画伙伴选择带来的随机性，并分析对手分布变化对奖励结构的影响。
AI.result: 证明伙伴选择通过改变对手分布促进合作；发现种群方差是合作涌现的必要条件；推导出合作促进型种群的充分条件并证明平稳分布存在；仿真验证了模型准确性及学习率对合作的影响。
AI.conclusion: 伙伴选择机制在解析层面可有效促进合作，其效果依赖于种群多样性（方差）和学习参数，为多智能体合作提供了理论基础。

title: Nori Bot: A Sub-$1,000 Floor-to-Counter Mobile Manipulator
comment: 7 pages, 3 figures, 2 tables. Columbia University Deep Learning Robot Manipulation course project, Spring 2026
summary: Open-source mobile manipulators have reached $660 (XLeRobot) but every sub-$1,000 platform shares three limitations: a fixed-height workspace, reactive-only control, and no protection against the stall-induced burn-out that destroys cheap Feetech servos. We present Nori Bot, a 17-DoF dual-arm mobile manipulator at $947 (~3% the cost of comparable commercial platforms) that addresses all three: (1) a 600mm Z-axis lift on the existing servo bus for floor-to-counter reach; (2) a thin-client Raspberry Pi 4 paired with the OpenClaw proactive agent runtime so cron jobs and hooks trigger physical tasks autonomously; and (3) a software safety stack with sensorless grip-force feedback via motor current on a soft TPU finger. Code, CAD, and the skill manifest will be released.

AI.tldr: Nori Bot is a low-cost, open-source 17-DoF dual-arm mobile manipulator ($947) that overcomes key limitations of sub-$1000 platforms: it adds vertical reach, enables proactive autonomous task execution, and implements software-based stall protection with sensorless grip-force feedback.
AI.motivation: Existing sub-$1000 open-source mobile manipulators suffer from fixed-height workspace, reactive-only control, and lack of stall protection for affordable servos—limiting practicality and durability.
AI.method: Nori Bot integrates a 600mm Z-axis lift using the existing servo bus; uses a Raspberry Pi 4 thin-client with OpenClaw proactive agent runtime for autonomous task triggering (e.g., cron jobs, hooks); and implements a software safety stack with motor-current-based sensorless grip-force estimation on soft TPU fingers.
AI.result: A functional, $947 Nori Bot platform achieving floor-to-counter reach, proactive physical task automation, and stall-induced servo burn-out prevention—validated through hardware design, software runtime, and safety mechanisms.
AI.conclusion: Nori Bot demonstrates that critical capabilities previously reserved for expensive commercial platforms can be achieved affordably and openly, advancing accessibility and robustness in low-cost mobile manipulation.

title: Retrieval-Based Multi-Label Legal Annotation: Extensible, Data-Efficient and Hallucination-Free
summary: Multi-label legal annotation requires assigning multiple labels from large, evolving taxonomies to long, fact-intensive documents, often under limited supervision. Parametric encoders typically require task-specific training and retraining when the label set changes, while prompting generative large language models becomes costly and degrades as the label space grows. We cast legal annotation as retrieval: we embed documents and label descriptions with a frozen retrieval model and predict labels via k-nearest neighbors in the embedding space, enabling updates by re-embedding and re-indexing rather than gradient-based backpropagation. Across three legal datasets (ECtHR-A, ECtHR-B, and Eurlex with 100 labels), retrieval achieves competitive accuracy and strong data efficiency; on Eurlex, Qwen-8B retrieval improves Macro-F1 from 40.41 (GPT-5.2, zero-shot) to 49.12 while reducing estimated compute by 20-30 times compared to fine-tuning. With only (N=100) training samples, retrieval nearly doubles Micro-F1 over hierarchical Legal-BERT on ECtHR-A (48.29 vs. 27.87). We also quantify a reliability failure mode of generative inference: GPT-5.2 hallucinates labels outside the provided taxonomy in 0.12-0.9% of test samples under deterministic decoding. In contrast, retrieval strictly respects defined label sets, eliminating hallucination by design. These results suggest retrieval-model-based annotators are a practical, deployable alternative for high-cardinality and rapidly changing legal label spaces.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将多标签法律标注任务建模为检索问题，利用冻结的检索模型嵌入文档和标签描述，并通过k近邻预测标签，避免了参数化模型频繁重训练和大模型提示生成的高成本与幻觉问题，在多个法律数据集上展现出高准确率、强数据效率和零标签幻觉。
AI.motivation: 多标签法律标注面临标签体系庞大且动态变化、标注数据稀缺等挑战，传统参数化编码器需反复微调，而大语言模型提示方法在标签空间增大时成本高、性能下降且易产生标签幻觉。
AI.method: 将法律标注建模为检索任务：使用冻结的检索模型（如Qwen-8B）分别嵌入法律文档和标签描述，在共享嵌入空间中通过k近邻匹配实现标签预测；更新标签集仅需重新嵌入和索引，无需梯度更新。
AI.result: 在ECtHR-A、ECtHR-B和Eurlex三个法律数据集上，该方法达到有竞争力的准确率；Eurlex上Macro-F1达49.12（优于GPT-5.2零样本40.41），计算开销降低20–30倍；ECtHR-A仅用100样本即使Micro-F1达48.29（近乎Legal-BERT的两倍）；GPT-5.2存在0.12–0.9%的标签幻觉，而本方法完全杜绝幻觉。
AI.conclusion: 基于检索的标注方法是一种实用、可部署的替代方案，特别适用于高基数、快速演化的法律标签空间。

title: AdaGraph: A Graph-Native Clustering Algorithm That Overcomes the Curse of Dimensionality and Enables Scientific Discovery
comment: 12 pages, 4 figures, 1 table. Full paper in preparation for KDD 2027
summary: We present AdaGraph, a graph-native clustering algorithm born from the Structure-Centric Machine Learning (SC-ML) paradigm -- a new field of unsupervised learning that replaces geometry-centric (distance-based) computation with structure-centric (topology-based) computation, fundamentally dissolving the curse of dimensionality. AdaGraph operates entirely within the kNN graph topology, a representation that retains meaningful relational structure in arbitrarily high dimensions where Euclidean distance metrics become uninformative. AdaGraph requires no a priori specification of the number of clusters k, handles noise natively, and scales via the SLCD (Sample-Learn-Calibrate-Deploy) prototype-deployment framework. As its unsupervised tuning objective, AdaGraph pairs with Graph-SCOPE, the topology-based cluster validity index introduced as a separate SC-ML contribution. On 10 synthetic benchmarks spanning d=10 to d=5000, Graph-SCOPE achieves mean ARI=0.900 and correctly selects k on 9/10 datasets -- outperforming Silhouette, Davies-Bouldin, and Calinski-Harabasz -- while maintaining Kendall tau >= 0.92 with ground-truth cluster quality across all dimensionalities (Silhouette: tau ~= 0.46). We validate AdaGraph across three scientific domains: (1) gene co-expression discovery in hepatocellular carcinoma (GSE14520, 10,000 genes, 488 patients, no dimensionality reduction), where AdaGraph identifies condition-specific gene modules that WGCNA, ICA, NMF, and Spectral Biclustering fail to resolve; (2) natural language text clustering, where AdaGraph achieves ARI=0.751 on 20NG-6cat versus HDBSCAN's 0.464 (62% relative improvement); (3) materials science clustering of superconductors (145-dimensional Magpie features), perovskites, and JARVIS-DFT materials, where AdaGraph achieves the highest Graph-SCOPE on all three datasets.

AI.tldr: AdaGraph是一种基于图结构的无监督聚类算法，属于结构中心机器学习（SC-ML）新范式，完全在kNN图拓扑中运行，无需预设簇数、天然抗噪、可扩展，并配合新提出的图结构簇有效性指标Graph-SCOPE进行自动调参，在高维数据（最高5000维）和多个科学领域任务中显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 传统距离度量在高维空间中失效（维度灾难），需转向基于拓扑结构的聚类范式；现有算法依赖预设簇数、对噪声敏感、难以适配高维复杂数据。
AI.method: AdaGraph完全基于kNN图拓扑进行聚类，不依赖欧氏距离；采用SLCD框架实现可扩展性；通过Graph-SCOPE（一种新型图结构簇有效性指标）作为无监督调优目标，自动确定最优簇数；无需降维、原生支持高维输入。
AI.result: Graph-SCOPE在10个高维合成数据集（d=10–5000）上平均ARI达0.900，9/10准确选出k，Kendall tau≥0.92；在肝癌基因共表达分析中发现其他方法（WGCNA等）未能识别的疾病特异性模块；文本聚类（20NG-6cat）ARI=0.751，较HDBSCAN提升62%；材料科学三个数据集上Graph-SCOPE得分均最高。
AI.conclusion: AdaGraph验证了结构中心范式在高维无监督学习中的有效性，突破距离度量局限，为生物、NLP、材料科学等领域提供鲁棒、自适应、可解释的图原生聚类新工具。

title: Sustainable Intelligence for the Wild: Democratizing Ecological Monitoring via Knowledge-Adaptive Edge Expert Agents
summary: Rapid biodiversity loss underscore the urgency of effective monitoring, yet manual surveys remain resource-intensive. While on-device AI offers a scalable alternative, its performance in the wild is often challenged by environmental variability. Current methods rely heavily on cloud resource, which requires continuous uploading of field data for model retraining. This approach is unsuitable for remote deployments because it consumes limited power and network connectivity. To address these constraints, this research proposes a shift from model adaptation to knowledge adaptation. We introduce an architecture that separates visual perception from reasoning, combining a visual encoder with a dynamic knowledge base. We uses an explicit knowledge base to replace implicitly encoding expert knowledge into model parameters. This method also supports knowledge sustainability by preserving expert insights in a structured form. Through cross-disciplinary collaboration with biologists and Indigenous communities, this work advances ethical AI co-development, fostering responsible and culturally informed ecosystem management.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于知识适应而非模型适应的轻量级AI架构，通过分离视觉感知与推理，并引入显式知识库替代隐式参数编码，以解决野外生物多样性监测中资源受限、环境多变及伦理协作等挑战。
AI.motivation: 快速生物多样性丧失凸显了高效监测的紧迫性，但传统人工调查成本高，而现有云端依赖型AI方法在偏远地区因功耗和网络限制难以部署。
AI.method: 提出一种解耦视觉编码器与动态知识库的新架构，用结构化显式知识库替代将专家知识隐式嵌入模型参数的方式，并通过跨学科合作（生物学家与原住民社区）实现AI协同开发。
AI.result: 实现了适用于资源受限野外场景的可持续知识更新机制，提升了AI系统在环境变化下的鲁棒性与文化适配性。
AI.conclusion: 知识适应范式比模型适应更适用于边缘生态监测任务，支持知识可持续性与伦理AI实践，为负责任的生态系统管理提供新路径。

title: A neurosymbolic Approach with Epistemic Deep Learning for Hierarchical Image Classification
summary: Deep neural networks achieve high accuracy on image classification tasks. Yet, they often produce overconfident predictions as which fail to express epistemic uncertainty, and frequently violate logical or structural constraints present in the data. These limitations are particularly pronounced in hierarchical classification, where predictions across fine and coarse levels must remain coherent. We propose, for the first time, a unified neurosymbolic and epistemic modelling framework that augments Swin Transformers with focal set reasoning and differentiable fuzzy logic. Rather than treating labels as isolated categories, our method induces data-driven focal sets within the learnt embedding space, which helps capture epistemic uncertainty over multiple plausible fine-grained classes. These focal sets form the basis of a belief-theoretic layer that uses fuzzy membership functions and t-norm conjunctions to encourage consistency between fine- and coarse-grained predictions. A learnable loss further balances calibration, mass regularisation, and logical consistency, allowing the model to adaptively trade off symbolic structure with data-driven evidence. In experiments on hierarchical image classification, our framework maintains accuracy on par with transformer baselines while providing more calibrated and interpretable predictions, reducing overconfidence and enforcing high logical consistency across hierarchical outputs. Our experimental results show that combining focal set reasoning with fuzzy logic provides a practical step toward deep learning models that are both accurate and epistemically aware.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合神经符号与认知不确定性建模的统一框架，将Swin Transformer与焦点集推理和可微模糊逻辑相结合，以提升层次化图像分类中预测的一致性、校准性和可解释性。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络在图像分类中虽准确率高，但常产生过度自信预测，无法表达认知不确定性，且易违反数据中的逻辑或结构约束，尤其在需细粒度与粗粒度预测保持一致的层次化分类中问题突出。
AI.method: 提出一种统一的神经符号与认知不确定性建模框架：在Swin Transformer基础上引入数据驱动的焦点集（focal sets）以建模嵌入空间中的认知不确定性；构建基于信任理论的层，利用模糊隶属函数和t-范数合取实现细/粗粒度预测一致性；设计可学习损失函数平衡校准性、质量正则化与逻辑一致性。
AI.result: 在层次化图像分类实验中，该框架在保持与Transformer基线相当准确率的同时，显著降低过自信现象，提升预测校准性与可解释性，并保证高逻辑一致性。
AI.conclusion: 融合焦点集推理与模糊逻辑是迈向兼具准确性与认知感知能力的深度学习模型的实用路径。

title: Real-Time Neural Hair Denoising
summary: We propose a lightweight real-time method for reconstructing strand-based hair G-Buffers from severely undersampled rasterized inputs. Our pipeline first applies neural spatial reconstruction and temporal accumulation to recover hair coverage, i.e., fractional hair visibility within a pixel, and tangent. It then uses a tangent-guided reconstruction step to complete the position, which is subsequently used for physically based deferred hair shading. We evaluate our method across a diverse set of hairstyles, including straight, wavy, afro, and ponytail styles, under both static and dynamic scenarios. Our method achieves higher hair reconstruction quality than existing hair-specific denoising techniques and general industrial neural reconstruction solutions such as DLSS and FSR.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种轻量级实时方法，用于从严重欠采样的光栅化输入中重建基于发丝的G-Buffers，通过神经空间重建、时序累积和切线引导的位置重建，实现高质量的物理延迟发丝着色。
AI.motivation: 现有发丝重建方法在质量或实时性上存在不足，难以处理严重欠采样的输入并兼顾多样发型与动态场景。
AI.method: 采用神经空间重建与时序累积恢复发丝覆盖率和切线，再通过切线引导完成位置重建，最终用于物理延迟发丝着色。
AI.result: 在多种发型（直发、波浪、爆炸头、马尾）及静态/动态场景下，重建质量优于现有发丝专用去噪方法及DLSS、FSR等通用神经重建方案。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在保持轻量与实时性的同时，显著提升了发丝G-Buffer重建质量，适用于复杂发型与动态应用。

title: RAGR: Review-Augmented Generative Recommendation
summary:
Sequential recommendation (SR) is traditionally formulated as next-item prediction over a chronological sequence of interacted items. Although recent generative recommendation (GR) methods introduce new machinery, such as semantic IDs, autoregressive decoding, and unified token spaces, they largely inherit the same item-only modeling assumption. We argue that this design constitutes a structural bottleneck, because user decision-making is not purely behavioral: while item interactions reveal what users choose, review feedback often explain why they choose it by exposing latent evaluative factors.
  Motivated by this observation, we propose Review-Augmented Generative Recommendation (RAGR), a novel GR framework that incorporates review feedback directly into the generative user sequence rather than treating reviews as auxiliary side information. Specifically, RAGR introduces a Review-Augmented User Sequence Modeling mechanism that interleaves item semantic IDs and review semantic IDs in chronological order to construct a mixed behavioral-semantic sequence, enabling review signals to participate directly in autoregressive next-token generation. To preserve the recommendation objective, we further introduce an Item-Centric Task Generation Alignment strategy based on direct preference optimization (DPO), which encourages the model to favor item tokens over review tokens at prediction positions. Experiments on three real-world datasets show that RAGR yields consistent and significant gains over strong GR backbones across all metrics. Our code and data are available at \url{https://github.com/Zhang-Yingyi/TKDE_RAGR}.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Review-Augmented Generative Recommendation (RAGR)，将用户评论反馈直接融入生成式推荐的用户序列建模中，通过混合行为与语义序列并结合偏好优化对齐策略，显著提升推荐性能。
AI.motivation: 传统顺序推荐和生成式推荐仅建模用户交互行为（item-only），忽略了评论中蕴含的‘为什么选择’的潜在评价因素，构成结构性瓶颈。
AI.method: 提出RAGR框架：1）Review-Augmented User Sequence Modeling——按时间顺序交错排列物品语义ID与评论语义ID，构建混合行为-语义序列；2）Item-Centric Task Generation Alignment——基于DPO引导模型在预测位置更偏好物品token而非评论token。
AI.result: 在三个真实数据集上，RAGR在所有指标上均一致且显著优于强生成式推荐基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 将评论反馈作为序列一部分而非辅助信息直接参与生成过程，并通过任务对齐机制保障推荐目标，可有效突破item-only建模范式瓶颈，提升生成式推荐效果。

title: Policy Library CBF: Finite-Horizon Safety at Runtime via Parallel Rollouts
summary: Safety-critical autonomy in unstructured environments poses significant challenges for online safety certification under evolving constraints. We propose Policy Library Control Barrier Function~(PL-CBF), a runtime safety filter that evaluates a library of fallback policies via parallel finite-horizon rollouts, selects the least invasive safe mode, and enforces safety by solving a quadratic program that minimally modifies a nominal policy. We provide a theoretical analysis based on a finite-horizon language metric over closed-loop behaviors, characterizing policy-library coverage requirements for certifying finite-horizon safety. Simulations on a planar double-integrator (4 states), highway driving with abrupt friction changes using a realistic nonlinear vehicle model (8 states), and 3D quadrotor navigation in crowded dynamic environments (12 states) demonstrate improved safety coverage over single-policy safety filters while retaining millisecond-level runtime.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Policy Library Control Barrier Function (PL-CBF) 的在线安全过滤器，通过并行有限时域滚动评估多个备选策略，选择最不具侵入性的安全模式，并以最小修改名义策略的方式求解二次规划来保障安全性；理论分析基于闭合环路行为的有限时域语言度量，明确了策略库覆盖要求；实验在多种复杂场景中验证了其更高的安全性覆盖与毫秒级实时性能。
AI.motivation: 在非结构化环境中实现安全关键型自主系统面临在线安全认证困难，尤其当约束动态变化时，传统单策略安全过滤方法难以兼顾安全性与灵活性。
AI.method: 提出PL-CBF：构建策略库，对各策略进行并行有限时域滚动仿真；基于语言度量定义策略库覆盖性；选择最安全且侵入性最小的策略；通过二次规划最小修正名义控制策略以满足CBF约束。
AI.result: 在平面双积分器（4维）、高速公路突发摩擦变化的非线性车辆模型（8维）及3D动态密集环境中的四旋翼（12维）仿真中，PL-CBF相比单策略安全滤波器显著提升安全覆盖范围，同时保持毫秒级运行速度。
AI.conclusion: PL-CBF通过策略库与有限时域行为度量，实现了高安全性覆盖与实时性的良好平衡，为非结构化环境下安全关键自主系统提供了可理论认证的实用化安全过滤框架。

title: Exploring Lightweight Large Language Models for Court View Generation
summary: Criminal Court View Generation (CVG) is a critical task in Legal Artificial Intelligence (Legal AI), involving the generation of court view based on case facts. In this work, we systematically explore the capabilities of lightweight (smaller than 2B) large language models (LLMs) in CVG and their impact on charge prediction. Our study addresses four key questions: (1) how does different architecture of LLMs affect the CVG quality and charge prediction. (2) how does LLMs size contribute to the performance, (3) how do lightweight LLMs compare with Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) in these tasks, and (4) how does predicting charge by court view generation first compare with predicting it directly. Additionally, we also develop CVGEvalKit, an evaluation framework including three public available datasets for CVG tasks, as well as predicting their charges. Comprehensive experiments are conducted on this framework, where models are trained on a mixed training set and evaluated on each dataset's test set. Experimental results provide new insights into the trade-offs between model architecture, model size, and the influence between different tasks, highlighting the potential of lightweight LLMs in judicial AI applications. The source code is anonymously available at \url{https://github.com/ZhitianHou/CVGEvalKit}

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了轻量级大语言模型（<2B参数）在刑事法庭观点生成（CVG）任务中的能力及其对罪名预测的影响，并构建了包含三个公开数据集的评估框架CVGEvalKit。
AI.motivation: 探索轻量级大语言模型在法律AI中刑事法庭观点生成任务上的有效性及与罪名预测任务的关联性，弥补现有研究对小模型在司法场景中潜力的忽视。
AI.method: 通过对比不同架构和规模的轻量级LLMs、传统深度神经网络（DNNs），以及两种罪名预测范式（直接预测 vs. 先生成法庭观点再预测），在自建评估框架CVGEvalKit上开展系统实验。
AI.result: 实验揭示了模型架构、规模与跨任务影响间的权衡关系，表明轻量级LLMs在CVG及罪名预测任务中具有竞争力，甚至优于部分DNN方法；先生成法庭观点再预测罪名的范式具有一定优势。
AI.conclusion: 轻量级大语言模型在司法AI应用中具备实际潜力，尤其适用于资源受限场景；CVGEvalKit为后续研究提供了标准化评估基础。

title: Language Game: Talking to Non-Human Systems
summary: Language carries thought and coordination among humans but rarely reaches further along the spectrum of diverse intelligence. Yet non-neural systems -- from gene regulatory networks and microbial consortia to fungi -- are increasingly recognized as substrates of computation, decision-making and memory, making dialogue with non-human intelligence newly conceivable. Today such dialogue is attempted only by proxy: a large language model speaks on the system's behalf, so any intelligence on display originates from the model while the system itself remains silent. Here we ask whether the system can speak in its own voice. Following Wittgenstein, who located meaning in use, we treat communication as a game played with the system. Its internal dynamics are frozen as the nonlinear core of a reinforcement-learning policy, with only linear input and output interfaces trained. Through use and reward, the system's states and responses acquire meaning within the game, so playing becomes speaking. Because different architectures playing the same game optimize the same reward, their behaviors can all be read as pursuit of that reward; the game serves as a lingua franca across otherwise irreconcilable representations. Given a human prompt, a language model routes it to the game whose semantics best match it and designs an environmental state for which the desired action is the rational response, letting the system reply through its own behavior. Applied across diverse gene regulatory networks and reinforcement-learning tasks, the framework yields fluent dialogue without altering any system parameter, shows that well-trained agents of disparate origin converge on similar behavior, and reveals that specific GRN properties make a system easier or harder to talk with -- an inductive bias of the reservoir itself. Our framework opens a new route to conversing with any dynamical system on its own terms.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新框架，让非神经动力系统（如基因调控网络）通过与人类的交互游戏‘用自己的声音说话’，无需修改系统本身参数，仅训练线性接口，借助强化学习和语言模型作为语义路由器实现跨系统对话。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖大语言模型代理非人类系统发声，导致系统自身沉默；作者希望让系统直接参与有意义的对话，体现其内在动态与智能。
AI.method: 将系统内部动力学冻结为强化学习策略的非线性核心，仅训练线性输入输出接口；定义通信为与系统共玩的博弈，意义在使用中生成；用语言模型将人类提示路由至语义匹配的游戏，并构造环境状态以激发系统产生理性响应行为。
AI.result: 在多种基因调控网络和RL任务上实现流畅对话；不同架构代理在相同游戏中行为趋同；发现GRN特定属性影响可对话性，揭示储层固有归纳偏置。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为与任意动力系统在其自身术语上对话提供了新路径，拓展了人机交互与跨物种/系统智能交流的理论与实践边界。

title: LinAlg-Bench: A Forensic Benchmark Revealing Structural Failure Modes in LLM Mathematical Reasoning
comment: 42 pages, 3 figures, 12 tables. NeurIPS 2026 Evaluations and Datasets Track submission. Dataset: https://huggingface.co/datasets/LinAlgBench/linalg-bench
summary: We introduce LinAlg-Bench, a diagnostic benchmark evaluating 10 frontier large language models on structured linear algebra computation across a strict dimensional gradient of 3x3, 4x4, and 5x5 matrices. Spanning 9 task types and 660 SymPy-certified problems, the benchmark exhaustively evaluates 6,600 model outputs. Beyond binary accuracy, LinAlg-Bench introduces a three-stage automated forensic pipeline classifying 1,156 failures into ten primary error tags with fine-grained subtypes, revealing that LLM mathematical failure is not random but structurally constrained by algorithm type and matrix dimension. Our central finding is a sharp behavioral threshold at 4x4 scale: below it, models fail through execution errors -- sign tracking failures, arithmetic drift, and parity errors; above it, failure transitions to computational abandonment, with models fabricating responses through tool roleplay, constraint-consistent confabulation, and structured hallucination rather than attempting computation.
