This image-to-multimodal retrieval setting presents two asymmetries: a modality disparity -- a visual query must match image--text items, and a granularity disparity -- a cropped query must be compared with full images containing background context and possible distractors. Detection-based pipelines handle the granularity disparity through explicit localization but incur extra cost and error propagation, whereas CLIP-style encoders avoid detection, but are vulnerable to backgrounds or irrelevant items. To address these limitations, we propose TIGER-FG, a text-guided implicit fine-grained grounding framework for image-to-multimodal e-commerce retrieval. TIGER-FG uses item text as semantic guidance to produce target-focused item representations without object detection for retrieval. We further introduce dual distillation objectives that preserve target-region spatial consistency and query--item similarity structure, yielding more stable and discriminative multimodal representations. In addition, we construct ECom-RF-IMMR, a realistic benchmark suite with a 10M-pair training set and two evaluation benchmarks covering standard and cluttered item layouts. TIGER-FG improves Recall@1 over the strongest baseline by 6.1 and 34.4 percentage points on the two evaluation benchmarks, respectively, with only 85.7M query-side parameters and 256-dim embeddings. Results on public e-commerce benchmarks further demonstrate its generalization to noisy and one-to-many retrieval scenarios. Code and data will be released.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TIGER-FG框架，用于解决电商图像搜索中裁剪图查询与图文商品候选之间的模态与粒度不对称问题，通过文本引导的隐式细粒度定位和双重蒸馏机制提升检索性能。
AI.motivation: 电商图像搜索中存在模态不对称（视觉查询 vs 图文商品）和粒度不对称（裁剪查询 vs 全图含背景干扰），现有检测方法成本高、误差传播，CLIP类方法易受背景干扰。
AI.method: 提出TIGER-FG：利用商品文本作为语义引导，实现无需目标检测的细粒度表征学习；引入双重蒸馏目标——保持目标区域空间一致性与查询-商品相似性结构。
AI.result: 在自建ECom-RF-IMMR基准上，Recall@1分别提升6.1和34.4个百分点；仅85.7M查询端参数、256维嵌入；在公开电商基准上也验证了对噪声和一对多场景的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: TIGER-FG有效缓解图像到多模态检索中的不对称挑战，在精度、效率与鲁棒性间取得更好平衡，为实际电商搜索提供新范式。

title: Agent Bazaar: Enabling Economic Alignment in Multi-Agent Marketplaces
summary: The deployment of Large Language Models (LLMs) as autonomous economic agents introduces systemic risks that extend beyond individual capability failures. As agents transition to directly interacting with marketplaces, their collective behavior can amplify volatility and mask deception at scale. We introduce the Agent Bazaar, a multi-agent simulation framework for evaluating Economic Alignment, the capacity of agentic systems to preserve market stability and integrity. We identify two failure modes: (1) Algorithmic Instability in a B2C market ("The Crash"), where firms amplify price volatility until the market collapses, and (2) Sybil Deception in a C2C market ("The Lemon Market"), where a single deceptive agent controlling multiple coordinated seller identities floods the market with fraudulent listings, eroding trust and consumer welfare. We evaluate frontier and open-weight models across both scenarios and find that models largely fail to self-regulate, with failure severity varying by model rather than by size. We propose economically aligned harnesses, Stabilizing Firms and Skeptical Guardians, that improve outcomes but remain fragile under harder market conditions. To close this gap, we train agents with REINFORCE++ using an adaptive curriculum, producing a 9B model that outperforms all evaluated frontier and open-weight models. We propose the Economic Alignment Score (EAS), a 4-component scalar metric aggregating stability, integrity, welfare, and profitability, enabling direct cross-model comparison. Our results show that economic alignment is orthogonal to general capability and can be directly trained with targeted RL.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Agent Bazaar多智能体仿真框架，用于评估经济对齐（Economic Alignment）能力，识别出算法不稳定和Sybil欺骗两类市场失效模式，并通过强化学习训练出更优的9B模型，提出可量化的经济对齐评分（EAS）。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型作为自主经济代理部署时，其集体行为可能放大市场波动、掩盖大规模欺骗，带来系统性风险，亟需评估和提升其经济对齐能力。
AI.method: 构建Agent Bazaar多智能体仿真框架；定义两种典型失败模式（The Crash与The Lemon Market）；评估前沿及开源模型表现；设计稳定化企业（Stabilizing Firms）与怀疑型守护者（Skeptical Guardians）等对齐机制；采用REINFORCE++与自适应课程学习训练新模型；提出四维经济对齐评分（EAS）。
AI.result: 发现模型自我调节能力普遍不足，失败程度取决于模型而非参数量；所提对齐机制在简单场景有效但鲁棒性差；经RL训练的9B模型全面优于所有对比模型；EAS证实经济对齐与通用能力正交且可独立优化。
AI.conclusion: 经济对齐是LLM作为经济代理的关键新维度，不能由通用能力自然涌现，需通过面向经济目标的建模、评测与强化学习进行专门训练与评估。

title: NORM-Nav: Zero-Shot Mobile Robot Navigation with Natural Language Behavioral Constraints
summary: Mobile robots operating in human-centered environments must generate not only collision-free paths but also trajectories that follow local behavioral conventions. Conventional costmap-based navigation emphasizes geometric feasibility and often overlooks such requirements, which can result in socially inappropriate behaviors. This paper presents NORM-Nav, a zero-shot framework that integrates natural language behavioral constraints into costmap-based planning. An LLM parses each instruction into structured constraints and grounds them using real-time vision--LiDAR perception. These constraints are encoded as multi-layer costmaps that represent geometric, semantic, directional, and velocity cues and are directly compatible with standard grid-based planners. Simulation and real-world experiments indicate that NORM-Nav improves task success rates and produces trajectories closer to human references than representative baselines. The project website is available at https://ei-nav.github.io/NORM-Nav.

AI.tldr: 本文提出NORM-Nav，一种零样本框架，将自然语言行为约束融入基于代价图的导航规划中，通过大语言模型解析指令并结合实时多模态感知生成多层代价图，提升机器人在人类环境中的社会合规性与任务成功率。
AI.motivation: 传统基于代价图的导航方法侧重几何可行性，忽视人类环境中的行为规范，易导致不恰当的社会行为。
AI.method: 利用大语言模型（LLM）解析自然语言指令为结构化行为约束，并结合视觉-LiDAR实时感知进行语义与空间 grounding；将约束编码为包含几何、语义、方向和速度信息的多层代价图，兼容标准栅格规划器。
AI.result: 仿真与真实世界实验表明，NORM-Nav相较基线方法提升了任务成功率，并生成更接近人类参考轨迹的路径。
AI.conclusion: NORM-Nav实现了无需额外训练即可将自然语言行为规范嵌入传统导航框架，有效增强移动机器人在人本环境中的社会智能与实用性。

title: Roll Out and Roll Back: Diffusion LLMs are Their Own Efficiency Teachers
summary: Diffusion Large Language Models (DLLMs) promise fast parallel generation, yet open-source DLLMs still face a severe quality-speed trade-off: accelerating decoding by revealing multiple tokens often causes substantial quality degradation. We attribute this dilemma to a train-inference mismatch amplified by irreversible decoding. While training reconstructs tokens from randomly corrupted states, efficient inference requires an adaptive denoising order, where easier tokens are revealed earlier and context-dependent ones are deferred. This view motivates two complementary methods: an inference-time method that makes parallel decoding revokable, and a training-time extension that distills the reliable order exposed by this revokable process. Accordingly, we first propose Wide-In, Narrow-Out (WINO), a training-free decoding algorithm that enables revokable parallel generation. WINO aggressively drafts multiple tokens, verifies generated tokens with enriched global context, and re-masks unreliable ones for later refinement. Building on this discovered order, we further introduce WINO+, which injects the verified denoising trajectories produced by WINO into model parameters, aligning training with efficient inference. Experiments on LLaDA and MMaDA show that WINO improves both quality and efficiency, while WINO+ further strengthens this progression. On GSM8K, WINO improves accuracy from 73.24% to 75.82% with a 6.10x step reduction, and WINO+ further achieves 76.58% with a 6.83x reduction. On Flickr30K, WINO+ reaches a 16.22x step reduction with improved CIDEr. These results demonstrate that DLLMs can serve as their own efficiency teachers by first discovering reliable denoising orders through revokable decoding and then learning to follow them for faster generation. Code is available at https://github.com/Feng-Hong/WINO-DLLM/tree/WINO-plus.

AI.tldr: 本文提出WINO和WINO+两种方法，解决扩散大语言模型（DLLMs）在并行解码中质量与速度的权衡问题：WINO是一种无需训练的可撤销并行解码算法，WINO+则通过蒸馏WINO发现的可靠去噪轨迹来改进训练，显著提升生成质量与效率。
AI.motivation: 开源DLLMs在加速并行解码时因多token同时生成导致质量严重下降，根源在于训练（随机加噪重建）与推理（需自适应、上下文感知的去噪顺序）之间的不匹配，且传统解码不可逆。
AI.method: 提出两种互补方法：1) WINO——训练无关的推理时可撤销并行解码算法，包含多token草稿、全局上下文验证与不可靠token重掩码；2) WINO+——训练时方法，将WINO生成的可靠去噪轨迹蒸馏进模型参数，使训练对齐高效推理。
AI.result: 在GSM8K上，WINO将准确率从73.24%提升至75.82%，步数减少6.10倍；WINO+进一步达76.58%准确率、6.83倍步数减少；在Flickr30K上，WINO+实现16.22倍步数减少且CIDEr提升。
AI.conclusion: DLLMs可通过自身可撤销解码发现可靠去噪顺序，并以此作为‘效率教师’指导训练，从而打破质量-速度权衡，实现高质量、高效率生成。

title: Geometric Asymmetry in MoE Specialization: Functional Decorrelation and Representational Overlap
summary: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures achieve scalable capacity through sparse routing, yet the geometric structure of expert specialization remains poorly understood. We introduce a unified Jacobian-PCA-Grassmann framework for analyzing MoE layers in both function space and representation space. Across pretrained MoE Transformers (Mistral, Qwen), we find a consistent structural asymmetry: experts exhibit strong functional decorrelation (consistently low, near-zero cross-expert Jacobian alignment) while their routed representations occupy distinct but partially overlapping subspaces. This indicates that functional decorrelation and representation overlap coexist rather than coincide in MoE specialization. Controlled routing experiments further indicate that routing sparsity appears to be a key factor shaping this geometry: top-k routing induces sharper functional separation and larger subspace divergence, whereas fully soft routing yields more entangled expert structure. Together, these results suggest a geometric interpretation in which MoE layers may be viewed as implementing locally decorrelated operators over overlapping submanifolds on a shared representation manifold, and provide a general diagnostic framework for studying conditional computation in modern Transformer architectures.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Jacobian-PCA-Grassmann的统一框架，用于分析MoE模型中专家在函数空间和表征空间中的几何结构，发现专家功能上高度去相关但表征子空间部分重叠，并指出路由稀疏性是塑造该几何结构的关键因素。
AI.motivation: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) 架构虽通过稀疏路由实现可扩展容量，但其专家专业化背后的几何结构仍缺乏深入理解。
AI.method: 提出Jacobian-PCA-Grassmann统一分析框架，应用于预训练MoE Transformer（Mistral、Qwen），并开展控制路由实验（top-k vs. 全软路由）以检验几何特性。
AI.result: 发现专家间功能上强去相关（Jacobian对齐度近零），但其路由表征占据不同却部分重叠的子空间；路由越稀疏（如top-k），功能分离越明显、子空间差异越大。
AI.conclusion: MoE层可几何地解释为在共享表征流形上的重叠子流形上实施局部去相关的算子；该框架为研究现代Transformer中的条件计算提供了通用诊断工具。

title: Voices in the Loop: Mapping Participatory AI
comment: Accepted to The 2026 ACM Conference on Fairness, Accountability, and Transparency (FAccT '26), June 25--28, 2026, Montreal, QC, Canada
summary: Participatory approaches to artificial intelligence are increasingly documented across public, civic, and humanitarian settings, but evidence about how participation is organized remains fragmented. This paper reports on the construction of an open repository and interactive atlas of participatory AI initiatives, using records harmonized from Maga~na and Shilton's Trustworthy AI corpus, and additional audited cases from research and practice. We contribute three elements. First, we specify a reproducible protocol for discovery, vetting, harmonization, geocoding, provenance tracking, and release-based publication of participatory AI records. Second, we report corpus-level patterns in geography, participation tiers, lifecycle loci, organizational form, verification status, and remaining documentation gaps. Documented initiatives remain concentrated in a small number of countries, while participation is most often coded at problem formulation, evaluation, and governance rather than model development or training. Third, we show how the atlas operationalizes a design and governance framework for participatory-by-default AI infrastructures through versioned releases, record-linked issue and annotation channels, schema feedback workflows, and redaction or restricted-disclosure requests. The atlas is intended to support comparative research, policy learning, and community scrutiny through a living inventory that can be updated, contested, and reused.

AI.tldr: 本文构建了一个开放的参与式AI倡议存储库和交互式地图集，提出了可复现的数据处理协议，分析了现有案例的地理分布与参与模式，并设计了支持参与式AI基础设施的设计与治理框架。
AI.motivation: 参与式人工智能在公共、公民和人道主义场景中日益增多，但关于其组织方式的实证研究仍零散不系统。
AI.method: 基于Magaña和Shilton的可信AI语料库及额外审核案例，构建开放存储库与交互式地图集；制定涵盖发现、审核、标准化、地理编码、溯源追踪与发布的一整套可复现协议；开展语料级模式分析，并实现支持版本化、记录关联、反馈与隐私保护的地图集功能设计。
AI.result: 发现参与式AI倡议高度集中于少数国家；参与多发生在问题定义、评估与治理阶段，而非模型开发或训练；地图集已支持比较研究、政策学习与社区监督。
AI.conclusion: 该地图集作为‘活’的目录，为参与式AI的实证研究、政策制定与社区问责提供了可更新、可质疑、可重用的基础设施。

title: WinDeskGround: A Benchmark for Robust GUI Grounding in Complex Multi-Window Desktop Environments
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have revolutionized GUI automation, yet their efficacy is largely established on idealized, single-layer interfaces. This paper identifies a critical reliability gap: state-of-the-art agents face distinct robustness challenges in real-world desktop environments characterized by multi-window stacking, occlusion, and visual clutter. To address this, we introduce WinDeskGround, a novel benchmark and synthesis framework tailored for evaluating GUI grounding robustness. Unlike static datasets, our framework parametrically generates complex desktop scenarios by controlling window occlusion, layout density, and semantic similarity, thereby simulating the distribution shifts of authentic workflows. We construct a diverse meta-dataset of 1,356 high-fidelity instruction-target pairs and conduct comprehensive evaluations of five leading MLLMs. Our results demonstrate that while top-tier agents excel in simplified settings, their accuracy declines under partial occlusion. WinDeskGround provides a valuable benchmark to facilitate the assessment and advancement of GUI agent robustness in realistic environments. The code is available at https://github.com/ZZZhr-1/WinDeskGround.

AI.tldr: 本文提出WinDeskGround基准和合成框架，用于评估多模态大语言模型在真实桌面环境（如多窗口堆叠、遮挡和视觉杂乱）下的GUI定位鲁棒性，并揭示当前模型在部分遮挡场景下性能显著下降。
AI.motivation: 现有MLLMs在理想单层界面中表现良好，但在真实桌面环境（多窗口堆叠、遮挡、视觉杂乱）中存在显著鲁棒性缺陷。
AI.method: 提出WinDeskGround：一个可参数化生成复杂桌面场景（控制窗口遮挡、布局密度、语义相似性）的基准与合成框架，并构建含1356个高质量指令-目标对的元数据集，对5种主流MLLM进行综合评测。
AI.result: 实验表明，顶级MLLM在简化设置中表现优异，但在部分遮挡条件下准确率明显下降；WinDeskGround为GUI智能体鲁棒性评估提供了新基准。
AI.conclusion: WinDeskGround填补了GUI自动化鲁棒性评估的空白，推动MLLM在真实复杂桌面环境中的实用化发展。

title: Improved Baselines with Representation Autoencoders
summary: Representation Autoencoders (RAE) replace traditional VAE with pretrained vision encoders. In this paper, we systematically investigate several design choices and find three insights which simplify and improve RAE. First, we study a generalized formulation where the representation is defined as sum of the last k encoder layers rather than solely the final layer. This simple change greatly improves reconstruction without encoder finetuning or specialized data (e.g., text, faces). Second, we study the prevalent assumption that RAE (using pretrained representation as encoder) replaces representation alignment (REPA), which distills the same representation to intermediate layers instead. Through large-scale empirical analysis, we uncover a surprising finding: RAE and REPA exhibit complementary working mechanisms, allowing the same representation to be used as both encoder and target for intermediate diffusion layers. Finally, the original RAE struggles with classifier-free guidance (CFG) and requires training a second, weaker diffusion model for AutoGuidance (AG). We show that REPA itself can be viewed as x-prediction in RAE latent space. By simply re-parameterizing the output of the DiT model, it can provide guidance for "free". Overall, RAEv2 leads to more than 10x faster convergence over the original RAE, achieving a state-of-the-art gFID of 1.06 in just 80 epochs on ImageNet-256. On FDr^k, RAEv2 achieves a state-of-the-art 2.17 at just 80 epochs compared to the previous best 3.26 (800 epochs) without any post-training. This motivates EP_FID@k (epochs to reach unguided gFID <= k) as a measure of training efficiency. RAEv2 attains an EP_FID@2 of 35 epochs, versus 177 for the original RAE. We also validate our approach across diverse settings for text-to-image generation and navigation world models, showing consistent improvements. Code is available at https://raev2.github.io.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RAEv2，通过三项关键改进显著提升了Representation Autoencoders（RAE）的性能与训练效率：1）使用最后k层特征和作为表征，提升重建质量；2）揭示RAE与REPA机制互补，可协同用于中间扩散层；3）将REPA重参数化为RAE潜在空间中的x预测，实现免额外模型的Classifier-Free Guidance。RAEv2在ImageNet-256上仅80轮即达gFID=1.06，收敛速度超原RAE 10倍，并提出EP_FID@k新指标衡量训练效率。
AI.motivation: 解决原始Representation Autoencoders（RAE）存在的三大问题：重建质量受限、与REPA关系不清、Classifier-Free Guidance需额外训练AutoGuidance模型，从而提升表征驱动生成模型的效率与效果。
AI.method: 1）推广表征定义为预训练编码器最后k层特征之和；2）通过大规模实验分析RAE与REPA的协作机制；3）将REPA重参数化为RAE潜在空间中的x-prediction，使DiT输出直接支持CFG。
AI.result: RAEv2在ImageNet-256上80 epoch达成gFID=1.06（SOTA），FDr^k=2.17（此前SOTA为3.26，需800 epoch）；EP_FID@2仅需35 epoch（原RAE需177 epoch）；在文本到图像与导航世界模型中也验证了泛化性。
AI.conclusion: RAEv2通过更优的表征设计、对RAE/REPA互补机制的理解及CFG的免费实现，大幅提升了训练效率与生成质量，确立了新的技术范式，并提出了EP_FID@k作为评估训练效率的新标准。

title: Improving BM25 Code Retrieval Under Fixed Generic Tokenization: Adaptive q-Log Odds as a Drop-In BM25 Fix
summary: In retrieval-augmented coding, failures often begin when the relevant file is absent from the retrieved context. Under frozen generic tokenization, where a BM25 index has been built by a search system whose analyzer the practitioner does not control, this failure is routine: BM25's logarithmic RSJ-odds IDF under-separates the identifier tail that distinguishes one function from another. We replace the outer logarithm of the Robertson-Spärck-Jones odds with a q-logarithm. At q=1 the transform recovers BM25 exactly by L'Hôpital's rule, and for q<1 it is a Box-Cox transform of the RSJ odds with lambda = 1-q. On CoIR CodeSearchNet Go (182K documents), oracle-tuned NDCG@10 rises from 0.2575 to 0.4874 (absolute +0.2299; +89.3% relative; zero sign reversals in 10,000 paired-bootstrap resamples, reported as p <= 10^-4). The effect is graded across code languages and is near-zero on BEIR text. A one-parameter closed form estimates a corpus-level q from hapax density and stays near q=1 on corpora where BM25 is already optimal. The index-time cost is a single pass over the sparse score matrix and query latency is unchanged. A tokenizer ablation shows that identifier-aware tokenization largely removes the incremental gain from q-IDF.

AI.tldr: 本文提出q-IDF方法，通过用q-对数替代BM25中的外层对数，提升代码检索性能，尤其在标识符区分度低的场景下效果显著，且索引开销极小。
AI.motivation: BM25在代码检索中因通用冻结分词导致标识符尾部区分不足，常无法召回相关文件。
AI.method: 将Robertson-Spärck-Jones（RSJ）odds的外层对数替换为q-对数，形成q-IDF；q=1时退化为标准BM25；q<1时等价于Box-Cox变换；提出基于词频密度的单参数q估计方法。
AI.result: 在CoIR CodeSearchNet Go数据集上，oracle调优的NDCG@10从0.2575提升至0.4874（绝对+0.2299，相对+89.3%），统计显著（p ≤ 10⁻⁴）；效果因编程语言而异，在BEIR文本检索上几乎无增益；标识符感知分词可消除q-IDF的额外收益。
AI.conclusion: q-IDF是一种轻量、理论一致、代码友好的IDF改进，在冻结分词约束下有效缓解BM25对标识符尾部的欠分离问题，适用于实际代码搜索系统。

title: Interaction-Breaking Adversarial Learning Framework for Robust Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
comment: 8 pages for main, 27 pages for total, Accepted to ICML 2026
summary: Cooperation is central to multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL), yet learned coordination can be fragile when external perturbations disrupt inter-agent interactions. Prior robust MARL methods have primarily considered value-oriented attacks, leaving a gap in robustness when interaction structures themselves are corrupted. In this paper, we propose an interaction-breaking adversarial learning (IBAL) framework that takes an information-theoretic view to construct attacks that impede coordination by perturbing agents' observations and actions, and trains agents to perform reliably under such disruptions. Empirically, our approach improves robustness over existing robust MARL baselines across diverse attack settings and yields stronger performance even under agent-missing scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种交互破坏型对抗学习（IBAL）框架，从信息论角度构建攻击以干扰智能体间的协调，并训练智能体在观测与动作被扰动时仍保持鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有鲁棒多智能体强化学习方法主要关注值层面的攻击，缺乏对交互结构被破坏情形下的鲁棒性保障。
AI.method: 提出IBAL框架，通过信息论视角设计扰动智能体观测与动作的对抗攻击，同时训练智能体抵抗此类交互破坏。
AI.result: 在多种攻击设置下，该方法优于现有鲁棒MARL基线；即使在部分智能体缺失场景中也展现出更强性能。
AI.conclusion: IBAL有效提升了多智能体系统在交互结构受扰下的协调鲁棒性，拓展了鲁棒MARL的研究边界。

title: Generalizable and Actionable Parts Pose Estimation with Symmetry Annotation-Free Learning Strategy
comment: Accepted as a poster at the Forty-third International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026)
summary: Urgently needed generalizable robot object interaction and manipulation requires high-quality Cross-Category object perception. As a pioneer of this area, Generalizable and Actionable Parts (GAParts) understanding has attracted increasing attention from relevant researchers. However, most recent works either have insufficient design regarding the symmetry issue or require rich symmetry annotation, which severely impedes precise GAPart pose estimation in data-lacking scenarios. In this paper, we propose SAFAG, a novel Symmetry Annotation-Free framework for Generalizable and Actionable Parts Pose Estimation. Specifically, we suggest a stepwise refinement two-stage framework for candidate-to-final quaternion regression, and tackle the symmetry prediction as a probability distribution problem with self-supervised learning strategy. The experimental results demonstrate the superior performance and robustness of our SAFAG. We believe that our work has the enormous potential to be applied in many areas of embodied AI system.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需对称性标注的通用可操作部件（GAParts）姿态估计框架SAFAG，通过两阶段渐进式四元数回归和自监督学习解决对称性预测问题，在数据稀缺场景下展现出优越性能和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理物体对称性问题时设计不足或依赖大量对称性标注，难以在数据稀缺场景下实现精确的GAParts姿态估计。
AI.method: 提出无需对称性标注的SAFAG框架，采用分步优化的两阶段结构进行候选到最终四元数回归，并将对称性预测建模为概率分布问题，结合自监督学习策略。
AI.result: 实验结果表明SAFAG在性能和鲁棒性方面优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: SAFAG为通用机器人物体交互与操作提供了新思路，具有在具身智能系统中广泛应用的潜力。

title: Closing the Gap at CRAC 2026: Two-Stage Adaptation for LLM-Based Multilingual Coreference Resolution
summary: We present our submission to the LLM track of the 2026 Computational Models of Reference, Anaphora and Coreference (CRAC 2026) shared task. With an average CoNLL F1 score of 74.32 on the official test set, our system ranked first in the LLM track, and third overall. Our system is based on the Gemma-3-27b model, fine-tuned using a two-stage strategy with a multilingual base adapter followed by dataset-specific adapters. We represent mention spans by their headword using an XML-inspired format with local reindexing and annotate documents iteratively. These design choices proved effective across languages, document lengths, and annotation guidelines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Gemma-3-27b模型的两阶段微调方法，在CRAC 2026 LLM赛道中以74.32平均CoNLL F1分获得第一名，系统采用XML风格头词表示与迭代标注策略，具备跨语言、长文档和多标注规范鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 提升大语言模型在指代消解、回指与共指任务中的多语言、长文档及不同标注规范下的泛化能力，并在CRAC 2026共享任务中取得领先性能。
AI.method: 基于Gemma-3-27b模型，采用两阶段适配器微调：先训练多语言基础适配器，再训练数据集特异性适配器；使用XML风格格式以头词表示提及跨度，并引入局部重索引；对文档进行迭代式标注。
AI.result: 在CRAC 2026官方测试集上取得74.32的平均CoNLL F1分数，位居LLM赛道第一、总排名第三。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法（两阶段适配器微调+头词XML表示+迭代标注）在多语言、不同文档长度和标注指南下均表现稳健，验证了其通用性和有效性。

title: Federated Nested Learning: Collaborative Training of Self-Referential Memories for Test-Time Adaptation
summary: We rethink Federated Learning (FL) from a nested learning perspective, framing the core challenge as how to collaboratively learn optimization rules, not just static models, to tackle Non-IID client data. To address this, we propose Federated Nested Learning (FedNL), a novel framework that reformulates FL as a three-level nested optimization system. FedNL embeds Titans-based linear attention into FL, enabling clients to perform lightweight, zero-shot test-time adaptation by treating a delta rule as an online gradient step. Experiments on Non-IID MMLU and long-context benchmarks show that FedNL achieves competitive performance in short-context reasoning, enhances the performance of long-context retrieval and streaming Cross-Entropy, and maintains constant inference memory.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FedNL框架，从嵌套学习视角重构联邦学习，使客户端能通过零样本测试时自适应提升非独立同分布数据下的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统联邦学习难以应对客户端数据非独立同分布（Non-IID）的挑战，本文旨在协同学习优化规则而非仅静态模型参数。
AI.method: 提出联邦嵌套学习（FedNL）框架，构建三层嵌套优化系统，并在其中嵌入基于Titans的线性注意力机制，使客户端可将delta规则视为在线梯度步实现轻量级零样本测试时自适应。
AI.result: 在Non-IID MMLU和长上下文基准测试中，FedNL在短上下文推理上表现具竞争力，显著提升长上下文检索与流式交叉熵性能，并保持恒定推理内存开销。
AI.conclusion: FedNL通过嵌套优化与线性注意力机制，有效提升了联邦学习在Non-IID场景下的泛化性、适应性与效率，为动态优化规则学习提供了新范式。

title: Sketch Then Paint: Hierarchical Reinforcement Learning for Diffusion Multi-Modal Large Language Models
summary: Diffusion Multi-Modal Large Language Models (dMLLMs) are powerful for image generation, but optimizing them through reinforcement learning (RL) remains a major challenge. One primary difficulty is that a single image can be generated through many different unmasking sequences, which makes calculating importance ratios often intractable. Additionally, existing methods tend to ignore the hierarchical generation process of dMLLMs, where early tokens define the global layout and later tokens focus on local details. By assigning uniform rewards to all tokens, these current methods fail to reflect the actual contribution of each token to the final image. To address these issues, we propose Hierarchical Token GRPO (HT-GRPO), which integrates this hierarchy directly into the policy optimization process. Our approach features a Sketch-Then-Paint training scheme that organizes updates into three distinct stages: global, structure, and refinement. We also use a prompt-conditioned estimator to calculate importance ratios starting from a fully masked state. Furthermore, we introduce a Hierarchical Credit Assignment mechanism that prioritizes key structural tokens to ensure accurate reward propagation. Experiments using two popular dMLLM backbones, MMaDA and Lumina-DiMOO, demonstrate that HT-GRPO achieves substantial gains on the GenEval and DPG benchmarks. Evaluations across six additional metrics confirm significant improvements in image quality, aesthetics, and human preference.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HT-GRPO方法，通过分阶段训练（Sketch-Then-Paint）、提示条件重要性比估计和分层信用分配，解决dMLLMs在RL优化中因生成路径多样性和忽略层次结构导致的奖励分配不准问题，显著提升图像生成质量。
AI.motivation: 扩散多模态大语言模型（dMLLMs）在图像生成中强大，但其强化学习优化面临两大挑战：一是单张图像对应大量不同的去掩码序列，导致重要性比率难以计算；二是现有方法忽略dMLLMs固有的层次化生成过程（早期token决定全局布局，后期聚焦局部细节），采用统一token奖励，无法反映各token真实贡献。
AI.method: 提出分层Token GRPO（HT-GRPO）：1）Sketch-Then-Paint训练方案，将策略更新分为全局、结构、细化三个阶段；2）使用提示条件估计器，从全掩码状态出发计算重要性比率；3）引入分层信用分配机制，优先赋予关键结构token更高权重以实现精准奖励传播。
AI.result: 在MMaDA和Lumina-DiMOO两个主流dMLLM骨干上实验，HT-GRPO在GenEval和DPG基准上取得显著提升；六项额外指标（图像质量、美学、人类偏好等）均验证了性能改进。
AI.conclusion: HT-GRPO通过显式建模dMLLMs的层次生成结构并改进RL中的信用分配与重要性比率估计，有效提升了扩散多模态大模型的强化学习优化效果，为高质量可控图像生成提供了新范式。

title: When Vision Speaks for Sound
summary: Despite rapid progress in video-capable MLLMs, we find that their apparent audio understanding in videos is often vision-driven: models rely on visual cues to infer or hallucinate acoustic information, rather than verifying the audio stream. This issue appears across both state-of-the-art open-source omni models and leading closed-source models from providers such as Google and OpenAI. We characterize this failure mode as an audio-visual Clever Hans effect, in which models appear (falsely) audio-grounded, but actually exploit visual-acoustic correlations without verifying whether the audio and visual streams are truly aligned. To systematically study this behavior, we introduce Thud, an intervention-driven probing framework based on three counterfactual audio edits: Shift, which tests temporal synchronization; Mute, which tests sound existence; and Swap, which tests audio-visual consistency. Beyond diagnosis, we further study a two-stage alignment recipe: intervention-derived preference pairs teach audio verification, while event-level general video preferences regularize the model against over-specialization. Our best 10K-sample recipe improves average performance across the three intervention dimensions by 28 percentage points, while slightly improving performance on general video and audio-visual QA benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了当前视频多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在音频理解上存在‘视觉驱动幻觉’问题，即模型依赖视觉线索而非真实音频流进行推理；为此提出Thud干预式探测框架与两阶段对齐训练方法，显著提升音频-视觉一致性理解能力。
AI.motivation: 发现现有视频多模态大语言模型看似具备音频理解能力，实则依赖视觉线索推断或幻觉音频信息，缺乏对真实音频流的验证，存在严重的音频-视觉‘聪明汉斯效应’。
AI.method: 提出Thud探测框架，通过三种反事实音频编辑（Shift、Mute、Swap）诊断模型在时序同步性、声音存在性与音画一致性上的缺陷；并设计两阶段对齐训练：基于干预生成偏好对以学习音频验证，结合事件级通用视频偏好防止过拟合。
AI.result: 最优10K样本训练方案在三类干预维度上平均性能提升28个百分点，同时轻微提升通用视频及音视频问答基准表现。
AI.conclusion: 视频MLLMs的音频理解需显式建模音频-视觉对齐与验证机制，仅依赖多模态联合表征不足以保证真实音频感知能力；Thud框架与两阶段对齐策略为构建真正音画协同模型提供了可行路径。

title: 3D Skew Gaussian Splatting with Any Camera Trajectory Visualization Engine
summary: While 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has revolutionized real-time photorealistic view synthesis, its fundamental reliance on symmetric Gaussian distributions introduces visual artifacts that hinder accurate spatial data exploration. Specifically, symmetric kernels struggle to capture shape and color discontinuities , which cause blurriness and primitive redundancy that mislead human perception during visual analysis. To address these visualization barriers, we introduce 3D Skew Gaussian Splatting (3DSGS), a novel framework that significantly enhances the structural fidelity and compactness of explicit scene representations. Our key insight lies in extending the standard primitive to a general Skew Gaussian counterpart. This generalized primitive inherits the highly efficient rasterization properties of standard Gaussians while gaining intrinsic asymmetric modeling capabilities. We couple this with an enhanced opacity representation to better handle complex transparency, alongside a depth-aware densification strategy that intelligently manages primitive allocation. Furthermore, to make these advancements actionable for real-world visual analytics, we re-derive the CUDA rasterization pipeline to universally support both symmetric and skew Gaussians, integrating it into a decoupled, free-camera interactive visualization engine. Extensive experiments demonstrate that 3DSGS achieves superior rendering quality and structural compactness, particularly in regions with intricate details, while maintaining the real-time frame rates necessary for fluid interactive exploration. Supplementary derivations and visual results are available at \textbf{\textit{https://3d-skew-gs.github.io/}}.

AI.tldr: 本文提出3D Skew Gaussian Splatting（3DSGS），通过引入非对称的偏斜高斯分布替代传统对称高斯，提升3DGS在结构保真度、紧凑性和可视化分析能力上的表现，并支持实时交互渲染。
AI.motivation: 传统3D高斯泼溅（3DGS）依赖对称高斯核，在处理形状与颜色不连续区域时易产生模糊和图元冗余，影响空间数据的视觉分析准确性。
AI.method: 提出3D Skew Gaussian Splatting（3DSGS），采用偏斜高斯作为基础图元；设计增强型不透明度表示以更好建模复杂透明度；引入深度感知的图元稠密化策略；并重推CUDA光栅化管线，支持对称与偏斜高斯统一渲染，集成至自由视角交互式可视化引擎。
AI.result: 实验表明，3DSGS在细节丰富区域显著提升渲染质量与结构紧凑性，同时保持实时帧率，适用于交互式视觉分析任务。
AI.conclusion: 3DSGS通过推广图元建模能力，在不牺牲效率的前提下，有效克服了传统3DGS在视觉保真与结构表达上的固有局限，为科学可视化与空间数据分析提供了更可靠的显式表征框架。

title: Traditional statistical representations outperform generative AI in identifying expert peer reviewers
summary: The exponential growth of scientific submissions has strained the peer review system. Despite the rapidly expanding global pool of researchers, this unprecedented scale has rendered the previous approach of manual expert identification unfeasible. Therefore, institutions have naturally turned to Large Language Models (LLMs) to automate intricate processes like expert reviewer identification. However, the reliability of these new models in accurately identifying domain experts lacks rigorous evaluation. We conduct a comprehensive empirical evaluation of statistical and AI-driven expertise identification methodologies to benchmark their reliability and limitations. Framing expert identification as an information retrieval problem, we utilize the distributed peer review system of a major international astronomical observatory, where proposal authorship serves as our proxy ground truth for domain expertise. Evaluating six retrieval methodologies utilized across observatories and computer science conferences, we demonstrate that traditional statistical representations outperform generative AI. Specifically, Term Frequency-Inverse Document Frequency successfully identified a labeled expert within the top 25 recommendations 79.5% of the time, compared to 51.5% for GPT-4o mini. Our results highlight that distinguishing subfield expertise requires fine-grained vocabulary, which is obscured by the semantic smoothing in generative methods. By establishing a rigorous evaluation framework for automated peer review, we demonstrate that transparent and reproducible statistical representations still outperform computationally expensive LLMs in specialized scientific tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文通过实证评估比较了统计方法与AI驱动方法在专家评审员识别任务中的性能，发现传统统计方法（如TF-IDF）在天文学提案评审场景中显著优于生成式大模型（如GPT-4o mini），主因在于子领域专精识别依赖细粒度词汇，而生成模型的语义平滑削弱了该能力。
AI.motivation: 同行评审系统面临投稿量激增压力，人工遴选专家不可持续，机构转向LLM自动化，但其在精准识别领域专家方面的可靠性缺乏严格评估。
AI.method: 将专家识别建模为信息检索问题，基于某大型国际天文台分布式评审系统的真实提案作者数据构建代理真值；对比评估六种主流检索方法（含TF-IDF、BM25及GPT-4o mini等生成式方法）。
AI.result: TF-IDF在前25名推荐中命中标注专家的比例达79.5%，显著高于GPT-4o mini的51.5%；生成式方法因语义平滑导致子领域专精识别能力下降。
AI.conclusion: 在高度专业化的科学任务中，可解释、可复现的统计表征仍优于计算昂贵的大语言模型；本研究建立了面向自动同行评审的严谨评估框架。

title: LLM-Guided Communication for Cooperative Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
comment: 9 pages for main, 32 pages for total, Accepted to ICML 2026
summary: Communication is a key component in multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) for mitigating partial observability, yet prior approaches often rely on inefficient information exchange or fail to transmit sufficient state information. To address this, we propose LLM-driven Multi-Agent Communication (LMAC), which leverages an LLM's reasoning capability to design a communication protocol that enables all agents to reconstruct the underlying state as accurately and uniformly as possible. LMAC iteratively refines the protocol using an explicit state-awareness criterion, improving state recovery while narrowing differences in agents' knowledge. Experiments on diverse MARL benchmarks show that LMAC improves state reconstruction across agents and yields substantial performance gains over prior communication baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为LMAC的LLM驱动多智能体通信框架，利用大语言模型的推理能力设计高效通信协议，以提升多智能体在部分可观测环境下的状态重建一致性与性能。
AI.motivation: 现有MARL通信方法信息交换效率低或无法传递足够状态信息，难以缓解部分可观测性问题。
AI.method: 提出LMAC框架，利用LLM设计通信协议，并通过显式的状态感知准则迭代优化协议，使各智能体尽可能准确且一致地重建全局状态。
AI.result: 在多个MARL基准上实验表明，LMAC显著提升了各智能体的状态重建质量与一致性，并大幅超越已有通信基线方法。
AI.conclusion: LMAC验证了利用LLM进行通信协议设计的有效性，为解决MARL中部分可观测性问题提供了新思路。

title: How to Instruct Your Robot: Dense Language Annotations Power Robot Policy Learning
summary: Scaling robot policy learning is bottlenecked by the cost of collecting demonstrations, while language annotations for existing demonstrations are comparatively cheap. We study language density as a lever for extracting more signal from a fixed robot or egocentric-video corpus. We introduce DeMiAn (Dense Multi-aspect Annotation), a two-stage approach that first re-labels demonstration segments with VLM-generated annotations along four complementary aspects: physical motion, scene composition, arm pose, and reasoning. A learned instructor then maps a task description and initial scene snapshot to a task-appropriate annotation at deployment, running asynchronously so generation latency is hidden behind policy execution. Across over 1M robot manipulation clips and 50K EgoVerse human-egocentric videos, DeMiAn improves both a vision-language-action policy and a video-based world-action model without collecting new demonstrations. On RoboCasa, the instructor raises success by 5 points over a task-only baseline and comes within 3 points of a per-task oracle. No fixed annotation aspect dominates across tasks, showing that selecting the right dense language matters. DeMiAn also improves composite-task and out-of-distribution performance, and shifts the compute-performance frontier in both mid-training and post-training after accounting for annotation-generation FLOPs. These results position dense re-annotation as a practical scaling lever for robot policy learning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DeMiAn方法，通过密集多方面语言标注（物理运动、场景构成、手臂姿态、推理）提升机器人策略学习效果，在不增加新演示数据的前提下显著提高任务成功率和泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 机器人策略学习受限于演示数据收集成本高，而对已有演示进行语言标注成本较低；因此探索如何通过提高语言标注密度来从固定数据集中提取更多信息。
AI.method: DeMiAn采用两阶段方法：第一阶段利用视觉语言模型（VLM）为演示片段生成四个互补维度的语言标注；第二阶段训练一个‘指导员’模型，根据任务描述和初始场景快照异步选择最合适的标注，以隐藏生成延迟。
AI.result: 在超过100万机器人操作视频和5万EgoVerse视频上验证，DeMiAn提升了视觉-语言-动作策略与视频世界-动作模型性能；在RoboCasa上任务成功率比仅用任务描述的基线高5个百分点，接近任务级oracle性能（相差3点）；同时改善复合任务与分布外泛化，并优化计算-性能权衡。
AI.conclusion: 密集重标注是一种实用且高效的机器人策略学习扩展手段，能有效提升模型性能而不依赖新增演示数据。

title: Skills on the Fly: Test-Time Adaptive Skill Synthesis for LLM Agents
summary: LLM agents benefit from reusable skills, yet test-time tasks often require guidance more specific than a static skill library can provide. We propose \emph{SkillTTA}, a Test-Time Adaptive Skill Synthesis method that retrieves a small set of training trajectories relevant to the current task and synthesizes them into a temporary, task-specific textual skill. The solver model is kept fixed, so adaptation happens entirely through generated context rather than parameter updates. We evaluate the method on SpreadsheetBench, ALFWorld, and BigCodeBench. Compared with static trajectory-to-skill synthesis using GPT-5.5, task-specific skills improve SpreadsheetBench Pass@1 from 0.397 to 0.505 and BigCodeBench Pass@1 from 0.517 to 0.651. On ALFWorld, the method matches a heavier memory-learning baseline within four points of success rate while producing the shortest successful trajectories among reported methods. Ablations on SpreadsheetBench further show that synthesized skills outperform raw trajectory prompting, that top-$k$ retrieval should stay small, and that failed trajectories are especially useful because they expose recurring evaluator-facing mistakes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SkillTTA方法，在测试时通过检索相关训练轨迹并合成任务特定的文本技能，实现无需参数更新的轻量级自适应，显著提升多个基准上的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM代理依赖静态技能库，难以应对测试时任务所需的细粒度指导，需更灵活、任务适配的技能生成机制。
AI.method: SkillTTA在测试时检索少量相关训练轨迹，将其合成临时的、任务特定的文本技能；保持求解器模型固定，仅通过生成上下文实现适应，不更新参数。
AI.result: 在SpreadsheetBench上Pass@1从0.397提升至0.505，在BigCodeBench上从0.517提升至0.651；在ALFWorld上接近更强记忆学习基线，且生成最短成功轨迹；消融实验表明合成技能优于原始轨迹提示，小规模top-k检索更优，失败轨迹对暴露评估侧错误尤为有用。
AI.conclusion: 任务特定技能合成是一种高效、参数-free的测试时自适应范式，能显著提升LLM代理在多样化任务上的泛化与执行能力。

title: PIMSM: Physics-Informed Multi-Scale Mamba for Stable Neural Representations under Distribution Shift
summary: Scientific foundation models are expected to reuse representations under changes in dataset, acquisition protocol, and deployment domain, yet many sequence backbones treat scientific temporal structure as an unconstrained pattern to be fitted. We argue that this misses a central property of natural dynamical systems: neural and atmospheric time series are organized by interacting processes across multiple physical timescales, and failure to preserve this multiscale structure contributes to brittleness under distribution shift. We formalize this failure mode as temporal kernel mismatch, where a model fits in-distribution dynamics with an effective memory policy that is not anchored to the signal's physical timescales, leading to representation drift and degraded transfer. We propose Physics-Informed Multi-Scale Mamba (PIMSM), a state-space architecture that maps spectrum-estimated transition points between frequency regimes (knee frequencies) to scale-specific discretization parameters and anchors them to acquisition time units. On Human Connectome Project fMRI, PIMSM improves robustness and representation stability under severe temporal-context truncation, extreme low-resource transfer, and resting-state-to-task-state generalization. Without modality-specific adaptation, the same architecture also attains the lowest variable-wise MAE across all reported horizons and variables on Weather-5K held-out-station spatial out-of-distribution forecasting. These results support temporal-scale alignment as a practical inductive bias for scientific foundation models that must preserve structure, not only fit correlations, under deployment shift.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Physics-Informed Multi-Scale Mamba (PIMSM)，一种将物理时间尺度与模型记忆策略对齐的状态空间架构，以解决科学时序模型在分布偏移下的脆弱性问题；在fMRI和气象预测任务中显著提升鲁棒性与泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有科学序列模型忽视自然动力系统固有的多物理时间尺度结构，导致在数据集、采集协议或部署域变化时表征不稳定、迁移性能下降。
AI.method: 提出PIMSM架构，利用频谱估计识别‘拐点频率’（knee frequencies），将其映射为尺度相关的离散化参数，并锚定到实际采集时间单位，实现物理时间尺度与模型状态更新的对齐。
AI.result: 在HCP fMRI数据上，PIMSM在严重时序截断、极低资源迁移及静息态到任务态泛化中均提升鲁棒性与表征稳定性；在Weather-5K空间OOD预测中，无需模态适配即取得所有变量与预测步长下最低的逐变量MAE。
AI.conclusion: 时间尺度对齐是一种关键且实用的归纳偏置，有助于构建能保持结构而非仅拟合相关性的科学基础模型。

title: Artificial Adaptive Intelligence: The Missing Stage Between Narrow and General Intelligence
summary: Between the narrow systems we deploy and the general intelligence we speculate about lies an entire regime of machine behavior that has never received its own name. This monograph argues that this regime is not empty: it is where meta-learning, neural architecture search, AutoML, continual learning, evolutionary computation, and physics-informed modeling have quietly converged on a common principle, namely the steady removal of the human from the loop of parameter specification. We name this regime Artificial Adaptive Intelligence (AAI) and define it operationally: a system exhibits AAI to the extent that it requires no human-specified tunable hyperparameters while maintaining competitive performance across a diverse distribution of tasks. To make the definition quantitative, we introduce an adaptivity index that measures progress along an axis orthogonal to scale, combining the fraction of hyperparameters absorbed by the system with the performance ratio against a task-specialized baseline. We develop the principle of parametric minimality and ground it in the minimum description length framework, showing that the appropriate hyperparameter count is data-determined rather than designer-determined. We then organize the field around three pathways to minimality: data- and task-aware configuration, structural and evolutionary morphing, and in-training self-adaptation. We analyze their stability, convergence, and governance implications, and illustrate them through case studies spanning aerospace design, financial regime detection, turbulence modeling, ecological dynamics, and vision-language systems. The thesis is that the path from ANI to AGI passes through AAI, and that naming this stage changes what we measure, what we build, and what we call a success.

AI.tldr: 本文提出并定义了人工自适应智能（AAI）这一新范式，强调系统在无需人工设定超参数的前提下，仍能在多样化任务中保持竞争力；通过引入适应性指数和参数极小化原则，从理论与实践两方面系统阐述AAI的内涵、路径与意义。
AI.motivation: 现有AI研究介于窄域系统与通用智能之间存在一个未被命名但已实际汇聚的中间范式，包括元学习、神经架构搜索、AutoML等方向共同指向‘人类逐步退出超参数设定回路’这一趋势，亟需统一概念框架。
AI.method: 提出AAI的操作性定义与量化指标——适应性指数；建立基于最小描述长度（MDL）的参数极小化原理；归纳三条实现路径：数据与任务感知配置、结构与进化形态变化、训练中自适应；结合多领域案例进行稳定性、收敛性与治理分析。
AI.result: 确立AAI作为ANI到AGI演进中的关键中间阶段；给出可量化的评估标准；系统梳理技术路径并验证其在航空航天、金融、流体力学、生态建模和多模态系统等场景的有效性。
AI.conclusion: AAI不仅是技术趋势的凝练，更是一种范式转变——命名该阶段将重塑AI的研究目标、工程实践与成功标准，推动AI向真正自主适应的方向发展。

title: Hybrid Quantum-MambaVision: A Quantum-enhanced State Space Model for Calibrated Mixed-type Wafer Defect Detection
summary: Extracting actionable knowledge from industrial visual data is fundamentally bottlenecked by extreme class imbalance and the prohibitive computational complexity of modern foundation models. In semi-conductor manufacturing, identifying multi-label wafer defects is a complex spatial data mining task where overlapping patterns obscure critical root-cause signals. While Vision Transformers (ViTs) excel at global dependency extraction, their quadratic scaling renders them inefficient for high-throughput, real-time anomaly detection. To overcome these computational barriers, this paper introduces Hybrid Quantum-MambaVision, a highly efficient architecture tailored for spatial knowledge discovery. We integrate a linear-complexity State-Space Model (SSM) backbone with a Parameterized Quantum Context Adapter (QCA) and Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA). The Mamba backbone efficiently captures long-range spatial dependencies, while the quantum adapter maps compressed latent features into a high-dimensional Hilbert space to disentangle complex, overlapping signatures. On the highly imbalanced MixedWM38 dataset, Hybrid Quantum-MambaVision achieves exceptional multi-label classification performance, significantly reducing the error rate on complex multi-defect topologies compared to classical baselines. The quantum regularizer acts as a profound uncertainty calibrator, substantially reducing Maximum Calibration Error (MCE) and minimizing expected false-positive costs. This work establishes a scalable Quantum-Classical hybrid paradigm for efficient representation learning in industrial data mining.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Hybrid Quantum-MambaVision，融合线性复杂度的Mamba骨干网络、参数化量子上下文适配器（QCA）与LoRA，用于解决半导体制造中高不平衡、高通量的多标签晶圆缺陷检测问题；在MixedWM38数据集上显著提升分类精度与校准性能，降低误报成本。
AI.motivation: 工业视觉数据存在极端类别不平衡和现代基础模型计算复杂度过高的瓶颈，尤其在半导体制造中，多标签晶圆缺陷识别受重叠空间模式干扰，且ViT等模型因二次复杂度难以满足实时性要求。
AI.method: 提出Hybrid Quantum-MambaVision架构：采用线性复杂度State-Space Model（Mamba）作为主干提取长程空间依赖；引入Parameterized Quantum Context Adapter（QCA）将压缩特征映射至高维Hilbert空间以解耦重叠缺陷信号；结合Low-Rank Adaptation（LoRA）实现高效微调；并利用量子正则器进行不确定性校准。
AI.result: 在高度不平衡的MixedWM38数据集上，该方法显著降低复杂多缺陷拓扑的错误率，优于经典基线；最大校准误差（MCE）大幅下降，预期假阳性成本显著减少。
AI.conclusion: 本工作建立了可扩展的量子-经典混合范式，为工业数据挖掘中的高效表征学习提供了新路径，兼具计算效率与物理可解释性。

title: Code-as-Room: Generating 3D Rooms from Top-Down View Images via Agentic Code Synthesis
summary: Designing realistic and functional 3D indoor rooms is essential for a wide range of applications, including interior design, virtual reality, gaming, and embodied AI. While recent MLLM-based approaches have shown great potential for 3D room synthesis from textual descriptions or reference images, text-based methods struggle to capture precise spatial information, and existing image-conditioned agents suffer from instability and infinite looping when tasked with holistic room generation from top-down views. To address these limitations, we propose Code-as-Room, an MLLM-based agentic framework equipped with a structured execution harness, which represents 3D rooms with Blender codes. Given a top-down room image, the framework parses the reference image to extract scene elements and their spatial relationships, and synthesizes executable Blender code for geometry, materials, and lighting in a principled, multi-stage pipeline. A cross-stage memory module is maintained throughout to mitigate context forgetting inherent to existing agent-based frameworks. We further introduce a dedicated benchmark for code-based 3D room synthesis, encompassing various evaluation protocols. Based on our benchmark, comprehensive comparisons against existing agent-based methods are conducted to validate the effectiveness of our proposed execution harness.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Code-as-Room框架，利用MLLM结合结构化执行机制，将顶层平面图转化为可执行的Blender代码生成3D室内场景，解决了文本/图像驱动方法在空间精度与生成稳定性上的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有基于文本或图像的3D房间生成方法存在空间信息捕捉不准、生成不稳定及易陷入无限循环等问题，亟需更可靠、结构化的生成范式。
AI.method: 提出Code-as-Room：以顶层平面图为输入，通过MLLM解析场景元素与空间关系，分阶段生成几何、材质、光照等Blender可执行代码；引入跨阶段记忆模块缓解上下文遗忘，并构建专用代码驱动3D房间合成基准。
AI.result: 在自建基准上，Code-as-Room显著优于现有基于代理的方法，在生成稳定性、空间保真度和代码可执行性方面表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 将3D房间表示为可执行代码是一种可行且高效的新范式；结构化执行机制与跨阶段记忆是提升MLLM代理在复杂3D生成任务中鲁棒性的关键设计。

title: NewsLens: A Multi-Agent Framework for Adversarial News Bias Navigation
summary: Media bias detection has predominantly been framed as a classification task: assign a political label to an article or outlet. We argue this framing is too shallow: it identifies that bias exists but not where, how, or crucially, what is structurally omitted. We present NewsLens, a five-agent adversarial pipeline for structured news bias navigation. A Fact Verifier, Progressive Framing Analyst, Conservative Framing Analyst, Propaganda Detector, and Neutral Summarizer collaborate to deconstruct articles into interpretable framing maps, exposing ideological omissions, rhetorical manipulation, and framing boundaries. The system is evaluated on 15 articles across four geopolitical event clusters (India-Pakistan Kashmir, Gaza, Climate Policy, Ukraine) using Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct (4-bit quantised, Google Colab T4), with cross-model validation using Mistral 7B on the Kashmir cluster. Center outlets show the highest mean Perspective Divergence Score (PDS: Qwen 0.907, Mistral 0.729 on Kashmir subset); conservative-framing outlets show the highest mean Manipulation Index (MI: 0.600 across both models). Cross-model comparison shows high consistency for high-propaganda content (Republic World delta-PDS=0.125, MI=0.8 both models) and greater variance for nuanced reporting. Mann-Whitney U tests find no statistically significant between-group differences at n=15, reported honestly as a sample-size limitation confirmed by post-hoc power analysis. A partial ablation removing the Propaganda Detector shows degraded omission precision in the Neutral Summarizer output. The architecture extends prior lexical-geometric bias work to agentic LLM reasoning, and is fully reproducible using open-weight models without API keys.

AI.tldr: 本文提出NewsLens——一个由五个智能体组成的对抗性管道系统，用于深入分析新闻偏见的结构化特征（如意识形态遗漏、修辞操纵和框架边界），超越了传统的政治倾向分类任务。
AI.motivation: 现有媒体偏见检测多局限于政治标签分类，无法揭示偏见发生的位置、方式及关键性内容遗漏，因此需要更细粒度、结构化的分析框架。
AI.method: 构建五智能体对抗性管道NewsLens，包括事实核查器、渐进式框架分析器、保守框架分析器、宣传检测器和中立摘要生成器，协同生成可解释的‘框架地图’；在15篇涵盖四大地缘事件的新闻上，使用Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct（4-bit量化）与Mistral 7B进行跨模型验证，并开展消融实验与统计检验。
AI.result: 中心媒体偏见表现为最高视角分歧分（PDS），保守媒体则呈现最高操纵指数（MI）；高宣传性内容跨模型一致性高，而细微报道差异较大；消融实验证明宣传检测器对遗漏识别精度至关重要；统计检验因样本量小（n=15）未达显著性，但后验功效分析确认此为真实限制。
AI.conclusion: NewsLens将偏见检测从静态分类推进至动态、结构化、可解释的多智能体推理范式，基于开源大模型实现完全可复现，为媒体素养与AI辅助新闻评估提供新路径。

title: Beyond Scaling: Agents Are Heading to the Edge
summary: The bottleneck of useful agentic intelligence has shifted from compressing world knowledge into a single model to executing a coordinated system. This position paper argues that personal-agent architecture must move to the edge because the core properties of agentic intelligence tasks, particularly their structural coupling with high-fidelity local context and the need for zero-latency execution loops, do not sit well with cloud-centric designs. We develop this claim through three structural shifts. First, the Prefrontal Turn: the main marginal lever of capability has moved from pre-training scale to framework-level executive control. Such control must remain physically close to the environment of action if the agent is to preserve cognitive alignment. Second, the Data-Geography Paradox, the ``dark matter'' of agentic data (local file hierarchies, real-time sensor streams, and transient OS states) degrades, disappears, or loses meaning once prepared for cloud transmission, thereby cutting the agent off from ground-truth context. Third, the interaction-alignment loop, the only economically and ecologically sustainable source of agentic refinement data is the high-fidelity implicit preference signal produced through real-time local interaction. Third, the interaction-alignment loop, the only economically and ecologically sustainable source of agentic refinement data is the high-fidelity implicit preference signal produced through real-time local interaction. We conclude with falsifiable predictions for the next deployment cycle of personal agents.

AI.tldr: 本文主张个人智能体架构应转向边缘计算，因为云中心化设计无法满足高保真本地上下文耦合和零延迟执行循环等核心需求；提出前额叶转向、数据地理悖论和交互对齐循环三大结构性转变，并给出可证伪的未来部署预测。
AI.motivation: 当前有用智能体智能的瓶颈已从将世界知识压缩进单一模型，转变为协调系统执行；而云中心化设计难以支持智能体任务所需的高保真本地上下文耦合与零延迟执行。
AI.method: 通过提出并论证三大结构性转变——前额叶转向（强调框架级执行控制而非预训练规模）、数据地理悖论（指出本地‘暗物质’数据在上传云端过程中失真或丢失）、交互对齐循环（强调实时本地交互产生的隐式偏好信号是可持续优化来源）——构建边缘优先的个人智能体架构主张。
AI.result: 确立了边缘部署是实现真正认知对齐、环境敏感与可持续演化的个人智能体的必要条件，并导出若干可证伪的技术部署预测。
AI.conclusion: 个人智能体必须部署于边缘；唯有如此，才能保障认知对齐、保留真实上下文、获取高质量反馈信号，从而实现稳健、可持续的智能体演化。

title: Contrastive Conceptor Activation Steering (COAST): Unlocking Vision-Language-Action Models through Hidden States
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models leverage powerful perceptual priors from web-scale Vision-Language Model (VLM) pre-training, yet they remain surprisingly brittle in practice, frequently failing at simple robotic tasks. To mitigate this, we propose Contrastive Conceptor Activation Steering (COAST). COAST builds on the notion of a "conceptor", a linear operator that soft-projects data into the principal components of a target distribution. COAST uses conceptors to identify success-critical subspaces for a target robotic task from a few examples of success and failure rollouts. At inference time, it steers VLA latents into these identified success subspaces to improve task outcomes. Across three architecturally distinct neural policies (flow-matching VLA, autoregressive VLA, and Diffusion Policy), COAST improves absolute mean simulation and real-robot task success rate by over 20 and 40% respectively. The activation subspace geometry reveals that failure modes share substantial structure across tasks while success representations remain largely task-specific. When tasks share similar failure modes, this structure enables previously fitted conceptors to improve performance on new tasks without refitting. Ultimately, our results suggest that current VLAs retain substantial task-relevant knowledge in their latent representations, and that the action expert's decoding bottleneck could be mitigated by steering its residual stream toward task-relevant subspaces. COAST provides a lightweight, training-free path to unlocking these latent capabilities by steering the model towards its own "success" distributions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为COAST的方法，通过使用conceptor线性算子识别任务成功关键的潜在子空间，并在推理时引导VLA模型的潜在表示进入这些子空间，从而显著提升机器人任务成功率，且无需额外训练。
AI.motivation: 现有Vision-Language-Action (VLA)模型虽具备强大的视觉语言先验，但在实际机器人任务中表现脆弱，常在简单任务上失败，亟需提升其鲁棒性与任务适配能力。
AI.method: 提出Contrastive Conceptor Activation Steering (COAST)，利用conceptor（一种软投影到目标分布主成分的线性算子），基于少量成功/失败轨迹识别任务相关的成功子空间，并在推理时对VLA潜变量进行定向引导。
AI.result: 在三种不同架构的神经策略（flow-matching VLA、autoregressive VLA、Diffusion Policy）上，COAST分别将仿真和真实机器人任务成功率绝对提升超20%和40%；发现失败模式跨任务具有结构共性，而成功表征任务特异；已有conceptor可迁移至相似失败模式的新任务。
AI.conclusion: 当前VLA模型潜空间中仍蕴含大量任务相关知识，其动作解码瓶颈可通过残差流引导至任务相关子空间缓解；COAST提供了一种轻量、免训练的方式，激活模型自身‘成功’分布以释放潜在能力。

title: Response-free item difficulty modelling for multiple-choice items with fine-tuned transformers: Component-wise representation and multi-task learning
summary: Response-free item difficulty modelling promises to reduce reliance on response-based calibration but is intrinsically difficult on reading-comprehension multiple-choice items, where difficulty depends on inferential demands across wording components. Whereas most existing approaches extract item-text features and pass them to a separate statistical or machine-learning model, we fine-tune transformer encoders end-to-end on the item wording, eliminating the manual feature engineering and preprocessing that discards information. Moreover, two extensions to this joint-encoding approach are proposed: a component-wise variant that encodes wording components separately through a shared encoder, and a multi-task variant that retains joint encoding and adds an auxiliary multiple-choice question answering objective on the shared encoder. Each method is evaluated under a Monte Carlo subsampling design at three training-set sizes on a held-out test set. We find that joint encoding is a viable end-to-end alternative to feature-engineering pipelines; while the component-wise variant shows no detectable benefit, consistent with self-attention already harvesting the cross-component signal, the multi-task variant delivers significant paired improvements in the smallest-sample regime. Transformer fine-tuning, especially if regularised by a suitable auxiliary task, recovers a substantial share of the wording-derivable signal at training-set sizes typical of applied measurement. The framework provides a customisable interface for psychometrically motivated extensions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需作答数据的阅读理解选择题难度建模方法，通过端到端微调Transformer编码器直接从题干文本建模难度，并引入多任务学习提升小样本下的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统基于作答数据的题目难度标定依赖大量响应数据，而阅读理解类选择题的难度高度依赖题干各语言成分间的推理要求，难以仅靠人工提取文本特征建模；亟需减少人工特征工程、保留更多原始文本信息的端到端建模方法。
AI.method: 采用端到端微调Transformer编码器直接处理题目文本（joint encoding）；进一步提出两种变体：组件式编码（component-wise，分别编码题干各成分但共享编码器）和多任务编码（multi-task，联合编码基础上增加选择题回答作为辅助任务）。所有方法在蒙特卡洛子采样设计下、三种训练集规模上评估。
AI.result: 联合编码是可行的端到端替代方案；组件式变体未带来显著提升（因自注意力已捕获跨成分信号）；多任务变体在最小样本场景下显著提升性能；Transformer微调（尤其辅以合适辅助任务）能在典型应用测量样本量下恢复大量可由题干推导的难度信号。
AI.conclusion: 无需作答数据的Transformer端到端建模是可行且有效的，尤其在小样本条件下多任务正则化能显著增强泛化能力；该框架为心理测量驱动的扩展提供了可定制接口。

title: Augmenting Human Evaluation with LLM Judges: How Many Human Reviews Do You Need?
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used as automated evaluators of AI systems, including in high-stakes applications. In this role, LLMs are used to generate judgments about the quality, appropriateness, or even safety of model outputs. This approach is motivated by practical constraints. Expert human ratings are costly and difficult to scale, whereas LLM ratings can be produced quickly at low cost. However, current approaches to deploying LLM evaluators are ad hoc, typically limited to reporting agreement metrics between human and LLM judges as a justification for substitution of human ratings, and lack a formal basis for study design. This paper (1) shifts the role of the LLM judge from substitutive to auxiliary, and (2) formulates the LLM-as-a-judge paradigm as one of augmenting human evaluation through a two-stage sampling design, where LLM evaluations are measured for all observations at the first stage and human ratings are partially observed for a subsample at the second stage. We propose to use a doubly robust estimator from the missing data literature, which takes advantage of the robustness property against the prediction model, since the missingness model is known by design. Using the asymptotic variance of this estimator, we propose how sample sizes of human and LLM ratings can be determined to achieve a targeted level of power. We also show that a study can be efficiently designed by allocating more human ratings for types of evaluations where the predictability of LLM ratings is not high. To the best of our knowledge, there is very little guidance on how much human oversight should be retained when validating benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将大语言模型（LLM）作为评估者时，应从替代人类转向辅助人类，并引入两阶段抽样设计与双重稳健估计器，以科学确定人机评估样本量及分配策略，提升评估效率与可靠性。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM评估方法缺乏严谨实验设计基础，仅依赖人机一致性指标粗略替代人工评价，而人工标注成本高、难扩展，亟需兼顾效率与统计可靠性的新范式。
AI.method: 将LLM评估定位为辅助工具，构建两阶段抽样设计：第一阶段对全部样本进行LLM评分，第二阶段对子样本进行人工评分；采用双重稳健估计器（利用已知缺失机制提升鲁棒性），并基于其渐近方差指导人机样本量配置与动态分配（如在LLM预测不准的类别上增加人工标注）。
AI.result: 提出了可计算的样本量规划方法，支持在目标统计功效下优化人力投入；证明了按LLM预测不确定性动态分配人工标注能提升整体评估效率；为LLM评估提供了首个具统计理论基础的设计框架。
AI.conclusion: LLM不应直接替代人类评估者，而应作为增强人类判断的辅助工具；通过严谨的抽样设计与因果推断方法，可在保障评估质量前提下显著降低人工成本，为高风险AI系统评估提供可推广的方法论支撑。

title: Learning to Learn from Multimodal Experience
summary: Experience-driven learning has emerged as a promising paradigm for enabling agents to improve from interaction trajectories by accumulating and reusing past experience. However, existing approaches are predominantly developed in textual settings and rely on manually designed memory schemas, limiting their applicability to multimodal environments. In real-world scenarios, experience is inherently multimodal, involving heterogeneous signals across perception, reasoning, and action, which makes effective memory design significantly more challenging. In particular, the optimal way to structure and utilize multimodal experience is highly task-dependent and evolves over time, rendering fixed memory designs insufficient. In this work, we propose a new paradigm, learning to learn from multimodal experience, which shifts memory design from a predefined component to an adaptive and learnable process. Our framework enables agents to dynamically construct, organize, and utilize memory based on task requirements and interaction history, effectively learning how to structure experience for improved performance. Experiments demonstrate that adaptive memory design substantially enhances agent performance and generalization across multimodal tasks, highlighting the critical role of learning memory mechanisms in experience-driven learning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种‘从多模态经验中学习如何学习’的新范式，将记忆设计从预定义转变为自适应、可学习的过程，使智能体能根据任务需求和交互历史动态构建、组织和利用记忆，从而显著提升多模态任务中的性能与泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有基于经验的学习方法主要面向文本环境，依赖人工设计的记忆结构，难以适配真实世界中感知、推理与动作交织的多模态经验；且固定记忆结构无法适应任务依赖性和时序演化性。
AI.method: 提出一种可学习、自适应的记忆机制框架，使智能体能动态构造、组织和利用多模态经验记忆，将记忆设计本身作为可优化的学习过程。
AI.result: 实验表明，该自适应记忆设计显著提升了智能体在多模态任务中的性能与泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 记忆机制本身应是可学习的，而非固定模块；学习如何结构化经验是提升多模态经验驱动学习效果的关键。

title: Concepts Worth Having: Refining VLM-Guided Concept Bottleneck Models with Minimal Annotations
summary: Concept-bottleneck models (CBMs) are neural classifiers that compute predictions from high-level concepts extracted from the input. CBMs ensure stakeholders can understand the concepts -- and the predictions they entail -- by learning these from concept-level annotations, which are however seldom available. Recent CBM architectures work around this issue by obtaining annotations from Vision-Language Models (VLMs). While greatly broadening applicability, doing so can yield lower quality concepts and therefore less interpretable models. We strike for a middle ground by introducing Vision-plus-Human-guided CBM (VH-CBM), a hybrid approach that exploits both VLMs and a small amount of dense annotations. VH-CBM employs a Gaussian Process in the VLM's embedding space, which captures useful global information about the target domain, to propagate the expert's supervision to any target data point. Our empirical evaluation shows how VH-CBM predicts more accurate concepts than VLM-guided CBMs even when annotating as little as 1% of the data, while sporting better concept calibration and supporting active learning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种混合概念瓶颈模型VH-CBM，结合视觉语言模型（VLM）与少量人工密集标注，利用高斯过程在VLM嵌入空间中传播专家监督，从而在仅标注1%数据时即可提升概念预测准确性、校准性，并支持主动学习。
AI.motivation: 现有基于VLM的概念瓶颈模型（CBM）因缺乏高质量概念标注而可解释性受限；完全依赖人工标注又成本高昂，需在二者间寻求平衡。
AI.method: 提出VH-CBM框架：在VLM嵌入空间中构建高斯过程模型，利用少量密集人工标注作为监督信号，通过其全局建模能力对未标注样本进行概念传播与校准。
AI.result: 实验表明，VH-CBM在仅使用1%人工标注时，概念预测准确率、校准性均优于纯VLM引导的CBM，并天然支持主动学习。
AI.conclusion: 融合VLM先验与少量人类监督的混合范式，可在低标注成本下显著提升CBM的可解释性与可靠性，为实际部署提供更可行路径。

title: PIXLRelight: Controllable Relighting via Intrinsic Conditioning
summary: We present PIXLRelight, a feed-forward approach for physically controllable single-image relighting. Existing methods either provide limited lighting control (e.g. through text or environment maps), accumulate errors when chaining inverse and forward rendering, or require costly per-image optimization. Our key idea is to bridge physically based rendering (PBR) and learned image synthesis through a shared intrinsic conditioning that can be obtained from either real photographs or PBR renders. At training time, paired multi-illumination photographs are decomposed into albedo, diffuse shading, and non-diffuse residuals, which condition the model. At inference time, the same conditioning is computed from a path-traced render of a coarse 3D reconstruction of the input under user-specified PBR lights. A transformer-based neural renderer then applies the target illumination to the source photograph, preserving fine image detail through a per-pixel affine modulation. PIXLRelight enables arbitrary PBR-style lighting control, achieves state-of-the-art relighting quality, and runs in under a tenth of a second per image. Code and models are available at https://mlfarinha.github.io/pixl-relight/.

AI.tldr: PIXLRelight是一种前馈式单图像重光照方法，通过共享的物理内在条件（如反照率、漫反射阴影等）桥接基于物理的渲染（PBR）与学习型图像合成，支持任意PBR风格光照控制，速度快、质量高。
AI.motivation: 现有单图像重光照方法存在光照控制受限、误差累积或需昂贵逐图优化等问题，亟需一种高效、可控且物理一致的方法。
AI.method: 提出共享内在条件（albedo、diffuse shading、non-diffuse residuals）作为真实照片与PBR渲染之间的桥梁；训练时使用多光照配对照片进行分解监督；推理时基于粗略3D重建的路径追踪渲染提取相同条件；采用Transformer神经渲染器结合逐像素仿射调制实现重光照。
AI.result: 实现任意PBR风格光照控制，达到当前最优重光照质量，单图处理耗时低于0.1秒。
AI.conclusion: PIXLRelight在保持细节真实性的同时，首次实现了高效、前馈式、物理可控的单图像重光照，显著提升了可控性与实用性。

title: IVF-TQ: Streaming-Robust Approximate Nearest Neighbor Search via a Codebook-Free Residual Layer
summary: We propose IVF-TQ, an IVF index with a codebook-free residual layer: a fixed random rotation followed by precomputed Lloyd-Max scalar quantization depending only on (b, d). Only the IVF coarse partition is trained. Building on TurboQuant (Zandieh et al., 2025), the design substantially reduces a key failure mode of trained-codebook ANN indexes (PQ, OPQ, ScaNN): staleness under streaming ingestion.Empirical (3 seeds): Per-batch PQ retraining does not recover the streaming gap at any tested bit budget (paired-t p > 0.28 everywhere). On streaming Deep-10M, IVF-TQ holds at 87.4% -> 86.6% (Delta = -0.80 +/- 0.10pp) while IVF-PQ degrades -3.23pp. A shuffled-i.i.d. control on SIFT-1M shows IVF-PQ losing -3.9pp without distribution shift. At higher PQ bit budgets (~1.5x IVF-TQ memory), absolute recall favors PQ as expected from rate-distortion (+6.1pp Deep-10M; +2.0pp SIFT-10M); the durable IVF-TQ benefit is operational (no codebook to retrain), robust across memory regimes.Prior art: IVF around a codebook-free residual quantizer is architecturally not new -- IVF-RaBitQ ships in Milvus, cuVS, LanceDB, Weaviate; Shi et al. (2026) is concurrent GPU work. TurboQuant itself tests only flat-rotation ANN.Contributions: (i) A multi-seed streaming-operational story for codebook-free IVF: 10M-scale evidence across PQ memory budgets. (ii) A uniform-over-sphere IP-error bound for the TQ residual quantizer with one fixed rotation (proof sketch in v1; rigorous in v2). (iii) Adaptive IVF-TQ: a partition-only refresh recovering 67% -> 97.8% under worst-case rotation shift with re-ranking (90.3% without).Code, data: https://github.com/tarun-ks/turboquant_search

AI.tldr: 本文提出IVF-TQ，一种无需训练码本的IVF索引结构，通过固定随机旋转加预计算标量量化（Lloyd-Max）实现残差量化，仅训练IVF粗聚类；在流式数据场景下显著缓解传统PQ类方法因码本陈旧导致的性能下降，实验证明其在Deep-10M和SIFT数据集上具有更强的鲁棒性和操作可持续性。
AI.motivation: 解决传统基于训练码本的近似最近邻（ANN）索引（如PQ、OPQ、ScaNN）在流式数据持续注入时因码本陈旧（staleness）导致的性能显著下降问题。
AI.method: 提出IVF-TQ：在IVF框架下，用固定随机旋转+预计算Lloyd-Max标量量化替代传统可训练残差码本；仅训练IVF粗聚类；理论分析TQ残差量化在均匀球面内积误差的上界；并扩展为自适应IVF-TQ，支持仅刷新分区以应对旋转偏移。
AI.result: 在流式Deep-10M上，IVF-TQ召回率仅下降0.80pp（±0.10），而IVF-PQ下降3.23pp；在i.i.d. SIFT-1M上IVF-PQ也无分布偏移即下降3.9pp；高比特预算下PQ绝对召回略优，但IVF-TQ具备免重训练、跨内存鲁棒等操作优势；自适应IVF-TQ在最坏旋转偏移下经重排序恢复至97.8%性能。
AI.conclusion: 代码本无关的IVF残差量化（IVF-TQ）是一种更适用于流式场景的实用ANN索引方案，在保持竞争力的同时消除了码本维护开销，兼具理论保障与工程落地价值。

title: Event-Grounded Sparse Autoencoders for Vision-Language-Action Policies
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) policies translate language and visual inputs into robot actions, where their hidden representations directly shape closed-loop behavior. However, mechanistic interpretability tools from language and vision-language models do not transfer cleanly to VLAs: outputs are robot actions rather than human-readable tokens, and interventions can only be tested via expensive closed-loop rollouts. We propose an event-grounded interpretability pipeline that anchors SAE feature analysis to behavioral events rather than text contexts. End-effector keyframes are clustered within each task using visual, state, and temporal cues, linking SAE features to behaviorally salient events and, via optional VLM annotations, to semantic context. To our knowledge, our pipeline is among the first to ground SAE-based VLA analysis in closed-loop behavioral events. Across two simulation architectures and a real-robot study, event-grounded ranking yields the strongest causal effects on OpenVLA and transfers to the continuous action chunks of $π_{0.5}$. SAE is a sparse but imperfect intervention basis: usability varies with architecture and intervention site, and aggressive intervention reveals safety and interpretability limits. Overall, event-grounded SAE analysis emerges as a practical starting point for behavior-anchored VLA interpretability, motivating future work on SAE features beyond action-aligned coordinates, finer-grained closed-loop evaluation, and safe interventions for high-stakes VLA deployments. Code is available at \url{https://github.com/xc-j/Event-SAE}.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向行为事件的稀疏自编码器（SAE）可解释性分析流程，用于Vision-Language-Action（VLA）策略，将SAE特征与机器人末端执行器的关键帧事件对齐，而非文本上下文，并在仿真与真实机器人实验中验证了其因果有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有语言/多模态模型的可解释性工具难以直接迁移到VLA模型：其输出为机器人动作而非人类可读token，且干预效果需通过昂贵的闭环 rollout 验证。
AI.method: 提出事件锚定（event-grounded）的可解释性流程：基于视觉、状态和时间线索对任务内末端执行器关键帧聚类，将SAE特征与行为显著事件关联；可选结合VLM进行语义标注；并在不同VLA架构（OpenVLA、π₀.₅）上开展干预实验。
AI.result: 事件锚定的SAE特征排序在OpenVLA上展现出最强因果效应，并能迁移到π₀.₅的连续动作块；SAE作为干预基底虽稀疏但不完美，其可用性依赖于架构与干预位置，强干预暴露安全与可解释性边界。
AI.conclusion: 事件锚定的SAE分析是行为导向VLA可解释性的实用起点，未来应探索超越动作坐标的SAE特征、更细粒度的闭环评估及高风险部署下的安全干预方法。

title: Evaluation Drift in LLM Personality Induction: Are We Moving the Goalpost?
comment: 14 pages, 8 main pages, 5 figures, 4 main page figures
summary: Can large language models reliably express a human-like personality, or are they merely mimicking surface cues without a stable underlying profile? To investigate this, we induce personality in LLMs by fine-tuning them on the long-form essays, where each essay is associated with a target Big Five personality profile. We then evaluate the stability and fidelity of the induced personality using the IPIP-NEO questionnaire. Specifically, we ask: (i) does post-training (SFT, DPO, ORPO) stabilize questionnaire scores under prompt rephrasings, and (ii) can it induce target Big Five profiles from unguided essays? Our results demonstrate that fine-tuning consistently reduces variance in questionnaire responses across five models, directly mitigating the evaluation fragility reported in pre-trained models. However, this newfound stability reveals a more fundamental limitation: accuracy on the full five-dimensional profile remains near chance, even when single-trait scores improve. This indicates that unguided essays lack the cues needed for faithful personality expression. We therefore argue for scenario-grounded datasets or interactive elicitation that accumulates test-aligned evidence over time.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了大语言模型（LLM）能否真正表达稳定、人类般的人格特质，还是仅表面模仿。作者通过在长篇人格相关作文数据上微调LLMs（SFT/DPO/ORPO），并用IPIP-NEO问卷评估其人格稳定性与准确性。结果表明：微调显著提升回答稳定性（降低重写提示下的方差），但五维人格整体准确率仍接近随机水平，说明原始作文缺乏足够线索支撑真实人格建模；因此建议采用情境化数据集或交互式人格采集方法。
AI.motivation: 探究大语言模型是否具备稳定、内在的人格表达能力，而非仅表面模仿；解决现有评估中因提示变化导致人格得分不稳定的‘评估脆弱性’问题。
AI.method: 在标注有Big Five人格标签的长篇作文数据上对多个LLM进行监督微调（SFT）、DPO和ORPO；使用IPIP-NEO问卷评估微调前后模型在不同提示重写下的人格得分稳定性与目标人格匹配度。
AI.result: 微调显著降低了五种模型在IPIP-NEO问卷上的响应方差，提升了稳定性；但五维人格整体预测准确率仍接近随机水平，单维略有提升，表明原始作文缺乏足够人格线索。
AI.conclusion: 当前基于非结构化作文的微调虽能提升人格表达的稳定性，却无法实现高保真度的人格建模；需转向场景驱动的数据构建或交互式人格 elicitation 方法以积累评估对齐的证据。

title: LEAF: A Living Benchmark for Event-Augmented Forecasting
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly applied to forecasting. To evaluate this capability while mitigating pre-training data contamination, several living benchmarks have been proposed. However, existing benchmarks either lack the multidimensional events essential for accurate forecasting due to data scarcity, or focus on relatively closed environments. To assess the predictive capabilities of LLMs in complex, real-world scenarios, we propose LEAF, the first living benchmark for event-augmented forecasting tasks, including future event probabilities, trend and time series forecasting. LEAF utilizes a recursive retrieval agent system paired with dual-agent cross-validation to provide comprehensive and relevant auxiliary text for forecasting. Evaluating state-of-the-art proprietary and open-weight LLMs, we find that these models can leverage signals extracted from complex events to enhance predictive performance. In the stock domain, we find that LLMs achieve better performance on equities they confidently identify as more predictable. Furthermore, the events demonstrate a strong correlation with the target equities. To this end, LEAF provides a necessary, dynamically updating testbed to continuously track and drive progress in event-driven forecasting tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LEAF，首个面向事件增强型预测任务的动态基准，通过递归检索代理与双代理交叉验证提供辅助文本，验证了大语言模型（LLMs）可利用复杂事件信号提升预测性能，尤其在股票领域表现出对可预测性识别能力及事件-标的强相关性。
AI.motivation: 现有预测基准或因数据稀缺缺乏多维事件支持，或局限于封闭环境，难以评估LLM在真实复杂场景下的预测能力；需构建能动态更新、融合事件信息的新型基准。
AI.method: 提出LEAF基准，采用递归检索代理系统与双代理交叉验证机制，自动获取并验证与预测目标相关的辅助事件文本，支持未来事件概率、趋势与时间序列预测等多任务评估。
AI.result: 实验表明主流闭源与开源LLM能有效利用事件信号提升预测性能；在股票预测中，模型对高可预测性股票表现更优，且所提取事件与目标股票显著相关。
AI.conclusion: LEAF作为首个事件增强、持续更新的预测基准，为推动事件驱动型 forecasting 研究提供了必要且可靠的动态评测平台。

title: Reasoning Can Be Restored by Correcting a Few Decision Tokens
summary: Large reasoning models (LRMs) substantially outperform their base LLM counterparts on challenging reasoning benchmarks, yet it remains poorly understood where base models go wrong during token-by-token generation and how to narrow this gap efficiently. We study the base-reasoning gap through quantifying token-level distributional disagreement between a base model and a stronger reasoning model using likelihood-based divergences. Across benchmarks, we find that the reasoning advantage is highly sparse and concentrates on a small set of early, planning-related decision tokens. For instance, on Qwen3-0.6B, only ~8% of generated tokens account for the salient disagreement, and these tokens concentrate early in the response, are strongly enriched in planning-related decisions (17x), and coincide with high base-model uncertainty -- suggesting that base models fail mainly at early planning points that steer the subsequent reasoning trajectory. Building on these findings, we propose disagreement-guided token intervention, a simple inference-time delegation scheme that performs a one-token takeover by the reasoning model only at high-disagreement positions and immediately switches back to the base model. With a small intervention budget, this sparse delegation substantially recovers and can even surpass the performance of a same-size reasoning model on challenging reasoning tasks. Code is available at https://github.com/AlphaLab-USTC/RRTokenIntervention.

AI.tldr: 本文通过量化基础模型与强推理模型在token-level上的分布差异，发现推理优势集中在少量早期规划相关token上，并提出一种基于分歧引导的稀疏token干预方法，在推理时仅对高分歧位置进行单token接管，显著提升基础模型性能。
AI.motivation: 大型推理模型（LRMs）在复杂推理任务上显著优于基础大语言模型（LLMs），但尚不清楚基础模型在逐token生成过程中具体在哪出错，以及如何高效缩小这一差距。
AI.method: 通过基于似然的散度量化基础模型与强推理模型在token-level上的分布差异；识别高分歧token的时空分布特征；提出分歧引导的token干预策略——仅在高分歧位置进行单token接管并立即切回基础模型。
AI.result: 发现推理优势高度稀疏，集中于约8%的早期、规划相关的高不确定性token；所提稀疏干预方法以极小预算显著恢复甚至超越同规模推理模型的性能。
AI.conclusion: 基础模型的主要缺陷在于早期规划节点，这些节点主导后续推理路径；针对性地干预少量关键token即可高效提升推理能力，为轻量级推理增强提供了新范式。

title: Contrastive-SDXL: Annotation-Preserving Night-Time Augmentation for Pedestrian Detection
summary: Night-time pedestrian detection remains challenging because labelled night-time data are limited and large illumination differences make daytime-only trained detectors unreliable. Latent diffusion models (LDMs) provide a powerful basis for image-to-image translation and cross-domain augmentation, but their effectiveness in safety-critical perception depends on whether detector-relevant objects and local semantic structure are preserved when translating between source and target domains. In this work, we present Contrastive-SDXL, a day-to-night augmentation framework for night-time pedestrian detection built on SDXL-Turbo and fine-tuned using Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA). To preserve semantic correspondence between daytime inputs and translated night-time images, we introduce a patch-wise semantic contrastive loss guided by a pretrained DINOv2 encoder rather than generator encoder features. Multi-level DINOv2 self-attention maps enforce both local and global semantic consistency, while an object consistency loss explicitly encourages pedestrian preservation. Contrastive-SDXL produces realistic night-time images, achieving a Frechet Inception Distance (FID) of 22.5. Detectors trained with our synthetic images obtain a 6-7% reduction in miss rate compared with a daytime-only baseline, approaching the performance of detectors trained on real night-time data. These results demonstrate that consistency-driven diffusion augmentation can effectively support safety-critical night-time pedestrian detection.Specific

AI.tldr: 本文提出Contrastive-SDXL框架，基于SDXL-Turbo与LoRA微调，结合DINOv2引导的补丁级对比损失和目标一致性损失，提升夜景行人检测性能；合成图像FID为22.5，检测器漏检率降低6–7%，接近使用真实夜景数据训练的效果。
AI.motivation: 夜间行人检测面临标注数据稀缺和昼夜光照差异大导致模型泛化差的问题。
AI.method: 构建基于SDXL-Turbo与LoRA微调的Contrastive-SDXL框架；引入DINOv2编码器指导的补丁级语义对比损失，并利用多级DINOv2自注意力图保证局部与全局语义一致性，辅以显式的行人目标一致性损失。
AI.result: 生成图像FID为22.5；使用合成数据训练的检测器漏检率比仅用日间数据训练的基线降低6–7%，性能接近使用真实夜间数据训练的结果。
AI.conclusion: 面向语义一致性的扩散模型增强方法可有效支撑安全关键型夜间行人检测任务。

title: Beyond Catalogue Counts: the Dataset Visibility Asymmetry in Low-Resource Multilingual NLP
comment: Accepted at the 15th edition of the Language Resources and Evaluation Conference (LREC 2026)
summary: Multilingual NLP often relies on dataset counts from centralized catalogues to characterize which languages are resource-rich or resource-poor. However, these catalogues record only one layer of dataset visibility: what has been registered or institutionally distributed. They do not necessarily reflect which datasets are created, cited, or reused in the research literature. To examine this gap, we combine a catalogue-based baseline with literature-backed evidence of dataset circulation. We introduce the Resource Density Index (RDI), defined as the number of catalogued datasets per one million speakers, and compute it for the 200 most widely spoken languages in Ethnologue. Among them, 118 languages (59%) have an average RDI of zero across the LRE Map and the Linguistic Data Consortium (LDC), and another 23 fall below 0.1, corresponding to at most one catalogued dataset per ten million speakers. We then apply an LLM-assisted citation-mining pipeline over the Semantic Scholar corpus to these 141 low-visibility languages. After manual validation and consolidation, we identify 609 unique datasets across 53 languages, of which 356 remain openly accessible through working public links. These results reveal a substantial visibility gap: many large-speaker languages appear data-poor in catalogue records yet show clear evidence of dataset activity in the research literature. Our findings suggest that multilingual data scarcity should be understood not only as a production problem, but also as a question of documentation, discoverability, and long-term accessibility. Code and data are publicly available at (https://github.com/zhiyintan/dataset-visibility-asymmetry).

AI.tldr: 本文提出Resource Density Index (RDI)来衡量语言的数据资源丰富程度，并结合文献引用挖掘发现大量高使用率语言虽在数据目录中显示为‘数据贫乏’，但在研究文献中实际存在大量未被收录的数据集，揭示了数据可见性与实际可用性之间的显著差距。
AI.motivation: 现有集中式数据目录仅反映注册或机构分发的数据集，无法体现真实的研究中创建、引用和复用情况，导致对多语言NLP资源分布的误判。
AI.method: 构建Resource Density Index（RDI），结合LRE Map和LDC目录计算200种主流语言的RDI；再通过LLM辅助的引文挖掘流程，在Semantic Scholar中针对141种低可见性语言识别并人工验证相关数据集。
AI.result: 在200种语言中，59%（118种）RDI为0；进一步挖掘发现53种语言共609个独特数据集，其中356个仍可公开访问。
AI.conclusion: 多语言数据稀缺不仅是数据生产不足的问题，更关键的是文档记录、可发现性与长期可访问性问题；应重视提升数据集在学术文献中的可见性与可持续管理。

title: Generating Realistic Safety-Critical Scenarios for Vehicle-Pedestrian Interactions
summary: Automated driving system deployment requires rigorous validation across safety-critical vehicle-pedestrian interactions, yet real-world datasets rarely capture high-risk scenarios while simulation platforms lack realistic behavior. In response, this study proposes a three-stage framework that combines real-world grounding with adaptive simulation to generate behaviorally realistic safety-critical scenarios at scale. Stage 1 pre-trains multi-agent state-space Transformer-enhanced DDPG (MA-SST-DDPG) agents on real-world safety-critical data to learn human-like interactive evasive behaviors through data-driven learning. Stage 2 deploys pre-trained multi-agents in CARLA for online reinforcement learning to generalize across diverse scenarios, integrating real-world knowledge with simulation experience to produce a refined MA-SST-DDPG model. Stage 3 uses CARLA with the refined model to generate over 198,000 high-resolution interaction episodes from eight intersection scenarios, culminating in the Vehicle-Pedestrian Safety-Critical Interaction (VPSCI) dataset. The Refined MA-SST-DDPG model outperformed baseline methods in reproducing realistic evasive behaviors, achieving the lowest trajectory errors (ADE = 0.072 m, FDE = 0.142 m).
