AI.conclusion: 在结构化感知领域（如SAR），采用语义保持的几何变换进行随机平滑，是比各向同性噪声更优的对抗防御策略。

title: From a Single Demonstration to a General Policy for Contact-Rich Manipulation
summary: We present a Learning from Demonstration (LfD) framework that achieves one-shot generalization in multi-stage, contact-rich manipulation tasks. Central to our approach is the utilization of environmental constraints as the inductive bias. By representing a demonstration as a sequence of behaviors that exploit environmental constraints, the robot separates task-general structure -- the constraint types and their transitions -- from instance-specific details such as exact demonstration trajectories, poses, and local geometries. Our four-stage pipeline builds a complete policy on this representation: the robot first abstracts a single demonstration into environmental-constraint primitives, then disambiguates them through self-guided exploration, next assimilates targeted human corrections that handle out-of-distribution variations, and finally recovers the abstracted-away details online through compliant interaction. Because the resulting policy follows constraints rather than mimics trajectories, it generalizes across object poses, local geometries, and unmodeled contact dynamics. We validate our approach on seven real-world multi-stage contact-rich manipulation tasks and achieve over 90% success. These extensive experimental results establish environmental constraints as fundamental building blocks for efficient generalization in learning from demonstration.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于环境约束作为归纳偏置的示教学习（LfD）框架，实现了多阶段、接触丰富的操作任务中的一次性泛化。该方法将示教抽象为利用环境约束的行为序列，分离任务通用结构与实例细节，并通过四阶段流程构建策略，在真实世界七项任务中成功率超90%。
AI.motivation: 解决多阶段、接触丰富操作任务中传统LfD方法难以实现一次性泛化的问题，尤其在物体位姿、局部几何和未建模接触动力学变化时表现不佳。
AI.method: 提出四阶段LfD框架：1）将单次示教抽象为环境约束基元；2）通过机器人自主引导探索消歧；3）融合人类针对性修正以应对分布外变化；4）在线通过顺应性交互恢复被抽象掉的细节。核心是将环境约束作为归纳偏置。
AI.result: 在七个真实世界的多阶段接触丰富操作任务上验证，成功率超过90%，显著优于轨迹模仿类方法，证明环境约束可作为高效泛化的基础单元。
AI.conclusion: 环境约束是示教学习中实现高效、强泛化能力的关键归纳偏置；所提框架不依赖精确轨迹复现，而通过遵循约束实现跨物体位姿、几何与接触动态的鲁棒泛化。

title: Weak-to-Strong Elicitation via Mismatched Wrong Drafts
summary: We consider whether off-policy experience from a smaller, weaker model can elicit capability in a stronger learner that on-policy RL fine-tuning (e.g., GRPO) does not reach. We find that injecting mathematically wrong drafts from a smaller but more domain-trained model -- mismatched to the current problem -- into a stronger learner's GRPO context consistently outperforms standard on-policy GRPO on held-out MATH-500 and out-of-distribution AIME 2025/2026. Concretely, we use Mathstral-7B as the learner, Qwen2.5-Math-1.5B as the draft model, 8.8K Level 3--5 MATH problems (with MATH-500 held out), and train with Dr. GRPO. Mismatch is an active ingredient: shuffling drafts to mismatched problems while holding everything else constant yields $+1.62$pp on MATH-500 (greedy pass@1) over the matched-wrong variant ($n=10$ seeds, $p=0.0015$, Welch's $t$). In fact, the mismatched-wrong variant leads all other variants we tested on MATH-500 across both greedy pass@1 and sampling pass@$k$. On out-of-distribution AIME 2025 and 2026, the mismatched-wrong variant uniquely lifts pass@$k$ above both Mathstral-7B (in its native [INST] format) and the Qwen2.5-Math-1.5B draft model at every sample budget from $k=1$ to $k=1024$ across 2 seeds ($+14.2$pp on 2025 and $+9.0$pp on 2026 at pass@1024 over Mathstral-7B), and at pass@1024 also leads no-draft, matched-wrong, and mismatched-correct variants on both years. All variants use the same prompt with no draft injection at test time. The recipe -- trained on a single GPU with no SFT, no reward models, no synthesized data, and no produce-critique-revise inner loop -- reaches 71.98% MATH-500 on Mathstral-7B-v0.1, the highest published result on this model to our knowledge, surpassing the heavier WizardMath pipeline at 70.9% on full MATH (SFT + PPO with process/instruction reward models).

AI.tldr: 本文发现，将较小但领域训练更充分的模型（Qwen2.5-Math-1.5B）生成的数学错误草稿，以不匹配方式注入到更强模型（Mathstral-7B）的GRPO训练中，能显著提升其在MATH和AIME等数学推理任务上的泛化性能，且无需SFT、奖励模型或合成数据。
AI.motivation: 探究弱模型的离线经验是否能激发强学习器中在线强化学习（如GRPO）无法达到的能力，尤其关注‘错误但领域相关’草稿的潜在价值。
AI.method: 采用Dr. GRPO算法，在MATH数据集上训练Mathstral-7B（learner），注入来自Qwen2.5-Math-1.5B（draft model）的错误草稿；关键设计是故意将草稿与问题错配（mismatched-wrong），并严格控制变量进行消融对比。
AI.result: Mismatched-wrong变体在MATH-500上达71.98% greedy pass@1（当前Mathstral-7B-v0.1最高公开结果），显著优于标准GRPO及其它变体；在OOD的AIME 2025/2026上全面超越基线（+14.2pp/+9.0pp at pass@1024），且测试时不使用草稿。
AI.conclusion: ‘错配的错误草稿’是一种有效且轻量的离线经验注入机制，挑战了‘正确性’和‘匹配性’在RLHF中的必要性假设，为高效、低资源数学推理模型训练提供了新范式。

title: DeepArrhythmia: Segment-Contextualized ECG Arrhythmia Classification via Selective Evidence Acquisition
summary: Beat-level Electrocardiography (ECG) arrhythmia detection aims to assign an arrhythmia class to each beat in a recording, yet many existing systems treat beats as isolated local instances. This is limiting because beat labels often depend on multi-beat rhythm context, including timing, compensatory pauses, and beat-to-beat morphological consistency. We present DeepArrhythmia, a tool-grounded multimodal framework for segment-contextualized beat-level ECG arrhythmia classification. Given a multi-beat ECG segment, DeepArrhythmia combines the raw ECG signal and a rendered waveform image, localizes R peaks to identify beat instances, and produces structured beat-level predictions. The framework decouples physiological measurement from evidence integration using specialized tools for beat localization, numerical rhythm--morphology extraction, and morphology-focused textual analysis. DeepArrhythmia uses segment-level confidence to route between minimal and rich evidence states, since richer physiological evidence is not uniformly useful. This agentic design integrates rhythm context, explicit physiological grounding, and selective evidence acquisition for decision making.

AI.tldr: DeepArrhythmia 是一种面向节拍级心电图（ECG）心律失常检测的多模态框架，通过结合原始信号与波形图像、定位R波、提取节律与形态特征，并选择性整合证据，在段落上下文中实现更准确的节拍级分类。
AI.motivation: 现有方法将每个心跳视为孤立实例，忽略了多节拍节律上下文（如时间关系、代偿性停顿、形态一致性）对分类的重要影响。
AI.method: 提出 DeepArrhythmia 框架：融合原始 ECG 信号与渲染的波形图像；利用专用工具定位 R 波、提取数值化节律-形态特征、进行形态导向的文本分析；采用段级置信度动态选择最小或丰富证据路径。
AI.result: 实现了段上下文感知的节拍级心律失常分类，提升了对依赖节奏模式的 arrhythmia 的识别能力。
AI.conclusion: 该代理式（agentic）、工具驱动、多模态的设计，将节律上下文建模、生理性显式建模与选择性证据获取统一起来，为节拍级 ECG 分析提供了新范式。

title: Capturing LLM Capabilities via Evidence-Calibrated Query Clustering
summary: Query clustering organizes queries into groups that reflect shared latent capability demands, enabling capability-aware LLM evaluation. Existing clustering methods, which primarily rely on semantic taxonomies or embeddings, often fail to capture such latent capability requirements due to a misalignment between surface-level semantics and actual model performance. We propose ECC, an algorithm that calibrates prior semantic embeddings using limited posterior model comparisons to bridge the gap between surface-level semantics and latent capability requirements. ECC characterizes each cluster through a capability profile parameterized by a Bradley-Terry model and uses trainable mixture weights to accommodate queries with mixed capability demands, jointly learning a flexible, capability-aware clustering structure that supports query-specific inference of LLM capabilities. Extensive quantitative and qualitative evaluations demonstrate that ECC significantly improves LLM capability ranking quality, outperforming human-labeled and embedding-based baselines by an average of 17.64 and 18.02 percentage points, respectively, and proves effective in downstream tasks such as query routing.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ECC算法，通过校准语义嵌入并结合模型后验比较，实现面向能力的查询聚类，显著提升大语言模型能力评估与排序质量。
AI.motivation: 现有查询聚类方法依赖语义分类或嵌入，难以捕捉表层语义与实际模型性能之间的潜在能力需求差异。
AI.method: 提出ECC算法：利用少量模型后验比较结果校准先验语义嵌入；用Bradley-Terry模型建模能力剖面；引入可训练混合权重处理多能力需求查询，联合学习能力感知的聚类结构。
AI.result: ECC在LLM能力排序质量上显著优于人工标注和嵌入基线（分别提升17.64和18.02个百分点），并在查询路由等下游任务中表现有效。
AI.conclusion: ECC成功弥合了表面语义与潜在能力需求之间的鸿沟，为能力感知的大语言模型评估提供了更鲁棒、灵活的查询聚类框架。

title: Diffusion Attention Expert Model for Predicting and Semi-automatic Localizing STAS in Lung Cancer Histopathological Images
summary: Accurate intraoperative and postoperative diagnosis of spread through air spaces (STAS) is essential for guiding surgical decisions and postoperative management in lung cancer. However, histopathological assessment is labor-intensive and is prone to missed or incorrect diagnoses. We propose a Diffusion Attention Expert Model (DAEM) to detect STAS in frozen sections (FSs) and paraffin sections (PSs). Its diffusion attention expert module leverages full attention aggregation to learn multi-scale features from histopathological images, while a dual-branch architecture strengthens multi-scale feature representation. On an internal dataset, DAEM achieves AUCs of 0.8946 for FSs and 0.9112 for PSs. Validation on external multi-center datasets from eight institutions demonstrates strong generalizability and interpretability. Using tumor microenvironment (TME) features in PSs, we further enable semi-automatic measurement of STAS location and its distance from the primary tumor. Several quantitative TME metrics are identified as potential biomarkers for STAS, including micropapillary-type STAS. Overall, DAEM offers a clinically actionable framework for STAS assessment by enabling accurate and interpretable detection on FSs and PSs, supporting postoperative risk stratification through quantitative TME-based analysis.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Diffusion Attention Expert Model (DAEM)的深度学习模型，用于在冰冻切片（FSs）和石蜡切片（PSs）中准确、可解释地检测肺腺癌中的空气间隙播散（STAS），并在多中心数据上验证了其泛化能力；同时结合肿瘤微环境（TME）特征实现了STAS位置与距离的半自动量化分析，并挖掘出若干潜在生物标志物。
AI.motivation: 术中及术后准确诊断肺腺癌中的空气间隙播散（STAS）对指导手术决策和术后管理至关重要，但传统组织病理学评估费时且易漏诊或误诊。
AI.method: 提出Diffusion Attention Expert Model（DAEM），包含扩散注意力专家模块（实现全注意力聚合以学习多尺度特征）和双分支结构（增强多尺度表征能力）；并利用石蜡切片中的肿瘤微环境（TME）特征实现STAS空间定位与距离的半自动测量。
AI.result: 在内部数据集上，DAEM对FSs和PSs的AUC分别达0.8946和0.9112；在外部队列（八个中心）中展现出强泛化性与可解释性；识别出多个TME定量指标（如微乳头型STAS）作为潜在STAS生物标志物。
AI.conclusion: DAEM为STAS评估提供了临床可行的框架：既支持术中/术后切片的高精度、可解释检测，又通过TME定量分析助力术后风险分层。

title: Mono-Hydra++: Real-Time Monocular Scene Graph Construction with Multi-Task Learning for 3D Indoor Mapping
comment: Submitted to ISPRS Journal of Photogrammetry and Remote Sensing. 50 pages, figures and tables included. Code: https://github.com/BavanthaU/mono-hydra-pp.git
summary: Autonomous agile robots need more than metric geometry: they must understand objects, rooms, places, and spatial relations for search, inspection, exploration, and human robot interaction. Conventional metric maps support localization and collision avoidance, but do not provide this semantic and relational structure. 3D scene graphs address this gap by connecting geometry with object level and room level understanding. Building such representations on agile platforms remains difficult because aerial and lightweight robots operate under strict payload, power, and compute limits, making RGB-D cameras and LiDAR sensors impractical for many onboard settings. We present Mono-Hydra++, a real time monocular RGB plus IMU pipeline for indoor metric semantic mapping and hierarchical 3D scene graph construction. The system combines M2H-MX, a DINOv3 based multi-task model for depth and semantics, with a deep feature visual inertial odometry front end, sparse predicted depth constraints in the VIO derived pose graph, semantic masking for dynamic regions, and pose aware temporal alignment before volumetric fusion in the Mono-Hydra backend. On the Go-SLAM ScanNet evaluation subset, Mono-Hydra++ achieves 1.6% lower average trajectory error than the strongest RGB-D baseline in our comparison, while using only monocular RGB plus IMU input. On calibrated 7-Scenes, it improves average ATE by 29.8% over the strongest competing calibrated baseline. We further validate Mono-Hydra++ in a real ITC building deployment using RealSense RGB plus IMU and demonstrate embedded feasibility by deploying the ONNX/TensorRT FP16 M2H-MX-L perception model at 25.53 FPS on a Jetson Orin NX 16GB. These results show that Mono-Hydra++ can provide real time metric semantic mapping and scene graph construction for resource constrained robotic platforms without relying on active depth sensors.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Mono-Hydra++，一种基于单目RGB与IMU的实时室内度量语义建图与分层3D场景图构建系统，适用于计算与载荷受限的敏捷机器人，无需RGB-D或LiDAR，在多个基准上超越现有方法并验证了嵌入式实时可行性。
AI.motivation: 自主敏捷机器人需具备语义与空间关系理解能力，而传统度量地图缺乏此类结构；同时，RGB-D和LiDAR在轻量/空中平台上受限于载荷、功耗与算力，亟需仅依赖单目视觉与IMU的轻量高效方案。
AI.method: 提出Mono-Hydra++系统：融合基于DINOv3的多任务模型M2H-MX（预测深度与语义）、深度特征视觉惯性里程计（VIO）前端、VIO位姿图中的稀疏深度约束、动态区域语义掩码、位姿感知的时间对齐，以及Mono-Hydra后端的体素融合。
AI.result: 在Go-SLAM ScanNet子集上轨迹误差比最强RGB-D基线低1.6%；在7-Scenes上平均绝对轨迹误差（ATE）提升29.8%；实机部署于ITC建筑，且M2H-MX-L模型在Jetson Orin NX上以25.53 FPS实时运行（ONNX/TensorRT FP16）。
AI.conclusion: Mono-Hydra++实现了资源受限平台上的实时度量语义建图与3D场景图构建，摆脱对主动深度传感器的依赖，为敏捷机器人提供了可行的轻量级语义感知与空间推理基础。

title: Transitivity Meets Cyclicity: Explicit Preference Decomposition for Dynamic Large Language Model Alignment
summary: Standard RLHF relies on transitive scalar rewards, failing to capture the cyclic nature of human preferences. While some approaches like the General Preference Model (GPM) address this, we identify a theoretical limitation: their implicit formulation entangles hierarchy with cyclicity, failing to guarantee dominant solutions. To address this, we propose the Hybrid Reward-Cyclic (HRC) model, which utilizes game-theoretic decomposition to explicitly disentangle preferences into orthogonal transitive (scalar) and cyclic (vector) components. Complementing this, we introduce Dynamic Self-Play Preference Optimization (DSPPO), which treats alignment as a time-varying game to progressively guide the policy toward the Nash equilibrium. Synthetic data experiments further validate HRC's structural superiority in mixed transitive--cyclic settings, where HRC converges faster and achieves higher accuracy than GPM. Experiments on RewardBench 2 demonstrate that HRC consistently improves over both BT and GPM baselines (e.g., +1.23% on Gemma-2B-it). In particular, its superior performance in the Ties domain empirically validates the model's robustness in handling complex, non-strict preferences. Extensive downstream evaluations on AlpacaEval 2.0, Arena-Hard-v0.1, and MT-Bench confirm the efficacy of our framework. Notably, when using Gemma-2B-it as the base preference model, HRC+DSPPO achieves a peak length-controlled win-rate of 44.75% on AlpacaEval 2.0 and 46.8% on Arena-Hard-v0.1, significantly outperforming SPPO baselines trained with BT or GPM. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/lab-klc/Hybrid-Reward-Cyclic.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的奖励建模框架HRC，通过博弈论分解将人类偏好显式分离为传递性（标量）和循环性（向量）两个正交分量，并结合动态自博弈偏好优化（DSPPO）方法，使策略逐步收敛至纳什均衡；在多个基准测试中显著优于BT和GPM等基线方法。
AI.motivation: 标准RLHF依赖传递性标量奖励，无法刻画人类偏好的循环性；现有方法如GPM虽尝试建模循环性，但其隐式建模方式混淆了层级结构与循环性，无法保证主导解的存在。
AI.method: 提出Hybrid Reward-Cyclic（HRC）模型，利用博弈论分解显式分离偏好为传递性（标量）和循环性（向量）分量；并设计Dynamic Self-Play Preference Optimization（DSPPO），将对齐视为时变博弈以引导策略逼近纳什均衡。
AI.result: 在合成数据上，HRC在混合传递-循环设置中收敛更快、精度更高；在RewardBench 2上超越BT和GPM（如Gemma-2B-it上+1.23%）；在Ties域表现突出；AlpacaEval 2.0和Arena-Hard-v0.1上分别达44.75%和46.8%长度控制胜率，显著优于SPPO基线。
AI.conclusion: HRC+DSPPO框架有效解耦并协同建模人类偏好的传递性与循环性，提升了偏好建模的结构性与鲁棒性，在多项下游评估中验证了其先进性与实用性。

title: Two-Valued Symmetric Circulant Matrices: Applications in Deep Learning
summary: Despite the success of deep neural networks in vision, medical diagnosis, and IoT scenarios, their deployment on resource-limited platforms poses serious challenges due to their high storage requirements, computational complexity, and large footprint. In particular, fully connected layers require a large number of weights, making it difficult for edge devices to accommodate them. To overcome these challenges associated with limited platforms, this paper proposes the Two-Valued Symmetric Circulant Matrix (TVSCM), a very sparse architecture that employs just two weights per layer to keep it circulant and symmetric. The extreme form of structured sparse architecture provides negligible storage costs compared to traditional full-weight storage. Instead of hardware and additional stages of other traditional sparse learning techniques, such as low-rank approximation and pruning approaches, this architecture provides an extreme form of sparsity, achieving very minimal storage requirements. The simulation study demonstrates more than 80$\times$ reduction in model parameters, reducing parameters from 623,290 to 7,852 on MNIST and from 24,709 to 942 on the MIT-BIH arrhythmia dataset, while maintaining comparable accuracy from 97.6% to 93.5% on MNIST and from 97.6% to 93.1% on MIT-BIH. Due to its minimal architectural requirements and very low power consumption, this architecture would be ideal for edge computing platforms, tiny-ML platforms, IoMT systems, and battery-powered systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为双值对称循环矩阵（TVSCM）的极稀疏网络架构，仅用两个权重实现每层的循环与对称结构，在大幅减少参数量（超80倍）的同时保持可接受的准确率，适用于边缘计算与低功耗设备。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络在资源受限平台（如边缘设备、IoMT、电池供电系统）部署时面临高存储、高计算复杂度和大模型体积的挑战，尤其是全连接层权重过多难以适配。
AI.method: 提出双值对称循环矩阵（TVSCM）架构，利用仅两个可学习权重构建每层的循环且对称矩阵，实现极致结构化稀疏，无需额外硬件或传统剪枝/低秩近似等步骤。
AI.result: 在MNIST上参数从623,290降至7,852（约79×压缩），准确率从97.6%微降至93.5%；在MIT-BIH心律失常数据集上参数从24,709降至942（约26×压缩），准确率从97.6%微降至93.1%。
AI.conclusion: TVSCM是一种高度紧凑、低功耗、易部署的轻量级架构，特别适合边缘计算、TinyML及医疗物联网（IoMT）等资源严苛场景。

title: F2IND-IT! -- Multimodal Fuzzy Fake Indian News Detection using Images and Text
summary: Biased manipulation of facts across regional and national media outlets complicates misinformation detection in diverse landscapes like India. This paper introduces a novel multimodal framework combining visual and textual modalities for enhanced fake news detection on Indian media. The architecture utilizes a ResNet-50 Convolutional Neural Network to extract visual features from news images, a DistilBERT encoder to obtain textual semantic embeddings, and an Adaptive Neuro-Fuzzy Inference System (ANFIS) to generate a fuzzy reliability score. A lightweight attention-based fusion module assigns learnable weights to each modality prior to classification. Evaluated on the IFND dataset, the proposed model is validated through an in-depth comparative analysis against previous research. Experimental results demonstrate superior performance across accuracy, precision, recall, and $F_1$-scores, confirming the efficacy of the architecture.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合视觉与文本模态的新型多模态框架，用于提升印度媒体环境下的假新闻检测效果，通过ResNet-50、DistilBERT与ANFIS融合注意力机制，在IFND数据集上取得优于先前方法的性能。
AI.motivation: 印度地区和国家媒体对事实的偏见性操控使虚假信息检测变得复杂，亟需适配多语言、多文化背景的多模态检测方法。
AI.method: 采用ResNet-50提取图像特征，DistilBERT编码文本语义，引入ANFIS生成模糊可信度评分，并设计轻量级注意力融合模块动态加权双模态特征后分类。
AI.result: 在IFND数据集上，该模型在准确率、精确率、召回率及F1分数上均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提多模态融合框架能有效提升印度语境下假新闻检测的鲁棒性与准确性，验证了视觉-文本协同建模与模糊推理结合的有效性。

title: Multi-hop Relational Contrastive Learning: Extending Spatial Contrastive Pre-training Beyond Pairwise Relations
summary: Understanding how objects relate to each other in space is fundamental to scene understanding, yet most contrastive pre-training approaches only model pairwise relationships, leaving richer compositional and multi-hop interactions largely unexplored. We introduce Multi-Hop Relational Contrastive Learning (MRCL), a framework that extends spatial contrastive learning to graph-structured scene representations. By tracing k-hop paths through scene graphs built from detected objects, MRCL captures implicit spatial dependencies that go well beyond what direct object pairs can express. We define a multi-level contrastive objective spanning nodes, edges, and multi-hop paths, encouraging embeddings that remain stable across object semantics while staying responsive to spatial layout. On a GQA subset, MRCL produces spatially-aware representations that improve content-based graph retrieval (NDCG@5 = 0.748) and consistently benefit downstream tasks, including spatial relationship recognition and graph-based question answering. Together, these results suggest that multi-hop relational supervision offers substantially richer structural guidance than pairwise-only methods, leading to visual representations that are more robust, compositional, and geometry-aware.

AI.tldr: 本文提出多跳关系对比学习（MRCL）框架，通过场景图中的k跳路径建模对象间复杂的多跳空间关系，超越传统两两对比学习，提升了空间感知表征能力，在图检索和空间关系识别等下游任务中表现更优。
AI.motivation: 现有对比学习方法仅建模物体间的两两关系，忽略了更丰富的组合性与多跳空间交互，限制了场景理解的深度。
AI.method: 提出Multi-Hop Relational Contrastive Learning（MRCL），在检测出的对象构建的场景图上追踪k跳路径，定义涵盖节点、边及多跳路径的多层次对比损失，使表征对语义稳定、对空间布局敏感。
AI.result: 在GQA子集上，MRCL显著提升内容驱动的图检索性能（NDCG@5 = 0.748），并持续改善空间关系识别与基于图的问答等下游任务。
AI.conclusion: 多跳关系监督比仅依赖两两关系的方法提供更丰富的结构引导，从而生成更鲁棒、可组合、几何感知更强的视觉表征。

title: PRIME: Physically-consistent Robotic Inertial and Motion Estimation for Legged and Humanoid Robots
summary: Humanoid and legged robots interact with the environment through intermittent contacts, making accurate motion estimation fundamentally dependent on reasoning about contact dynamics. However, standard sensing pipelines-whether based on onboard proprioception with Extended Kalman Filters (EKFs) or external motion capture systems-recover only kinematics, while contact forces, contact timing, and inertial parameters remain unobserved. As a result, purely kinematic reconstructions often violate rigid-body dynamics, particularly during contact-rich motions. To enable accurate motion estimation from onboard kinematics in real-world deployment, we propose PRIME (Physically-consistent Robotic Inertial and Motion Estimation), a Maximum A Posteriori (MAP) formulation that refines measured kinematics and actuator commands into a dynamically consistent trajectory while jointly estimating frictional contact forces and physically consistent inertial parameters. Our approach incorporates differentiable contact dynamics with smoothed complementarity constraints and an Anitescu-style friction model, yielding a smooth optimization problem that remains tractable across versatile contact transitions. We evaluate PRIME on contact-rich locomotion with quadrupedal robots and the Unitree G1 humanoid, demonstrating improved trajectory consistency and accurate inertial parameter identification. Beyond improving state estimation and feedback control with calibrated inertial parameters, PRIME produces force- and contact-annotated motion reconstructions from real robots in deployment, which can be used to provide high-quality data for downstream learning applications, including large-scale behavior modeling and robot foundation models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PRIME方法，通过最大后验估计联合优化运动学测量、执行器指令、接触力和惯性参数，实现物理一致的机器人运动估计。
AI.motivation: 标准传感方案仅能恢复运动学信息，无法观测接触力、接触时刻和惯性参数，导致运动重建违反刚体动力学，尤其在接触丰富的运动中。
AI.method: 提出PRIME框架，基于最大后验估计（MAP），融合可微接触动力学、平滑互补约束和Anitescu摩擦模型，联合估计接触力与惯性参数。
AI.result: 在四足机器人和Unitree G1人形机器人上验证，显著提升轨迹一致性与惯性参数辨识精度，并生成带力与接触标注的高质量运动重建数据。
AI.conclusion: PRIME实现了仅依赖机载运动学传感器的物理一致运动估计，为反馈控制、行为建模与机器人基础模型提供高质数据支持。

title: Taming "Zombie'' Agents: A Markov State-Aware Framework for Resilient Multi-Agent Evolution
summary: Recent advancements in LLM-based multi-agent systems have demonstrated remarkable collaborative capabilities across complex tasks. To improve overall efficiency, existing methods often rely on aggressive graph evolution among agents (e.g., node or edge pruning), which risks prematurely discarding valuable agents due to transient issues such as hallucinations or temporary knowledge gaps. However, such hard pruning overlooks the potential for ``zombie'' agents to recover and contribute in subsequent discussion rounds. In this paper, we propose AgentRevive, a Markov state-aware framework for resilient multi-agent evolution. Our approach dynamically manages agent collaboration through soft state transitions, implemented via two key components: (1) State-Aware Policy Learning: Agent states are divided into ``Active'', ``Standby'', and ``Terminated'' states, selectively propagating messages based on agent memory. The policy employs a risk estimator to optimize agent state transitions by assessing hallucination risk, minimizing the influence of unreliable nodes while safeguarding valuable ones. (2) State-Aware Edge Optimization: Subgraph edges are pruned according to states learned from the policy, permanently removing ``Terminated'' nodes and retaining ``Standby'' nodes for subsequent rounds to assess their potential future contributions. Extensive experiments on general reasoning, domain-specific, and hallucination challenge tasks show that our method consistently outperforms strong baselines and significantly reduces token consumption through state-aware agent scheduling.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AgentRevive框架，通过马尔可夫状态感知的软状态转移机制（Active/Standby/Terminated），动态管理多智能体协作，避免硬剪枝导致的有价值智能体过早淘汰，在提升推理性能的同时显著降低token消耗。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM的多智能体系统常采用激进图演化（如节点/边剪枝）来提升效率，但易因幻觉或临时知识缺失等瞬时问题误删潜在有价值的“僵尸”智能体，忽视其后续恢复与贡献可能。
AI.method: 提出AgentRevive：（1）状态感知策略学习——将智能体划分为Active/Standby/Terminated三态，基于记忆选择性传递消息，并用风险估计器优化状态转移以平衡可靠性与潜力；（2）状态感知边优化——依据策略学习的状态对子图边进行剪枝，永久移除Terminated节点，保留Standby节点供后续轮次评估。
AI.result: 在通用推理、领域特定及幻觉挑战任务上均显著优于强基线，且大幅减少token消耗。
AI.conclusion: AgentRevive通过软状态机制实现了更鲁棒、高效的多智能体协同演化，兼顾性能提升与资源节约，为LLM多智能体系统的可持续协作提供了新范式。

title: Membership Inference Attacks on Discrete Diffusion Language Models
summary: Masked Diffusion Language Models MDLMs replace autoregressive generation with iterative demasking and their privacy properties are largely unstudied. We study membership inference attacks MIA on fine tuned MDLMs and show they are significantly more vulnerable than current grey box baselines suggest. We extract a 46 dimensional feature vector from the models reconstruction loss at four masking ratios and train XGBoost and MLP classifiers on top. On the MIMIR benchmark across six text domains XGBoost achieves mean AUC 0.878 peaking at 0.930 on Pile CC and beats the SAMA grey box baseline by 0.062 AUC on average. A leave one signal out ablation shows that the ELBO trajectory alone drives most of this with a mean drop of 0.130 when removed while attention features add almost nothing below 0.003. We also design a shadow model transfer attack where K equals 3 surrogate MDLMs trained on data from unrelated domains generate classifier labels with no access to the target domain. This achieves 0.858 mean AUC within 0.020 of the white box oracle and establishes shadow model transfer as a practical and near equally effective attack path.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了掩码扩散语言模型（MDLMs）的成员推断攻击（MIA）脆弱性，发现其比现有灰盒基线更易受攻击；提出基于重建损失特征和ELBO轨迹的XGBoost/MLP分类器，在MIMIR基准上AUC达0.878；并通过影子模型迁移攻击验证了跨域攻击的有效性。
AI.motivation: 掩码扩散语言模型（MDLMs）正逐步替代自回归生成模型，但其隐私特性尤其是成员推断攻击（MIA）风险尚未被系统研究。
AI.method: 从MDLM在四种掩码比率下的重建损失中提取46维特征向量，结合ELBO轨迹与注意力特征，训练XGBoost和MLP分类器进行MIA；同时设计基于3个无关领域影子MDLM的迁移攻击方案。
AI.result: XGBoost在MIMIR六文本域上平均AUC为0.878（最高0.930），显著优于SAMA灰盒基线（+0.062）；消融显示ELBO轨迹贡献最大（移除后AUC下降0.130），注意力特征几乎无贡献（<0.003）；影子模型迁移攻击达0.858平均AUC，接近白盒上限。
AI.conclusion: MDLMs存在严重成员隐私泄露风险；重建损失动态（尤其ELBO轨迹）是关键攻击信号；影子模型迁移攻击是一种实用且高效的黑盒MIA新路径。

title: Latent Heuristic Search: Continuous Optimization for Automated Algorithm Design
comment: Accepted at LION 2026, The Learning and Intelligent Optimization Conference
summary: The integration of Large Language Models (LLMs) into evolutionary frameworks has established a new paradigm for automated heuristic discovery. Despite their promise, these methods typically search in the discrete space of program syntax, relying on stochastic sampling to navigate a highly non-convex optimization landscape. This work proposes a continuous heuristic discovery framework that shifts optimization to a learned latent manifold. We employ an encoder to map discrete programs into continuous embeddings and train a differentiable surrogate model to predict performance, enabling gradient-based search. To regularize the optimization trajectory, an invertible normalizing flow maps these embeddings to a structured Gaussian prior, where we perform gradient ascent. The resulting optimized latent vectors are projected through a learned mapper into soft prompts, which condition a frozen LLM to synthesize novel executable heuristics. We evaluate the proposed method on the Traveling Salesman Problem (TSP), the Capacitated Vehicle Routing Problem (CVRP), the Knapsack Problem (KSP), and Online Bin Packing (OBP). Empirical results demonstrate that continuous latent-space optimization achieves performance competitive with state-of-the-art discrete evolutionary baselines while offering a complementary methodological alternative for automated algorithm design. The implementation code is available at \url{https://github.com/cheikh025/LHS}.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于连续潜在空间优化的启发式算法自动发现框架，通过编码器、可微代理模型和标准化流，在连续隐空间中进行梯度优化，并利用冻结大语言模型生成可执行启发式算法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于大语言模型的进化式启发式发现方法在离散语法空间中搜索，依赖随机采样，难以高效优化高度非凸的目标函数。
AI.method: 构建编码器将离散程序映射为连续嵌入；训练可微代理模型预测性能；使用可逆标准化流将嵌入映射至结构化高斯先验空间并进行梯度上升；再将优化后的潜在向量经学习映射器转化为软提示，驱动冻结LLM生成新启发式。
AI.result: 在TSP、CVRP、KSP和OBP四个组合优化问题上，该方法性能媲美当前最优离散进化基线。
AI.conclusion: 连续潜在空间优化为自动化算法设计提供了一种与传统离散进化方法互补的新范式。

title: Conservative AI for Safety-Sensitive Medical Image Restoration: Residual-Bounded CT-CTA Enhancement for Intracranial Aneurysm-Relevant Signal Recovery
comment: Preprint manuscript, 16 pages, 4 figures, 3 tables. This manuscript presents a residual-bounded 2.5D CT/CTA restoration framework for conservative medical image enhancement and evaluates it using image-recovery, baseline comparison, Monte Carlo stability, anatomical localization, and external low-dose CT testing
summary: Image restoration models are increasingly applied to degraded medical scans, but in safety-sensitive settings they must improve image quality without uncontrolled modification of clinically important regions. This is especially relevant for intracranial CT and CT angiography (CTA), where small vessels and aneurysm-relevant cues lie near high-contrast anatomical boundaries. We frame medical image restoration as a conservative AI problem and present a residual-bounded 2.5D restoration framework trained on synthetically degraded CT/CTA inputs. The model adds a learned residual to the original center slice through an edit-control map that limits the magnitude and spatial extent of modification. We evaluate the framework using an aneurysm-relevant image-recovery matrix, paired comparison against a Gaussian baseline, Monte Carlo stability testing, anatomical localization of meaningful edits, and external evaluation on low-dose CT. On 50 out-of-distribution CT-CTA cases, the bounded model achieved a mean target gain of 0.0635, a mean PSNR of 37.51 dB, and an iatrogenic-edit rate of 4.0%. Across 1,000 Monte Carlo runs, it remained net positive in 85.4% of runs with no stably negative cases. On external low-dose CT, the model was directionally beneficial and produced a substantially smaller modification footprint than the baseline. Meaningful edits concentrated in brain and skull regions while unrelated anatomy showed negligible change. These findings provide preliminary computational evidence that residual-bounded restoration is feasible in boundary-sensitive vascular imaging, but they do not establish clinical diagnostic performance and require expert review and prospective validation before clinical use.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种残差有界、2.5D的医学图像恢复框架，专为颅内CT/CTA设计，在提升图像质量的同时严格限制对关键解剖边界的修改，通过编辑控制图约束残差幅度与空间范围，并在多项指标（如目标增益、PSNR、医源性编辑率、蒙特卡洛稳定性）上验证其保守性与鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 医疗图像恢复模型在安全敏感场景中必须在提升图像质量的同时避免对临床关键区域（如小血管、动脉瘤线索）的不可控修改，尤其在高对比度解剖边界附近。
AI.method: 提出残差有界2.5D恢复框架：以原始中心切片为输入，通过学习得到的编辑控制图约束残差添加的幅度和空间范围；训练数据为合成退化CT/CTA；评估采用动脉瘤相关图像恢复矩阵、与高斯基线配对比较、蒙特卡洛稳定性测试、解剖定位分析及外部低剂量CT验证。
AI.result: 在50例分布外CT-CTA上，平均目标增益0.0635、PSNR 37.51 dB、医源性编辑率4.0%；1000次蒙特卡洛运行中85.4%净收益、无稳定负向结果；外部低剂量CT上修改足迹显著小于基线，有意义编辑主要集中于脑与颅骨区域。
AI.conclusion: 残差有界恢复在边界敏感的血管影像中具有可行性，但尚不能确立临床诊断性能，需专家评审与前瞻性验证后方可临床应用。

title: CosFly-Track: A Large-Scale Multi-Modal Dataset for UAV Visual Tracking via Multi-Constraint Trajectory Optimization
summary: Recent aerial vision-language navigation (VLN) datasets have grown rapidly, but they primarily address goal-oriented navigation to static destinations, leaving UAV visual tracking -- continuously following a moving target while maintaining visibility -- largely without dedicated training data. We introduce CosFlyTrack, a large-scale multi-modal dataset and scalable generation pipeline for UAV visual tracking in urban environments. The dataset provides approximately 12,000 expert and perturbed UAV trajectories generated from 6,000 pedestrian paths, comprising 2.4 million timesteps (approximately 334 hours) with seven aligned data channels: RGB, metric depth, semantic segmentation, six-degree-of-freedom drone pose, target state with visibility flag, bilingual (Chinese-English) instructions, and trajectory-pair metadata. To generate high-quality expert trajectories, we develop MuCO, a multi-constraint optimizer that plans directly in continuous three-dimensional space with BVH-accelerated collision and visibility queries, jointly enforcing target visibility, viewpoint quality, collision avoidance, smoothness, and kinematic feasibility, avoiding the discretization artifacts and post-hoc smoothing of grid-based planners. Fine-tuning experiments on seven vision-language models show that CosFlyTrack improves tracking performance to 78.3 to 95.6 percent SR@1 meter, a 53 to 69 percentage point gain over zero-shot baselines, supporting the dataset as a training resource for dynamic target-following agents. The dataset is publicly available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/AutelRobotics/CosFly; evaluation scripts and pre-trained checkpoints are hosted at https://huggingface.co/AutelRobotics/CosFly-Track.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了CosFlyTrack——一个面向城市环境中无人机视觉跟踪任务的大规模多模态数据集及可扩展生成流程，并设计了多约束优化器MuCO以生成高质量的专家轨迹；实验表明，基于该数据集微调的视觉语言模型在动态目标跟踪任务中性能显著提升。
AI.motivation: 现有空中视觉-语言导航（VLN）数据集主要关注静态目标的导航任务，缺乏针对无人机持续跟随移动目标并保持可见性的视觉跟踪任务的专用训练数据。
AI.method: 构建了包含12,000条专家与扰动轨迹、2.4百万时间步的CosFlyTrack多模态数据集；提出MuCO多约束优化器，在连续三维空间中联合优化目标可见性、视角质量、避障、平滑性与运动学可行性，采用BVH加速碰撞与可见性查询。
AI.result: 在7个视觉语言模型上的微调实验显示，CosFlyTrack将1米成功率（SR@1m）提升至78.3%–95.6%，相比零样本基线提升53–69个百分点。
AI.conclusion: CosFlyTrack为无人机动态目标跟踪任务提供了高质量、大规模、多模态训练资源，MuCO优化器有效支撑了真实感与可行性兼备的轨迹生成，验证了该数据集对提升跟踪智能体性能的有效性。

title: AMATA: Adaptive Multi-Agent Trajectory Alignment for Knowledge-Intensive Question Answering
summary: Despite substantial advances in large language models (LLMs), generating factually consistent responses for knowledge-intensive question answering remains challenging. These difficulties are primarily due to hallucinations and the limitations of LLMs in bridging long-tail knowledge gaps. To address this, we propose AMATA, an Adaptive Multi-Agent Trajectory Alignment framework that dynamically integrates external knowledge to improve response interpretability and factual grounding. Our architecture leverages six specialized agents that collaboratively perform structured actions for complex question reasoning. We formalize multi-agent collaboration with external tools as a trajectory preference alignment problem, incorporating question-aware agent customization and inter-agent preference harmonization. AMATA introduces two principal innovations: (1) Intra-Trajectory Preference Learning, which learns objective-oriented preferences to prioritize critical agents, and (2) Inter-Agent Dependency Learning, which captures cross-agent tool dependencies through a novel dependency-aware direct preference optimization technique. Empirical results show that AMATA consistently outperforms baseline approaches, knowledge-augmented frameworks, and LLM-based trajectory systems on five established knowledge-intensive QA benchmarks. Further analysis demonstrates the efficiency of our method in reducing token consumption.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AMATA框架，通过自适应多智能体轨迹对齐方法，结合外部知识提升大语言模型在知识密集型问答中的事实一致性与可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型在知识密集型问答中易产生幻觉且难以覆盖长尾知识，导致事实不一致。
AI.method: 提出AMATA框架，包含六个专用智能体，将多智能体协作建模为轨迹偏好对齐问题，并引入轨迹内偏好学习和智能体间依赖学习两种创新机制。
AI.result: 在五个知识密集型问答基准上显著优于基线方法、知识增强框架及LLM轨迹系统，并降低了token消耗。
AI.conclusion: AMATA通过动态整合外部知识与结构化多智能体协作，有效提升了响应的事实性、可解释性与推理效率。

title: Avoiding Structural Failure Modes in Tabular Fair SSL: Online Primal-Dual Allocation under Confidence Gating
summary: Semi-supervised learning (SSL) enables prediction with limited labels, but high-stakes tabular applications (medical, credit, recidivism) require statistical fairness guarantees. We identify a structural conflict in tabular fair SSL through a diagnostic stress test: under confidence-gated pseudo-labeling, moment-matching fairness regularizers can trigger two failure modes -- Masking Collapse (fairness erodes confidence, starving pseudo-labels) and Trivial Saturation (drift to constant predictors). We propose Online Primal-Dual Allocation (OPDA), an online controller that schedules fairness and entropy-based stability penalties using violation, risk, and pseudo-label health signals, avoiding per-dataset selection of a fixed fairness weight within this diagnostic regime. On the evaluated tabular benchmarks (Adult, ACSIncome, COMPAS), OPDA mitigates the degenerate regimes observed under static weighting and simple single-signal adaptive baselines. On Adult and COMPAS, it yields non-degenerate operating points competitive with the empirical static-$λ$ frontier; on ACSIncome, it preserves utility with a wider fairness-utility spread. Relative to OPDA-lite, the full controller mainly shifts the operating point toward higher utility on ACSIncome, while Adult highlights the fairness-utility trade-off between the two variants. These results position OPDA as a calibration-free controller for non-degenerate operating points in tabular fair SSL without per-dataset tuning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Online Primal-Dual Allocation（OPDA）的在线控制器，用于解决表格型半监督学习中公平性与置信度伪标签之间的结构性冲突，避免了静态权重或简单自适应方法导致的退化现象，在多个基准数据集上实现了无需调参的非退化公平-效用权衡。
AI.motivation: 高风险表格数据应用（如医疗、信贷、再犯预测）中，半监督学习需兼顾有限标注下的预测性能与统计意义上的公平性保证，但现有公平正则化方法在置信度门控伪标签下易引发Masking Collapse和Trivial Saturation两类失败模式。
AI.method: 提出Online Primal-Dual Allocation（OPDA），一种基于违反度、风险和伪标签健康信号的在线控制器，动态调度公平性约束与熵稳定性惩罚，无需为每个数据集手动选择固定公平权重。
AI.result: 在Adult、ACSIncome、COMPAS三个表格基准上，OPDA有效缓解了静态加权及单信号自适应基线的退化问题；在Adult和COMPAS上达到接近最优静态λ前沿的非退化性能点；在ACSIncome上保持效用并拓宽公平-效用权衡范围；相比简化版OPDA-lite，全量OPDA在ACSIncome上更倾向提升效用，在Adult上体现二者公平-效用权衡差异。
AI.conclusion: OPDA是一种无需校准、无需数据集特异性调参的控制器，可在表格型公平半监督学习中稳定获得非退化操作点，为高风险应用场景提供了实用且鲁棒的公平学习框架。

title: Dynamics of collective creativity in AI art competitions
summary: Creativity is a fundamental aspect of how culture evolves, yet the mechanisms by which groups produce novelty are notoriously difficult to infer from the historical record. Iterated learning experiments have shown that cultural transmission reliably distorts artifacts toward the inductive biases of learners, but most of this work uses linear chains between human participants, leaving open how these dynamics play out in the networked, human-AI systems that increasingly shape cultural production. In this study, we leverage one such system, Artbreeder, which hosts daily "remix parties" where users iteratively build on each other's work from a single seed image, producing branching lineages of human-AI co-created images. We analyze a dataset of 130,882 images from 368 remix parties over 13 months and find that images become simpler and converge toward common thematic "attractors" (e.g., steampunk scenes, alien architecture). We also find that while more novel "parent" images produce more novel and complex "children" that attract more likes, users paradoxically prefer to remix images that are less novel and complex. Finally, larger remix parties produce more novelty at the cost of lower complexity.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过分析Artbreeder平台上的“混音派对”图像演化数据，发现人-AI协同创作中图像趋向简化与主题收敛；虽新颖父图能产更复杂子图并获更多点赞，用户却偏好 remix 较不新颖的图像；大规模派对提升新颖性但降低复杂性。
AI.motivation: 探究网络化人-AI系统中群体如何产生文化新颖性，弥补传统线性迭代学习实验在现实文化生产场景（如AI协作平台）中的适用性不足。
AI.method: 基于Artbreeder平台368场混音派对、130,882张图像的13个月数据，量化分析图像新颖性、复杂性、主题吸引子演化及用户偏好（如点赞、remix选择）与派对规模的关系。
AI.result: 图像随迭代趋于简化并收敛至若干主题吸引子（如蒸汽朋克、外星建筑）；新颖父图生成更新颖、更复杂且更受点赞的子图，但用户更倾向remix低新颖性/低复杂性图像；派对规模越大，整体新颖性越高，但平均复杂性越低。
AI.conclusion: 人-AI协同文化演化受认知偏差与社会偏好双重驱动：个体偏好稳定易处理的内容，而群体规模扩大可激发新颖性，但以牺牲复杂性为代价；这揭示了当代数字文化生产中创新与保守的动态张力。

title: REC-RL: Referring expression counting via Gaussian and range-based reward optimization
summary: Referring expression counting (REC) is an intention-driven task that requires context-aware visual reasoning. While recent vision-language models incorporate language for visual understanding, most existing REC methods rely on rulebased reinforcement learning with rewards focused primarily on final accuracy, overlooking the quality of intermediate reasoning. We propose REC-RL, a reinforcement learning framework that introduces a think-range-answer paradigm to explicitly optimize the visual reasoning process. RECRL employs Group Relative Policy Optimization and two lightweight rewards: an accuracy reward that combines range-based interval supervision with Gaussian-based precision guidance, and a format reward that enforces structured outputs. By modeling intermediate focus prediction as internal decision-making, REC-RL avoids additional annotations and better aligns with human perception. Extensive experiments demonstrate consistent improvements over strong baselines and robust generalization across benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出REC-RL框架，通过引入‘思考-范围-回答’范式和双轻量级奖励机制（精度与格式），在无需额外标注的前提下优化指代表达计数任务中的视觉推理过程，显著提升性能与泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有指代表达计数（REC）方法多依赖以最终准确率为导向的基于规则的强化学习，忽视中间推理质量，且未充分建模符合人类感知的视觉决策过程。
AI.method: 提出REC-RL强化学习框架，采用‘think-range-answer’范式；设计Group Relative Policy Optimization算法；引入两种轻量奖励：融合区间监督与高斯精度引导的准确性奖励，以及约束结构化输出的格式奖励；将中间聚焦预测建模为内部决策，避免额外标注。
AI.result: 在多个基准上一致超越强基线模型，展现出优异的鲁棒泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: REC-RL通过显式优化视觉推理过程而非仅关注最终结果，有效提升了REC任务的可解释性、合理性与性能，验证了高质量中间推理对意图驱动视觉语言任务的重要性。

title: Optimal Knock-Pick Planning for Tightly Packed Tabletop Blocks With Parallel Grippers
summary: Rearranging densely packed tabletop objects is challenging when parallel-gripper picks are infeasible without sufficient clearance around an object. This work studies the problem characteristics for practically motivated settings with uniformly sized blocks placed at planar tabletop grid locations. Since purely prehensile removal can become infeasible, a directional knock primitive is therefore introduced and the optimal knock-pick variant of the problem is formulated. The work proposes a series of abstractions wherein minimal constraining gadgets are covered to identify the necessary knocks. Utilizing a maximum-weight perfect matching on a graphical abstraction yields efficient polynomial-time computation of the optimal plan that minimizes the number of actions. Experiments are reported for increasing grid sizes in synthetic settings as well as in IsaacSim. The theoretical observations provide a promising stepping stone towards rigorously building efficient manipulation strategies that interleave prehensile and non-prehensile actions.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在桌面密集排列物体时，由于缺乏足够间隙导致平行夹爪难以抓取的问题，提出了一种方向性敲击（knock）操作作为补充，并构建了最优敲击-抓取规划模型，通过图论中的最大权完美匹配实现多项式时间最优解。
AI.motivation: 当桌面物体密集排列、缺乏抓取间隙时，传统平行夹爪抓取不可行，需引入非抓取式操作以完成重排任务。
AI.method: 提出方向性敲击（directional knock）操作，构建敲击-抓取混合规划问题；设计分层抽象模型，用最小约束装置覆盖识别必要敲击；最终建模为图上的最大权完美匹配问题，实现多项式时间最优求解。
AI.result: 在合成场景和IsaacSim仿真中验证了方法随网格规模增长仍保持高效；理论分析表明该框架可扩展至更一般的抓取与非抓取动作协同规划。
AI.conclusion: 敲击与抓取协同的抽象建模与图匹配求解方法，为密集场景下高效混合操作规划提供了严谨可行的新路径。

title: Learning Transferable Topology Priors for Multi-Agent LLM Collaboration Across Domains
summary: Large language model (LLM)-based multi-agent systems have shown strong potential for complex reasoning by coordinating specialized agents through structured communication. However, existing topology-evolution methods typically construct or optimize a collaboration topology for each query from scratch, leading to substantial online search overhead, high inference-time token consumption, and limited scalability in multi-domain settings. We propose TopoPrior, a framework for learning transferable topology priors for multi-agent LLM collaboration across domains. Rather than repeatedly searching for effective collaboration structures online, TopoPrior learns reusable topology priors from reference collaboration graphs collected offline from multiple domains and uses them to generate query-conditioned initial collaboration graphs for downstream refinement. By shifting part of topology search from per-query online optimization to offline prior learning, TopoPrior amortizes search cost while remaining compatible with existing topology-evolution backbones. Technically, TopoPrior contains two key components. First, a transferable topology prior learning module employs a conditional variational graph framework to capture reusable structural regularities across domains in a latent space. Second, a query-conditioned latent adaptation module introduces adversarial alignment to reduce unnecessary domain discrepancy while preserving query-relevant structural variation. Experiments on multi-domain reasoning benchmarks show that TopoPrior consistently improves several heterogeneous topology-evolution backbones while reducing online inference-time token usage, with only modest additional trainable parameters. These results suggest that transferable topology initialization is an effective and lightweight mechanism for improving the efficiency of multi-agent LLM collaboration across domains.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TopoPrior框架，通过离线学习跨域可迁移的协作拓扑先验，减少多智能体大模型系统在推理时的在线搜索开销和token消耗，提升多领域复杂推理效率。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM的多智能体系统在每次查询时从头构建协作拓扑，导致高在线搜索开销、高token消耗及跨领域泛化能力差。
AI.method: TopoPrior包含两个核心模块：1）基于条件变分图的可迁移拓扑先验学习模块，从多领域参考协作图中提取结构规律；2）引入对抗对齐的查询条件隐空间适配模块，兼顾域间一致性与查询特异性。
AI.result: 在多领域推理基准上，TopoPrior显著提升多种拓扑演化骨干方法的性能，同时降低推理token用量，仅需少量额外可训练参数。
AI.conclusion: 跨领域可迁移的拓扑初始化是一种高效轻量的机制，能有效提升多智能体LLM协作在多领域的推理效率与可扩展性。

title: Nested Spatio-Temporal Time Series Forecasting
summary: Spatiotemporal forecasting is critical for real-world applications like traffic management, yet capturing reliable interactions remains challenging under noisy and non-stationary conditions. Existing methods primarily rely on historical spatial priors, often failing to account for evolving temporal correlations and suffering from systematic errors. In this work, we propose a nested forecasting framework that couples future macro-level regional trends with micro-level historical observations, enabling top-down guidance from abstract future representations for fine-grained forecasting. Specifically, we employ a spectral clustering-based approach to construct semantically coherent regions, providing both theoretical and empirical evidence that this representation effectively filters systematic noise while preserving essential trends. Building on this, we develop a progressive coarse-to-fine predictor to integrate these representative features into the inference process. This enables the model to leverage trend predictions to anticipate dynamic anomalies, such as periodic offsets, in advance. Furthermore, extensive experiments on multiple high-dimensional datasets demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, validating the effectiveness of future macro-guided nested forecasting.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种嵌套式时空预测框架，通过结合宏观区域未来趋势与微观历史观测，实现自上而下的细粒度预测，并利用谱聚类构建语义一致区域以抑制系统噪声、保留关键趋势，在多个高维数据集上显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖静态空间先验，难以应对噪声和非平稳条件下的动态时空交互建模，尤其无法捕捉随时间演化的相关性并易受系统误差影响。
AI.method: 提出嵌套预测框架：首先基于谱聚类构建语义连贯的区域划分以提取鲁棒宏观表征；再设计渐进式由粗到精的预测器，将宏观趋势预测作为指导信号融入微观预测过程。
AI.result: 在多个高维时空数据集（如交通流）上实验表明，该方法持续超越当前最优基线模型，显著提升预测精度与异常（如周期性偏移）识别能力。
AI.conclusion: 未来宏观趋势可为细粒度预测提供有效引导，所提出的嵌套式、谱聚类增强的粗到精预测范式，能更鲁棒地建模复杂、噪声干扰下的时空动态。

title: MHMamba: Multi-Head Mamba for 3D Brain Tumor Segmentation
summary: Brain tumors exhibit high heterogeneity in morphology and multimodal contrast, making manual slice-by-slice de lineation time-consuming and experience-dependent, thus necessitating efficient and stable automated segmentation methods. To address the limitations of CNNs in modeling long-range dependencies, and the heavy computational and memory overhead and inter-block contextual in coherence of Transformers in 3D MRI, this paper proposes Multi-Head Mamba (MHMamba). This method combines a U-shaped architecture with a multi-head state-space model (Mamba), splitting the channel dimension into parallel SSM heads and aggregating them with residuals. This enhances long-range representation and improves the stability of multimodal training while maintaining linear complexity. To further align statistics and enhance lesion response, we designed a channel-space calibration module for multi-head outputs and introduced an adaptive fusion mechanism at skip connections to dynamically connect global semantics with local details, thereby improving boundary consistency and the detection of small-volume lesions. We conducted experiments and ablations on BraTS2021 and BraTS2023. The results showed that MHMamba achieved stable and significant improvements in overall accuracy, boundary smoothness, and sensitivity to tumor core and small-volume enhancement areas, while preserving the linear-complexity advantage of Mamba-based modeling, thus verifying the effectiveness and versatility of the method.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Multi-Head Mamba（MHMamba），一种结合U型架构与多头状态空间模型（Mamba）的轻量高效3D脑肿瘤分割方法，通过多头SSM、通道-空间校准和自适应跳跃连接融合，在BraTS数据集上显著提升精度、边界平滑性和小病灶敏感性，同时保持线性计算复杂度。
AI.motivation: 脑肿瘤MRI图像具有高度形态与多模态异质性，传统人工标注耗时且依赖经验；CNN难以建模长程依赖，而3D Transformer存在计算开销大、内存占用高及上下文不一致问题。
AI.method: 提出Multi-Head Mamba（MHMamba）：1）U型主干中嵌入多头状态空间模型（各头并行处理分通道特征，残差聚合）；2）引入通道-空间校准模块对齐多头输出统计特性；3）在跳跃连接处设计自适应融合机制，动态整合全局语义与局部细节。
AI.result: 在BraTS2021和BraTS2023上实验表明，MHMamba在整体准确率、边界平滑性、肿瘤核心及微小强化区敏感性方面均取得稳定显著提升，同时维持Mamba固有的线性复杂度优势。
AI.conclusion: MHMamba有效平衡了建模能力、计算效率与多模态鲁棒性，为3D医学图像分割提供了一种高效、稳定且可扩展的新范式。

title: Virtues of Ordered Chaos: Planning with Topple Actions in Tabletop Stack Rearrangement
summary: Efficient object manipulation strategies have significant impact in automation applications. In this work, the stack rearrangement in tabletop settings is studied, with a focus on augmenting the task planning domain with richer nonprehensile aggregating actions, in particular the toppling of objects from a stack to the table. Toppling can compress long sequences of intermediate relocations. Computed plans need to interleave pick-and-place actions with topple throughout its plan based on the problem. In order to generate the task plan and model an abstraction to compute solutions that include both pick-and-place and topple actions, a novel aggregating gadget for topple is introduced. Using this directed graphical abstraction, candidate task plan computation becomes a variant of the pebble motion problem, treating objects as pebbles. Benchmarks are then reported in a IsaacSim-based physics simulation. Results highlight clear benefits of achieving faster execution than solely using pick-and-place actions. Though this work primarily investigates the topple action, we demonstrate that similar abstractions can model other aggregating actions of interest, like scoop. The current work provides a preliminary, strong indication of the promising benefits of abstractions for rich object interactions in manipulation applications.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了桌面环境中的堆叠重排任务，引入了一种用于'倾倒（topple）'动作的新型聚合小工具，并将其建模为有向图抽象，将任务规划转化为类弹珠运动问题，从而在规划中融合抓取放置与倾倒动作；实验表明该方法比仅使用抓取放置更快，且框架可扩展至其他非抓取动作（如铲取）。
AI.motivation: 提升自动化中物体操作的效率，特别是通过引入更丰富的非抓取式聚合动作（如倾倒）来压缩冗长的中间搬运序列。
AI.method: 提出一种针对倾倒动作的新型聚合小工具，构建有向图抽象，将物体视为弹珠，将任务规划建模为变体弹珠运动问题；在IsaacSim物理仿真中进行基准测试。
AI.result: 相比仅使用抓取放置，所提方法显著加快执行速度；验证了该抽象框架对其他聚合动作（如铲取）的可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: 面向丰富物体交互的抽象建模在操作任务中具有显著潜力，倾倒等非抓取动作能有效提升规划效率与执行性能。

title: PESD-TSF: A Period-Aware and Explicit Structured Decomposition Framework for Long-Term Time Series Forecasting
summary: Deep forecasting models often suffer from attenuated periodic perception and entangled trend-noise representations as network depth increases. Moreover, the widely adopted channel-independent paradigm, while improving training stability, disrupts intrinsic dynamic coordination among variables, hindering the modeling of cross-variable consistency in multivariate time series. To address these issues, we propose PESD-TSF, a physics-inspired structured decomposition framework for long-term time series forecasting that jointly emphasizes interpretability and predictive accuracy. PESD-TSF introduces three key designs. First, a Multiplicative Periodic Gating mechanism incorporates continuous-time priors to dynamically modulate signal amplitudes, preserving periodic structures across deep layers. Second, a multi-scale structured encoder integrates detrended attention with hierarchical sampling to explicitly decouple long-term trends from high-frequency variations while retaining fine-grained temporal semantics. Third, to recover disrupted inter-variable dependencies, we propose Cross-Scale Collaborative Attention (CSCA) together with an RLC regularization scheme, which reconstructs global inter-variable topology in deep feature spaces and enforces physically consistent collaboration through orthogonality and consistency constraints. Extensive experiments on benchmark datasets from multiple domains demonstrate that PESD-TSF consistently achieves state-of-the-art performance, with particularly strong gains on multivariate forecasting tasks involving complex inter-variable coupling, highlighting its superior structural modeling capability and generalization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PESD-TSF，一种物理启发的结构化分解框架，通过乘性周期门控、多尺度结构化编码器和跨尺度协同注意力机制，解决深度预测模型中周期感知衰减、趋势-噪声表征纠缠及通道独立范式破坏变量间动态协调的问题，在多变量时间序列长期预测中实现SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 深度预测模型存在周期感知衰减、趋势-噪声表征纠缠问题，且通道独立范式破坏多变量间的内在动态协调，难以建模跨变量一致性。
AI.method: 提出PESD-TSF框架，包含：1）乘性周期门控机制，引入连续时间先验动态调制信号幅度；2）多尺度结构化编码器，结合去趋势注意力与分层采样显式解耦趋势与高频变化；3）跨尺度协同注意力（CSCA）与RLC正则化，重建深层特征空间中的全局变量拓扑并施加正交性与一致性约束。
AI.result: 在多个领域基准数据集上实验表明，PESD-TSF持续达到SOTA性能，尤其在具有复杂变量耦合的多变量预测任务中增益显著。
AI.conclusion: PESD-TSF通过物理启发的结构化分解设计，兼顾可解释性与预测精度，有效提升了深度时序模型对周期性、趋势-噪声分离及跨变量一致性的建模能力与泛化性。

title: From Imitation to Interaction: Mastering Game of Schnapsen with Shallow Reinforcement Learning
summary: This paper investigates whether shallow neural network agents can master the card game Schnapsen and challenge a strong search-based baseline, RdeepBot, which uses Monte Carlo sampling and lookahead search. Guided by a progressively more complex experimental design, we first evaluate a supervised learning agent (MLPBot) trained on replay data and then a reinforcement learning agent (RLBot) with the same shallow architecture trained through asynchronous Monte Carlo updates and experience replay. The results show that supervised imitation does not generalize well enough to defeat strong RdeepBot opponents, whereas reinforcement learning produces substantially stronger agents. In the setting that focuses on the depth parameter of RdeepBot, the best performance is achieved when the learned value function is combined with deeper lookahead during gameplay, allowing RLBot to achieve statistically significant higher winning rates against the strongest evaluated RdeepBot baseline. In the sample-based setting, the gains are more conditional: the strongest performance appears at a relatively lower training num_samples parameter rather than increasing uniformly with stronger sampling.

AI.tldr: 本文研究浅层神经网络代理是否能在Schnapsen纸牌游戏中挑战基于搜索的强基线RdeepBot，发现监督学习效果有限，而强化学习能显著提升性能，尤其在结合价值函数与更深搜索时表现更优。
AI.motivation: 探索浅层神经网络能否在复杂策略游戏Schnapsen中超越基于蒙特卡洛采样和前瞻搜索的强基线RdeepBot。
AI.method: 采用渐进式实验设计：先构建监督学习代理（MLPBot）训练于回放数据；再构建同架构的强化学习代理（RLBot），通过异步蒙特卡洛更新与经验回放训练。
AI.result: 监督模仿学习无法泛化以击败强RdeepBot；RLBot结合学习到的价值函数与更深前瞻搜索，在对抗最强RdeepBot时取得统计显著更高的胜率；在样本设置下，最优性能出现在较低训练采样数而非单调递增。
AI.conclusion: 强化学习比监督学习更适合此类策略游戏，且将学习型价值函数与经典搜索结合可有效提升浅层代理性能，但采样规模需权衡而非一味增大。

title: Mechanistically Interpretable Neural Encoding Reveals Fine-Grained Functional Selectivity in Human Visual Cortex
summary: A central goal in understanding human vision is to uncover the visual features that drive neuronal activity. A growing body of work has used artificial neural networks as encoding models to predict cortical responses to natural images, revealing the visual content that activates category-selective regions. However, existing approaches are largely correlational and treat the encoder as a black box, leaving open which image features drive each voxel's response. We introduce Mechanistically Interpretable Neural Encoding (MINE), a framework that opens this black box by applying mechanistic-interpretability tools to localize the features within natural images that drive millimeter-scale (voxel-level) activity. MINE predicts each voxel's response using language-aligned image representations, and produces semantically interpretable descriptions of the features critical for the voxel's activation. We further generalize these per-image features into per-voxel functional profiles. To validate the per-image descriptions, we show they are sufficient to generate images that elicit voxel responses matching the responses to the original images, more accurately than images generated from random or low-attribution controls. Moreover, counterfactually inserting or removing the predicted features from images shifts activation in the expected direction, providing causal evidence. Counterfactual editing guided by the per-voxel activation profiles produces even stronger activation shifts, indicating that the profiles faithfully capture each voxel's selectivity. Finally, we apply MINE to well-studied category-selective brain regions, showing it recovers their known categorical preferences while revealing fine-grained unique voxel structure within each region. Overall, our results establish mechanistic interpretability as a path to discover and causally validate fine-grained hypotheses about neural function.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MINE框架，通过机械可解释性工具定位自然图像中驱动体素活动的关键视觉特征，并生成语义可解释的描述和功能轮廓，经因果验证有效揭示了大脑皮层体素的精细选择性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于人工神经网络的编码模型多为相关性分析且视为黑箱，无法明确哪些图像特征驱动每个体素的响应。
AI.method: 提出Mechanistically Interpretable Neural Encoding（MINE）框架，利用语言对齐的图像表征预测体素响应，生成每张图像的关键特征描述及每体素的功能轮廓，并通过反事实图像编辑进行因果验证。
AI.result: MINE能准确生成诱发相似体素响应的图像；反事实插入/删除预测特征可按预期调控激活；基于体素功能轮廓的编辑引发更强激活变化；在类别选择性脑区成功复现已知偏好并揭示体素级精细结构。
AI.conclusion: 机械可解释性是发现并因果验证神经功能精细假设的有效路径。

title: A Dexterous and Compliant Gripper With Soft Hydraulic Actuation for Microgravity Manipulation
comment: Accepted to the IEEE ICRA 2026 Space Robotics Workshop (SRW). 4 pages, 3 figures
summary: Astrobee's existing one-degree-of-freedom (DOF) underactuated compliant claw gripper enables perching on the International Space Station (ISS), but provides limited capability for continuous dexterous manipulation. More complex microgravity tasks require an end-effector that can maintain stable contact while limiting disturbance to the free-flying base, since contact forces directly couple into base motion. This article presents the integration of DexCoHand, a dexterous and compliant two-finger, 6-DOF gripper, with the Astrobee free-flying robot for microgravity manipulation. The system is evaluated in MuJoCo using Astrobee's standard handrail perching sequence, including approach, perching, and subsequent pan and tilt motions. Compared with Astrobee's existing gripper, DexCoHand preserves the commanded pan and tilt motions while reducing unintended cross-axis base motion. Hardware experiments on Earth further demonstrate DexCoHand's dexterous manipulation capabilities and its potential for more adaptable intelligent manipulation tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了将DexCoHand（一种灵巧且柔顺的双指6自由度抓取器）集成到Astrobee自由飞行机器人上，以提升其在微重力环境下连续灵巧操作能力；实验表明该新抓取器在保持期望运动的同时显著减少了对机器人基座的扰动。
AI.motivation: Astrobee现有的单自由度欠驱动柔性爪式夹持器虽能实现在国际空间站（ISS）上的停靠，但难以支持连续灵巧操作；更复杂的微重力任务需要末端执行器在维持稳定接触的同时限制对自由飞行基座的扰动。
AI.method: 将DexCoHand（双指、6自由度、柔顺灵巧夹持器）集成至Astrobee机器人，并在MuJoCo仿真中复现标准扶手停靠流程（包括接近、停靠及后续俯仰与偏航运动）进行评估；同时开展地面硬件实验验证其灵巧操作能力。
AI.result: 相比Astrobee现有夹持器，DexCoHand在执行指定俯仰和偏航运动时能更好保持指令精度，并显著降低非预期的跨轴基座运动；地面实验进一步证实其灵巧操作能力及在智能自适应操作任务中的潜力。
AI.conclusion: DexCoHand成功提升了Astrobee在微重力环境下的灵巧操作性能与稳定性，为未来空间机器人执行复杂自主任务提供了更优的末端执行解决方案。

title: Learning Faster with Better Tokens: Parameter-Efficient Vocabulary Adaptation for Specialized Text Summarization
comment: 16 pages. Accepted in the 64th Annual Meeting of the Association for Computational Linguistics [ACL (Main) 2026] as a long paper
summary: Large language models pretrained on general-domain corpora often exhibit tokenization inefficiencies when applied to specialized domains. Although continual pretraining for domain adaptation partially alleviate performance degradation, it does not resolve the fundamental vocabulary mismatch. To address this gap, we introduce a targeted parameter-efficient domain adaptation approach that combines vocabulary adaptation with pretraining for LLM-based text summarization. Our unified framework augments pretrained tokenizers with domain-specific tokens while selectively replacing under-trained and unreachable tokens to limit parameter growth. We evaluate our approach on Llama-3.1-8B and Qwen2.5-7B across legal and medical summarization tasks on a challenge-oriented evaluation protocol focused on expert-driven text and summaries which typically has higher concentration of over-fragmented Out-of-Vocabulary (OOV) words. The vocabulary adaptation algorithm enhances the overall quality of the summarization model by improving semantic similarity between the generated summaries and their references. In addition, the adapted model produces summaries that incorporate more appropriate novel and domain-specific words, leading to improved coherence, relevance, and faithfulness. We further observe that our proposed approach significantly reduce training time by $35-55\%$ over continual pretraining and reduce parameter counts up to $37\%$ w.r.t expansion-only methods. We make the codebase publicly available at https://github.com/gb-kgp/VocabReplace-Then-Expand.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向领域自适应的参数高效方法，通过词汇表适配与预训练结合，提升大语言模型在法律和医疗文本摘要任务中的性能，同时减少训练时间和参数量。
AI.motivation: 通用领域预训练的大语言模型在专业领域应用时存在分词效率低、词汇不匹配的根本问题，仅靠持续预训练无法解决。
AI.method: 提出一种统一框架：在预训练分词器中增补领域特有词汇，并选择性替换欠训练和不可达词元，以控制参数增长；结合词汇适配与轻量级预训练用于文本摘要任务。
AI.result: 在Llama-3.1-8B和Qwen2.5-7B上验证，显著提升摘要语义相似度、连贯性、相关性和忠实性；训练时间减少35–55%，参数量相比纯扩展方法降低最多37%。
AI.conclusion: 词汇表适配是提升领域摘要性能的关键且高效的手段，兼顾效果、效率与模型轻量化，为专业领域LLM部署提供新范式。

title: Physics-Guided Geometric Diffusion for Macro Placement Generation
summary: Macro placement is a pivotal stage in VLSI physical design, fundamentally determining the overall chip performance. Recent data-driven placement methods have demonstrated significant potential, yet they often struggle to handle sequential dependencies and to balance topological connectivity with physical constraints. To bridge this gap, we propose MacroDiff+, a physics-guided geometric diffusion framework. Specifically, we design a dual-domain denoising architecture that couples topological connectivity encoded by heterogeneous GNNs with global geometric context modeled by a Transformer. Furthermore, we introduce Physics-Guided Sampling, an inference strategy that actively steers the generation using explicit gradients to ensure both statistical plausibility and physical validity. On the ISPD2005 MMS benchmarks, MacroDiff+ outperforms state-of-the-art baselines with a 6.1-6.2% reduction in wirelength. Notably, it exhibits superior stability and scalability on large-scale designs where prior methods fail to converge. The source code is available at https://github.com/jhy00n/MacroDiff-plus.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MacroDiff+，一种物理引导的几何扩散框架，用于宏观布局优化，通过双域去噪架构和物理引导采样策略，在ISPD2005基准上显著降低线长并提升稳定性和可扩展性。
AI.motivation: 现有数据驱动的宏布局方法难以处理序列依赖性，并在拓扑连通性与物理约束之间取得平衡。
AI.method: 提出MacroDiff+框架，包含耦合异构图神经网络（建模拓扑连通性）与Transformer（建模全局几何上下文）的双域去噪架构，以及利用显式梯度引导生成过程的物理引导采样策略。
AI.result: 在ISPD2005 MMS基准上，线长降低6.1–6.2%；在大规模设计中表现出更优的稳定性与可扩展性，而先前方法无法收敛。
AI.conclusion: MacroDiff+通过融合物理先验与深度生成建模，有效提升了宏观布局的质量、鲁棒性与可扩展性，为VLSI物理设计提供了新范式。

title: Visual Agentic Memory: Enabling Online Long Video Understanding via Online Indexing, Hierarchical Memory, and Agentic Retrieval
summary: Long video understanding requires more than large context windows. It also needs a memory mechanism that decides what visual evidence to retain, keeps it searchable over long horizons, and grounds later reasoning in recoverable observations rather than compressed latent state alone. We propose Visual Agentic Memory (VAM), a training-free framework with three components. Online Indexing supports selective evidence retention under streaming constraints. Hierarchical Memory organises retained evidence in a Parallel Representation that aligns temporal context with spatial observations. Agentic Retrieval searches, inspects, and verifies candidate evidence before producing a grounded answer. On OVO-Bench, VAM achieves the highest RT+BT average (68.41) across all reported baselines, improving over end-to-end use of the same underlying MLLM (Gemini 3 Flash, 67.46). On the month-scale split of MM-Lifelong train@month (105.6 hours over 51 days), VAM reaches 17.11%, second only to ReMA with GPT-5 (17.62%). These results suggest that long-horizon video understanding benefits from treating visual memory as an explicit, inspectable, and queryable substrate. Code is available at https://github.com/yiliu-li/Visual-Agentic-Memory.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需训练的视觉代理记忆（VAM）框架，用于长视频理解，包含在线索引、分层记忆和代理检索三个组件，在多个基准测试中表现优异。
AI.motivation: 长视频理解不仅需要大上下文窗口，还需要一种能选择性保留视觉证据、长期保持可检索性，并支持基于可恢复观测而非仅压缩潜在状态进行后续推理的记忆机制。
AI.method: 提出Visual Agentic Memory（VAM）框架，包含三个核心组件：1）在线索引（Online Indexing），在流式输入约束下选择性保留证据；2）分层记忆（Hierarchical Memory），以并行表征组织证据，对齐时间上下文与空间观测；3）代理检索（Agentic Retrieval），在生成答案前搜索、检查和验证候选证据。
AI.result: 在OVO-Bench上，VAM取得最高RT+BT平均分68.41，优于同底层MLLM（Gemini 3 Flash）的端到端方法（67.46）；在MM-Lifelong月尺度分割（105.6小时/51天）上达到17.11%，仅次于ReMA+GPT-5（17.62）。
AI.conclusion: 长时程视频理解受益于将视觉记忆设计为显式、可检查、可查询的基础结构。

title: WorldArena 2.0: Extending Embodied World Model Benchmarking on Modality, Functionality and Platform
summary: World models have emerged as a central paradigm for embodied intelligence, enabling agents to predict action-conditioned future and reason about environmental dynamics. However, existing embodied world model benchmarks are still largely confined to vision-only prediction, offline embodied applications, and simulator-based evaluation, making them insufficient for assessing increasingly comprehensive world models. In this work, we introduce WorldArena 2.0, an expanded benchmark that systematically broadens embodied world model evaluation along three dimensions: modality, functionality, and platform. Along the modality dimension, WorldArena 2.0 extends evaluation from vision-only to visuotactile modalities, enabling assessment of multimodal perception and prediction. Along the functionality dimension, it extends beyond policy evaluation and planning to assess world models as interactive RL environments for policy optimization. Along the platform dimension, it moves beyond simulator-only evaluation to a diverse suite of simulated and real-world robotic settings across multiple embodiments. Under a standardized protocol, WorldArena 2.0 comprehensively evaluates perceptual quality, interactive utility, and cross-platform performance, providing a comprehensive testbed for tracking progress toward embodied world models. The benchmark is available at: https://world-arena.ai.

AI.tldr: WorldArena 2.0 是一个面向具身世界模型的新型综合评测基准，从模态（视觉+触觉）、功能（支持交互式强化学习训练）和平台（涵盖仿真与真实机器人）三个维度全面拓展评测能力。
AI.motivation: 现有具身世界模型评测基准局限于纯视觉预测、离线应用和仿真环境，难以全面评估日益复杂的世界模型能力。
AI.method: 提出 WorldArena 2.0 基准，系统性地在模态（引入触觉）、功能（支持作为交互式 RL 环境）、平台（覆盖多仿真器与真实机器人）三方面进行扩展，并制定标准化评测协议。
AI.result: WorldArena 2.0 实现了对具身世界模型在感知质量、交互实用性与跨平台性能三方面的综合评测，成为推动具身智能发展的开放测试平台。
AI.conclusion: WorldArena 2.0 填补了具身世界模型全面评测的空白，为构建更通用、可迁移、可交互的具身世界模型提供了关键基础设施与评估标准。

title: MiniGPT: Rebuilding GPT from First Principles
summary: This paper presents MiniGPT, a compact from-scratch implementation of GPT-style autoregressive language modeling in PyTorch. The aim is to rebuild the core GPT pipeline from first principles after studying the design of nanoGPT by Andrej Karpathy, while keeping the model and training code independently written in a single notebook. MiniGPT implements token and positional embeddings, causal multi-head self-attention, pre-LayerNorm Transformer blocks, residual connections, feed-forward MLP layers, next-token cross-entropy training (teacher forcing), validation tracking, checkpoint selection, and autoregressive text generation. This paper evaluates the implementation on Tiny Shakespeare dataset using character-level tokenization. A baseline 0.83M-parameter model reaches a validation loss of 1.7236 after 3000 training iterations. A stronger 10.77M-parameter configuration, using a larger context length and improved training settings, reaches a best validation loss of 1.4780 and generates text with recognizable Shakespeare-style dialogue structure. MiniGPT does not introduce a new language-model architecture. Instead, it documents a clear and reproducible implementation path from raw text to trained character-level generation, including design choices, training behavior, generation quality, and practical limitations.

AI.tldr: MiniGPT 是一个从零开始、独立编写的轻量级 GPT 风格语言模型实现，聚焦于可复现性与教学清晰性，基于 Tiny Shakespeare 数据集验证其字符级建模能力。
AI.motivation: 在学习 nanoGPT 设计基础上，从第一性原理重建 GPT 核心流程，提供简洁、完整、自包含的 PyTorch 实现（单 notebook），强调可理解性与可复现性。
AI.method: 实现完整的 GPT 基础组件：字符级 token/pos embedding、因果多头自注意力、pre-LayerNorm Transformer 块、残差连接、FFN、teacher-forcing 交叉熵训练、验证监控、checkpoint 选择及自回归生成；全部代码自主编写，未依赖现有大模型库。
AI.result: 0.83M 参数基线模型在 Tiny Shakespeare 上达验证损失 1.7236（3000 步）；10.77M 参数增强版达最优验证损失 1.4780，并能生成具备莎士比亚风格对话结构的文本。
AI.conclusion: MiniGPT 并非提出新架构，而是提供一条从原始文本到训练完成的字符级生成模型的清晰、透明、可复现的工程实践路径，涵盖设计取舍、训练动态、生成质量与实际局限。

title: Peak-Detector: Explainable Peak Detection via Instruction-Tuned Large Language Models in Physiological Sign
summary: Accurate peak detection across diverse cardiac physiological signals, including the Electrocardiogram (ECG), Photoplethysmogram (PPG), Ballistocardiogram (BCG), and Bodyseismography (BSG), is fundamental for cardiovascular monitoring but is often hindered by artifacts and signal variability. Conventional algorithms are typically engineered with expert knowledge for a single signal modality, limiting their generalizability. Conversely, deep learning-based methods often lack interpretability, limiting transparency for expert verification and hindering expert-computer interaction. To address these limitations, we introduce Peak-Detector, a novel framework that leverages instruction-tuned Large Language Models (LLMs) for robust, cross-modal, and explainable peak detection. A core innovation of our framework is a "peak-representation" technique that transforms time-series data into a condensed format, preserving critical event information while significantly reducing signal length. This representation provides a crucial inductive bias, guiding the LLM to reason over physiologically meaningful events rather than raw, noisy data. The model is optimized through a two-stage process: supervised fine-tuning (SFT) followed by reinforcement learning (RL) with a multi-objective reward function. The model's self-explanation capabilities are cultivated by fine-tuning on a custom-built Peak-Explanation dataset. Across four modalities-ECG, PPG, BCG, and BSG-spanning seven datasets (six public benchmarks plus one real-world cohort), Peak-Detector demonstrates strong cross-modal performance, achieving best or tied-best detection under clinically relevant temporal tolerance. Beyond accuracy, the generated rationales surface failure modes and support verification and error analysis.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Peak-Detector框架，利用指令微调的大语言模型（LLM）实现跨模态、可解释的心脏生理信号（ECG/PPG/BCG/BSG）峰检测；核心是‘峰表征’技术将时序数据压缩为事件导向表示，并通过监督微调+多目标强化学习优化，辅以自解释能力训练，在多个数据集上达到最优或并列最优性能，同时提供可验证的推理依据。
AI.motivation: 传统基于专家规则的峰检测算法泛化性差，而深度学习方法缺乏可解释性，难以满足临床验证与人机协同需求。
AI.method: 提出Peak-Detector框架：1）设计‘峰表征’技术将原始信号压缩为事件导向的紧凑表示；2）采用指令微调的LLM建模；3）两阶段训练：监督微调（SFT）+ 多目标奖励函数的强化学习（RL）；4）在自建Peak-Explanation数据集上增强模型自解释能力。
AI.result: 在ECG、PPG、BCG、BSG四类信号共七个数据集（含六个公开基准和一个真实世界队列）上，Peak-Detector在临床相关时间容差下取得最佳或并列最佳峰检测性能；生成的解释能揭示失败模式，支持专家验证与错误分析。
AI.conclusion: Peak-Detector成功融合了强泛化能力与高可解释性，为多模态生理信号分析提供了新范式，推动AI在心血管监护中更安全、可信地落地。

title: CAREBench: Evaluating LLMs' Emotion Understanding by Assessing Cognitive Appraisal Reasoning
summary: Emotion understanding is a core capability for LLMs to interact effectively with humans, yet existing evaluation paradigms rely on discrete emotion label prediction and fail to capture the cognitive processes underlying emotion generation. Grounded in appraisal theory, we introduce CAREBench, the first benchmark with complete inferential chain annotations from both first- and third-person perspectives on real-world narratives, spanning appraisal reasoning, appraisal ratings, and multi-label emotion annotation. We propose a process-level evaluation framework and conduct systematic experiments across six LLMs organized around four research questions. We find that stronger models match or surpass human observers on certain tasks, yet fall short on appraisal reasoning and positive emotion recognition; performance across chain steps and sensitivity to appraisal interventions exhibit dissociations across models; and current models have not internalized the mechanisms needed to capture human subjective heterogeneity. These findings suggest that downstream emotion prediction metrics may overestimate LLMs' true emotion understanding, and CAREBench provides a foundation for more diagnostically informative evaluation of LLMs' affective cognitive capabilities.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CAREBench基准，基于评价理论，从第一和第三人称视角对真实叙事进行完整推理链标注（包括评价推理、评价评分和多标签情绪标注），并构建过程级评估框架，系统评测六种大语言模型在情绪理解能力上的表现，发现当前模型在评价推理与积极情绪识别上仍不足，且未能内化人类主观异质性机制。
AI.motivation: 现有情绪评估范式仅依赖离散情绪标签预测，无法捕捉情绪生成背后的认知过程，因此需要更符合心理学基础（如评价理论）且能反映完整推理链的评估基准。
AI.method: 基于评价理论构建CAREBench基准，包含第一与第三人称视角下的真实叙事数据，并标注完整的推断链（评价推理→评价评分→多标签情绪）；设计过程级评估框架，围绕四个研究问题对六种LLM开展系统实验。
AI.result: 较强LLM在部分任务上达到或超过人类观察者水平，但在评价推理和积极情绪识别上明显落后；不同模型在推理链各环节表现及对评价干预的敏感性存在显著差异；当前模型尚未内化人类主观异质性的认知机制。
AI.conclusion: 下游情绪预测指标可能高估LLM的真实情绪理解能力；CAREBench为更精准诊断LLM的情绪认知能力提供了新基准和方法论基础。

title: SeamCam: Quantifying Seamless Camouflage via Multi-Cue Visual Detectability
summary: Animals are described as effectively camouflaged when they blend seamlessly with their surrounding, yet no standardized quantitative measure of this seamlessness exists. We address this gap by framing camouflage evaluation as a visual localization problem: a well-camouflaged animal is one that remains difficult to detect even when its category is known. We introduce SeamCam (Seamless Camouflage), a metric that quantifies how detectable an animal is from the available visual evidence. Given an image and a target species, SeamCam generates category-conditioned detection proposals, extracts segmentation masks, and identifies the subset whose collective union yields the highest IoU with the ground-truth mask. The SeamCam score is one minus this maximum recoverable localization signal, where a higher score indicates stronger camouflage (i.e., lower detectability). In a human two-alternative forced-choice study with 94 participants and 2,390 comparisons, SeamCam achieves 78.82% agreement with human camouflage difficulty judgments, outperforming state-of-the-art by about 25%. We then demonstrate SeamCam's utility as a preference signal for Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) to fine-tune a diffusion-based inpainting model for camouflage generation. This offers an affordable training approach with an objective explicitly suited for camouflage generation, unlike typical diffusion models. To support rigorous benchmarking, we further introduce CamFG-1.5k, a curated dataset of 1,521 high-resolution images in which animals are fully visible prior to camouflage generation, enabling unbiased evaluation by controlling for occlusion artifacts present in existing datasets. https://7amin.github.io/SeamCam/

AI.tldr: 本文提出SeamCam指标，将伪装评估建模为视觉定位问题，通过类别条件检测与分割联合优化计算可恢复的定位信号，量化动物伪装程度；在人类感知实验中达到78.82%一致性，并用于DPO微调扩散模型生成伪装图像，同时发布新数据集CamFG-1.5k支持无偏评测。
AI.motivation: 缺乏对动物伪装‘无缝性’的标准化定量度量方法，现有评估方式难以客观反映人类感知的伪装难度。
AI.method: 将伪装评估建模为类别条件下的视觉定位任务；提出SeamCam指标：基于检测提案生成分割掩码，选取并集与真值掩码IoU最高的子集，以1减去该最大IoU作为伪装得分；结合DPO优化扩散模型用于伪装图像生成；构建CamFG-1.5k数据集以支持无遮挡偏差的公平评测。
AI.result: SeamCam在人类二选一实验中达78.82%判断一致性，较SOTA提升约25%；成功驱动DPO微调扩散模型生成高质量伪装图像；发布CamFG-1.5k数据集（1521张高分辨率图像），消除既有数据集中因遮挡引入的评估偏差。
AI.conclusion: SeamCam是一种符合人类感知、可微分且可优化的伪装量化指标，不仅提升了伪装评估的客观性与准确性，还为伪装生成任务提供了端到端可训练的监督信号和专用基准数据集。

title: Learning-Based Adaptive Control for Surgical Robotic Exposure Task on Deformable Tissues
comment: Accepted to Robotics: Science and Systems (RSS) 2026. 12 pages, 9 figures
summary: In various surgical procedures, regions of interest (ROIs) such as organs or lesions are often occluded by overlying tissues, requiring surgeons to achieve adequate exposure for precise intervention. However, the irregular geometry, nonlinear biomechanical properties of overlying tissues, and limited intraoperative visibility of the ROI pose significant challenges to the autonomous execution of tissue retraction. To address this, we formulate a realistic model of the tissue retraction task and propose a learning-based adaptive control framework for achieving ROI exposure. The method optimizes control inputs online by monitoring changes in the visual boundary of the tissue, while leveraging a deep deformation estimation model trained on simulation data to identify the optimal grasping point and ensure the convergence and safety of the adaptive controller. Through simulations and real-world experiments on different deformable materials, it has been demonstrated that this framework exhibits zero-shot adaptation to similar tasks and can complete the autonomous retraction process, from initial grasp selection to full ROI exposure. Therefore, it has the potential to be applied in actual surgical assistance scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于学习的自适应控制框架，用于手术中自主实现组织牵开以暴露目标区域（ROI），通过视觉边界监测与仿真训练的深度形变估计模型，实现零样本迁移和安全收敛。
AI.motivation: 手术中目标区域常被上方组织遮挡，而组织几何不规则、生物力学非线性及术中视野受限，给自主牵开带来挑战。
AI.method: 构建真实感组织牵开任务模型，结合在线视觉边界监测优化控制输入，并利用仿真数据训练的深度形变估计模型识别最优抓取点，保障控制器收敛与安全性。
AI.result: 在多种可变形材料的仿真与实物实验中验证了该框架具备零样本适应能力，能自主完成从抓取点选择到ROI完全暴露的全过程。
AI.conclusion: 该框架具有实际手术辅助应用潜力，为智能外科机器人提供了可行的自主牵开解决方案。

title: BELIEF: Structured Evidence Modeling and Uncertainty-Aware Fusion for Biomedical Question Answering
summary: Biomedical question answering often requires decisions from retrieved literature whose relevance, quality, and support for candidate answers are uneven. Most retrieval-augmented large language model (LLM) methods feed this literature to the model as flat text, leaving evidence reliability and remaining uncertainty largely implicit. We propose BELIEF, a structured evidence modeling and uncertainty-aware fusion framework for closed-set biomedical question answering. Rather than treating retrieved documents as undifferentiated context, BELIEF converts them into evidence objects that record clinical attributes, source quality, question relevance, support strength, and the associated candidate hypothesis. These evidence objects provide a shared basis for two complementary reasoning paths. The symbolic path constructs reliability-weighted basic probability assignments based on Dempster--Shafer (D-S) theory over a finite answer space and performs uncertainty-aware symbolic evidence fusion to estimate belief and residual uncertainty. The neural path uses the same structured evidence for LLM-based semantic inference, while a reliability-aware arbitration module reconciles the symbolic and neural outputs according to belief strength, uncertainty, evidence reliability, and semantic consistency. Experiments on PubMedQA, MedQA, and MedMCQA with five general-purpose LLM backbones show that BELIEF obtains the best result in 25 of 30 backbone--dataset--metric settings. Comparisons with biomedical-domain models indicate that BELIEF is competitive on MedQA and MedMCQA, while specialized biomedical pretraining remains advantageous on PubMedQA. Ablation, complementarity, uncertainty-stratified, and cost analyses further show that BELIEF improves retrieved-evidence utilization by making evidence structure, path disagreement, and decision uncertainty explicit.
