To address this gap, we introduce BanglaMedVQA, a dataset comprising clinically validated image-question-answer pairs, along with a comprehensive evaluation of current foundation models on this resource. Consistent with prior findings that report low performance of current models on English MedVQA benchmarks, our analysis reveals that Bangla performance is substantially lower, reflecting the challenges inherent to low-resource languages. Even top-performing models such as Gemini and GPT-4.1 mini fail to accurately answer specialized diagnostic questions, indicating severe limitations in fine-grained medical reasoning. Although certain open-source models, such as Gemma-3, occasionally outperform these models in general categories, they too struggle with clinically complex questions, underscoring the urgent need for top-notch evaluation method.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了首个孟加拉语医学视觉问答（BanglaMedVQA）基准数据集，并评估了当前主流多模态大模型在该任务上的表现，发现现有模型在孟加拉语医学推理上性能显著不足，尤其在专业诊断问题上表现极差，凸显低资源语言医学AI的挑战与评估方法的迫切需求。
AI.motivation: 孟加拉语是全球使用最广泛的语言之一，但目前尚无权威的孟加拉语医学视觉问答（MedVQA）基准，限制了低资源语言医学AI的发展与评估。
AI.method: 构建了首个临床验证的孟加拉语MedVQA数据集BanglaMedVQA，并系统评测了包括Gemini、GPT-4.1 mini和Gemma-3在内的多种前沿基础模型在其上的表现。
AI.result: 当前所有测试模型在BanglaMedVQA上表现远低于英语MedVQA基准水平；即便是顶尖闭源模型（如Gemini、GPT-4.1 mini）也无法准确回答专业诊断问题；开源模型（如Gemma-3）仅在一般性问题上偶有优势，但在临床复杂问题上仍严重受限。
AI.conclusion: 现有大模型在低资源语言（如孟加拉语）的细粒度医学推理任务中存在根本性局限，亟需更高质量的数据集、针对性训练方法及更严格的评估体系。

title: EmoMind: Decoding Affective Captions from Human Brain fMRI
summary: Decoding visual experience from brain activity has advanced substantially, but cur- rent brain-to-text systems largely recover semantic content while discarding affect. Additionally, language models can generate emotional text when prompted with categorical labels, but such labels collapse rich inter-subject variability into coarse discrete bins. We present EmoMind, the first end-to-end pipeline for decoding affective captions directly from fMRI signals. EmoMind first retrieves a semanti- cally grounded neutral scene description from brain-decoded visual features, then rewrites it using a continuous 34-dimensional emotion vector decoded from the same fMRI recording. To control the balance between content preservation and affective expression, we train the rewriter with classifier-free guidance against an identity-preserving null branch, enabling smooth interpolation between semantic fidelity and affective expressivity. We evaluate affective caption generation with a three-axis validation framework spanning subject-specificity, structural geometry, and causal control. We further augment this framework with a synthetic-brain substitution test that probes robustness to the measurement apparatus, and we benchmark each axis against GPT-4 prompted with brain-decoded top-5 emotion labels as a strong discrete baseline. Across two independent emotion fMRI datasets, EmoMind significantly outperforms label-prompted GPT-4 on all three axes, with the largest gains on metrics that require person-specific affective structure rather than population-level emotion aggregation. These results establish continuous brain-decoded affect as a viable control signal for individualized affective cap- tion generation and open new directions for studying individual affective brain organisation.

AI.tldr: EmoMind 是首个端到端从fMRI信号直接解码情感化图像描述的系统，通过连续34维情绪向量重写中性语义描述，并在多维度评估中显著优于基于离散情绪标签提示的GPT-4。
AI.motivation: 现有脑到文本系统忽略情绪信息，而语言模型依赖粗粒度离散情绪标签，无法刻画被试间丰富的情绪变异性。
AI.method: EmoMind采用两阶段流程：先从fMRI解码语义中性场景描述，再用同步解码的34维连续情绪向量重写；重写器采用无分类器引导（classifier-free guidance）与恒等零分支平衡内容保真与情绪表达。
AI.result: 在两个独立情绪fMRI数据集上，EmoMind在主体特异性、结构几何性和因果控制三轴评估中均显著优于GPT-4（以脑解码前5情绪标签为提示），尤其在需个体化情绪结构的任务上优势最大。
AI.conclusion: 连续脑解码情绪可作为个体化情感描述生成的有效控制信号，为研究个体情绪脑组织提供了新方向。

title: Divergence-Suppressing Couplings for Rectified Flow
summary: The promise of Rectified Flow rests on producing self-generated couplings whose trajectories are straight, or nearly so. In practice, trajectories generated by the base flow model can bend and intertwine, and the resulting coupling inherits this distortion. In this paper, we identify that such trajectory entanglement is often associated with regions of nonzero divergence in the learned velocity field, where local expansion or contraction distorts trajectories and steers particles away from their ideal endpoints. We then propose divergence-suppressing couplings for Rectified Flow, an offline correction that attenuate the divergent component of the learned velocity during coupling generation. The correction is paid only once per coupling pair and amortized over training, so deployment runs plain Euler at identical wall-clock cost to standard Rectified Flow. Empirically, this offline modification yields consistent improvements on 2D synthetic benchmarks and on image generation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对Rectified Flow的离线校正方法——散度抑制耦合，通过抑制学习速度场中的散度分量来减少轨迹纠缠，从而提升生成质量，且不增加推理开销。
AI.motivation: Rectified Flow在实践中常因速度场存在非零散度而导致轨迹弯曲和纠缠，进而影响耦合质量。
AI.method: 识别出轨迹纠缠与速度场散度相关，提出在耦合生成阶段离线抑制速度场的散度分量，该修正仅需一次计算并摊销至训练过程。
AI.result: 在2D合成数据集和图像生成任务上均取得一致性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 散度抑制耦合是一种高效、低成本的改进策略，能显著缓解Rectified Flow中由速度场散度引起的轨迹失真问题。

title: Coarse Semantic Injection for LLM-Conditioned Structured Indoor Prediction
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have recently been used as structured decoders for indoor understanding from 3D point-token inputs. However, point cloud encoders often under-represent thin structural elements such as doors and windows after voxelization and sparse pooling, and may miss individual furniture instances in cluttered scenes. We propose an interface-preserving semantic augmentation for LLM-conditioned structured decoding. The key idea is to associate semantic evidence with the point-cloud representation, reduce it to a coarse four-group code (furniture, walls, openings, and others), and encode it as an RGBB point interface: red for furniture, green for walls, blue for openings, and black for others, where RGBB denotes four semantic color states represented in three RGB channels rather than an additional fourth channel. This semantic color code is appended to the original raw point attributes before tokenization, so geometry and semantics share the same sparse tokenization path while the downstream language model decoder and output serialization remain unchanged. We further introduce a lightweight routed semantic shift module, with an auxiliary head used only for training-time ratio/budget regularization and analysis, to strengthen semantic cues after sparse pooling. The overall pipeline can use RGB-derived semantic evidence. Under these controlled semantic-source settings, the reported metrics improve across Structured3D, the SpatialLM dataset, and ARKitScenes, especially for opening localization and per-instance furniture detection in cluttered scenes. Ablations clarify the roles of semantic source, color coding, token fusion, and shift injection, while also showing that color/entropy effects remain nontrivial.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种接口保持的语义增强方法，通过将点云语义信息编码为RGBB颜色码（红-家具、绿-墙、蓝-开口、黑-其他）并融合到原始点属性中，提升大语言模型在3D室内理解任务中的结构化解码性能，尤其改善开口定位与杂乱场景中家具实例检测。
AI.motivation: 现有点云编码器在体素化和稀疏池化后难以充分表征门窗等细长结构及杂乱场景中的单个家具实例，导致LLM结构化解码性能受限。
AI.method: 提出RGBB语义颜色编码（四类语义映射至RGB三通道），将其附加于原始点属性后统一稀疏token化；引入轻量级路由语义偏移模块（含训练时辅助头用于预算调控与分析），强化稀疏池化后的语义线索。
AI.result: 在Structured3D、SpatialLM和ARKitScenes数据集上，开口定位与杂乱场景中逐实例家具检测指标均显著提升；消融实验验证了语义源、颜色编码、token融合与偏移注入的有效性，并发现颜色/熵效应不可忽略。
AI.conclusion: 语义信息以接口兼容方式融入点云token化流程，无需修改下游LLM解码器或输出序列化机制，即可有效提升结构化3D理解性能，尤其针对细粒度结构与实例密集场景。

title: ESI-Bench: Towards Embodied Spatial Intelligence that Closes the Perception-Action Loop
summary: Spatial intelligence unfolds through a perception-action loop: agents act to acquire observations, and reason about how observations vary as a function of action. Rather than passively processing what is seen, they actively uncover what is unseen - occluded structure, dynamics, containment, and functionality that cannot be resolved from passive sensing alone. We move beyond prior formulations of spatial intelligence that assume oracle observations by recasting the observer as an actor. We introduce ESI-BENCH, a comprehensive benchmark for embodied spatial intelligence spanning 10 task categories and 29 subcategories built on OmniGibson, grounded in Spelke's core knowledge systems. Agents must decide what abilities to deploy - perception, locomotion, and manipulation - and how to sequence them to actively accumulate task-relevant evidence. We conduct extensive experiments on state-of-the-art MLLMs and find that active exploration substantially outperforms passive counterparts, with agents spontaneously discovering emergent spatial strategies without explicit instructions, while random multi-view often adds noise rather than signal despite consuming far more images. Most failures stem not from weak perception but from action blindness: poor action choices lead to poor observations, which in turn drive cascading errors. While explicit 3D grounding stabilizes reasoning on depth-sensitive tasks, imperfect 3D representation proves more harmful than 2D baselines by distorting spatial relations. Human studies further reveal that unlike humans who seek falsifying viewpoints and revise beliefs under contradiction, models commit prematurely with high confidence regardless of evidence quality, exposing a metacognitive gap that neither better perception nor more embodied interaction alone can close.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ESI-BENCH基准，强调空间智能应通过感知-动作闭环实现主动探索，而非被动观察；实验表明主动探索显著优于被动方式，但当前模型存在‘动作盲区’和元认知缺陷。
AI.motivation: 突破以往空间智能研究依赖理想化（oracle）观测的局限，将观察者建模为能主动交互的具身智能体，以更真实地模拟人类空间推理能力。
AI.method: 构建基于OmniGibson和Spelke核心知识系统的ESI-BENCH基准（含10类29子类任务），要求模型自主决策感知、移动与操作能力及其执行序列；在多类MLLM上开展主动探索 vs 被动观测对比实验，并结合人类行为研究分析差异根源。
AI.result: 主动探索显著提升性能，模型自发发现空间策略；随机多视角反而引入噪声；主要失败源于‘动作盲区’（错误动作导致劣质观测），而非感知能力不足；显式3D表征在深度敏感任务中虽有帮助，但不完善3D表示比2D基线更易扭曲空间关系；人类善于证伪与信念修正，而模型过早高置信度决策，暴露元认知缺陷。
AI.conclusion: 空间智能的关键在于具身化的感知-动作协同与元认知能力，仅提升感知或增加交互不足以解决根本问题；未来需建模动作选择机制与不确定性推理能力。

title: iPOE: Interpretable Prompt Optimization via Explanations
summary: Prompt optimization has often been framed as a discrete search problem to find high-performing and robust instructions for an LLM. However, the search result might not make it transparent why and where specific prompt changes lead to performance gains. This is in contrast to how humans are instructed for annotation tasks. Here, researchers carefully design annotation guidelines, leading to enhanced annotation consistency. Our paper aims at joining these two approaches and introduces iPOE, a novel interpretable prompt optimization strategy via explanations. We guide the prompt optimization process by automatically created guidelines from explanations of annotation decisions (either automatically generated or from humans). This set of guidelines is furthermore optimized by as series of operations, including removing, adding, shuffling, and merging. The resulting prompt includes guidelines that instruct the annotation, making the decision process of the LLM and the optimization transparent. It therefore supports also laypeople in the area of prompt optimization, particularly in challenging domains requiring expertise. In our experiments on four datasets, we find that iPOE can improves over prompts without guidelines and with random selected guidelines by up to $31\%$ and $35\%$, respectively. Moreover, LLM explanations can replace human explanations in the proposed method.

AI.tldr: 本文提出iPOE方法，通过自动生成和优化标注指南来提升提示词性能，并增强其可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有提示优化方法缺乏透明性，难以解释为何某些提示修改能提升性能；而人工标注指南设计则注重一致性和可解释性，本文旨在结合两者优势。
AI.method: 提出iPOE（interpretable Prompt Optimization via Explanations），利用自动或人工生成的标注决策解释构建初始指南，再通过删除、添加、打乱、合并等操作优化指南，最终将优化后的指南嵌入提示中。
AI.result: 在四个数据集上的实验表明，iPOE相比无指南提示和随机指南提示分别最高提升31%和35%；且LLM生成的解释可替代人工解释。
AI.conclusion: iPOE是一种可解释、可操作、适用于专业领域的提示优化新范式，降低了非专家参与提示工程的门槛。

title: Propagation of Chaos in Contextual Flow Maps
summary: We develop a quantitative statistical theory of transformers in the large-context regime by adopting the abstraction of contextual flow maps (CFMs): dynamical systems that evolve a distinguished token in the presence of a contextual measure across a stack of attention blocks. Within this framework, the finite-context model approximates an idealized infinite-context system in which the contextual measure is replaced by its underlying population, so that the context length $n$ becomes a statistical resource. Exploiting the McKean--Vlasov structure of the dynamics and the classical machinery of propagation of chaos, we establish a forward bound controlling the deviation between the finite- and infinite-context CFMs uniformly along depth, and a backward bound controlling the deviation between the corresponding training trajectories uniformly across iterations of online gradient descent. Both bounds achieve the optimal Wasserstein rate $n^{-1/d}$ for general CFMs and parametric rate $n^{-1/2}$ for a restricted class of CFMs that includes transformers as a special case. The analysis rests on a new Eulerian adjoint formulation of the loss gradient and stability estimates for the resulting forward--adjoint system, both of which may be of independent interest.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于上下文流映射（CFM）的统计理论框架，用于分析大上下文规模下Transformer模型的行为。通过将有限上下文建模为对无限上下文系统的近似，并利用McKean-Vlasov动力学与传播混沌理论，建立了前向与后向偏差的最优Wasserstein收敛率界。
AI.motivation: 理解大上下文下Transformer的统计行为，填补大规模语言模型在极限上下文长度下的理论空白。
AI.method: 引入上下文流映射（CFM）作为抽象动力系统；将有限上下文视为对无限上下文（以总体分布替代经验上下文测度）的统计逼近；结合McKean-Vlasov结构与传播混沌理论，推导前向（模型演化）与后向（梯度下降轨迹）误差界；提出新的Eulerian伴随公式刻画损失梯度并分析前向-伴随系统的稳定性。
AI.result: 获得统一深度的前向偏差界和统一迭代次数的后向训练轨迹偏差界；两者均达最优Wasserstein速率n^{-1/d}；对含Transformer在内的参数化CFM子类，达到参数统计速率n^{-1/2}；提出了新的损失梯度Eulerian伴随表示及相应稳定性估计。
AI.conclusion: 该理论揭示了上下文长度n本质上是一种统计资源；为大上下文Transformer提供了首个兼具深度与训练动态一致性的定量收敛保证；所提出的伴随分析方法具有独立理论价值。

title: Harnessing LLM Agents with Skill Programs
summary: Equipping LLM agents with reusable skills derived from past experience has become a popular and successful approach for tackling complex and long-horizon tasks. However, such lessons are often encoded as textual guidance that remains largely advisory, lacking explicit mechanisms for when and how to intervene in the agent loop. To bridge the gap, we introduce HASP(Harnessing LLM Agents with Skill Programs), a new framework that upgrades skills into executable Program Functions (PFs). Rather than offering passive advice, PFs act as executable guardrails that activate on failure-prone states and modify the next action or inject corrective context. HASP is highly modular: it can be applied at inference time for direct agent-loop intervention, during post-training to provide structured supervision, or for self-improvement by evolving validated, teacher-reviewed PFs. Empirically, HASP drives substantial gains compared to both training-free and training-based methods on web-search, math reasoning, and coding tasks. For example, on web-search reasoning, inference-time PFs alone improve the average performance by 25% compared to (multi-loop) ReAct Agent, while post-training and controlled evolution achieve a 30.4% gain over Search-R1. To provide deeper insights into HASP, our mechanism analysis reveals how PFs trigger and intervene, how skills are internalized, and the requirement for stable skill library evolution.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HASP框架，将LLM代理的技能升级为可执行的程序函数（PFs），作为在失败易发状态下激活的主动干预机制，显著提升web搜索、数学推理和代码任务性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于文本指导的技能复用方法缺乏明确的干预时机与机制，难以在代理运行过程中主动修正错误。
AI.method: 提出HASP框架，将技能转化为可执行的Program Functions（PFs），支持推理时干预、后训练监督及教师审核驱动的自我进化；PFs在失败易发状态触发，动态修改动作或注入纠正上下文。
AI.result: 在web搜索、数学推理和编程任务上显著优于无训练和有训练基线：例如web搜索中，仅推理时PFs即比ReAct提升25%，后训练+可控进化比Search-R1提升30.4%。
AI.conclusion: HASP通过模块化、可执行的技能封装，实现了对LLM代理行为的细粒度、时机敏感干预，为构建更鲁棒、可进化的智能代理提供了新范式。

title: Learning Relative Representations for Fine-Grained Multimodal Alignment with Limited Data
summary: Multimodal pre-training demonstrates strong generalization performance, but this paradigm is often impractical in domains where paired data are scarce. A promising alternative is post-hoc multimodal alignment, which aligns separately pre-trained unimodal encoders using a limited number of paired examples. However, existing methods focus primarily on aligning global representations, missing patch-token relations. This may hinder transfer to tasks that require fine-grained cross-modal matching beyond coarse sample-level semantics. To address this issue, we propose a post-hoc alignment method that learns token-level cross-modal structure using relative representations. Specifically, we represent images and texts through their token-level similarities to a set of learnable anchors in each modality space, which are trained to induce consistent cross-modal similarity patterns for matched pairs. Despite learning only the anchors without heavy projection layers, our approach consistently outperforms existing methods in zero-shot classification, cross-modal retrieval, and zero-shot segmentation by a substantial margin. This highlights the importance of modeling fine-grained cross-modal structure for effective post-hoc multimodal alignment with limited paired data.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于相对表征的后验多模态对齐方法，通过可学习锚点建模图像与文本的token级相似性结构，在仅有少量配对数据的情况下显著提升零样本分类、跨模态检索和零样本分割性能。
AI.motivation: 现有后验多模态对齐方法仅关注全局表征对齐，忽略了patch-token层面的细粒度关系，难以支持需要精细跨模态匹配的任务。
AI.method: 利用每个模态中一组可学习的锚点，将图像和文本表示为各token到这些锚点的相似性向量，并训练锚点使得匹配样本对在跨模态间产生一致的相似性模式。
AI.result: 在零样本分类、跨模态检索和零样本分割任务上显著优于现有方法，且仅需学习锚点、无需复杂投影层。
AI.conclusion: 建模细粒度跨模态结构对受限配对数据下的后验多模态对齐至关重要。

title: FOL2NS: Generating Natural Sentences from First-Order Logic
summary: Translating formal language into natural language is a foundational challenge in NLP, driving various downstream applications in semantic parsing, theorem validation, and question answering. In this study, we introduce First-Order Logic to Natural Sentence (FOL2NS), a neurosymbolic framework designed to generate synthetic FOL formulas and convert them into natural human expressions. It handles deeply nested structures with varying quantifier depths (QD), which are rarely captured by existing corpora. By combining rule-driven modules with fine-tuned language models, FOL2NS enhances the diversity and coverage of the generated samples. In our experiments, we systematically evaluate the framework's capabilities through both character-level analysis and overall performance metrics. Experimental results show that FOL2NS can reliably produce well-formed templates and fluent statements, but it faces challenges in achieving precise semantic representations and natural generation as structural complexity increases.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为FOL2NS的神经符号框架，用于将一阶逻辑（FOL）公式转换为自然语言句子，旨在解决形式语言到自然语言翻译的基础性挑战；该框架结合规则驱动模块与微调语言模型，生成具有多样性和高覆盖率的合成数据，尤其支持深层嵌套和不同量词深度的结构，实验表明其在模板生成和语句流畅性上表现良好，但在高复杂度下的语义准确性和自然性仍有提升空间。
AI.motivation: 形式语言（如一阶逻辑）到自然语言的翻译是NLP中的基础挑战，现有语料库难以覆盖深层嵌套结构和多变的量词深度，限制了下游任务（如语义解析、定理验证、问答）的发展。
AI.method: 提出FOL2NS神经符号框架，融合规则驱动模块（用于生成结构正确的一阶逻辑公式）与微调语言模型（用于将其转化为自然语言），支持可变量化深度（QD）和深层嵌套结构。
AI.result: 实验表明FOL2NS能稳定生成语法正确的模板和流畅的自然语句，但在语义精确性和高结构复杂度下的自然性方面存在明显下降。
AI.conclusion: FOL2NS有效提升了形式语言到自然语言翻译的数据多样性与结构覆盖能力，但需进一步改进以应对复杂逻辑结构下的语义保真与自然生成问题。

title: Learning Unbiased Permutations via Flow Matching
summary: Learning permutations is fundamental to sorting, ranking, and matching, but existing differentiable methods based on entropy-regularized Sinkhorn produce a single softened solution and collapse under ambiguity. We present PermFlow, a conditional flow matching framework that operates directly on the affine subspace of matrices with unit row and column sums. A closed-form tangent-space projector preserves these constraints exactly along every trajectory, by construction rather than through iterative correction, and a nearest-target coupling routes distinct noisy initializations toward distinct valid permutations. The result is a model that captures multimodal permutation distributions rather than collapsing them to a single mode. On a visual sorting task with blended-digit ambiguity and a symmetric linear assignment problem, PermFlow achieves high accuracy on unambiguous inputs and recovers both valid permutations under ambiguity, where Sinkhorn-based baselines structurally fail.

AI.tldr: PermFlow is a conditional flow matching framework for learning multimodal permutation distributions, overcoming the mode-collapse limitation of Sinkhorn-based methods by enforcing permutation constraints exactly via a closed-form tangent-space projector and nearest-target coupling.
AI.motivation: Existing differentiable permutation methods like Sinkhorn collapse under ambiguity, producing only a single softened solution instead of capturing multimodal permutation distributions.
AI.method: PermFlow uses conditional flow matching on the affine subspace of doubly stochastic matrices, with a closed-form tangent-space projector to exactly preserve row/column sum constraints and a nearest-target coupling to guide noisy initializations to distinct valid permutations.
AI.result: PermFlow achieves high accuracy on unambiguous inputs and successfully recovers multiple valid permutations under ambiguity—unlike Sinkhorn baselines, which structurally fail in such cases.
AI.conclusion: PermFlow provides a principled, constraint-preserving approach to learning multimodal permutation distributions, enabling robust performance in ambiguous sorting, ranking, and matching tasks.

title: Agents for Experiments, Experiments for Agents: A Design Grammar for AI-Enabled Experimental Science
summary: AI systems are becoming active participants in organizational and knowledge work. They increasingly interact with humans, coordinate workflows, and operate in multi-agent arrangements. Understanding their effects therefore requires more than measuring output accuracy; it requires evidence about mechanisms, delegation, feedback, and control. Experiments remain central to this task, but they also face a recursive challenge: we need experiments for agents to study these arrangements, and we may need agents for experiments to help search the expanding space of possible designs. Yet experimental conditions for human-AI and agentic workflows are still largely specified in prose, making them difficult to compare, reuse, or audit. We frame this as a problem of workflow representation, traceability, and governance in AI-enabled knowledge production. We introduce SEED (Structural Encoding for Experimental Discovery), a framework that represents experimental conditions as typed actor-flow graphs. SEED supports three design functions: describing conditions as interaction structures, evaluating structural novelty relative to encoded prior designs, and generating candidate designs under feasibility and governance constraints. We report a lightweight empirical feasibility test that compares graph-blind and SEEDguided generation in a medical-triage design task. In this diagnostic contrast, SEED-guided candidate designs show clearer actor-flow changes, assumptions, and governance checks, supporting the feasibility of the grammar as a design aid. The commentary closes by identifying governance tensions around novelty, replication, validity, diversity of inquiry, and accountability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SEED框架，通过类型化的参与者-流程图来表示AI实验条件，以解决人类-AI及多智能体工作流中实验条件难以比较、复用和审计的问题，并验证其在医疗分诊设计任务中的可行性。
AI.motivation: AI系统正深度参与组织与知识工作，但现有实验方法难以有效刻画和复用复杂人-AI与多智能体工作流的实验条件，导致机制、委托、反馈与控制等关键问题缺乏可追溯、可治理的实证基础。
AI.method: 提出SEED（Structural Encoding for Experimental Discovery）框架，将实验条件建模为类型化的actor-flow图；支持三种功能：结构化描述交互、评估结构新颖性、在可行性与治理约束下生成候选设计；并通过轻量级实证对比（graph-blind vs. SEED-guided）检验其在医疗分诊任务中的可行性。
AI.result: SEED引导生成的设计方案展现出更清晰的参与者流程变化、隐含假设和治理检查点，验证了该图语法作为设计辅助工具的可行性。
AI.conclusion: SEED为AI增强型知识生产中的实验表示、可追溯性与治理提供了新路径，但也揭示出关于新颖性、可复现性、效度、研究多样性与问责制之间的深层治理张力。

title: Thinking with Patterns: Breaking the Perceptual Bottleneck in Visual Planning via Pattern Induction
summary: Planning from raw visual input remains a significant challenge for current Vision-Language Models (VLMs), when the complexity of input is beyond their one-step perception capability. Motivated by recent advances in Thinking with Images (TWI), a reasonable solution is to decompose the perception process into simpler steps by iteratively acquiring and incorporating local visual evidence. However, even though current VLMs are well-trained in general TWI ability, their perceptual bottleneck in the planning domain remains. To tackle this challenge, we formulate TWI as a tool to gradually build and reflect an accurate internal world model. We find that the resulting training-free planning strategy enables VLMs to solve tasks that are far beyond their initial capabilities, at the cost that too many TWI operations would significantly increase the computational overhead. To further improve efficiency, we propose Pattern Inference, a novel TWI strategy enabling VLMs to actively recognize known visual patterns in the new tasks and directly infer local world model structures. To obtain these patterns, we propose Pattern Induction, an online inductive learning strategy treating visual patterns as composite and reusable experts, which are autonomously discovered and optimized from experience. Experimental evaluations in FrozenLake, Crafter and CubeBench domains show that our approaches achieve a desirable balance between accuracy and efficiency.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于'图像思考'(TWI)的视觉规划新范式，通过构建内部世界模型和引入模式推理与归纳方法，提升VLM在复杂视觉任务中的规划能力与效率。
AI.motivation: 当前视觉语言模型（VLMs）在处理复杂原始视觉输入进行规划时存在感知瓶颈，尽管具备通用的‘图像思考’（TWI）能力，但在规划任务中仍受限。
AI.method: 将TWI建模为构建和反思内部世界模型的工具；提出Pattern Inference（模式推理）以主动识别并复用已知视觉模式；设计Pattern Induction（模式归纳）作为在线归纳学习策略，自主发现并优化可组合、可复用的视觉模式专家。
AI.result: 在FrozenLake、Crafter和CubeBench等基准上验证了所提方法在准确率与计算效率之间实现了良好平衡，显著超越基线VLM的原始规划能力。
AI.conclusion: TWI可被有效用于提升VLM的视觉规划能力；Pattern Inference与Pattern Induction协同实现了训练免费、高效且可扩展的视觉规划范式。

title: Leveraging Graph Structure in Seq2Seq Models for Knowledge Graph Link Prediction
comment: 9 pages, 1 figure, 2 tables. Preprint of a paper accepted at the 5th Workshop on LLM-Integrated Knowledge Graph Generation from Text (TEXT2KG), co-located with ESWC 2026, May 10--14, 2026, Dubrovnik, Croatia
summary: We introduce Graph-Augmented Sequence-to-Sequence (GA-S2S), a novel framework that integrates a T5-small encoder-decoder with a Relational Graph Attention Network (RGAT) to improve link prediction in knowledge graphs. While existing Seq2Seq models rely solely on surface-level textual descriptions of entities and relations and at best, flatten the neighborhoods of a query entity into a single linear sequence, thereby discarding the inherent graph structure, GA-S2S jointly encodes both textual features and the full $k$-hop subgraph topology surrounding the query entity. By integrating raw encoder outputs with RGAT's relation-aware embeddings, our model captures and leverages richer multi-hop relational patterns and textual information. Our preliminary experiments on the CoDEx dataset demonstrate that GA-S2S outperforms competitive Seq2Seq-based baseline models, achieving up to a 19\% relative gain in link prediction accuracy.

AI.tldr: GA-S2S是一种结合T5-small与关系图注意力网络（RGAT）的新框架，用于知识图谱链接预测，通过联合编码文本特征和k跳子图拓扑结构，显著提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有Seq2Seq模型仅利用实体和关系的表面文本描述，或简单地将邻域展平为线性序列，丢失了图结构信息。
AI.method: 提出GA-S2S框架，将T5-small编码器-解码器与关系图注意力网络（RGAT）结合，联合编码实体文本描述及其k跳子图拓扑结构，并融合原始编码器输出与RGAT的关系感知嵌入。
AI.result: 在CoDEx数据集上的初步实验表明，GA-S2S相比主流Seq2Seq基线模型，在链接预测准确率上最高获得19%的相对提升。
AI.conclusion: 联合建模文本与图结构信息能有效增强知识图谱链接预测能力，GA-S2S验证了该思路的有效性与潜力。

title: Distinguishable Deletion: Unifying Knowledge Erasure and Refusal for Large Language Model Unlearning
summary: Mitigating sensitive and harmful outputs is fundamental to ensuring safe deployment of LLMs. Existing approaches typically follow two paradigms: Knowledge Deletion (KD), which erases undesirable information during training, and Distinguishable Refusal (DR), which steers models away from using sensitive knowledge during inference. Despite rapid progress, KD-based unlearning struggles with biased deletion due to suppressing specific token sequences as a substitute for complete knowledge removal, whereas DR-based unlearning risks the re-emergence of harmful knowledge because the underlying knowledge remains intact. To address these issues, we propose Distinguishable Deletion ($\mathrm{D^2}$), a paradigm that restricts the response distribution in the latent representation rather than specific tokens to erase undesirable knowledge, while distinguishing it from retained knowledge, enabling a refusal mechanism to handle unlearned inputs safely and coherently. To implement $\mathrm{D^2}$, we introduce an energy index that quantifies the presence of knowledge and the separation between unlearned and retained content. Mathematical and empirical analyses show that energy is both accurate and efficient, enabling Energy-based Unlearning Alignment (EUA) to enforce energy-boundary unlearning during training and apply an energy-based refusal mechanism at inference. Extensive experiments demonstrate that EUA significantly outperforms previous methods, indicating the superiority of $\mathrm{D^2}$. Our code is available at https://github.com/Puning97/EUA-for-LLM-Unlearning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出D²（Distinguishable Deletion）范式，通过在隐空间而非词元层面约束响应分布来实现知识擦除，并引入能量指数量化知识存在性与区分度，进而设计基于能量的遗忘对齐（EUA）方法，在训练中实施能量边界遗忘、推理时启用能量拒绝机制，显著优于现有知识删除（KD）与可区分拒绝（DR）方法。
AI.motivation: 现有知识删除（KD）方法易因仅压制特定词元序列而造成偏差性删除；可区分拒绝（DR）方法则因底层知识未真正移除，存在有害知识复现风险。亟需一种兼顾彻底擦除与安全拒绝的新范式。
AI.method: 提出D²范式，核心是定义并优化‘能量指数’以刻画知识存在性与保留/遗忘知识间的分离程度；据此构建Energy-based Unlearning Alignment（EUA）：训练阶段施加能量边界约束实现遗忘，推理阶段依据能量值触发拒绝机制。
AI.result: 在多个基准上，EUA显著超越现有KD与DR类方法，在遗忘效果、拒绝一致性与泛化安全性方面均表现更优；理论与实验验证了能量指数的准确性与高效性。
AI.conclusion: D²范式及其具体实现EUA，通过在隐空间建模知识能量并统一训练与推理中的能量控制，有效解决了传统LLM遗忘方法中删除不彻底与拒绝不可靠的根本矛盾，为安全可控的大模型部署提供了新路径。

title: Surface-Form Neural Sparse Retrieval: Robust Fuzzy Matching for Industrial Music Search
summary: Music search at the scale of Amazon Music presents a unique challenge: queries frequently deviate from indexed metadata due to misspellings, transpositions, and phonetic variations, yet the retrieval system must operate under strict millisecond-level latency constraints. Our existing learning-to-retrieve system, the High Confidence Index (HCI), learns query-entity associations from customer behavior, relying on continual ``exploration'' to choose candidates. Traditional n-gram matching enables this exploration but suffers from poor semantic robustness and high noise, limiting the system's ability to learn from long-tail queries. In this work, we present a \textbf{robust neural sparse retrieval system} designed to maximize exploration efficiency. We adapt a state-of-the-art \textbf{inference-free} sparse retrieval architecture to the music domain, combining it with an effective \textbf{domain-specific granular subword tokenization strategy}. Our approach utilizes short-length token constraints (max 3 chars) to enforce the learning of surface-form robustness over lexical memorization. By pre-computing the neural embeddings and term expansions during the offline indexing phase, online processing is reduced to minimal tokenization and IDF weighting, achieving effectively zero latency overhead for query encoding. Evaluations on a 6M-document production corpus show an aggregate \textbf{91.4\%} recall@10 (vs. \textbf{57.7\%} for trigrams) at comparable throughput. Simulation of the HCI feedback loop demonstrates improved exploration efficiency, with \textbf{+0.8\%} higher stabilized recall than production trigrams. Ablation studies indicate that our sparse training methodology drives the performance gains, while domain-specific pretraining provides a cost-effective alternative to large-scale general-purpose pretraining.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向音乐搜索的鲁棒神经稀疏检索系统，通过领域定制的细粒度子词分词（最大3字符）和无推理稀疏架构，在保持毫秒级延迟的同时显著提升长尾查询的召回率与探索效率。
AI.motivation: 现有基于n-gram匹配的探索机制语义鲁棒性差、噪声高，难以从长尾查询中有效学习；同时需在严格毫秒级延迟约束下提升检索质量。
AI.method: 采用无推理（inference-free）稀疏检索架构，结合音乐领域定制的短长度（≤3字符）子词分词策略；离线预计算神经嵌入与词项扩展，线上仅需轻量分词与IDF加权。
AI.result: 在600万文档生产语料上，Recall@10达91.4%（三元组基线为57.7%）；HCI反馈循环仿真显示稳定召回率提升+0.8%；消融实验表明稀疏训练方法是主要增益来源。
AI.conclusion: 该神经稀疏检索系统在极低延迟下实现了高语义鲁棒性与高效探索，为大规模音乐搜索提供了可落地的端到端优化方案。

title: VGGT-CD: Training-Free Robust Registration for 3D Change Detection
comment: 13 pages, 5 figures. Code is available at: https://github.com/WZ-CS/VGGT-CD
summary: 3D change detection from multi-view images is essential for urban monitoring, disaster assessment, and autonomous driving. However, existing methods predominantly operate in the 2D domain, where viewpoint variations are mistaken for physical changes and depth is unavailable. While visual geometry foundation models like VGGT rapidly produce dense point clouds from unposed images, independent per-epoch reconstruction encounters fundamental obstacles: unpredictable inter-epoch scale ambiguity, registration-change paradox where scene changes corrupt alignment, and pervasive edge-flying noise. To address these challenges, we present VGGT-CD, a training-free pipeline decoupling cross-temporal registration from dynamic-change interference. In the Coarse Stage, sparse keyframe joint inference establishes a unified metric space and yields an initial Sim(3) prior. In the Fine Stage, dense reconstructions are purified by isolating static-background correspondences. A closed-form centroid alignment refines the translation while locking scale and rotation, using a residual self-check to mathematically guarantee non-degradation. Evaluated on an 11-scene benchmark from the World Across Time dataset, VGGT-CD reduces Absolute Trajectory Error by 44% outdoors and 59% indoors. It completes registration over 6 times faster, producing high-purity 3D change maps without task-specific training.

AI.tldr: 本文提出VGGT-CD，一种无需训练的3D变化检测流程，通过解耦跨时间配准与动态变化干扰，在多视角图像中实现高精度、高效、无退化变化检测。
AI.motivation: 现有2D变化检测方法易将视角变化误判为物理变化，且缺乏深度信息；而基于视觉几何基础模型（如VGGT）的逐期重建存在尺度模糊、配准-变化悖论和边缘飞点噪声等根本性问题。
AI.method: VGGT-CD采用两阶段无训练流程：粗阶段通过稀疏关键帧联合推理建立统一度量空间并获取初始Sim(3)先验；细阶段通过分离静态背景对应关系净化稠密重建，并用闭式质心对齐精化平移，同时锁定尺度与旋转，辅以残差自检确保不退化。
AI.result: 在World Across Time数据集11个场景上，VGGT-CD将绝对轨迹误差（ATE）降低44%（室外）和59%（室内），配准速度提升6倍以上，生成高纯度3D变化图，且无需任务特定训练。
AI.conclusion: VGGT-CD有效克服了多时期3D重建中的尺度歧义、变化干扰与噪声问题，为无监督、高效、鲁棒的3D变化检测提供了新范式。

title: Context Memorization for Efficient Long Context Generation
summary: Modern large language model (LLM) applications increasingly rely on long conditioning prefixes to control model behavior at inference time. While prefix-augmented inference is effective, it incurs two structural limitations: i) the prefix's influence fades as generation proceeds, and ii) attention computation over the prefix scales linearly with its length. Existing approaches either keep the prefix in attention while compressing it, or internalize it into model parameters through gradient-based training. The former still attends to the prefix at inference, while the latter is training-intensive and ill-suited to prefix updates. To address these issues, we propose attention-state memory, a training-free approach that externalizes the prefix into a lightweight, lookup-based memory of precomputed attention states between prefix and query tokens. On ManyICLBench with LLaMA-3.1-8B, our method improves accuracy over in-context learning at 1K-8K memory budgets while reducing attention latency by 1.36x at 8K, and surpasses full-attention RAG performance on NBA benchmark using only 20% of its memory footprint.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需训练的attention-state memory方法，通过将长前缀外部化为轻量级、基于查找的注意力状态记忆，缓解了长前缀在LLM推理中影响力衰减和计算开销大的问题，在多个基准上实现了更高准确率与更低延迟。
AI.motivation: 现有方法要么仍需在推理时对长前缀进行注意力计算（效率低），要么依赖梯度训练将前缀内化（训练开销大、难以动态更新），无法兼顾高效性、灵活性与效果。
AI.method: 提出attention-state memory：预计算并缓存前缀与查询token之间的注意力状态，以轻量、可查表的方式外部化前缀信息，完全避免推理时对原始长前缀的注意力计算。
AI.result: 在ManyICLBench（LLaMA-3.1-8B）上，1K–8K内存预算下准确率优于上下文学习；8K时注意力延迟降低1.36倍；在NBA基准上，仅用20%内存即超越全注意力RAG性能。
AI.conclusion: attention-state memory是一种训练免费、高效、可动态更新的前缀建模新范式，有效解耦前缀表达与推理计算，为长上下文控制提供了实用新路径。

title: Lever: Speculative LLM Inference on Smartphones
summary:
Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly needed for interactive mobile applications, but high-quality models exceed the limited DRAM available on smartphones. Flash storage can hold larger models, yet flash-backed inference is slow because autoregressive decoding repeatedly invokes the target model and incurs costly I/O. We observe that speculative decoding is a natural fit for this setting: a small draft model can remain in DRAM, while a larger flash-resident target model verifies multiple candidate tokens per invocation. However, existing methods assume server-class accelerators and fail to account for prolonged I/O latency, limited computation parallelism, and irregular speculation execution.
  We present Lever, an end-to-end system for efficient flash-backed LLM inference on smartphones. Lever jointly optimizes the three stages of speculative decoding under mobile constraints. For drafting, it builds token trees using an I/O- and compute-aware gain-cost objective. For verification, it prunes low-value branches through early-exit prediction to reduce target-model computation. For execution, it maps speculation efficiently across mobile CPU-NPU hardware to improve utilization. Comprehensive evaluations show that Lever reduces inference latency by an average of 2.93x over baseline flash-offloaded inference and 1.50x over conventional speculative decoding, narrowing the latency gap between flash-backed and memory-resident LLM inference.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Lever系统，通过针对智能手机硬件约束优化推测解码的三个阶段（起草、验证、执行），实现了高效的闪存支持大语言模型推理，显著降低了延迟。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在移动设备上的应用需求日益增长，但高质量模型超出智能手机有限的DRAM容量；虽然闪存可以容纳更大的模型，但基于闪存的推理因自回归解码反复调用模型并产生高I/O开销而变慢。
AI.method: Lever系统联合优化推测解码的起草（基于I/O与计算感知的目标函数构建token树）、验证（通过早期退出预测剪枝低价值分支）和执行（在手机CPU-NPU异构硬件上高效映射推测任务）三个阶段。
AI.result: 实验表明，Lever相比基线闪存卸载推理平均降低2.93倍延迟，相比传统推测解码降低1.50倍延迟，显著缩小了闪存支持与内存驻留LLM推理之间的延迟差距。
AI.conclusion: Lever是首个专为智能手机设计的端到端闪存支持LLM推测解码系统，在真实移动约束下实现了高效、低延迟的大模型推理。

title: Entropy-Gradient Inversion: Moving Toward Internal Mechanism of Large Reasoning Models
summary: The advancement of Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) has catalyzed a paradigm shift from reactive ``fast thinking'' text generation to systematic, step-by-step ``slow thinking'' reasoning, unlocking state-of-the-art performance in complex mathematical and logical tasks. However, the field faces \textit{the fundamental gap between token-level behavioral analysis and internal reasoning mechanisms, and the instability of reinforcement learning (RL) for reasoning optimization relying on costly external verifiers}. We identify and formally define \textbf{Entropy-Gradient Inversion}, a robust negative correlation between token entropy and logit gradients that acts as a definitive geometric fingerprint for LRM reasoning capability. Building on this, we propose \textbf{Correlation-Regularized Group Policy Optimization (CorR-PO)}, which embeds this inversion signature into RL reward regularization. Extensive experiments on various reasoning benchmarks across multiple model scales show CorR-PO consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, confirming that stronger inversion directly correlates with superior reasoning performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Entropy-Gradient Inversion作为大推理模型（LRM）推理能力的几何指纹，并基于此设计CorR-PO算法，通过相关性正则化改进强化学习优化过程，在多个推理基准上显著提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有研究存在两个关键问题：一是token级行为分析与模型内部推理机制之间存在根本性鸿沟；二是依赖昂贵外部验证器的强化学习方法在推理优化中不稳定。
AI.method: 首先形式化定义Entropy-Gradient Inversion现象（token熵与logit梯度间的强负相关），并将其作为推理能力的几何标识；进而提出Correlation-Regularized Group Policy Optimization（CorR-PO），将该逆相关性嵌入RL奖励函数中进行正则化优化。
AI.result: 在多个推理基准（如数学、逻辑任务）和不同规模模型上，CorR-PO持续超越当前最优方法；实验证明Entropy-Gradient Inversion强度与推理性能呈直接正相关。
AI.conclusion: Entropy-Gradient Inversion是可量化、鲁棒的推理能力指标，CorR-PO通过将其融入强化学习框架，有效弥合了行为分析与内在机制之间的 gap，为稳定高效地优化LRM推理能力提供了新范式。

title: Prefix-Adaptive Block Diffusion for Efficient Document Recognition
summary: Block Diffusion Models (BDMs) support parallel generation, flexible-length output, and KV caching, making them promising for efficient document parsing. However, existing BDMs bind denoising and cache commitment to fixed block boundaries: parallelism shrinks during intra-block denoising, while generated tokens cannot be cached until the whole block is completed. Moreover, intra-block bidirectional denoising conflicts with inter-block autoregression, creating inconsistent information flow that can challenge structure-sensitive recognition. We propose the Prefix-Adaptive Block Diffusion Model (PA-BDM), which replaces intra-block bidirectional denoising with causal denoising from prefix to suffix and treats the block size as a maximum candidate range rather than a fixed commitment unit. PA-BDM uses Confidence-gated Structural Loss (CSL) to build low-entropy prefixes before extending training to longer continuations. During inference, Progressive Prefix Commitment (PPC) then dynamically commits the longest reliable prefix into the KV cache and resets the next candidate range from the updated prefix, restoring a large parallel decoding space at each step. Experiments show that the 3B PA-BDM achieves higher recognition scores on several benchmarks and improves inference throughput by 71.6\% over the 2.5B MinerU-Diffusion.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Prefix-Adaptive Block Diffusion Model (PA-BDM)，通过因果去噪、置信度门控结构损失（CSL）和渐进前缀提交（PPC）机制，提升块扩散模型在文档解析任务中的并行性、缓存效率与结构识别精度。
AI.motivation: 现有块扩散模型（BDMs）存在三个关键问题：1）并行性在块内去噪时下降；2）KV缓存需等待整块完成，延迟高；3）块内双向去噪与块间自回归不一致，损害结构敏感识别。
AI.method: 提出PA-BDM：1）用前缀到后缀的因果去噪替代块内双向去噪；2）将块大小视为最大候选范围而非固定单元；3）引入CSL损失构建低熵可靠前缀；4）推理时采用PPC动态提交最长可信前缀至KV缓存，并重设后续候选范围。
AI.result: 3B PA-BDM在多个基准上识别分数更高，推理吞吐量比2.5B MinerU-Diffusion提升71.6%。
AI.conclusion: PA-BDM通过解耦去噪与缓存策略、增强前缀可靠性与动态范围调整，显著提升了块扩散模型在高效文档解析任务中的性能与实用性。

title: The Unlearnability Phenomenon in RLVR for Language Models
summary: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Reward (RLVR) has proven effective in improving Large Language Model's (LLM) reasoning ability. However, the learning dynamics of RLVR remain underexplored. In this paper, we reveal a counterintuitive phenomenon: among hard examples that the model initially struggles with, a substantial subset remains unlearnable even when correct rollouts are present. To understand the phenomenon, we first demonstrate that existing optimization and sampling techniques fail to resolve unlearnability. With cross-example gradient analysis, we show that unlearnable examples have fundamental representation issue, characterized by low gradient similarity with the rest of the examples and ungeneralizable reasoning patterns. We further show that representation flaws are difficult to mitigate in RL, as data augmentation does not improve gradient similarity. Our study provides the first systematic characterization of unlearnable data in RLVR training and reveals fundamental limitations in current RL approaches for reasoning tasks. Code and data are available at \url{https://github.com/yulinchen99/unlearnability-rlvr}.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了强化学习与可验证奖励（RLVR）在提升大语言模型推理能力时存在‘不可学习性’现象：部分难题即使提供正确推理路径仍无法被模型学会，并指出其根源在于表征层面的缺陷（如梯度相似性低、推理模式不可泛化），且现有优化、采样和数据增强方法均难以缓解。
AI.motivation: 尽管RLVR在提升LLM推理能力上有效，但其学习动态尚不清楚；作者旨在探究为何某些难题即使有正确rollout也无法被学会。
AI.method: 通过跨样本梯度分析识别不可学习样本的表征问题（如梯度相似性低、推理模式不可泛化），并检验现有优化、采样及数据增强方法的有效性。
AI.result: 发现不可学习样本存在根本性的表征缺陷，表现为低梯度相似性和不可泛化的推理模式；且这些缺陷在RL框架下难以通过数据增强等手段缓解。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次系统刻画了RLVR训练中不可学习数据的现象与成因，揭示了当前RL方法在推理任务中的根本局限性。

title: STRIDE: A Self-Reflective Agent Framework for Reliable Automatic Equation Discovery
summary: LLM-based equation discovery offers a promising route to recovering symbolic laws from data, but many systems still rely on generation-centered loops that propose candidates, fit parameters, score results, and reuse selected examples. Such loops can misjudge useful skeletons under unreliable fitting, discard near-correct equations that require repair, and accumulate redundant memories that provide limited guidance. We propose STRIDE, a self-reflective agent framework that improves reliability by coordinating data-aware generation, mixed-fitting evaluation, critic--executor repair, and diversity-preserving semantic memory. By turning fitted scores and candidate behavior into shared feedback, STRIDE enables equations to be proposed, assessed, refined, and reused within a closed-loop discovery process. Experiments on representative symbolic-regression benchmarks and LSR-Synth suites show that STRIDE improves accuracy, OOD robustness, and structural recovery across multiple LLM backbones, with ablations and analyses confirming the contribution of its core components.

AI.tldr: 本文提出STRIDE框架，通过数据感知生成、混合拟合评估、批评-执行修复和多样性保持的语义记忆，提升基于大语言模型的方程发现的可靠性与鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM的方程发现方法依赖生成为中心的循环，易因拟合不可靠而误判候选结构、忽略需修复的近似正确方程，并积累冗余记忆，导致发现效率与准确性受限。
AI.method: STRIDE是一种自反思智能体框架，整合数据感知生成、混合拟合评估、批评-执行式修复机制及多样性保持的语义记忆，实现闭环式方程发现：候选方程可被提出、评估、精修与复用。
AI.result: 在典型符号回归基准与LSR-Synth数据集上的实验表明，STRIDE在准确性、分布外（OOD）鲁棒性与结构恢复能力上均优于现有方法，且适用于多种LLM主干模型；消融实验验证了各核心组件的有效性。
AI.conclusion: STRIDE通过引入协同反馈与闭环优化机制，显著提升了LLM驱动方程发现的可靠性与泛化能力，为科学发现中的符号建模提供了更稳健的智能体范式。

title: Metric-Guided Feature Fusion of Visual Foundation Models for Segmentation Tasks
comment: Accepted to the CVPR 2026 Findings Track
summary: Although large-scale visual foundation models (VFMs) achieve remarkable performance in semantic understanding, they still underperform in instance-aware dense prediction tasks. They exhibit different biases in representation: for instance, promptable segmentation models (e.g., SAM2) focus on fine-grained region boundaries, while self-supervised models (e.g., DINOv3) emphasize object-level structure. This observation highlights the potential of combining complementary features from different VFMs to enhance downstream dense prediction tasks. However, naive multi-VFM fusion seldom leads to reliable gains, and interpretable principles for leveraging their complementary features are still underexplored. In this work, we propose a metric-guided approach that effectively selects and aggregates complementary features from different VFMs based on explicit assessment scores. Specifically, we design a suite of label-free metrics in feature space across two aspects, Structural Coherence and Edge Fidelity, to assess features of VFM encoders. Guided by these scores, we identify complementary edge-strong and structure-strong encoder pairs, and integrate them via a master-auxiliary fusion scheme. This feature fusion requires no complex architectural changes and is trained only in a single stage. Our model shows consistent performance gains across multiple dense prediction tasks compared with the baselines, with better object-level semantics and more accurately localized boundaries. The code is available at {https://github.com/gyc-code/metric-guided-fusion}.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于度量引导的多视觉基础模型（VFM）特征融合方法，通过无标签的结构一致性和边缘保真度指标评估不同VFM特征，选择互补性强的编码器对，并采用主辅融合策略，在不增加模型复杂度的前提下显著提升实例感知密集预测任务性能。
AI.motivation: 大型视觉基础模型在语义理解上表现优异，但在实例感知的密集预测任务中仍不足；不同VFMs在表征上存在互补偏差（如SAM2重边界、DINOv3重结构），但现有融合方法缺乏可解释性与可靠性。
AI.method: 设计两类无标签特征空间度量——结构一致性与边缘保真度，据此筛选互补的‘边缘强’和‘结构强’编码器对，并采用轻量级单阶段主辅融合方案进行特征聚合。
AI.result: 在多个密集预测任务上持续超越基线，提升了目标级语义表达能力与边界定位精度，且无需复杂架构改动或额外训练阶段。
AI.conclusion: 基于显式度量引导的特征选择与融合是一种有效、可解释且高效的多VFM协同范式，为密集预测任务提供了新思路。

title: Multilingual jailbreaking of LLMs using low-resource languages
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) remain vulnerable to jailbreak attempts that circumvent safety guardrails. We investigate whether multi-turn conversations using low-resource African languages (Afrikaans, Kiswahili, isiXhosa, and isiZulu) can bypass safety mechanisms across commercial LLMs. We translated prompts from existing datasets and evaluated ChatGPT, Claude, DeepSeek, Gemini, and Grok through automated testing and human red-teaming with native speakers. Single-turn translation attacks proved ineffective, while multi-turn conversations achieved English harmful response rates from 52.7% (Claude 3.5 Haiku) to 83.6% (GPT-4o-mini), Afrikaans from 60.0% (Claude 3.5 Haiku) to 78.2% (GPT-4o-mini), and Kiswahili from 41.8% (Claude 3.5 Haiku) to 70.9% (DeepSeek). Human red-teaming increased jailbreak rates compared to automated methods. Over all evaluated languages, the average jailbreak rate increased from 59.8% to 75.8%, with improvements of +20.0% (Afrikaans), +12.7% (isiZulu), +12.3% (isiXhosa), and +1% (Kiswahili), demonstrating that poor translation quality limits jailbreak success. These findings suggest that vulnerabilities in LLMs persist in multilingual contexts and that translation quality is the critical factor determining jailbreak success in low-resource languages.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了使用低资源非洲语言（如阿非利卡语、斯瓦希里语、祖鲁语和科萨语）进行多轮对话是否能绕过商用大语言模型的安全机制，发现多轮对话显著提高了越狱成功率，且翻译质量是决定越狱成败的关键因素。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型（LLMs）在面对越狱攻击时仍存在安全漏洞，尤其在低资源多语言场景下其安全性尚未被充分研究。本文旨在探究利用非洲低资源语言进行多轮对话是否能有效规避现有安全防护机制。
AI.method: 将现有数据集中的提示词翻译为四种非洲语言（阿非利卡语、斯瓦希里语、科萨语、祖鲁语），在ChatGPT、Claude、DeepSeek、Gemini和Grok等商用模型上开展自动化测试与母语者参与的人工红队测试，对比单轮与多轮攻击效果，并分析翻译质量对越狱成功率的影响。
AI.result: 单轮翻译攻击效果差；多轮对话显著提升越狱率：英语达52.7%–83.6%，阿非利卡语60.0%–78.2%，斯瓦希里语41.8%–70.9%；人工红队测试比自动化测试平均提升越狱率16个百分点；翻译质量差明显限制越狱成功率。
AI.conclusion: LLMs在低资源多语言场景中仍存在显著安全漏洞，而翻译质量是影响越狱成功与否的核心因素，提示需加强多语言安全评估与高质量本地化支持。

title: TIER: Trajectory-Invariant Execution Rewards for Multi-Step Tool Composition
comment: Preprint. Submitted to NeurIPS 2026. 28 pages, 7 figures, 8 tables. Code and datasets available at https://github.com/anaykulkarni/TIER
summary: Tool use enables large language models to solve complex tasks through sequences of API calls, yet existing reinforcement learning approaches fail to scale to multi-step composition settings. Outcome-based rewards provide only sparse feedback, while trajectory-supervised rewards depend on annotated reference solutions, penalizing valid alternatives and limiting scalability. We propose TIER: Trajectory-Invariant Execution Rewards, a reward framework that derives supervision directly from function schemas and runtime execution, rather than from reference trajectories. The reward decomposes into format validity, schema adherence, execution success, and answer correctness, providing dense, interpretable sequence-level feedback derived from fine-grained verification of individual steps of tool use. This design allows any valid execution path to receive credit, naturally supporting multiple solution strategies and adapting to evolving tool interfaces. On DepthBench, a compositional benchmark stratified by depth (1 to 6 steps), TIER achieves >90% accuracy across steps, where trajectory-supervised rewards collapse beyond step-4. We further demonstrate consistent gains on benchmarks like BFCL v3 and NestFUL. Ablation studies confirm that all reward components are necessary, highlighting the importance of multi-level supervision for compositional reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TIER（Trajectory-Invariant Execution Rewards）框架，通过函数模式和运行时执行生成稠密、可解释的序列级奖励，而非依赖参考轨迹，从而提升大语言模型在多步工具调用任务中的可扩展性与鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于结果或轨迹监督的强化学习方法在多步工具调用中面临稀疏反馈、依赖人工标注、抑制合理替代路径及难以适配动态工具接口等问题。
AI.method: TIER将奖励分解为四部分：格式有效性、模式一致性、执行成功性、答案正确性，全部基于函数schema和实际运行时验证自动计算，不依赖参考轨迹。
AI.result: 在DepthBench（1–6步分层基准）上TIER达到>90%准确率，显著优于轨迹监督方法（其在第4步后性能崩溃）；在BFCL v3和NestFUL上也取得一致提升；消融实验证明各奖励组件均不可或缺。
AI.conclusion: TIER通过细粒度、轨迹无关的执行反馈，有效支持组合式推理，提升了工具调用的泛化性、可扩展性与鲁棒性，为大模型工具学习提供了新范式。

title: Accelerating AI-Powered Research: The PuppyChatter Framework for Usable and Flexible Tooling
summary: This research addresses the challenges inherent in developing Artificial Intelligence (AI) applications, particularly those leveraging Large Language Models (LLMs). While AI vendors provide Application Programming Interfaces (APIs) and Software Development Kits (SDKs) to facilitate developer interaction, the former often requires intricate manual request construction, and the latter can lead to significant vendor lock-in. Furthermore, existing model abstraction frameworks, though mitigating vendor dependency, introduce an additional layer of complexity and potential security concerns. To reconcile these conflicting factors, the study introduces PuppyChatter, a novel software framework designed to preserve the intuitive simplicity of vendor-specific SDKs while simultaneously adhering to the vendor-neutrality principles characteristic of model abstraction, thereby offering a more streamlined and flexible development paradigm.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PuppyChatter框架，旨在兼顾LLM应用开发中SDK的易用性与模型抽象层的厂商中立性，解决API手动构造复杂、SDK厂商锁定及现有抽象框架安全与复杂性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM开发方式存在API手动构造繁琐、SDK导致厂商锁定、以及模型抽象框架引入额外复杂性和安全风险等问题，亟需一种兼顾易用性与中立性的新方案。
AI.method: 设计并实现了一个名为PuppyChatter的新型软件框架，融合厂商特定SDK的直观简洁性与模型抽象层的厂商中立原则。
AI.result: PuppyChatter成功实现了在保持开发体验简洁的同时，消除厂商依赖，并降低安全与集成复杂性。
AI.conclusion: PuppyChatter为LLM应用开发提供了一种更流畅、灵活且安全的范式，弥合了易用性与中立性之间的鸿沟。

title: HAD: Hallucination-Aware Diffusion Priors for 3D Reconstruction
summary: Diffusion priors have recently demonstrated strong capability in enhancing the quality of sparse-view 3D reconstruction by augmenting training views at novel viewpoints, but they inevitably introduce hallucinated content -- artifacts inconsistent with the input views -- into the final 3D model. To address this challenge, we propose Hallucination-Aware Diffusion prior (HAD), which estimates pixel-wise hallucination score maps for augmented images by leveraging multi-view reasoning capabilities from a feedforward novel view synthesis (NVS) network pre-trained on large-scale 3D data. These hallucination scores enable selective masking of unreliable pixels during the progressive 3D reconstruction procedure, preventing the introduction of non-existent artifacts into the 3D model. To further enhance performance, we create multiple versions of augmented images at each novel view by conditioning the diffusion prior on different input views, which are then fused into a final image that leverages the broader context across all input views. We show that our method substantially reduces hallucination artifacts in diffusion-assisted 3D reconstruction, thereby achieving state-of-the-art performance across multiple benchmarks on novel view synthesis. Our project are publicly available at \href{https://xiliu8006.github.io/HAD-Project-website/}{project website}.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Hallucination-Aware Diffusion prior（HAD）的方法，通过估计像素级幻觉得分图并选择性掩码不可靠像素，有效减少扩散先验在稀疏视角3D重建中引入的幻觉伪影，并利用多输入视图条件融合增强重建质量。
AI.motivation: 扩散先验在稀疏视角3D重建中虽能提升质量，但会引入与输入视图不一致的幻觉内容（artifacts），亟需一种机制识别并抑制此类伪影。
AI.method: 1）利用预训练的前馈式多视角合成（NVS）网络生成像素级幻觉得分图；2）在3D重建过程中对高幻觉分数像素进行选择性掩码；3）以不同输入视图为条件生成多个扩散增强图像，并融合为最终视图。
AI.result: 在多个新视角合成基准上显著降低幻觉伪影，达到当前最优性能（state-of-the-art）。
AI.conclusion: HAD通过幻觉感知机制和多视图条件融合，有效提升了扩散先验在稀疏视角3D重建中的可靠性与重建质量。

title: Machine Unlearning for Masked Diffusion Language Models
summary: Recent masked diffusion language models (MDLMs), such as LLaDA and Dream, have achieved performance comparable to autoregressive large language models. Unlike autoregressive models, which generate text sequentially, MDLMs generate text by iteratively denoising masked positions in parallel. During fine-tuning, MDLMs learn to recover responses from masked response states conditioned on a prompt, thereby shifting their predictions from a prompt-masked unconditional distribution toward a prompt-conditional distribution. Despite this distinct generative and fine-tuning mechanism, machine unlearning for MDLMs remains largely unexplored. In this paper, we propose Masked Diffusion Unlearning (MDU), the first unlearning framework for MDLMs, by revisiting the process of learning specific knowledge in terms of diffusion. Specifically, MDU minimizes a forward KL divergence from the prompt-conditional prediction to a prompt-masked unconditional anchor at every masked response position, with a temperature scaling parameter to control the privacy-utility trade-off. Our empirical results on standard benchmarks and MDLM backbones show that MDU achieves high unlearning performance compared to existing LLM unlearning methods. Code is available at https://github.com/leegeoru/MDU.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了首个针对掩码扩散语言模型（MDLMs）的机器遗忘框架Masked Diffusion Unlearning（MDU），通过最小化前向KL散度实现高效遗忘，兼顾隐私与效用。
AI.motivation: 尽管掩码扩散语言模型（MDLMs）在生成机制和微调方式上与自回归模型显著不同，其机器遗忘问题却尚未被探索。
AI.method: MDU框架通过在每个掩码响应位置最小化prompt-conditional预测分布到prompt-masked unconditional anchor分布的前向KL散度，并引入温度缩放参数控制隐私-效用权衡。
AI.result: 在标准基准和多种MDLM主干模型上的实验表明，MDU相比现有大语言模型遗忘方法具有更高的遗忘性能。
AI.conclusion: MDU是首个专为MDLMs设计的机器遗忘框架，有效利用了MDLMs的扩散式学习机制，在保证模型效用的同时实现了高质量的遗忘。

title: PULSE: Generative Phase Evolution for Non-Stationary Time Series Forecasting
summary: Time series forecasting under non-stationarity faces a fundamental tension between capturing stable representations and adapting to distribution shifts. Existing methods implicitly rely on static historical assumptions, leading to a critical failure mode we term Phase Amnesia, where models become blind to the evolving global context. To resolve this, we formalize non-stationary dynamics through three physical hypotheses: wold decomposition, dynamical phase evolution, and heteroscedastic manifold generation. These principles inspire PULSE, a physics-informed, plug-and-play framework adopting a Disentangle--Evolve--Simulate design philosophy. Specifically, PULSE utilizes phase-anchored disentanglement to resolve optimization interference caused by dominant trends, employs a Phase Router to actively generate future trajectories, and introduces Statistic-Aware Mixup (SAM) to ensure robustness against out-of-distribution volatility. Empirically, PULSE enables a simple MLP backbone to achieve state-of-the-art or highly competitive performance across 12 real-world benchmarks. This validates that a correct physics-informed inductive bias is far more critical than raw architectural complexity for non-stationary forecasting. The code is available at: https://github.com/Gemost/PULSE.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PULSE框架，通过物理启发的三阶段设计（解耦-演化-模拟）解决非平稳时间序列预测中的'相位失忆'问题，显著提升简单MLP模型在12个真实基准上的预测性能。
AI.motivation: 非平稳时间序列预测中存在稳定表征学习与分布偏移适应之间的根本张力，现有方法因依赖静态历史假设而产生'相位失忆'问题，无法感知全局演化上下文。
AI.method: 基于Wold分解、动力学相位演化和异方差流形生成三大物理假设，提出PULSE框架：采用相位锚定解耦缓解趋势干扰、Phase Router主动生成未来轨迹、Statistic-Aware Mixup（SAM）增强对分布外波动的鲁棒性。
AI.result: PULSE使简单MLP骨干网络在12个真实世界基准上达到SOTA或极具竞争力的性能，验证了正确的物理归纳偏置比架构复杂度更为关键。
AI.conclusion: 引入符合物理规律的归纳偏置可有效克服非平稳性带来的建模挑战，PULSE作为一种即插即用框架，为时间序列预测提供了新范式。

title: Going Headless? On the Boundaries of Vertical AI Firms
summary: Vertical AI firms in accounting, law, healthcare, procurement, and similar domains historically bundled workflow, domain logic, and accountability into a single application. General-purpose AI agents are now unbundling that package, prompting founders and investors to advocate "going headless": cede the workflow and interface to agents and expose domain expertise as callable services. This article argues that going headless is correct for some firms and destructive for others, and that the latter often cede their value capture inadvertently through architectural choices that look like interface decisions. This is a boundary question, and the answer turns on distinguishing the interface boundary, which can often move, from the accountability boundary, which often must not. Drawing on Coase's theory of the firm, Eisenmann, Parker, and Van Alstyne's platform envelopment framework, and Teece's analysis of complementary assets and appropriability, the article shows that orchestrators operating through open protocols acquire envelopment power even as technical interoperability improves, and that durable value capture concentrates in cospecialized accountability assets: professional signoff, regulated workflows, evidence trails, and trusted systems of record. The article proposes a three-position taxonomy (component, integrated software platform, dual-track) determined not by sector but by task-accountability regime, and formalizes the construct of rule debt: the future governance, maintenance, and accountability burden that accrues to customer organizations when business rules and professional standards migrate from governed systems into prompts and agent instructions. Four principles follow: decompose by accountability not interface, invert the edges while retaining the core, position rule debt as the customer cost the integrated platform prevents, and avoid single-orchestrator dependence.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨垂直领域AI公司是否应采用“去头化”（headless）架构，指出关键在于区分界面边界与问责边界；强调价值捕获集中于专业背书、受监管流程等可协同专用的问责资产，并提出基于任务-问责机制的三类定位及‘规则债务’概念。
AI.motivation: 垂直AI公司正面临通用AI代理解构传统捆绑式应用的挑战，创始人和投资者推崇‘去头化’，但该策略可能无意中削弱企业价值捕获能力，亟需理论框架厘清何时适用、为何失败。
AI.method: 融合科斯的企业理论、Eisenmann等人的平台包络框架以及Teece的互补性资产与可占有性分析，构建以问责边界为核心的分类模型，引入‘规则债务’新概念并提炼四条设计原则。
AI.result: 提出三类定位（组件型、集成软件平台型、双轨型）取决于任务-问责机制而非行业；揭示开放协议下协调者仍具包络能力；证明持久价值集中于cospecialized accountability assets；定义规则债务并导出四项架构原则。
AI.conclusion: ‘去头化’并非普适策略，企业应以问责边界为锚点进行架构决策，避免将本应内化的专业责任外移至AI代理导致规则债务累积，从而保障长期价值捕获。

title: Zero-Shot Faithful Textual Explanations via Directional-Derivative Influence on Predictions
summary: Zero-shot textual explanations aim to make image classifiers more transparent by probing their internal representations, without relying on task-specific supervision or LVLMs. However, existing methods often miss the features that truly drive the prediction, resulting in limited \textit{faithfulness} to the evidence underlying the model's decision. To address this, we propose FaithTrace. Motivated by the idea that faithful explanations should describe concepts that strongly influence the prediction, FaithTrace directly measures how much the representation induced by the explanation changes the class logit. We introduce an influence score, computed as the directional derivative of the class logit along the text-induced direction in the classifier's feature space, and use it as a proxy for faithfulness. Moreover, we extend this influence score into quantitative evaluation metrics, helping fill the gap in faithfulness evaluation for textual explanations. Experiments show that FaithTrace yields more faithful explanations than baselines, facilitating a more accurate understanding of the model. The code will be publicly released.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FaithTrace方法，通过计算文本诱导方向上的类别logit方向导数来衡量文本解释的忠实性，并引入定量评估指标，显著提升了零样本文本解释的忠实性。
AI.motivation: 现有零样本文本解释方法往往无法捕捉真正驱动预测的特征，导致解释的忠实性（faithfulness）不足。
AI.method: 提出FaithTrace方法，定义一个影响分数（influence score），即类别logit在文本诱导方向上的方向导数，作为忠实性的代理指标；并将其扩展为定量评估指标。
AI.result: 实验表明FaithTrace生成的文本解释比基线方法更忠实，有助于更准确理解模型决策过程。
AI.conclusion: FaithTrace通过直接建模文本解释对分类logit的影响，有效提升了零样本文本解释的忠实性，并提供了可量化的评估手段。

title: Knowledge-to-Verification: Exploring RLVR for LLMs in Knowledge-Intensive Domains
summary: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has demonstrated promising potential to enhance the reasoning capabilities of large language models (LLMs) in domains such as mathematics and coding. However, its applications on knowledge-intensive domains have not been effectively explored due to the scarcity of high-quality verifiable data. Furthermore, current RLVR focuses solely on the correctness of final answers, leading to the limitations of flawed reasoning and sparse reward signals. In this work, we propose Knowledge-to-Verification (K2V), a framework that extends RLVR to knowledge-intensive domains through automated verifiable data synthesis, while enabling verification of the LLM's reasoning process. Extensive experiments demonstrate that K2V enhances the reasoning of LLM in knowledge-intensive domains without significantly compromising the model's general capabilities. This study also suggests that integrating automated data synthesis with reasoning verification is a promising direction to enhance model capabilities in these broader domains. Code is available at https://github.com/SeedScientist/K2V.

AI.tldr: 本文提出K2V框架，将强化学习与可验证奖励（RLVR）扩展至知识密集型领域，通过自动合成可验证数据并验证推理过程，提升大语言模型在该类任务中的推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有RLVR方法在知识密集型领域应用受限，主要因高质量可验证数据稀缺，且仅关注最终答案正确性，忽视推理过程，导致推理错误和奖励稀疏问题。
AI.method: 提出Knowledge-to-Verification（K2V）框架，结合自动化可验证数据合成与对LLM推理过程的分步验证，从而扩展RLVR至知识密集型任务。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，K2V显著提升了LLM在知识密集型任务中的推理能力，同时未明显损害其通用能力。
AI.conclusion: 将自动化数据合成与推理过程验证相结合，是增强大语言模型在更广泛领域中能力的可行且有前景的方向。

title: Cross-Domain Molecular Relational Learning: Leveraging Chemical Structure-Activity Analysis
summary: Recent advances in molecular representation integrates molecular topological and visual modalities, opening new avenues for precise Molecular Relational Learning (MRL). Existing MRL methods focus on intra-domain modeling, and their inherent domain-closed effect limits applicability to molecular science, particularly in elucidating cross-domain interaction mechanisms. Consequently, the imperative for Cross-Domain Molecular Relational Learning has become increasingly pressing. Benefiting from structure-activity analysis, we propose the Domain Adversarial Training Network with Structural-Semantic Transfer Discrepancy (DisTrans) to optimize cross-domain adaptive representation for molecular structures and visual images. 1) We employ the gradient reversal strategy based on substructure topological discrepancies between domains to learn the domain dependence of molecular structures. This strategy guides the model to adapt to the structural adjacency patterns in the target domain, generating domain-separable structural representations. 2) We apply the cross-domain representation guidance mechanism to align the functional-group semantic information between the source and target domains, learning cross-domain consistency information. The experimental results in two typical cross-domain strategies demonstrate that DisTrans outperforms 16 baseline methods, maintaining satisfactory performance even under pronounced inter-domain discrepancy.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DisTrans模型，通过域对抗训练和结构-语义迁移差异优化分子结构与图像的跨域自适应表示，提升跨域分子关系学习性能。
AI.motivation: 现有分子关系学习方法局限于域内建模，难以应对跨域交互机制解析需求，亟需发展跨域分子关系学习方法。
AI.method: 提出Domain Adversarial Training Network with Structural-Semantic Transfer Discrepancy（DisTrans）：1）基于子结构拓扑差异采用梯度反转策略学习分子结构的域依赖性；2）引入跨域表示引导机制对齐源域与目标域的功能基团语义信息。
AI.result: 在两种典型跨域策略实验中，DisTrans优于16种基线方法，即使在域间差异显著时仍保持良好性能。
AI.conclusion: DisTrans有效提升了分子结构与视觉模态在跨域场景下的表征迁移能力，为跨域分子关系学习提供了新范式。

title: Interactive Evaluation Requires a Design Science
summary: AI evaluation is undergoing a structural change. Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed as systems that act over time through tools, environments, users, and other agents, while many evaluation practices still inherit assumptions from response-centered benchmarks (e.g., fixed inputs, isolated outputs, and outcome judgments that can be made from a single response). The field has begun to build interactive benchmarks, but the resulting landscape is fragmented: benchmarks differ in what interaction artifacts they admit, how trajectories are scored, and what claims their results support. This position paper argues that interactive evaluation should be treated as a principled evaluation paradigm, not merely a new family of agent benchmarks. Simply adopting previous evaluation paradigms does not suffice. We define evaluation as an autonomous mapping from evidence to judgments, and show that interactive evaluation changes both sides of this mapping: the evidence becomes interaction-generated trajectories, while the evaluation procedure must assess process, recoverability, coordination, robustness, and system-level performance. Building on this definition, we propose a two-axis taxonomy, derive design principles and reporting standards, examine representative scenarios, and analyze how longstanding evaluation challenges reappear at the trajectory level.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将交互式评估视为一种原则性的评估范式，而非仅仅是新的代理基准测试家族。作者重新定义评估为从证据到判断的自主映射，并指出交互式评估改变了这一映射的两端：证据变为交互生成的轨迹，评估过程需关注过程性、可恢复性、协调性、鲁棒性和系统级性能。文章进一步提出双轴分类法、设计原则与报告标准，并分析传统评估挑战在轨迹层面的新表现。
AI.motivation: 当前AI评估正经历结构性变革，但许多评估实践仍沿用以响应为中心的旧范式（如固定输入、孤立输出），而大语言模型越来越多地作为随时间通过工具、环境、用户和其他智能体进行交互的系统部署；现有交互式基准测试呈现碎片化，缺乏统一框架。
AI.method: 作者将评估重新定义为‘从证据到判断的自主映射’，据此分析交互式评估如何改变证据形式（变为交互轨迹）和判断逻辑（需涵盖过程、恢复、协调等维度）；进而提出一个双轴分类法，推导出设计原则与报告标准，并对典型场景及传统评估挑战在轨迹层面的再现进行分析。
AI.result: 建立了交互式评估作为独立评估范式的理论基础；提出了涵盖轨迹建模、评分机制与结果解释的双轴分类法；导出了面向交互系统的具体设计原则与报告标准；揭示了经典评估问题（如偏差、泛化、可复现性）在轨迹层级的新表现形式。
AI.conclusion: 交互式评估不能简单套用传统评估范式，必须发展为具备自身理论基础、方法论规范和实践标准的独立范式；该范式转变对构建可靠、可解释、可扩展的智能系统至关重要。

title: Towards Generalized Image Manipulation Localization via Score-based Model
summary: With the rapid evolution of synthetic media, Image Manipulation Localization (IML) has emerged as a critical component in multimedia forensics for ensuring the integrity of digital content. However, generalization remains a core challenge, as existing discriminative methods typically learn a fixed decision boundary that tends to overfit to specific training artifacts and fails to adapt to unseen manipulation types. To address this, we propose DiffIML, a novel framework that introduces score-based generative modeling to IML. Diverging from the direct estimation of hard boundaries, DiffIML approximates the score function, the gradient of the log-likelihood, to capture the intrinsic geometric topology of mask distributions. This paradigm leverages structural priors to iteratively recover coherent masks from noise, thereby circumventing the brittleness associated with discriminative models. Under this formulation, diffusion models serve as an effective numerical solver for the learned score function.To ensure practicality, we respectively resolve the efficiency and stability bottlenecks of standard diffusion by: (1) utilizing a Lightweight Mask-Specific VAE for fast latent-space process and a decoupled architecture with a lightweight denoising UNet, (2) edge supervision and error prior to mitigate error accumulation during sampling. Extensive experiments of two distinct protocols on eight non-generative and three generative benchmarks demonstrate that DiffIML consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods, yielding remarkable generalization improvements on diverse unseen datasets. The code will be publicly available.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DiffIML框架，利用基于分数的生成建模解决图像篡改定位中的泛化性问题，通过近似分数函数并结合轻量级VAE与去噪UNet提升效率与稳定性，在多个基准上显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有判别式方法学习固定决策边界，易过拟合训练伪影，难以适应未见过的篡改类型，泛化能力差。
AI.method: 提出DiffIML框架，采用基于分数的生成建模，近似对数似然梯度（分数函数）以刻画掩码分布的内在几何结构；引入轻量级掩码专用VAE和解耦轻量去噪UNet提升效率；采用边缘监督与误差先验缓解采样中误差累积。
AI.result: 在八个非生成式和三个生成式基准数据集、两种不同协议下的大量实验表明，DiffIML持续超越现有最优方法，在多种未见数据集上展现出显著的泛化性能提升。
AI.conclusion: DiffIML通过将图像篡改定位建模为分数函数学习与扩散求解问题，有效克服了判别式模型的泛化瓶颈，为多媒体取证提供了更鲁棒、可推广的新范式。

title: FIM-LoRA: Task-Informative Rank Allocation for LoRA via Calibration-Time Gradient-Variance Estimation
summary: Low-rank adaptation (LoRA) assigns a uniform rank to every adapted weight matrix - a practical convenience that ignores a fundamental reality: different layers contribute unequally to task adaptation. We address this with a lightweight engineering solution: before fine-tuning begins, run eight calibration backward passes, compute the gradient variance of each LoRA-B matrix as a proxy for layer informativeness, and redistribute the rank budget proportionally. The resulting adapter is a standard LoRA with a per-layer rank pattern - no new parameters, no training overhead, no changes to serving infrastructure. We implement this via an efficient approximation of the empirical Fisher Information Matrix (eFIM) diagonal, restricted to LoRA adapter matrices only, which reduces memory cost by approximately 256x compared to full-model Fisher estimation. On GLUE with DeBERTa-v3-base, FIM-LoRA matches LoRA (88.6 vs. 88.7) at the same parameter budget, and on commonsense reasoning with LLaMA-3-8B reaches 68.5 vs. 68.7 for LoRA. The per-layer rank maps are interpretable: value projections and early-to-middle layers consistently receive higher rank, consistent with established findings on transformer layer roles.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FIM-LoRA，通过在微调前用8次反向传播估计LoRA-B矩阵的梯度方差（近似eFIM对角线），动态分配各层LoRA秩，实现零开销、零修改的自适应低秩适配。
AI.motivation: 标准LoRA对所有层使用统一秩，忽略了不同层在任务适配中贡献不均的事实，导致参数利用效率不高。
AI.method: 在微调前进行8次校准反向传播，计算每个LoRA-B矩阵的梯度方差作为层信息量代理，并据此按比例重分配总秩预算；采用仅限LoRA适配器的eFIM对角线高效近似，降低内存消耗约256倍。
AI.result: 在DeBERTa-v3-base+GLUE上达到88.6（vs. LoRA 88.7），在LLaMA-3-8B+常识推理上达68.5（vs. LoRA 68.7），性能持平但参数分配更合理；生成的每层秩分布可解释，符合Transformer中value投影和中早期层更重要的已有认知。
AI.conclusion: FIM-LoRA是一种轻量、即插即用的LoRA改进方案，无需新增参数、训练开销或部署改动，即可提升低秩适配的参数效率与可解释性。

title: Remembering More, Risking More: Longitudinal Safety Risks in Memory-Equipped LLM Agents
summary: Safety evaluations of memory-equipped LLM agents typically measure within-task safety: whether an agent completes a single scenario safely, often under adversarial conditions such as prompt injection or memory poisoning. In deployment, however, a single agent serves many independent tasks over a long horizon, and memory accumulated during earlier tasks can affect behavior on later, unrelated ones. Studying this regime requires evaluation along the temporal dimension across tasks: not whether an agent is safe at any single memory state, but how its safety profile changes as memory accumulates across many independent interactions. We call this failure mode temporal memory contamination. To isolate memory exposure from stream non-stationarity, we introduce a trigger-probe protocol that evaluates a fixed probe set against read-only memory snapshots at varying prefix lengths, together with a NullMemory counterfactual baseline for identifying memory-induced violations. We apply this protocol across three deployment scenarios spanning records, memos, forms, and email correspondence and eight memory architectures, and additionally on Claw-like AI agents, such as OpenClaw, using the platform's native memory mechanism. Memory-enabled agents consistently exceed the NullMemory baseline, and memory-induced violation rates show a robust upward trend with exposure length on both agent classes. Order-randomization experiments indicate that the effect is driven primarily by accumulated content rather than encounter order. Finally, a structural consequence of the event decomposition is that memory-induced risk is detectable from retrieval state before generation, which we confirm with a high-recall diagnostic monitor. Our results argue for treating memory safety as a longitudinal property that requires temporal evaluation, not a single-state property that can be captured by a snapshot.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的安全评估范式——‘时序记忆污染’（temporal memory contamination），用于评估具备记忆能力的大语言模型代理在长期、多任务部署中因记忆累积而导致的安全性退化问题；通过触发-探测协议和NullMemory基线，发现记忆确实会随交互长度增加而系统性提升违规率，且该风险可在生成前通过检索状态检测。
AI.motivation: 现有安全评估主要关注单任务、单状态下的安全性（within-task safety），但实际部署中，具备记忆的LLM代理需长期处理大量独立任务，早期任务积累的记忆可能影响后续无关任务的行为，这一跨时间维度的风险未被系统研究。
AI.method: 提出‘触发-probe协议’：对固定探针任务集，在不同长度的记忆前缀快照（read-only）上进行评估，并引入NullMemory反事实基线以分离记忆效应；在三类真实部署场景（记录、备忘录、表单/邮件）及八种记忆架构、Claw类AI代理（如OpenClaw）上开展实验；辅以顺序随机化与检索状态分析验证机制。
AI.result: 所有记忆增强代理均显著超出NullMemory基线；记忆诱发违规率随记忆暴露长度稳健上升；顺序随机化表明效应主因记忆内容累积而非顺序；记忆诱发风险可在生成前从检索状态中高召回率地检测到。
AI.conclusion: 记忆安全性是一种纵向属性（longitudinal property），必须通过时序维度评估，不能简化为单状态快照评估；应将记忆安全纳入长期部署可靠性设计的核心考量。

title: Mind the Gap: Learning Modality-Agnostic Representations with a Cross-Modality UNet
comment: Published in IEEE Transactions on Image Processing. See full abstract in the PDF file
summary: Cross-modality recognition has many important applications in science, law enforcement and entertainment. Popular methods to bridge the modality gap include reducing the distributional differences of representations of different modalities, learning indistinguishable representations or explicit modality transfer. The first two approaches suffer from the loss of discriminant information while removing the modality-specific variations. The third one heavily relies on the successful modality transfer, could face catastrophic performance drop when explicit modality transfers are not possible or difficult. To tackle this problem, we proposed a compact encoder-decoder neural module (cmUNet) to learn modality-agnostic representations while retaining identity-related information. This is achieved through cross-modality transformation and in-modality reconstruction, enhanced by an adversarial/perceptual loss which encourages indistinguishability of representations in the original sample space. For cross-modality matching, we propose MarrNet where cmUNet is connected to a standard feature extraction network which takes as inputs the modality-agnostic representations and outputs similarity scores for matching. We validated our method on five challenging tasks, namely Raman-infrared spectrum matching, cross-modality person re-identification and heterogeneous (photo-sketch, visible-near infrared and visible-thermal) face recognition, where MarrNet showed superior performance compared to state-of-the-art methods. Furthermore, it is observed that a cross-modality matching method could be biased to extract discriminant information from partial or even wrong regions, due to incompetence of dealing with modality gaps, which subsequently leads to poor generalization. We show that robustness to occlusions can be an indicator of whether a method can well bridge the modality gap.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为cmUNet的紧凑型编解码神经模块，结合跨模态变换与同模态重建，并引入对抗/感知损失，以学习模态无关但保留身份信息的表示；进一步构建MarrNet框架用于跨模态匹配，在光谱匹配、行人重识别及多种异质人脸识别任务上显著优于现有方法，并指出抗遮挡鲁棒性可作为衡量模态鸿沟弥合能力的有效指标。
AI.motivation: 现有跨模态识别方法存在三类问题：基于分布对齐或不可区分表示的方法易丢失判别性信息；显式模态迁移方法在难以实现迁移时性能急剧下降。亟需一种既能消除模态差异、又能保留身份关键信息的鲁棒方法。
AI.method: 提出紧凑编码器-解码器模块cmUNet，通过跨模态变换（如红外→拉曼）和同模态重建联合训练，并引入对抗/感知损失约束隐空间表示在原始样本空间中不可区分；构建MarrNet框架，将cmUNet输出作为下游特征提取网络的输入，用于计算跨模态相似度。
AI.result: 在五个跨模态任务（拉曼-红外光谱匹配、跨模态行人重识别、素描-照片、可见光-近红外、可见光-热红外人脸识别）上均超越SOTA；发现模型对遮挡的鲁棒性与其跨模态泛化能力正相关，可作为模态鸿沟弥合效果的评估指标。
AI.conclusion: cmUNet与MarrNet能有效学习模态无关且身份敏感的表示，在多种异构模态匹配任务中具备强泛化性与鲁棒性；抗遮挡能力可作为衡量跨模态方法是否真正桥接模态鸿沟的重要经验指标。

title: Infini-News: Efficiently Queryable Access to 1.3 Billion Processed Common Crawl News Articles
summary: Large-scale news corpora support a wide range of research in Computational Social Science and NLP, yet access remains constrained: commercial archives impose prohibitive costs and licensing restrictions, while open alternatives like Common Crawl's CC-News require terabyte-scale storage and computationally intensive processing. We present Infini-News, a retrieval toolkit and index for the entire CC-News archive from August 2016 to the latest available snapshot. Our contributions are threefold. First, we extract, clean the text, and parse the structured metadata of over 1.35B articles. Second, we enrich the corpus with language detection using three frontier language classifiers (GlotLID, lingua, and CommonLingua), and with multi-source geographic attribution that resolves a country of origin for 83.4% of articles across 222 countries. Third, we construct Infini-gram indexes: suffix-array structures that let researchers search the full archive for arbitrary text patterns in sub-second time. Together, these resources lower the barrier to longitudinal, cross-national media research.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了Infini-News，一个面向CC-News全量新闻档案的检索工具包与索引系统，支持高效文本检索、多语言识别与地理归属标注，显著降低大规模跨国家、长时间新闻研究门槛。
AI.motivation: 现有大规模新闻语料库获取受限：商业档案成本高、授权严；开源资源（如CC-News）则需TB级存储和高算力处理，阻碍研究可及性。
AI.method: 1）清洗并结构化解析2016年8月至今超13.5亿篇CC-News文章；2）集成三类前沿语言检测器（GlotLID、lingua、CommonLingua）进行语言识别，并融合多源地理信息实现83.4%文章的国家级来源标注；3）构建基于后缀数组的Infini-gram索引，支持亚秒级任意文本模式检索。
AI.result: 建成覆盖CC-News全量数据的Infini-News工具包，含清洗文本、多语言标签、222国地理归属及高效检索索引，已支持快速、细粒度、跨时空新闻分析。
AI.conclusion: Infini-News有效解决了新闻大数据获取与使用瓶颈，为计算社会科学与NLP领域提供开放、高效、可扩展的新闻研究基础设施。

title: Cross-modal Affinity-aligned Multimodal Learning Analytics for Predicting Student Collaboration Satisfaction in Game-Based Learning
summary: Collaborative game-based learning environments offer rich opportunities for small-group knowledge construction, yet automatically predicting student collaboration satisfaction remains challenging. A critical barrier is modality degradation: in educational deployments, individual modalities such as eye gaze exhibit inconsistent informativeness across student cohorts, causing implicit attention-based fusion to produce brittle multimodal representations. We propose the Affinity-Aligned Multimodal Learning Analytics (AAMLA) framework, whose core contribution is the Cross-modal Affinity-guided Modality Alignment (CAMA) module, which explicitly models inter-modal relationships via affinity matrices and enforces cross-modal consistency through contrastive learning, enabling adaptive suppression of uninformative modalities without discarding them.
