EBMol is the first EBM for 3D molecular generation to achieve state-of-the-art performance on QM9 and GEOM-Drugs. Moreover, we show that the learned energy landscape serves as a principled quality metric for ranking and filtering configurations, and demonstrate controllable generation without retraining through shape-steered sampling via potential composition and zero-shot linker design.

AI.tldr: EBMol是一种新型能量基模型（EBM），通过学习原子可加性标量势来恢复物理驱动的能量景观先验，结合流匹配式目标与Mirror-Langevin采样，在3D分子生成中达到SOTA性能，并支持可控生成与质量评估。
AI.motivation: 传统扩散/流匹配模型虽训练便捷但丢失了分子系统固有的能量（Boltzmann）先验；而直接学习能量景观又面临难训练、难采样的问题。本文旨在恢复能量归纳偏置，同时保持可学习性和可采样性。
AI.method: 提出EBMol：1）学习原子加性的标量势作为能量函数；2）采用流启发的Restoring Field Matching目标进行训练；3）使用Mirror-Langevin算法统一更新原子位置与类型；4）引入并行退火提升推理效率。
AI.result: 在QM9和GEOM-Drugs数据集上达到3D分子生成SOTA；所学能量景观可作为无监督构型质量度量；支持形状引导采样与零样本连接体设计等可控生成任务。
AI.conclusion: EBMol首次成功将严格能量基建模引入高效、可控的3D分子生成框架，在保持物理一致性的同时实现高性能与多功能性，为AI for Science中的分子建模提供了新范式。

title: TabH2O: A Unified Foundation Model for Tabular Prediction
summary: We present TabH2O, a foundation model for tabular data that performs classification and regression in a single forward pass via in-context learning. TabH2O builds on the TabICL architecture with several key modifications: (1) unified training, a single model handles both classification and regression via a dual-head architecture, eliminating the need for separate models and reducing total pretraining cost; (2) single-stage pretraining, training stability improvements (bounded scalable softmax, inter-stage normalization, learnable residual scaling, logit soft-capping) eliminate the need for multi-stage curriculum learning, enabling training with full-length sequences from the start; and (3) noise-aware pretraining, synthetic datasets include explicit noise dimensions to teach the model robustness to irrelevant features. We evaluate TabH2O v1 (29.2M parameters) on the TALENT benchmark (300 datasets), where it achieves an average rank of 2.55 out of 6 evaluated methods, outperforming tuned CatBoost (4.07), H2O AutoML (4.18), and LightGBM (5.08), competitive with TabPFN v2.6 (2.74), and behind TabICL v2 (2.12), while placing in the top-3 on 81% of the testing datasets across classification and regression tasks.

AI.tldr: TabH2O是一种面向表格数据的基础模型，通过上下文学习在单次前向传播中统一处理分类与回归任务，具备统一训练、单阶段预训练和噪声感知预训练三大改进，在TALENT基准测试中表现优异。
AI.motivation: 解决现有表格数据模型需为分类与回归分别训练、多阶段课程学习复杂、对噪声特征鲁棒性不足等问题，提升模型通用性、训练效率与泛化能力。
AI.method: 基于TabICL架构，引入三方面改进：(1) 双头统一训练架构，支持分类与回归共用一个模型；(2) 单阶段预训练，采用有界可扩展softmax、跨阶段归一化、可学习残差缩放和logit软截断提升训练稳定性；(3) 噪声感知预训练，在合成数据中显式加入噪声维度以增强抗干扰能力。
AI.result: TabH2O v1（29.2M参数）在TALENT基准（300个数据集）上平均排名2.55/6，优于CatBoost、H2O AutoML和LightGBM，略逊于TabICL v2，与TabPFN v2.6相当，并在81%的测试数据集上进入前三。
AI.conclusion: TabH2O验证了单一轻量级基础模型统一处理多种表格任务的可行性，其设计显著降低了训练成本并提升了鲁棒性与实用性，为表格数据基础模型发展提供了新范式。

title: Collision-Resistant Single-Pass Method for Unsupervised Fine-Grained Image Hashing
summary: Unsupervised fine-grained image hashing aims to learn compact binary codes that preserve subtle visual differences among highly similar instances without manual annotations. However, most existing methods neglect collision resistance, leading to identical hash codes for slightly semantically different samples. In this paper, we propose Collision-Resistant Single-Pass Self-Supervised Semantic Hashing (CS3H), a collision-resistant framework that directly optimizes Hamming-space similarity via a single-pass normalized Hamming distance loss to produce well-separated binary representations. We further introduce a collision-sensitive attention module to emphasize rare and discriminative local patterns, reducing hash collisions and improving fine-grained discrimination. Experiments on multiple benchmarks show that CS3H consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods in retrieval accuracy while achieving superior collision resistance with minimal computational overhead.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无监督细粒度图像哈希方法CS3H，通过单次归一化汉明距离损失和碰撞敏感注意力模块，提升哈希码的区分性与抗碰撞能力，在多个基准上超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督细粒度图像哈希方法忽视抗碰撞性，导致语义略有差异的样本生成相同哈希码。
AI.method: 提出CS3H框架：1）单次传递的归一化汉明距离损失直接优化汉明空间相似性；2）引入碰撞敏感注意力模块，增强稀有判别性局部模式的表达。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上，CS3H在检索精度和抗碰撞性能上均优于当前最优方法，且计算开销极小。
AI.conclusion: CS3H有效解决了无监督细粒度哈希中的碰撞问题，实现了高区分性、强抗碰撞、低开销的紧凑二进制编码学习。

title: Graph Hierarchical Recurrence for Long-Range Generalization
summary: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) and Graph Transformers (GTs) are now a fundamental paradigm for graph learning, combining the representation-learning capabilities of deep models with the sample efficiency induced by their inductive biases. Despite their effectiveness, a large body of work has shown that these models still face fundamental limitations in tasks that require capturing correlations between distant regions of a graph. To address this issue, we introduce Graph Hierarchical Recurrence (GHR), a novel framework that operates jointly on the input graph and on a hierarchical abstraction obtained through pooling. We also show that the limitations of existing models are even more pronounced in out-of-range generalization, where test instances involve interactions over distances longer than those observed during training. By contrast, despite its simple design, GHR provides three key advantages: strong performance on long-range dependencies, improved out-of-range generalization, and high parameter efficiency. To corroborate these claims, we show that across a broad set of long-range benchmarks, GHR consistently outperforms existing graph models while using as little as 1% of the parameters of current state-of-the-art models. These results suggest a complementary direction to the current trend of scaling architectures to obtain graph foundation models, indicating that increased model capacity alone may not be sufficient for generalization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Graph Hierarchical Recurrence (GHR)框架，通过联合建模原始图与层次化池化抽象，有效解决GNNs和GTs在长程依赖建模和域外泛化上的根本局限，以极低参数量（仅1%）实现性能超越现有SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有GNNs和GTs在建模图中远距离节点间相关性方面存在根本局限，尤其在测试距离超出训练距离的“out-of-range generalization”任务中表现更差。
AI.method: 提出Graph Hierarchical Recurrence (GHR)，一种在输入图及其通过池化获得的层次化抽象上联合操作的新框架。
AI.result: 在多个长程基准测试中，GHR持续超越现有图模型，且参数量仅为当前SOTA模型的1%；显著提升长程依赖建模能力、out-of-range泛化能力和参数效率。
AI.conclusion: 增大模型容量并非图泛化的充分条件；GHR表明引入结构归纳偏置（如层次递归）是构建高效图基础模型的一条互补且重要路径。

title: Wasserstein Equilibrium Decoding for Reliable Medical Visual Question Answering
summary: Small vision-language models (2-8B) are well-suited for clin- ical deployment due to privacy constraints, limited connectivity, and low-latency requirements favouring on-device or on-premise inference. However, their limited capacity exacerbates the generation of plausible but incorrect outputs. We extend game-theoretic decoding, previously restricted to text-only, closed-ended NLP tasks, to vision-language mod- els for open-ended Medical VQA. We introduce a semantically aware Wasserstein stopping criterion that replaces lexical order matching, en- abling convergence based on semantic consensus among near-synonymous candidate answers and avoiding unnecessary iterations caused by clini- cally equivalent ranking swaps. On VQA-RAD and PathVQA, we ob- tain consistent, statistically significant improvements over greedy and discriminative baselines. On VQA-RAD, we improve Qwen3-VL-2B by +3.5 percentage points (p < 0.01), surpassing the greedy 4B model, with similar trends at larger scales. On PathVQA, Gemma-3-4B with BDG matches MedGemma-4B under greedy decoding despite no domain- specific fine-tuning. At accuracy parity with classic BDG, the Wasser- stein criterion reduces average convergence iterations by approximately 20%, improving inference efficiency while preserving the game-theoretic equilibrium behaviour. Code is available at https://github.com/luca-hagen/ Wasserstein-BDG-medical-VQA.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向医疗视觉问答（VQA）任务的语义感知Wasserstein停止准则，将博弈论解码（BDG）扩展至小规模视觉语言模型（2-8B），显著提升准确率并减少迭代次数，兼顾临床部署所需的隐私性、低延迟与可靠性。
AI.motivation: 小规模视觉语言模型（2-8B）适合临床部署（因隐私、连通性与低延迟要求），但易生成看似合理实则错误的答案；现有博弈论解码仅适用于文本闭合任务，亟需适配开放医疗VQA场景。
AI.method: 将博弈论解码（BDG）扩展至视觉语言模型，引入基于Wasserstein距离的语义感知停止准则，替代原有基于词序匹配的收敛判断，使模型在近义候选答案间达成语义共识后即停止迭代。
AI.result: 在VQA-RAD和PathVQA数据集上，显著超越贪婪与判别式基线：Qwen3-VL-2B提升+3.5个百分点（p<0.01），性能超越贪婪4B模型；Gemma-3-4B+BDG在无领域微调下媲美MedGemma-4B；Wasserstein准则使平均迭代次数降低约20%，保持博弈均衡同时提升推理效率。
AI.conclusion: 语义感知的Wasserstein停止准则有效缓解小视觉语言模型在医疗VQA中的幻觉问题，在不牺牲准确率前提下提升推理效率与临床适用性，为边缘/本地部署提供新范式。

title: Spherical Harmonic Optimal Transport: Application to Climate Models Comparisons
summary: Optimal transport provides a powerful framework for comparing measures while respecting the geometry of their support, but comes with an expensive computational cost, hindering its potential application to real world use cases. On manifolds, convolutional algorithms based on the heat kernel have been proposed to alleviate this cost, but their theoretical properties remain largely unexplored. We establish that the heat kernel cost converges to the optimal transport cost as time vanishes in the balanced and unbalanced cases. In the specific case of the 2-sphere $\mathbb{S}^2$, we ensure that the associated Sinkhorn divergences retains the desirable geometric and analytic properties of classical optimal transport discrepancies. Moreover, we leverage the harmonic structure of the sphere to derive a fast Sinkhorn algorithm, requiring only $\mathcal{O}(n)$ memory and $\mathcal{O}(n^{3/2})$ time per iteration, with fully dense GPU-friendly operations. We validate its computational efficiency on synthetic data, and discuss its potential use in the evaluation of global climate models, providing both spatial and seasonal insights into models performances.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于球面上热核的高效最优传输近似方法，证明了其在时间趋近于零时收敛到真实最优传输代价，并设计了适用于球面调和分析的快速Sinkhorn算法，显著降低了计算复杂度，适用于气候模型评估等实际应用。
AI.motivation: 最优传输计算成本高，尤其在流形上应用受限；现有基于热核的卷积算法缺乏理论保障。
AI.method: 利用球面热核构造传输代价，证明其在时间趋于零时收敛到最优传输代价；针对2-球面S²，结合球谐分析设计低内存、低时间复杂度的Sinkhorn算法。
AI.result: 理论证明了热核代价在平衡与非平衡情形下均收敛于最优传输代价；S²上的Sinkhorn散度保持经典OT距离的几何与分析性质；算法达到O(n)内存与O(n^{3/2})每轮时间复杂度，支持GPU密集运算；在合成数据与气候模型评估中验证了效率与实用性。
AI.conclusion: 热核驱动的最优传输近似在球面上兼具理论严谨性与计算高效性，为地球科学等需球面测度比较的领域提供了实用新工具。

title: Generative Adversarial Learning from Deterministic Processes
summary:
Physical AI is being successfully applied to data which does not follow the traditional paradigm of independent and identically distributed (i.i.d.) samples. In fact, physical AI is often trained on data which is not random at all, and is instead derived from chaotic dynamical systems like turbulence.
  We aim to explain the empirical success of these methods using the example of generative adversarial networks (GANs), whose statistical learning theory under the i.i.d. assumption is generally well understood. We prove that it is possible, using an infinite-dimensional model of generative adversarial learning (GAL), to learn the invariant distribution of a sufficiently chaotic dynamical system from a single deterministically evolving time series of its states or measurements thereof, and give explicit rates for the convergence to the solution in terms of the Jensen-Shannon divergence.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了物理人工智能（Physical AI）在非独立同分布（i.i.d.）数据（如混沌动力系统产生的时序数据）上的成功应用，以生成对抗网络（GAN）为例，提出了一种无限维的生成对抗学习（GAL）模型，理论上证明其可从单一确定性演化的时间序列中学习混沌系统的不变分布，并给出了Jensen-Shannon散度意义下的收敛速率。
AI.motivation: 解释物理AI在非i.i.d.、特别是混沌动力系统数据上经验成功的理论基础。
AI.method: 构建无限维生成对抗学习（GAL）模型，理论分析其在单条确定性时间序列上学习混沌系统不变分布的能力，并推导Jensen-Shannon散度下的收敛速率。
AI.result: 证明了GAL能从单一混沌时间序列中学习不变分布，并给出显式收敛速率。
AI.conclusion: 物理AI（如GAN）的成功不仅限于i.i.d.假设，在混沌系统等非随机数据上亦有坚实的统计学习理论支撑。

title: CineMatte: Background Matting for Virtual Production and Beyond
summary: LED Virtual Production (VP) uses large LED volumes to render backgrounds in real time, enabling in-camera visual effects but making post-shot changes labor-intensive. We address this with CineMatte, a robust background matting framework for VP and beyond. CineMatte employs a cross-attention-conditioned design. Instead of concatenating the background with the input, CineMatte employs a Siamese, frozen DINOv3 Vision Transformer with shared weights to encode the input frame and the captured background separately. A cross-attention module compares the two streams to predict the foreground, preserving pretrained semantics and improving robustness to background shifts. Previous ViT-based matting models use a parallel convolutional "detail branch" to recover fine details, which can cause boundary artifacts in real-world samples due to semantic misalignment with the backbone. We instead replace it with a pretrained, image-guided feature upsampler, which largely mitigates the problem. We also introduce CineMatte-4K, a 4K HDR image-video dataset captured on a professional LED VP stage. To the best of our knowledge, the image subset is the first dataset for VP matting and is non-synthetic, obtained via green-screen insertion; the video subset includes camera motion with tracked trajectories so that arbitrary backgrounds can be rendered later with correct parallax. Across CineMatte-4K and public benchmarks (VideoMatte240K, YouTubeMatte), CineMatte not only excels in VP but also generalizes robustly to real-world footage.

AI.tldr: CineMatte是一种用于LED虚拟制片（VP）的鲁棒背景抠像框架，采用基于交叉注意力的Siamese DINOv3编码器设计，并引入图像引导的特征上采样器替代传统细节分支，同时发布首个真实4K HDR VP抠像数据集CineMatte-4K。
AI.motivation: LED虚拟制片中实时渲染背景虽提升拍摄效率，但后期修改困难；现有ViT抠像模型在真实场景中易因语义错位产生边界伪影，且缺乏高质量真实VP抠像数据集。
AI.method: 提出CineMatte框架：1）采用共享权重的冻结DINOv3 ViT双流编码输入帧与背景；2）通过交叉注意力模块融合两路特征以预测前景；3）用预训练图像引导特征上采样器替代易出错的并行卷积细节分支；4）构建真实CineMatte-4K数据集（含绿幕合成图像子集与带相机轨迹的HDR视频子集）。
AI.result: 在CineMatte-4K、VideoMatte240K和YouTubeMatte等基准上，CineMatte在VP场景及通用真实世界抠像任务中均达到SOTA性能，显著缓解边界伪影，具备强泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: CineMatte通过语义对齐的交叉注意力架构与真实数据驱动，有效解决了LED虚拟制片中背景抠像的鲁棒性与细节保真难题，为VP后期制作提供了实用新范式。

title: Text2CAD-Bench: A Benchmark for LLM-based Text-to-Parametric CAD Generation
summary: Text-to-CAD generation aims to create parametric CAD models from natural language, enabling rapid prototyping and intuitive design workflows. However, existing benchmarks focus on basic primitives and simple sketch-extrude sequences, lacking advanced features essential for real-world applications and covering only traditional mechanical parts. We introduce Text2CAD-Bench, the first benchmark systematically evaluating text-to-CAD across geometric complexity and application diversity. Our benchmark comprises 600 human-curated examples spanning four levels: L1-L2 cover fundamental geometry with standard features, L3 introduces complex topology and freeform surfaces, and L4 extends to real-world domains beyond mechanical parts. Each example pairs dual-style prompts -- geometric descriptions mimicking non-expert users, and procedural sequences aligned with expert-level conventions. Evaluating mainstream general LLMs and domain-specific models, we find that current models perform reasonably on basic geometry but degrade substantially on complex topology and advanced features. We release our benchmark to drive progress in text-to-CAD research.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了首个系统评估文本到CAD生成能力的基准测试Text2CAD-Bench，涵盖几何复杂性和应用多样性，并揭示了当前模型在处理复杂拓扑和高级特征时的性能瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到CAD基准仅关注基础几何体和简单草图-拉伸序列，缺乏对真实应用场景所需高级功能的支持，且覆盖领域狭窄。
AI.method: 构建包含600个人工标注样本的Text2CAD-Bench基准，按L1-L4四个层级划分几何复杂度与应用广度；每例配以非专家风格（几何描述）与专家风格（程序化指令）双提示；评估主流通用大模型与领域专用模型。
AI.result: 当前模型在基础几何任务上表现尚可，但在复杂拓扑、自由曲面及跨领域（如非机械类）任务上性能显著下降。
AI.conclusion: Text2CAD-Bench为推动文本到CAD研究提供了标准化、多维度的评估平台，凸显了提升模型对高级CAD语义理解能力的必要性。

title: Lost in the Folds: When Cross-Validation Is Not a Deep Ensemble for Uncertainty Estimation
summary: Ensemble disagreement is widely used as a proxy for epistemic uncertainty in medical image segmentation. In practice, many studies form ensembles via K-fold cross-validation (CV), yet refer to them as ``deep ensembles'' (DE). Because CV members are trained on different data subsets, their disagreement mixes seed-driven variability with data-exposure effects, which can change how uncertainty should be interpreted. We audit recent segmentation uncertainty studies and find that terminology--implementation mismatches are common. We then compare a standard 5-fold CV ensemble to a 5-member DE (fixed training set, different random seeds) under otherwise identical configurations on three multi-rater segmentation datasets spanning three modalities. We evaluate uncertainty for calibration, failure detection, ambiguity modeling, and robustness under distribution shift. DE match segmentation accuracy while improving calibration and failure detection, whereas CV ensembles sometimes correlate more strongly with inter-rater variability on the studied datasets. Thus, ensemble construction should be chosen to match the research question: DE for reliability-oriented use (e.g., selective referral/failure detection) and CV ensembles as a proxy for ambiguity. We provide a lightweight nnU-Net modification enabling DE training within the default pipeline.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在医学图像分割中使用集成方法评估不确定性时，交叉验证（CV）集成与深度集成（DE）的区别与适用场景，并指出术语与实现不匹配的问题；通过实验比较发现DE更适用于可靠性导向任务（如失败检测），而CV集成更适合建模标注歧义；最后提供了一个轻量级nnU-Net修改方案以支持DE训练。
AI.motivation: 现有研究常将K折交叉验证形成的集成误称为“深度集成”，但二者因训练数据不同导致不确定性解释存在本质差异，易造成方法误用和结果误读。
AI.method: 对近期医学图像分割不确定性研究进行术语-实现一致性审计；在三个多标注者、多模态数据集上，对比5折CV集成与5成员深度集成（相同训练集、不同随机种子）在不确定性校准、失败检测、歧义建模及分布偏移鲁棒性方面的表现；提出并实现一个兼容nnU-Net默认流程的轻量级DE训练修改。
AI.result: 深度集成在保持分割精度的同时，显著提升不确定性校准性和失败检测能力；而CV集成在部分数据集上与评审者间变异度（inter-rater variability）相关性更强，更适合作为歧义代理；术语与实现错配现象普遍。
AI.conclusion: 集成构建方式应由研究目标决定：可靠性导向任务（如选择性转诊）宜用深度集成，歧义建模任务宜用交叉验证集成；需规范术语使用，并提供可行工具支持正确方法落地。

title: Heterogeneous Tasks Offloading in Vehicular Edge Computing: A Federated Meta Deep Reinforcement Learning Approach
summary:
Vehicular edge computing (VEC) enables latency-sensitive vehicular applications by offloading computation-intensive tasks to nearby edge servers. However, real-world vehicular workloads are typically modeled as heterogeneous directed acyclic graph (DAG) tasks with complex dependency structures, making joint offloading and resource allocation highly challenging. Moreover, distributed MEC deployment raises privacy concerns when collaboratively training learning-based policies.
  In this paper, we propose a Federated Meta Deep Reinforcement Learning framework with GAT-Seq2Seq modeling (FedMAGS) for heterogeneous task offloading in VEC systems. The proposed approach leverages Graph Attention Networks to capture DAG dependencies, a Seq2Seq-based policy to generate structured offloading decisions, and federated meta-learning to enable fast adaptation across distributed MEC servers without sharing raw data.
  Extensive simulations demonstrate that FedMAGS achieves faster convergence, lower execution delay, and better scalability compared with state-of-the-art baselines. In addition, the federated design preserves data privacy while reducing communication overhead, making the framework well suited for dynamic and large-scale VEC environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FedMAGS框架，结合图注意力网络（GAT）、序列到序列（Seq2Seq）策略与联邦元强化学习，解决车联边缘计算中异构DAG任务的联合卸载与资源分配问题，在保障隐私的同时实现快速收敛、低延迟和高可扩展性。
AI.motivation: 现实车载工作负载多为具有复杂依赖结构的异构有向无环图（DAG）任务，导致联合卸载与资源分配困难；同时分布式MEC部署带来基于学习策略协同训练时的数据隐私问题。
AI.method: 提出联邦元深度强化学习框架FedMAGS：利用图注意力网络（GAT）建模DAG任务依赖关系，采用Seq2Seq结构生成结构化卸载决策，并通过联邦元学习实现在不共享原始数据前提下的跨边缘服务器快速策略适配。
AI.result: 仿真表明FedMAGS相比现有方法具有更快收敛速度、更低执行延迟和更好可扩展性；联邦设计兼顾数据隐私保护与通信开销降低。
AI.conclusion: FedMAGS为动态、大规模车联边缘计算环境提供了一种隐私安全、高效且可扩展的异构任务卸载解决方案。

title: Modelling Customer Trajectories with Reinforcement Learning for Practical Retail Insights
comment: Proceeding of the 25th International Conference on Autonomous Agents and Multiagent Systems (AAMAS 2026)
summary: Understanding customer movement within retail spaces is essential for optimizing store layouts. Real-world trajectory data can provide highly accurate insights, but collecting it is costly and often infeasible for many retailers. Heuristics such as Travelling Salesman Problem (TSP) and Probabilistic Nearest Neighbours (PNN) are commonly used as inexpensive approximations, but actual customer trajectories deviate by an average of 28% from shortest paths, highlighting a tradeoff between accuracy and practicality. We propose an agent-based modelling framework that casts customer trajectory prediction as a maximum entropy reinforcement learning (RL) problem, balancing reward maximization with stochasticity to better reflect customers with bounded rationality. Using real-world trajectory data from a convenience store, we show that RL-generated trajectories align more closely with customer behaviour than TSP and PNN, providing more accurate estimates of impulse purchase rates and shelf traffic densities. Furthermore, only RL-based predictions yield repositioning decisions for impulse products that align with those derived from actual trajectory data, resulting in comparable estimated profit gains. Our work demonstrates that RL provides a practical, behaviourally grounded alternative that bridges the gap between oversimplified heuristics and data-intensive approaches, making accurate layout optimization more accessible. To encourage further research, the source code is available on GitHub.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于最大熵强化学习的智能体建模框架，用于更准确地预测顾客在零售店内的移动轨迹，相比传统启发式方法（如TSP、PNN）显著提升行为拟合度与布局优化效果。
AI.motivation: 真实顾客轨迹数据虽准确但采集成本高；现有启发式方法（如TSP、PNN）成本低但平均偏差达28%，亟需兼顾准确性与实用性的新方法。
AI.method: 将顾客轨迹预测建模为最大熵强化学习问题，引入有界理性的随机性，构建基于真实便利店轨迹数据的智能体仿真框架。
AI.result: RL生成轨迹比TSP和PNN更贴近真实行为，能更准确估计冲动购买率与货架流量密度；仅RL预测支持与真实数据一致的冲动商品重定位决策，并带来相当的利润提升。
AI.conclusion: 最大熵RL提供了一种行为合理、实用可行的新范式，弥合了简单启发式与数据密集型方法之间的鸿沟，使精准布局优化更易普及。

title: Focused Forcing: Content-Aware Per-Frame KV Selection for Efficient Autoregressive Video Diffusion
summary: Recent advances in autoregressive video diffusion have enabled sequential and streaming video generation. However, long-horizon generation requires increasingly large KV caches, making efficient compression without sacrificing quality challenging. Existing methods mostly select historical frames based on attention scores, but their context decisions remain coarse. When multiple frames are generated in the same chunk, these methods often apply a shared history selection to the whole chunk, score historical frames solely by attention, and assign head-wise budgets either uniformly or by attention-pattern heuristics rather than explicit head-importance estimation. We show that frames within the same generated chunk can depend on distinct historical frames, that the same historical frame can receive different attention scores as its relative temporal distance to the current frames changes, and that masking different heads induces unequal generation degradation. Motivated by these findings, we propose \textbf{Focused Forcing}, a training-free KV selection method that focuses cached history along both generated-frame and head dimensions. For each generated frame, Focused Forcing preserves the most relevant and distinctive historical frames by combining attention scores with diversity scores of historical frames, while assigning larger budgets to heads with higher estimated importance. Across multiple autoregressive generation paradigms, Focused Forcing achieves up to $\textbf{1.48}\times$ end-to-end acceleration without training, while \textbf{improving visual quality and text alignment}. \textit{Our code will be released on GitHub.}

AI.tldr: 本文提出Focused Forcing方法，一种无需训练的KV缓存选择策略，通过在生成帧和注意力头两个维度上精细化筛选历史帧，兼顾相关性与多样性，并动态分配各头预算，在提升视频生成质量与文本对齐的同时实现最高1.48倍端到端加速。
AI.motivation: 现有基于注意力分数的历史帧选择方法过于粗糙：同一chunk内共享选择、仅依赖注意力打分、未进行显式头重要性估计，导致长时序视频生成中KV缓存效率低且质量受损。
AI.method: Focused Forcing是一种训练无关的KV缓存选择方法，对每个生成帧联合使用注意力分数与历史帧多样性分数来选取最相关且具区分度的帧；同时基于各注意力头对生成质量的影响差异，显式估计并分配不同预算。
AI.result: 在多种自回归视频生成范式中，Focused Forcing在不训练的前提下实现最高1.48倍端到端加速，并同步提升视觉质量与文本-视频对齐效果。
AI.conclusion: 精细化、多维（帧级+头级）的KV缓存选择策略可显著提升长时序自回归视频生成的效率与质量，Focused Forcing为无需微调的高效推理提供了新范式。

title: Scheduling That Speaks: An Interpretable Programmatic Reinforcement Learning Framework
summary: Deep reinforcement learning (DRL) has recently emerged as a promising approach to solve combinatorial optimization problems such as job shop scheduling. However, the policies learned by DRL are typically represented by deep neural networks (DNNs), whose opaque neural architectures and non-interpretable policy decisions can lead to critical trust and usability concerns for human decision makers. In addition, the computational requirements of DNNs can further hinder practical deployment in resource constrained environments. In this work, we propose ProRL, a novel interpretable programmatic reinforcement learning framework that achieves high-performance scheduling with human-readable and editable programmatic policies (i.e., programs). We first introduce a domain-specific language for scheduling (DSL-S) to represent scheduling strategies as structured programs. ProRL then explores the program space defined by DSL-S using local search to identify incomplete programs, which are subsequently completed by learning their parameters via Bayesian optimization. ProRL learns which scheduling heuristic rules to select, and hence, it naturally incorporates existing heuristics already used in industrial scenarios. Experiments on widely used benchmark instances demonstrate the strong performance of ProRL against existing heuristics and DRL baselines. Furthermore, ProRL performs well under strongly constrained computational resources, such as training with only 100 episodes. Our code is available at https://github.com/HcPlu/ProRL.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ProRL框架，一种可解释的程序化强化学习方法，用于解决作业车间调度等组合优化问题，通过领域特定语言DSL-S生成人类可读、可编辑的程序化策略，并结合局部搜索与贝叶斯优化高效学习调度规则，在性能、可解释性与资源受限场景下均表现优异。
AI.motivation: 深度强化学习（DRL）在组合优化中虽有潜力，但其黑箱特性、不可解释性及高计算开销阻碍了实际工业部署和人类决策者信任。
AI.method: 提出ProRL框架：定义调度领域特定语言（DSL-S）以结构化表达调度策略；用局部搜索探索DSL-S程序空间，识别不完整程序；再通过贝叶斯优化学习其参数；自然融合已有启发式规则。
AI.result: 在标准基准实例上，ProRL显著优于传统启发式方法和DRL基线；即使仅用100训练回合（极低样本），仍保持高性能；且适用于计算资源受限环境。
AI.conclusion: ProRL实现了高性能、高可解释性与低资源消耗的统一，为工业调度提供了一种可信、实用、可编辑的AI决策范式。

title: Optimising CSRNet with parameter-free attention mechanisms for crowd counting in public transport
summary: Occupancy estimation and crowd counting are critical tasks in designing smart and efficient public transport vehicles. Given that public transport loading can vary from sparse to crowded, classical models for occupancy estimation must be adapted to suit this purpose. Attention mechanisms have shown remarkable capability in enhancing the representational power of deep neural networks for crowd counting in congested scenes with occlusion, complex backgrounds, and perspective distortion. However, conventional approaches, often implemented as parameterized sub-networks within convolutional layers, inevitably increase model size and computational cost, limiting deployment on resource-constrained edge devices. This paper investigates the effectiveness of state-of-the-art parameter-free attention mechanisms for crowd counting and density map estimation in highly congested scenes. We evaluate channel-wise (PFCA), spatial-wise (SA), and 3-D (SimAM) modules and compare their performance with parameterized attention modules constrained to introduce no more than 1% additional parameters. Furthermore, we present a novel combination of attention mechanisms that combines the strengths of PFCA and SA (PFCASA) customized for analyzing video streams onboard public transport systems. Using CSRNet as the backbone, experiments on the ShanghaiTech dataset demonstrate that parameter-free attention mechanisms achieve comparable or superior accuracy without introducing additional model parameters. A detailed performance analysis further reveals that PFCASA outperforms other attention modules in scenes with fewer than 40 individuals, while PFCA shows greater effectiveness as crowd density increases, underscoring their potential applicability for integration into smart public transport modalities.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了无参数注意力机制在拥挤场景下人群计数和密度图估计中的有效性，提出了结合PFCA和SA的新型注意力模块PFCASA，并在ShanghaiTech数据集上验证了其在智能公共交通系统中的适用性。
AI.motivation: 传统基于参数化子网络的注意力机制会增加模型大小和计算成本，难以部署在资源受限的边缘设备上；而公共交通载客量变化大，需要适应稀疏到拥挤各种场景的占用率估计与人群计数方法。
AI.method: 评估了三种无参数注意力机制（PFCA、SA、SimAM），并与参数受限（≤1%新增参数）的参数化注意力模块对比；提出融合PFCA与SA的新型模块PFCASA，适配车载视频流分析；以CSRNet为骨干网络进行实验。
AI.result: 在ShanghaiTech数据集上，无参数注意力机制达到与参数化方法相当甚至更优的精度，且不引入额外参数；PFCASA在人数少于40的场景中表现最佳，PFCA在高密度场景中更有效。
AI.conclusion: 无参数注意力机制是适用于边缘设备的高效方案，PFCASA与PFCA各有优势，可依据实际客流密度选择或组合使用，具有在智能公共交通系统中落地应用的潜力。

title: Adaptive Experimentation for Censored Survival Outcomes
summary: Adaptive experimentation enables efficient estimation of causal effects, but existing methods are not designed for survival data with censoring, where event times are only partially observed (e.g., overall survival in cancer trials but with dropout). In this paper, we develop a novel framework for adaptive experimentation to estimate causal effects under right censoring. For this, we derive the semiparametric efficiency bound for the average survival effect curve as a function of the treatment allocation policy and thereby obtain a closed-form efficiency-optimal allocation policy. The policy generalizes classical Neyman allocation to survival settings by prioritizing patient strata where both event and censoring dynamics induce high uncertainty. Building on this, we propose the Adaptive Survival Estimator (ASE), an adaptive framework that learns the allocation policy and estimates the average survival effect curve sequentially. Our framework has three main benefits: (i) it accommodates arbitrary machine learning models for nuisance estimation; (ii) it is guided by a closed-form efficiency-optimal allocation policy; and (iii) it admits strong theoretical guarantees, including asymptotic normality via a martingale central limit theorem. We demonstrate our framework across various numerical experiments to show consistent efficiency gains over uniform randomization and censoring-agnostic baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于带右删失生存数据的自适应实验新框架，推导了平均生存效应曲线的半参数有效界，并据此设计了效率最优的治疗分配策略，进而提出了自适应生存估计器（ASE），具备模型灵活性、理论保证和实际效率提升。
AI.motivation: 现有自适应实验方法未针对存在删失的生存数据（如癌症临床试验中因脱落导致的事件时间部分观测）进行设计，亟需能处理删失的高效因果效应估计方法。
AI.method: 推导平均生存效应曲线关于治疗分配策略的半参数效率界，得到闭式效率最优分配策略；在此基础上构建自适应生存估计器（ASE），支持任意机器学习模型估计辅助参数，并利用鞅中心极限定理建立理论保证。
AI.result: ASE在数值实验中一致优于均匀随机化及忽略删失的基线方法，展现出显著效率增益；同时具备渐近正态性等强理论性质。
AI.conclusion: 本文建立了首个面向右删失生存数据的自适应实验理论与方法框架，其效率最优策略推广了经典Neyman分配，为临床试验等场景提供了更稳健、高效的因果推断工具。

title: RAVE: Re-Allocating Visual Attention in Large Multimodal Models
summary: Large multimodal models (LMMs) inherit the self-attention mechanism of pretrained language backbones, yet standard attention can exhibit suboptimal allocation, including cross-modal misallocation between textual and visual evidence and intra-visual imbalance among visual tokens. We propose RAVE (Re-Allocating Visual Attention), a lightweight pair-gating mechanism that adds a learned query--key bias to pre-softmax attention scores over visual keys, derived from pre-RoPE query and key features. RAVE requires no architectural modification to the backbone and can be trained end-to-end with the rest of the model. Across a suite of multimodal benchmarks, RAVE improves over standard attention by an average of 3 points, with the largest gains on perception-intensive tasks -- including multilingual OCR, chart understanding, document VQA, and scene text VQA -- where accurate visual grounding is critical.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RAVE（Re-Allocating Visual Attention），一种轻量级的成对门控机制，用于优化大多模态模型中视觉注意力的分配，无需修改骨干网络架构，显著提升感知密集型多模态任务性能。
AI.motivation: 标准自注意力机制在多模态模型中存在跨模态错配（文本与视觉证据间）和视觉内部token注意力不平衡问题。
AI.method: RAVE通过在视觉key的预softmax注意力分数上添加由预RoPE查询和键特征导出的学习型查询-键偏置，实现视觉注意力重分配；该机制轻量、无需修改骨干结构，支持端到端训练。
AI.result: 在多个多模态基准测试中，RAVE平均提升3个点，尤其在多语言OCR、图表理解、文档VQA和场景文本VQA等感知密集型任务上增益最大。
AI.conclusion: RAVE是一种高效、即插即用的注意力优化方法，能显著增强LMMs在需精确视觉定位任务中的表现，且不增加模型结构复杂度。

title: GAMMA: Global Bit Allocation for Mixed-Precision Models under Arbitrary Budgets
summary: Mixed-precision quantization improves the budget--accuracy trade-off for large language models (LLMs) by allocating more bits to sensitive modules. However, automating this allocation at LLM scale faces a unique combination of constraints: learnable approaches require quantization-aware training, which is infeasible for billion-parameter models; training-free alternatives rely on static proxy metrics that miss cross-module interactions and must be recomputed per target budget; and search-based methods are expensive without guaranteeing exact budget compliance. We propose GAMMA, a quantizer-agnostic framework that learns module-wise precision preferences entirely within a post-training pipeline. GAMMA optimizes a teacher-forced hidden-state reconstruction objective under an augmented Lagrangian constraint, and projects the learned preferences into exact budget-feasible discrete assignments via integer programming. A key property is score reuse: because the learned preferences encode a stable sensitivity ranking rather than budget-specific weights, a single training run serves arbitrary deployment targets by re-solving only the integer program, reducing per-budget adaptation from hours to a few minutes. Across Llama and Qwen models (8B--32B), GAMMA outperforms both fixed-precision baselines (up to +12.99 Avg.) and search-based mixed-precision methods (up to +7.00 Avg.), and can match fixed 3-bit quality at 2.5-bit average precision, enabling deployment at substantially smaller memory footprints.

AI.tldr: GAMMA是一种训练后混合精度量化框架，通过教师强制隐状态重建和增广拉格朗日约束学习模块敏感度排序，并用整数规划实现精确预算分配，支持快速多目标部署适配。
AI.motivation: 现有混合精度量化方法在大语言模型上存在训练成本高、静态指标忽略模块交互、搜索方法效率低且难满足精确预算等缺陷。
AI.method: GAMMA采用训练后流程：1）基于教师强制隐状态重建目标优化连续精度偏好；2）引入增广拉格朗日约束保证预算；3）通过整数规划将连续偏好投影为离散比特分配；4）利用分数复用机制，单次学习即可适配任意目标预算。
AI.result: 在Llama与Qwen（8B–32B）上，GAMMA显著超越固定精度基线（最高+12.99 Avg.）和搜索式混合精度方法（最高+7.00 Avg.），并能在2.5-bit平均精度下达到3-bit固定精度质量。
AI.conclusion: GAMMA实现了高效、精确、可复用的大模型混合精度量化，在保持性能的同时大幅降低内存开销，适用于多样化部署场景。

title: GeoFlow: Enforcing Implicit Geometric Consistency in Video Generation
summary: Generating geometrically consistent videos remains an open challenge: text-to-video diffusion models trained on web-scale data treat geometry only implicitly, leading to object deformation, texture drift, and non-rigid backgrounds under camera motion. Existing solutions either improve consistency as a byproduct, apply only to static scenes or realign the latent space of the model completely. We introduce a geometry-consistency reward that directly measures whether motion in a generated video is compatible with a coherent scene. Our key insight is that in physically consistent videos, background motion should be explainable by rigid camera-induced flow, while independently moving objects should preserve appearance identity along motion trajectories. We operationalize this using optical flow, depth--pose predictions, and feature-based correspondence to separate rigid and dynamic regions and evaluate their respective consistency. Integrating this reward with reinforcement fine-tuning transforms geometric consistency from an emergent property into an explicit optimization objective for video generators. The approach is model agnostic and applies to diverse dynamic scenes containing both camera and object motion. Experiments show substantial reductions in temporal geometric artifacts over strong baselines while preserving perceptual quality. Code and model weights are published.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种几何一致性奖励机制，通过光学流、深度-姿态预测和特征匹配来评估视频中刚性与动态区域的运动一致性，并结合强化微调提升文本到视频生成模型的几何一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到视频扩散模型隐式处理几何信息，导致物体变形、纹理漂移及背景非刚性运动等问题；已有方法或效果有限，或仅适用于静态场景，缺乏对通用动态场景中几何一致性的显式建模。
AI.method: 设计基于光学流、深度-姿态估计和特征对应关系的几何一致性奖励函数，区分并分别评估刚性相机运动引起的背景流与独立运动物体的外观一致性；将该奖励融入强化学习微调框架中，实现对视频生成器的显式几何一致性优化。
AI.result: 在多种动态场景（含相机与物体运动）上显著减少时间维度上的几何伪影，同时保持生成视频的感知质量；方法具有模型无关性，且代码与模型权重已开源。
AI.conclusion: 将几何一致性从隐式涌现属性转变为可优化的显式目标是可行且有效的，所提奖励机制与强化微调策略为提升视频生成的物理合理性提供了新范式。

title: Modality vs. Morphology: A Framework for Time Series Classification for Biological Signals
summary: Time series classification (TSC) of biological signals has progressed from handcrafted, modality-specific approaches to deep architectures capable of representing the diverse waveform structures of underlying physiological processes (i.e., morphology). This review introduces a unified morphology--modality framework that connects waveform structure to a methodological design, revealing how spikes, bursts, oscillations, slow drift, and hierarchical rhythms inform model design. By analyzing electroencephalography, electromyography, electrocardiography, photoplethysmography, and ocular modalities (electrooculography, pupillometry, eye-tracking), the review demonstrates how morphology determines preprocessing and modeling strategies. Integrating evidence across these biological signals, the framework reveals that morphology, not model class, most strongly determines performance and interpretability. This provides insight into why deep models succeed when their inductive biases align with underlying waveform dynamics. This review also identifies future work including morphological data augmentation and evaluation metrics to improve generalization. Together, these insights position morphology-aware modeling as a unifying principle for developing generalizable, interpretable, and physiologically meaningful TSC models across biological signals.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种统一的‘形态-模态’框架，将生物信号波形结构（如尖峰、振荡、慢漂移等）与时间序列分类模型的设计联系起来，强调波形形态比模型类别更能决定性能和可解释性，并指出未来应发展形态感知的数据增强与评估指标。
AI.motivation: 生物信号时间序列分类（TSC）方法从手工特征向深度学习演进，但缺乏对波形形态如何指导模型设计的系统性理解；需建立连接波形结构与建模策略的统一框架。
AI.method: 提出‘形态–模态’分析框架，基于EEG、EMG、ECG、PPG及眼动相关信号（EOG、瞳孔测量、眼动追踪），系统归纳五类典型波形形态（尖峰、爆发、振荡、慢漂移、层级节律），并分析其对预处理与建模策略的影响。
AI.result: 发现波形形态是决定模型性能与可解释性的主导因素，远超模型类别本身；深度模型的成功关键在于其归纳偏置是否匹配底层波形动力学；该框架为跨模态TSC提供了统一设计原则。
AI.conclusion: 形态感知建模是构建泛化性强、可解释、符合生理意义的生物信号TSC模型的核心原则；未来需发展形态驱动的数据增强与评估指标以提升泛化能力。

title: Vision Foundation Models as Generalist Tokenizers for Image Generation
summary: In this work, we explore the largely unexplored direction of building a generalist image tokenizer directly on top of a frozen vision foundation model (VFM). To build this tokenizer, we utilize a frozen VFM as the encoder and introduce two key innovations: (1) a region-adaptive quantization framework to eliminate spatial redundancy in standard 2D grid features, and (2) a semantic reconstruction objective that aligns the decoded outputs with the VFM's representations to preserve semantic fidelity. Grounded in these designs, we propose VFMTok, a generalist visual tokenizer capable of operating seamlessly in both discrete and continuous latent spaces. VFMTok achieves substantial improvements in synthesis quality while drastically enhancing token efficiency. For discrete autoregressive (AR) generation, it accelerates model convergence by \textbf{3 times} and achieves a state-of-the-art gFID of \textbf{1.36} on ImageNet class-conditional synthesis. Similarly, for continuous-space generation, integrating VFMTok with a denoising model yields an exceptional gFID of \textbf{1.25}. Furthermore, because the latent space inherently captures rich spatial semantics, VFMTok enables high-fidelity class-conditional synthesis without classifier-free guidance (\textbf{w/o CFG}) across both generative paradigms, significantly accelerating inference speed. Beyond these remarkable empirical results, we systematically investigate the underlying mechanisms of our approach. We discover that the specific self-supervised learning objectives utilized during VFM pre-training dictate its effectiveness as a tokenizer. Specifically, a VFM jointly optimized with global contrastive learning and latent masked image modeling provides the optimal representations for image tokenization. These insights establish a strong foundation and offer valuable guidance for the design of future image tokenizers.

AI.tldr: 本文提出VFMTok，一种基于冻结视觉基础模型（VFM）的通用图像分词器，通过区域自适应量化和语义重建目标，在离散与连续潜在空间中均实现高效、高质量图像生成，并揭示VFM预训练目标对分词性能的关键影响。
AI.motivation: 探索直接在冻结视觉基础模型（VFM）上构建通用图像分词器这一尚未充分研究的方向，以克服传统2D网格特征的空间冗余并保持语义保真度。
AI.method: 采用冻结VFM作为编码器，引入（1）区域自适应量化框架消除空间冗余，（2）语义重建目标使解码输出与VFM表征对齐；据此提出VFMTok分词器，并系统分析VFM预训练目标（如全局对比学习与掩码图像建模联合优化）对其作为分词器有效性的影响。
AI.result: VFMTok在ImageNet类条件合成中，离散AR生成达SOTA gFID 1.36、收敛加速3倍；连续空间生成gFID达1.25；且无需分类器自由引导（w/o CFG）即可实现高保真合成，显著提升推理速度。
AI.conclusion: VFMTok是一种高效、通用的视觉分词器，其性能高度依赖VFM预训练目标的设计；联合全局对比学习与掩码建模的VFM提供最优表征，为未来图像分词器设计提供了理论基础与实践指导。

title: DBES: A Systematic Benchmark and Metric Suite for Evaluating Expert Specialization in Large-Scale MoEs
summary:
Expert specialization in Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models remains poorly understood, with traditional evaluations conflating architectural load-balancing with functional specialization. We introduce DBES, a comprehensive diagnostic framework combining a multi-domain benchmark with five theoretically grounded metrics: Routing Specialization, Normalized Effective Rank, Domain Isolation, Routing Stiffness Score, and N-gram Expertise measures.
  Critical findings demonstrate distinct specialization paradigms across models: Qwen-series exhibit modular specialization with high domain isolation, while DeepSeek and GLM employ distributed collaboration. However, we emphasize that specialization is a diagnostic dimension, necessary but not sufficient for downstream performance. Most crucially, interventional evidence validates the actionability of these metrics: by using DBES to identify high-specialization expert paths during domain-specific post-training, we achieved 66% to 94.48% improvement in specialized domains with only 15% of original training resources, demonstrating that these diagnostic tools can be converted into concrete optimization operators. This work provides the first systematic methodology for evaluating expert specialization independently of accuracy metrics, offering crucial insights for the design and post-training optimization of next-generation MoE systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DBES诊断框架，用于独立评估MoE模型中专家的专业化程度，并发现不同模型存在模块化或分布式等不同专业化范式；更重要的是，该框架可指导高效领域后训练，显著提升性能并节省资源。
AI.motivation: 传统MoE专家专业化评估混淆了架构负载均衡与功能专业化，缺乏独立、系统的诊断方法。
AI.method: 提出DBES诊断框架，包含多领域基准和五个理论驱动的指标：路由专业化、归一化有效秩、领域隔离度、路由刚性得分和N元专家专长度；并通过基于DBES指标的领域后训练干预实验验证其可操作性。
AI.result: 发现Qwen系列呈现高领域隔离的模块化专业化，DeepSeek和GLM则采用分布式协作；利用DBES指导后训练，在仅15%原始资源下实现特定领域性能提升66%–94.48%。
AI.conclusion: 专家专业化是必要但不充分的下游性能决定因素；DBES首次实现了脱离准确率指标的系统性专业化评估，为下一代MoE模型的设计与优化提供了关键方法论支持。

title: NEWTON: Agentic Planning for Physically Grounded Video Generation
summary: Video generation models produce visually compelling results but systematically violate physical commonsense -- on VideoPhy-2, the best model achieves only 32.6% joint accuracy. We identify a specification bottleneck: text prompts are lossy compression of the physical world, omitting the parameters that fully determine dynamics, and no amount of model scaling can recover what was never specified. From this diagnosis we derive three properties that physics conditioning must satisfy -- sufficiency, dynamism, and verifiability -- and show that no existing approach satisfies all three. We present NEWTON, in which video generation is demoted from the system output to one action inside an agent's toolbox: a learned planner orchestrates physics-aware tools (keyframe generation, scientific computation, prompt refinement) to construct rich conditioning, and a verifier closes the loop for iterative re-planning. The planner is the sole trainable component, optimized on-policy via Flow-GRPO inside the live multi-turn loop. On VideoPhy-2, NEWTON improves joint accuracy from 21.4% to 29.7% on LTX-Video and from 30.7% to 37.4% on Veo-3.1, without modifying either generator. Our project page: \href{https://Newton026.github.io/newton}{https://Newton026.github.io/newton}

AI.tldr: 本文提出NEWTON框架，通过将视频生成降级为智能体工具箱中的一个动作，结合物理感知工具和验证器实现迭代规划，显著提升视频生成模型在物理常识任务上的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有视频生成模型在物理常识任务上表现不佳，主要原因是文本提示无法完整描述物理世界的动态参数，导致物理信息丢失。
AI.method: NEWTON框架引入一个可学习的规划器，协调物理感知工具（如关键帧生成、科学计算、提示优化）构建丰富物理条件，并通过验证器实现闭环迭代重规划；规划器使用Flow-GRPO在多轮交互中在线优化。
AI.result: 在VideoPhy-2基准上，NEWTON将LTX-Video的联合准确率从21.4%提升至29.7%，Veo-3.1从30.7%提升至37.4%，且无需修改原有生成器。
AI.conclusion: 通过将视频生成嵌入物理感知的智能体规划流程，而非单纯扩大模型规模，可更有效地解决物理常识缺失问题；该方法满足充分性、动态性和可验证性三大物理条件要求。

title: DiPRL: Learning Discrete Programmatic Policies via Architecture Entropy Regularization
summary: Programmatic reinforcement learning (PRL) offers an interpretable alternative to deep reinforcement learning by representing policies as human-readable and -editable programs. While gradient-based methods have been developed to optimize continuous relaxations of programs, they face a significant performance drop when converting the continuous relaxations back into discrete programs. Post-hoc discretization can discard optimized branches and parameters in a program, which results in a collapse of policy expressivity and lowered task performance, leading in turn to a need for additional fine-tuning. To overcome these limitations, we propose Differentiable Discrete Programmatic Reinforcement Learning (DiPRL), a method that learns programmatic policies that become nearly discrete during training, avoiding a separate post-hoc fine-tuning stage. We first analyze the inherent risks of performance drop introduced by post-hoc discretization of gradient-based methods. Then, we introduce programmatic architecture entropy regularization, which enables smooth, differentiable training that encourages convergence toward a discrete program. DiPRL maintains the efficiency of gradient-based optimization while mitigating the risks of post-hoc discretization. Our experiments across multiple discrete and continuous RL tasks demonstrate that DiPRL can achieve strong performance via interpretable programmatic policies.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DiPRL方法，通过程序架构熵正则化实现可微分的离散化训练，避免后处理离散化带来的性能下降，提升程序化强化学习的可解释性与任务性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于梯度的程序化强化学习方法在将连续松弛策略转换为离散程序时存在显著性能下降，后处理离散化会丢弃已优化的分支和参数，导致策略表达能力坍塌和需额外微调。
AI.method: 提出Differentiable Discrete Programmatic Reinforcement Learning（DiPRL），引入程序架构熵正则化，在训练中平滑地促使策略收敛至近似离散形式，实现端到端可微训练。
AI.result: 在多个离散和连续强化学习任务上验证了DiPRL的有效性，其在保持梯度优化效率的同时显著提升了解释性程序策略的任务性能。
AI.conclusion: DiPRL成功克服了后处理离散化的固有缺陷，实现了无需额外微调的高效、可解释、高性能程序化策略学习。

title: Historical Knowledge Graphs for Global Maritime Estimated Time of Arrival
summary: Accurate vessel estimated-time-of-arrival forecasts are critical for port operations and decarbonization, yet global-scale travel-time prediction remains difficult without costly contextual data. Herein, I present a methodology for constructing a historical maritime knowledge graph using only Automatic Identification System (AIS) data. First, segmented trajectories are extracted from noisy AIS data using a Gaussian-mixture-model-based preprocessing pipeline. The graph is then constructed by iteratively processing the trajectories and storing speed distributions stratified by vessel type, time of travel, and direction of travel; the resulting global graph comprises 5,433 geohash-3 nodes and 12,334 edges. The graph can be queried to retrieve travel-time predictions between any two location via a hierarchical, priority-based system that uses historical statistics with principled fallback. On a temporally held-out test set, median RMSE is 22.75 min (segment-level) and 30.90 min (trajectory-level), with 69.1% of trajectories within 20% of actual arrival time. On a second external test set, median RMSE is 27.36 min (segment-level) and 37.46 min (trajectory-level), with 62.1% of trajectories within 20%. These results corroborate the promise of our method, enabling global travel-time prediction and providing a strong foundation for just-in-time arrival planning and emissions reduction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种仅基于AIS数据构建全球海上知识图谱的方法，用于精准预测船舶到达时间，支持港口运营优化与减排。
AI.motivation: 准确的船舶预计到达时间（ETA）对港口运营和航运脱碳至关重要，但缺乏低成本上下文数据时，全球尺度的航程时间预测仍具挑战性。
AI.method: 利用高斯混合模型预处理噪声AIS数据以提取轨迹段；基于船舶类型、出行时间和航行方向分层统计速度分布，构建含5433个geohash-3节点和12334条边的全球历史海上知识图谱；通过分层优先级查询机制结合历史统计与合理回退策略进行ETA预测。
AI.result: 在时间保留测试集上，航段级和轨迹级中位RMSE分别为22.75分钟和30.90分钟，69.1%的轨迹误差在实际到达时间的20%以内；在外部队列测试集中，对应指标为27.36分钟、37.46分钟和62.1%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法无需额外昂贵数据即可实现全球尺度ETA预测，为准时到达（JIT）调度和减排提供了坚实基础。

title: Offline Contextual Bandits in the Presence of New Actions
summary: Automated decision-making algorithms drive applications such as recommendation systems and search engines. These algorithms often rely on off-policy contextual bandits or off-policy learning (OPL). Conventionally, OPL selects actions that maximize the expected reward from an existing action set. However, in many real-world scenarios, actions, such as news articles or video content, change continuously, and the action space evolves over time after data collection. We define actions introduced after deploying the logging policy as new actions and focus on OPL with new actions. Existing OPL methods identify optimal actions from the existing set effectively but cannot learn and select new actions because no relevant data are logged. To address this limitation, we propose a new OPL method that leverages action features. We first introduce the Local Combination PseudoInverse (LCPI) estimator for the policy gradient, generalizing the PseudoInverse estimator initially proposed for off-policy evaluation of slate bandits. LCPI controls the trade-off between reward-modeling condition and the condition for data collection regarding the action features, capturing the interaction effects among different dimensions of action features. Furthermore, we propose a generalized algorithm called Policy Optimization for Effective New Actions (PONA), which integrates LCPI, a component specialized for new action selection, with Doubly Robust (DR), which excels at learning within existing actions. We define PONA as a weighted sum of the LCPI and DR estimators, optimizing both the selection of existing and new actions, and allowing the proportion of new action selections to be adjusted by the weight parameter. Through extensive experiments, we demonstrate that PONA efficiently selects new actions while maintaining the overall policy performance as opposed to most existing methods that cannot select new actions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向动态新增动作的离线策略学习方法PONA，通过结合新提出的LCPI估计器（用于建模动作特征交互并支持新动作选择）与Doubly Robust估计器（擅长已有动作学习），实现对演化动作空间的有效策略优化。
AI.motivation: 现有离线策略学习（OPL）方法无法处理部署后持续出现的新动作（如新发布的新闻或视频），因其缺乏对应的历史日志数据；而现实中动作空间常随时间动态演化，亟需支持新动作选择的OPL方法。
AI.method: 提出Local Combination PseudoInverse（LCPI）估计器，用于动作特征驱动的策略梯度估计，并设计Policy Optimization for Effective New Actions（PONA）算法，将LCPI与Doubly Robust（DR）估计器加权融合，兼顾新动作选择与已有动作优化。
AI.result: 实验表明，PONA能高效选择新动作，同时保持整体策略性能，显著优于无法选择新动作的现有OPL方法。
AI.conclusion: 引入动作特征建模和LCPI估计器是解决动态动作空间下离线策略学习的关键，PONA为实际场景中持续更新的内容推荐等应用提供了可行且有效的解决方案。

title: Cracks in the Foundation: A Civil Infrastructure Dataset to Challenge Vision Foundation Models
summary: Automated structural health monitoring is essential to prevent catastrophic infrastructure failures. Precise, pixel-level defect segmentation is needed to accurately assess structural integrity, but progress in defect segmentation for civil infrastructures has been held back by an extreme scarcity of data, which requires costly expert annotation. The need for data is accentuated by algorithmic hurdles intrinsic to the problem, including center-bias and the need to rely more on shape when inspecting nearly textureless building materials. To remove the bottleneck, we introduce Cracks in the Foundation (CiF), the largest and most detailed civil infrastructure (instance) segmentation dataset to date, comprising $\approx$150,000 high-resolution images meticulously curated over five years in collaboration with civil engineering experts. With the help of this unprecedented data source, we expose a blind spot of current visual AI: despite the advent of promptable Foundation Models (FMs) and Vision Language Models (VLMs), and despite the impressive abilities of today's specialised segmentation models, it turns out that dense image understanding in the built environment is nowhere near solved. Our evaluations indicate that even the most recent zero-shot FMs face significant challenges when deployed on real-world infrastructure and even the performance of specialised models with domain-specific supervision plateaus at $\approx$25% mAP. CiF establishes inspection of civil infrastructure, an elementary and seemingly easy perceptual task, as an open challenge that reveals fundamental weaknesses of present-day models trained predominantly on internet images, literally and figuratively highlighting cracks in the current foundation model paradigm.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了CiF数据集，这是目前最大最详细的民用基础设施（实例）分割数据集，包含约15万张高分辨率图像，并揭示了当前视觉AI在真实基础设施缺陷分割任务中的严重局限性。
AI.motivation: 由于专家标注成本高昂，民用基础设施缺陷分割领域面临严重的数据稀缺问题；同时，该任务存在中心偏差和依赖形状识别等算法难点，亟需高质量数据集推动研究进展。
AI.method: 构建了名为Cracks in the Foundation (CiF)的大规模、高精度民用基础设施实例分割数据集，并基于该数据集对当前主流基础模型（FMs）和专用分割模型进行了系统评估。
AI.result: 实验表明，即使是最新零样本基础模型在真实基础设施场景中表现不佳，而专用模型在领域监督下的性能也仅达约25% mAP，远未达到实用水平。
AI.conclusion: CiF数据集将民用基础设施缺陷检测确立为一个开放挑战，暴露了当前主要基于网络图像训练的视觉模型在建成环境密集图像理解方面的根本性缺陷。

title: XCTFormer: Leveraging Cross-Channel and Cross-Time Dependencies for Enhanced Time-Series Analysis
summary: Multivariate time-series analysis involves extracting informative representations from sequences of multiple interdependent variables, supporting tasks such as forecasting, imputation, and anomaly detection. In real-world scenarios, these variables are typically collected from a shared context or underlying phenomenon, suggesting the presence of latent dependencies across time and channels that can be leveraged to improve performance. However, recent findings show that channel-independent (CI) models, which assume no inter-variable dependencies, often outperform channel-dependent (CD) models that explicitly model such relationships. This surprising result indicates that current CD models may not fully exploit their potential due to limitations in how dependencies are captured. Recent studies have revisited channel dependence modeling with various approaches; however, these methods often employ indirect modeling strategies, which can lead to meaningful dependencies being overlooked. To address this issue, we introduce XCTFormer, a transformer-based channel-dependent (CD) model that explicitly captures cross-temporal and cross-channel dependencies via an enhanced attention mechanism. The model operates in a token-to-token fashion, modeling pairwise dependencies between every pair of tokens across time and channels. The architecture comprises (i) a data processing module, (ii) a novel Cross-Relational Attention Block (CRAB) that increases capacity and expressiveness, and (iii) an optional Dependency Compression Plugin (DeCoP) that improves scalability. Through extensive experiments on three time-series benchmarks, we show that XCTFormer achieves strong results compared to widely recognized baselines; in particular, it attains state-of-the-art performance on the imputation task, outperforming the second-best method by an average of 20.8% in MSE and 15.3% in MAE.

AI.tldr: 本文提出XCTFormer，一种基于Transformer的通道依赖（CD）模型，通过增强的注意力机制显式建模跨时间和跨通道的依赖关系，在多变量时间序列填补任务中达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管通道依赖（CD）模型理论上能更好利用变量间潜在关联，但现有CD模型因依赖建模方式间接或不充分，常被通道独立（CI）模型超越，亟需更直接、有效的依赖建模方法。
AI.method: 提出XCTFormer模型，包含三部分：（i）数据处理模块；（ii）新型Cross-Relational Attention Block（CRAB），实现token-to-token级别的跨时空、跨通道两两依赖建模；（iii）可选的Dependency Compression Plugin（DeCoP）提升可扩展性。
AI.result: 在三个时间序列基准上实验表明，XCTFormer在填补任务中显著优于主流基线，MSE平均降低20.8%，MAE平均降低15.3%，达到当前最优性能。
AI.conclusion: 显式、细粒度的跨时空-跨通道依赖建模是提升多变量时间序列CD模型性能的关键路径，XCTFormer验证了该设计的有效性与泛化能力。

title: Geometry-Aware Uncertainty Coresets for Robust Visual In-Context Learning in Histopathology
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) can couple visual perception with open-ended clinical reasoning, making them attractive for computational histopathology. However, fine-tuning billions of parameters on scarce, expert-annotated pathology data is prohibitive, while in-context learning (ICL), which conditions the VLM on demonstrative image-text pairs without parameter updates, suffers from high sensitivity to which examples are selected and how the query is phrased, producing unreliable diagnostics. Existing selection strategies rely on query-dependent nearest-neighbour retrieval that ignores global data structure, require costly parameter updates, or disregard the joint vision-text embedding geometry of VLMs. We propose GAUC, a training-free coreset selection method operating directly in the pre-trained multimodal embedding space. GAUC jointly optimises three objectives: (1) a Maximum Mean Discrepancy term enforcing distributional fidelity between coreset and full dataset, (2) an Effective Mutual Information Difference regulariser bounding performance degradation under prompt paraphrases by exploiting the VLM's joint vision-text alignment, and (3) a predictive-variance penalty suppressing overconfident, unstable outputs. On CRC-100K and MHIST across multiple open-source VLM architectures, GAUC consistently improves accuracy, calibration, and prompt robustness over recent ICL selection methods and dataset-distillation baselines, all without a single gradient update.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GAUC方法，一种无需训练的核集选择技术，用于提升视觉-语言模型在计算组织病理学中的上下文学习性能。GAUC在预训练多模态嵌入空间中联合优化分布保真度、提示鲁棒性与预测稳定性三个目标，在多个数据集和模型上显著优于现有方法，且无需任何梯度更新。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言模型（VLMs）在组织病理学中面临微调成本高、上下文学习（ICL）对示例选择和提示措辞高度敏感、现有示例选择策略忽略多模态嵌入几何结构或需参数更新等问题。
AI.method: 提出GAUC——一种无需训练的共核集（coreset）选择方法，直接在预训练多模态嵌入空间中联合优化：（1）最大均值差异（MMD）以保持分布保真；（2）有效互信息差正则项以提升提示改写下的鲁棒性；（3）预测方差惩罚项以抑制不稳定输出。
AI.result: 在CRC-100K和MHIST数据集及多个开源VLM架构上，GAUC在准确性、校准性和提示鲁棒性方面持续超越近期ICL选择方法和数据蒸馏基线，且完全不依赖梯度更新。
AI.conclusion: GAUC是一种高效、通用、训练自由的ICL示例选择框架，通过显式建模VLM的联合视觉-文本嵌入结构，显著提升了其在稀缺标注医学图像场景下的可靠推理能力。

title: Seeing Together:Multi-Robot Cooperative Egocentric Spatial Reasoning with Multimodal Large Language Models
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have made substantial progress in egocentric video understanding, but their ability to reason cooperatively from multiple embodied viewpoints remains largely unexplored. We study this problem through multi-robot cooperative dynamic spatial reasoning, where a model must answer spatial, temporal, visibility, and coordination questions by integrating synchronized egocentric videos from a team of moving robots. To support this setting, we introduce CoopSR, the first benchmark for this task, together with EgoTeam, a multi-robot egocentric QA dataset. EgoTeam contains 114,227 QA pairs spanning 19 question types, four difficulty tiers, and three team sizes in Habitat and iGibson, along with a real-world test set of around 2,326 QAs collected using two quadruped robots. We further propose SP-CoR (Spectral and Physics-Informed Cooperative Reasoner), an MLLM framework for fine-grained cooperative spatial reasoning. SP-CoR combines dynamics-aware multi-robot frame sampling, spectral- and physics-guided view fusion, and physics-aligned prompt distillation, enabling the model to benefit from privileged robot-pose supervision during training while requiring only egocentric videos at test time. Across 22 MLLM baselines, SP-CoR consistently improves cooperative reasoning, outperforming the strongest fine-tuned baseline by +3.87% on Habitat and +7.12% on iGibson. It also shows stronger generalization to unseen team sizes and real-world robot tests. Code can be found at https://github.com/KPeng9510/seeing-together.git.

AI.tldr: 本文提出多机器人协同动态空间推理任务，构建首个基准CoopSR和数据集EgoTeam，并设计SP-CoR框架，在仿真与真实机器人场景中显著提升多视角协同推理性能。
AI.motivation: 现有MLLM在单视角具身视频理解上进展显著，但缺乏对多具身视角协同推理能力的研究，尤其在多机器人动态空间推理方面尚属空白。
AI.method: 提出SP-CoR框架，包含动力学感知的多机器人帧采样、谱与物理引导的视角融合、以及物理对齐的提示蒸馏；构建CoopSR基准与EgoTeam数据集（含仿真与真实世界QA对）。
AI.result: SP-CoR在Habitat和iGibson上分别超越最强微调基线3.87%和7.12%，且在未见团队规模和真实机器人测试中展现出更强泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 多机器人协同空间推理是具身智能的重要方向，SP-CoR通过融合物理先验与多视角信息，有效提升了MLLM在该任务上的性能与泛化性。

title: Probing for Representation Manifolds in Superposition
summary: This paper introduces the Manifold Probe, a supervised method for discovering representation manifolds in superposition. The method generalizes linear regression probes by learning the space of features of a concept that can be linearly predicted from the representations, and then learning the directions used to encode them. We demonstrate the probe on representations of time and space in Llama 2-7b, finding manifolds which linearly represent an interpretable set of features in each case. In the case of time, we show that by steering along the manifold, we can influence the model's completions about the years in which famous songs, movies and books were released, providing evidence that the Manifold Probe can discover manifolds which are causally involved in model behaviour.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Manifold Probe，一种用于发现超叠加表示中流形的监督方法，通过学习概念特征空间及其编码方向，在Llama 2-7b中成功识别出时间与空间的可解释表征流形，并验证其对模型行为具有因果影响。
AI.motivation: 现有线性探针方法难以刻画高维表示中复杂概念（如时间、空间）所对应的结构化流形，需更精细地建模特征空间及其编码方向。
AI.method: Manifold Probe是一种监督式方法，先学习能从表示中线性预测的概念特征空间，再学习该空间在表示中的编码方向，从而发现并表征概念流形。
AI.result: 在Llama 2-7b中成功识别出时间与空间概念的线性可解释流形；通过沿时间流形引导，可系统性改变模型对歌曲、电影、书籍发布时间的生成结果。
AI.conclusion: Manifold Probe能有效发现并定位对模型行为具因果作用的概念表征流形，为大语言模型内部机制的可解释性研究提供了新工具。

title: A Dataset for the Recognition of Historical and Handwritten Music Scores in Western Notation
summary: A large amount of musical heritage has been digitised by memory institutions: libraries, museums, and archives. Nevertheless, the field of Optical Music Recognition (OMR) has struggled with making this music machine-readable, despite advances in deep learning, mostly because no datasets for training systems in realistic conditions were available. The MusiCorpus dataset aims to remedy this situation by providing 1,309 pages of historical sheet music, primarily handwritten, with MusicXML transcriptions and symbol annotations. It is the largest dataset of handwritten music to date and the first dataset containing a realistic and representative sample of musical document collections from memory institutions, suitable for training and evaluating both end-to-end and object detection-based OMR systems and comparing their performance.

AI.tldr: MusiCorpus is the largest dataset of handwritten historical sheet music, designed to advance Optical Music Recognition (OMR) by enabling training and evaluation of deep learning models under realistic conditions.
AI.motivation: The field of Optical Music Recognition (OMR) has been hindered by the lack of realistic, large-scale datasets—especially for handwritten historical music—despite advances in deep learning.
AI.method: The authors constructed MusiCorpus, a new dataset comprising 1,309 pages of primarily handwritten historical sheet music from memory institutions, annotated with MusicXML transcriptions and symbol-level labels.
AI.result: MusiCorpus becomes the largest publicly available dataset of handwritten music and the first to represent realistic musical document collections from libraries, museums, and archives, supporting both end-to-end and object detection-based OMR systems.
AI.conclusion: MusiCorpus fills a critical gap in OMR research by providing a realistic, large-scale, annotated dataset that enables robust training, evaluation, and fair comparison of modern OMR systems.

title: Protein Fold Classification at Scale: Benchmarking and Pretraining
summary: Classifying protein topology is essential for deciphering biological function, but progress is held back by the lack of large-scale benchmarks that avoid duplicates and by models that do not scale well. We introduce TEDBench, a large-scale, non-redundant benchmark for protein fold classification constructed from the Encyclopedia of Domains (TED) and Foldseek-clustered AlphaFold structures. We show that on TEDBench, current protein representation learning methods either require very large models or fail to deliver strong performance. To address this challenge, we propose Masked Invariant Autoencoders (MiAE), a self-supervised framework for protein structure representation learning. MiAE uses an extremely high masking ratio of up to 90% with an $\mathrm{SE(3)}$-invariant encoder and a lightweight decoder that reconstructs backbone coordinates from the latent representation and mask tokens. MiAE scales well and outperforms supervised counterparts and state-of-the-art baselines on TEDBench, establishing a strong recipe for protein fold classification. To test transfer beyond AlphaFold structures, we further benchmark on a curated dataset from experimental structures of CATH v4.4. TEDBench is available at https://github.com/BorgwardtLab/TEDBench.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了TEDBench——一个大规模、非冗余的蛋白质折叠分类基准，并设计了Masked Invariant Autoencoders（MiAE）自监督框架，在该基准及实验结构数据集上均取得优异性能。
AI.motivation: 现有蛋白质拓扑分类研究受限于缺乏大规模无重复基准和可扩展性差的模型。
AI.method: 构建TEDBench基准（基于TED和Foldseek聚类的AlphaFold结构），并提出MiAE：采用高达90%掩码率、SE(3)不变编码器与轻量解码器，重建主链坐标。
AI.result: MiAE在TEDBench上显著优于现有自监督与监督方法，并在CATH v4.4实验结构数据集上验证了跨域泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: TEDBench为蛋白质折叠分类提供了可靠基准，MiAE提供了一种高效、可扩展的自监督结构表征学习新范式。

title: Federated Martingale Posterior Samping
summary: Federated Bayesian neural networks require fixing a prior on the model parameters together with a likelihood. Eliciting meaningful priors on the weight space of modern overparameterized models is notoriously difficult, and misspecification of either component can severely degrade accuracy and calibration. Motivated by the rapid progress of predictive models such as large language models, the martingale posterior, also known as predictive Bayes, replaces the prior--likelihood pair with a predictive distribution and recovers parameter uncertainty by repeatedly drawing predictive samples and refitting the model. A direct federated implementation, however, would require clients to share the local data sets. This letter proposes {federated martingale posterior} (FMP) sampling, a one-shot embarrassingly parallel protocol in which each client uploads a small set of trainable data embeddings and the server runs the predictive sampler centrally. Experiments on MNIST, CIFAR-10, and CIFAR-100 show that FMP closely matches the centralized counterpart and significantly improves calibration over consensus-style baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为联邦马尔可夫后验（FMP）采样的新方法，用于联邦贝叶斯神经网络，通过客户端上传可训练的数据嵌入、服务器集中执行预测采样，避免共享原始数据，在保持准确率的同时显著提升模型校准性。
AI.motivation: 传统联邦贝叶斯神经网络依赖于难以设定的参数先验和似然函数，设定不当会严重损害准确性和校准性；而受大语言模型等预测模型进展启发，马尔可夫后验（预测贝叶斯）用预测分布替代先验-似然对，但其直接联邦化需共享本地数据，存在隐私风险。
AI.method: 提出联邦马尔可夫后验（FMP）采样：客户端仅上传少量可训练的数据嵌入（而非原始数据），服务器在中心端执行预测采样与模型重拟合，实现一次性、完全并行的联邦协议。
AI.result: 在MNIST、CIFAR-10和CIFAR-100上的实验表明，FMP性能接近集中式马尔可夫后验，并显著优于共识类基线方法的校准性。
AI.conclusion: FMP提供了一种隐私友好、高效且校准良好的联邦贝叶斯推断框架，规避了先验设定难题与数据共享需求。

title: NeRF-based Spacecraft Reconstruction from Close-Range Monocular Imagery Under Illumination Variability and Pose Uncertainty
summary: Autonomous rendezvous and proximity operations around uncooperative, unknown spacecraft are critical for active debris removal and on-orbit servicing missions. A key component of such operations is the offline reconstruction of a 3D model of the target from a set of 2D images. This task is challenging due to two main factors. First, in-orbit illumination conditions exhibit considerable variability, and change rapidly over time. Second, the inaccuracy of pose information in the images, results in 3D reconstruction uncertainty. To overcome these challenges, we propose to extend Neural Radiance Fields with per-image degrees of freedom: a learnable appearance embedding that captures the illumination conditions specific to each image, and an image-specific pose correction term that refines its noisy pose label to increase 3D consistency across images. These parameters add minimal complexity, as they are learned jointly with the NeRF, yet they substantially improve robustness to illumination variability and pose inaccuracies. We validate our approach on three image sets representative of in-orbit operations, demonstrating its effectiveness for offline reconstruction and highlighting its suitability for online reconstruction, an open problem in the field.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种扩展Neural Radiance Fields（NeRF）的方法，通过引入每张图像的外观嵌入和姿态校正项，提升在轨光照多变与姿态不准条件下的3D重建鲁棒性，适用于非合作目标的离线及潜在在线重建。
AI.motivation: 在轨非合作目标的自主交会与近距操作需依赖其3D模型重建，但面临光照剧烈变化和图像位姿标签不准确两大挑战。
AI.method: 在NeRF框架中引入可学习的每图像外观嵌入（建模光照）和每图像位姿校正项（优化输入位姿），二者与NeRF联合训练。
AI.result: 在三组模拟在轨图像数据集上验证了该方法显著提升了3D重建质量与跨图像一致性，支持离线重建，并展现出在线重建潜力。
AI.conclusion: 所提扩展NeRF方法以极小额外复杂度有效缓解光照与位姿不确定性问题，为太空机器人任务中的目标建模提供了实用且可扩展的解决方案。

title: Self-supervised local learning rules learn the hidden hierarchical structure of high-dimensional data
summary: The brain learns abstract representations of high-dimensional sensory input, but the plasticity rules that enable such learning are unknown. We study biologically plausible algorithms on the Random Hierarchy Model (RHM), an artificial dataset designed to investigate how deep neural networks learn the intrinsic hierarchical structure of high-dimensional data. We focus on two types of local learning rules that avoid both a long convergence time and the use of a symmetric error network. The first type uses direct feedback signals to approximate error propagation from the output layer. The second type uses layerwise self-supervised contrastive or non-contrastive loss functions that do not explicitly approximate errors at the output layer. We show that all rules of the first type fail to solve the tasks of the RHM and trace this failure back to input-specific nonlinearities (`masking') that are implemented in full backpropagation and are essential for learning complex tasks. However, algorithms of the second type are able to learn the hierarchical hidden structure of the RHM tasks and are as data-efficient as supervised backpropagation training, while being compatible with known rules of synaptic plasticity in cortex.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了生物可实现的学习规则如何在随机层次模型（RHM）上学习高维数据的内在层次结构，发现基于反馈误差近似的局部规则因无法处理输入特异性非线性（'masking'）而失败；而基于层内自监督（对比或非对比）损失的规则能有效学习层次结构，且数据效率媲美反向传播，同时符合皮层突触可塑性规律。
AI.motivation: 探索大脑如何通过生物可实现的可塑性规则学习高维感官输入的抽象表征，填补反向传播与真实神经机制之间的鸿沟。
AI.method: 在人工设计的随机层次模型（RHM）上系统评估两类局部学习规则：（1）利用直接反馈信号近似误差反传的规则；（2）基于层内自监督（对比/非对比）损失、不依赖输出误差的规则，并分析其成功或失败的机制。
AI.result: 第一类规则全部失败，主因是缺乏反向传播中关键的输入特异性非线性（'masking'）；第二类规则能成功学习RHM的隐藏层次结构，数据效率与监督式反向传播相当，且符合皮层突触可塑性约束。
AI.conclusion: 层内自监督学习规则是比误差近似类规则更可行的生物可实现深度学习机制，为理解皮层层次表征学习提供了新理论路径。

title: scHelix: Asymmetric Dual-Stream Integration via Explicit Gene-Level Disentanglement
summary: A critical challenge in single-cell RNA sequencing (scRNA-seq) integration is resolving the tension between eliminating batch effects and maintaining biological fidelity. While recent evidence indicates that batch effects manifest heterogeneously across genes, most existing methods process the transcriptome uniformly, frequently resulting in over-correction and loss of subtle biological signals. To address this, we present scHelix, a dataset-adaptive framework that fundamentally changes how features are processed by explicitly partitioning genes into domain-invariant Anchors and domain-sensitive Variants at the input level. scHelix utilizes a dual-stream sparse diffusion encoder equipped with stop-gradient graph caching to efficiently learn multi-scale structural representations. The core of our approach is a novel asymmetric Align-Refine-Fuse protocol: the unstable Variant stream is first aligned to the robust topology of the Anchor stream, followed by a conservative refinement phase where the Anchor stream absorbs denoised details via bounded residual gating. This divide-and-conquer architecture prevents shortcut learning and ensures robust batch removal without compromising the integrity of biological clusters. Extensive benchmarking demonstrates that scHelix outperforms state-of-the-art methods.

AI.tldr: scHelix是一种新型单细胞RNA测序数据整合方法，通过将基因分为域不变的Anchors和域敏感的Variants，并采用双流稀疏扩散编码器与非对称Align-Refine-Fuse协议，在去除批次效应的同时保留生物信号。
AI.motivation: 现有scRNA-seq整合方法常统一处理全转录组，易导致过校正并丢失细微生物学信号；而批次效应在基因层面具有异质性，需更精细建模。
AI.method: 提出scHelix框架：输入层基因自适应划分（Anchors/Variants）；双流稀疏扩散编码器结合停梯度图缓存；设计非对称Align-Refine-Fuse协议——Variant流对齐Anchor流拓扑，Anchor流经有界残差门控吸收去噪细节。
AI.result: 在多项基准测试中，scHelix优于当前最优方法，有效去除批次效应且更好保持生物学聚类完整性。
AI.conclusion: scHelix通过输入级特征解耦与结构感知的双流协同学习，实现了批次效应消除与生物保真度之间的更好平衡，为scRNA-seq整合提供了新范式。

title: PERL: Parameter Efficient Reasoning in CLIP Latent Space
summary: Contrastively trained vision-language models such as CLIP provide strong zero-shot transfer by aligning images and text in a shared embedding space. However, adapting these models to downstream tasks without degrading their open-vocabulary generalization remains challenging. Existing parameter-efficient adaptation methods typically improve task specialization through learned prompts, adapters, or multimodal transformations, where adaptation capacity is primarily expressed through additional trainable parameters. Inspired by recent latent reasoning methods in language models, we investigate a complementary perspective: can adaptation emerge from iterative reasoning on latent representations rather than from increasing parameter count alone? We introduce PERL (Parameter-Efficient Reasoning in CLIP Latent Space), a lightweight adaptation framework that augments a frozen CLIP model with a compact shared reasoning module applied recurrently across refinement steps. At each step, PERL generates a latent reasoning token conditioned on the current representation and injects it into an intermediate encoder layer, progressively refining higher-level semantic representations while preserving CLIP's pretrained multimodal structure. Across 15 benchmarks spanning base-to-novel generalization, cross-dataset transfer, and out-of-distribution ImageNet variants, PERL achieves the best parameter-performance trade-off among the compared methods under a fast-adaptation few-shot setting, combining strong novel-class accuracy and competitive transfer performance with only about 6K trainable parameters, up to 817x fewer than the largest compared approach. Overall, our results suggest that iterative latent reasoning provides a complementary adaptation mechanism to parameter scaling in discriminative vision-language models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PERL框架，通过在冻结的CLIP模型上添加轻量级、可递归应用的共享推理模块，在潜在空间中进行迭代推理以实现高效适配，仅用约6K参数即在多项少样本迁移任务中取得最优参数-性能权衡。
AI.motivation: 如何在不损害CLIP等对比学习视觉语言模型开放词汇泛化能力的前提下，对其进行下游任务适配仍具挑战；现有参数高效方法依赖增加可训练参数，本文探索是否可通过潜在表示上的迭代推理而非单纯扩参来实现适应。
AI.method: 提出PERL（Parameter-Efficient Reasoning in CLIP Latent Space），在冻结CLIP基础上引入紧凑共享推理模块，该模块在每步生成一个条件于当前表征的潜在推理token，并将其注入中间编码器层，递归地精炼高层语义表征。
AI.result: 在15个涵盖基础到新类泛化、跨数据集迁移及分布外ImageNet变体的基准上，PERL在少样本快速适配设定下取得最佳参数-性能权衡：新类准确率高、迁移性能具竞争力，仅需约6K可训练参数（较最大对比方法减少达817倍）。
AI.conclusion: 迭代潜在推理为判别式视觉语言模型提供了一种与参数扩展互补的适配机制，验证了‘推理’可替代部分‘参数增长’以实现高效适应。

title: S2Aligner: Pair-Efficient and Transferable Pre-Training for Sparse Text-Attributed Graphs
summary: Pre-training on text-attributed graphs (TAGs) is central to building transferable graph foundation models, where LLM-as-Aligner methods align graph and text representations through the semantic knowledge of large language models. However, these methods usually assume that node texts provide sufficient and reliable supervision, an assumption often violated in real-world sparse TAGs. When textual anchors are missing, noisy, or uneven across domains, graph structures must be aligned with weak semantic evidence, leading to unreliable structure-semantics correspondence and sparsity-induced transfer bias. This paper presents S2Aligner, a sparsity-aware and structure-enhanced LLM-as-Aligner framework for graph-text pre-training on sparse TAGs. The key idea is to decouple semantic alignment from structural modeling, allowing topology-aware signals to enhance alignment without contaminating the shared semantic space. Specifically, S2Aligner decomposes graph-text representations into semantic and structural components, uses structure-oriented reconstruction with consistency control to inject reliable topology cues into text representations, and suppresses inconsistent structural signals under textual sparsity. Moreover, S2Aligner introduces sparsity-aware cross-domain risk balancing, which calibrates domain risks through a global-domain density ratio and downweights unreliable sparse samples via graph reliability estimation. Theoretical analysis shows that this objective reduces cross-domain generalization gaps by controlling domain risk discrepancy. Extensive experiments across diverse graph domains, sparsity levels, and downstream tasks demonstrate that S2Aligner consistently outperforms existing baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出S2Aligner框架，用于在稀疏文本属性图（TAGs）上进行图-文本预训练，通过解耦语义对齐与结构建模、引入结构导向重建与一致性控制、以及稀疏感知的跨域风险平衡，提升对稀疏、噪声和不均衡文本监督下的图表示学习鲁棒性与泛化性。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM-as-Aligner方法假设节点文本提供充分可靠的监督，但在真实稀疏TAG中该假设常被违反，导致结构-语义对应不可靠及稀疏引发的迁移偏差。
AI.method: S2Aligner将图-文本表征解耦为语义与结构分量；采用结构导向重建与一致性控制将拓扑线索注入文本表征；通过图可靠性估计实现稀疏感知的跨域风险平衡，并理论证明其可缩小跨域泛化差距。
AI.result: 在多种图领域、稀疏程度和下游任务上的大量实验表明，S2Aligner持续优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: S2Aligner是一种鲁棒、可扩展的图-文本预训练框架，有效缓解了文本稀疏性带来的对齐失准与迁移偏差问题，为构建面向真实场景的图基础模型提供了新范式。

title: Speech-Guided Multimodal Learning for Vocal Tract Segmentation in Real-Time MRI
summary: Segmenting vocal tract articulators in real-time MRI (rtMRI) is a challenging dynamic image segmentation problem characterized by low contrast, rapid motion, and limited spatial resolution. However, while rtMRI acquisitions may provide synchronized acoustic signals, existing methods discard this information, and the few multimodal approaches that incorporate audio cannot be deployed when audio is unavailable. We propose a three-stage framework that leverages acoustic and phonological supervision during training while requiring only the rtMRI image at inference: phonological representations are converted into spatial bounding-box priors for articulator localization, visual and acoustic encoders are aligned via dual-level cross-modal contrastive pretraining, and the learned representations are fused through a cross-attention decoder, effectively transferring multimodal knowledge into a single-modality inference pipeline. Evaluated on 75-Speaker~Annot-16 and USC-TIMIT datasets, our method outperforms existing unimodal and multimodal methods, demonstrating that multimodal supervision provides transferable benefits for precise and clinically deployable vocal tract segmentation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种三阶段框架，利用语音和音系信息在训练中进行监督，仅需实时MRI图像即可在推理时实现高精度声门道分割，显著优于现有单模态与多模态方法。
AI.motivation: rtMRI图像存在低对比度、快速运动和空间分辨率有限等挑战；尽管常同步采集音频信号，但现有方法大多忽略该信息，而现有多模态方法又依赖音频，缺乏鲁棒性。
AI.method: 构建三阶段框架：1）将音系表征转化为空间边界框先验以定位发声器官；2）通过双层级跨模态对比预训练对齐视觉与音频编码器；3）采用交叉注意力解码器融合表征，将多模态知识迁移到单模态推理流程中。
AI.result: 在75-Speaker~Annot-16和USC-TIMIT数据集上，本方法性能超越现有单模态与多模态方法，验证了多模态监督对精确、临床可用的声门道分割具有可迁移增益。
AI.conclusion: 多模态监督（语音+音系）可在训练中提供关键引导，使纯图像推理模型获得更鲁棒、更精准的分割性能，推动rtMRI在临床中的实际部署。

title: Randomized Advantage Transformation (RAT): Computing Natural Policy Gradients via Direct Backpropagation
summary: Natural policy gradients improve optimization by accounting for the geometry of distribution space, but their practical use is limited by the cost of estimating and inverting the Fisher matrix. We present Randomized Advantage Transformation (RAT), a method for estimating Tikhonov-regularized natural policy gradients via direct backpropagation. By applying the Woodbury formula, we reformulate the regularized natural policy gradients as vanilla policy gradients with a transformed advantage. RAT computes this transformation efficiently via randomized block Kaczmarz iterations on on-policy mini-batches, avoiding explicit Fisher construction, conjugate-gradient solvers, and architecture-specific approximations. We provide convergence guarantees for RAT and demonstrate empirically that it matches or exceeds established natural-gradient methods across continuous and visual control benchmarks, while remaining simple to implement and compatible with various architectures.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为随机优势变换（RAT）的新方法，用于高效估计带Tikhonov正则化的自然策略梯度，无需显式构建Fisher矩阵或使用共轭梯度求解器，通过随机块Kaczmarz迭代实现，并在多个控制任务上表现优异。
AI.motivation: 自然策略梯度虽能提升优化性能，但受限于Fisher矩阵的估计与求逆开销大，实际应用困难。
AI.method: 提出随机优势变换（RAT），利用Woodbury公式将正则化自然策略梯度重写为经变换优势函数的普通策略梯度，并通过在在线策略小批量上执行随机块Kaczmarz迭代来高效计算该变换。
AI.result: RAT在连续控制和视觉控制基准测试中达到或超越现有自然梯度方法性能，同时实现简单、架构通用。
AI.conclusion: RAT是一种高效、通用且理论有保障的自然策略梯度近似方法，显著降低了计算复杂度，提升了实用性。

title: InstructAV2AV: Instruction-Guided Audio-Video Joint Editing
summary: Recent diffusion-based methods have achieved impressive progress in video content manipulation.
