Furthermore, we introduce NarraStream-Bench, a benchmark for narrative streaming video generation that features 324 multi-prompt scripts spanning six dimensions and a three-dimensional evaluation protocol that integrates both traditional metrics and multimodal large language model-based assessments. Extensive experiments show that IAMFlow, despite being training-free, achieves the best overall performance on NarraStream-Bench, outperforming the strongest baseline by 2.56 points, while achieving a 1.39$\times$ speedup over the most efficient baseline in the 60-second multi-prompt setting.

AI.tldr: 本文提出IAMFlow，一种无需训练的身份感知记忆框架，用于解决自回归视频生成中的长期不一致和记忆退化问题，通过LLM提取实体并分配全局ID、VLM异步验证属性来实现显式实体跟踪，并设计了加速推理流程，在新提出的NarraStream-Bench基准上取得最优性能。
AI.motivation: 现有自回归视频生成方法在处理动态变化的提示（尤其是实体引用转移）时，易导致身份漂移、角色重复和属性丢失，因其依赖预定义压缩策略或粗粒度隐式注意力检索历史帧。
AI.method: 提出IAMFlow框架：1）用LLM从每条提示中提取带视觉属性的实体并分配唯一全局ID；2）用VLM异步验证与更新渲染帧中的实体属性，替代隐式相似性匹配；3）设计包含异步视觉验证、自适应提示切换和模型量化在内的推理加速流程。
AI.result: 在新构建的NarraStream-Bench基准（含324个多提示脚本、六维叙事结构）上，IAMFlow无需训练即超越最强基线2.56分；在60秒多提示生成任务中比最高效基线快1.39倍。
AI.conclusion: IAMFlow通过显式建模与跟踪持久实体身份，有效缓解了自回归视频生成中的长期一致性问题，且无需训练、计算高效，为叙事流式视频生成提供了可扩展的新范式。

title: EgoExoMem: Cross-View Memory Reasoning over Synchronized Egocentric and Exocentric Videos
comment: The source code and dataset can be found at https://github.com/RuipingL/EgoExoMem
summary: Egocentric memory is widely used in embodied intelligence, but it may be insufficient for comprehensive spatial-temporal reasoning. Inspired by human recall from both field and observer perspectives, we introduce EgoExoMem, the first benchmark for cross-view memory reasoning over synchronized egocentric and exocentric videos. EgoExoMem contains $2.6K$ high-quality MCQs across eight temporal, spatial, and cross-view QA types. To support dual-view retrieval, we propose E$^2$-Select, a training-free frame selection method for synchronized ego-exo videos. It combines relevance-based budget allocation with per-view k-DPP sampling to handle view asymmetry and cross-view temporal consistency. Experiments show that ego and exo views provide complementary memory cues, while existing MLLMs remain far from solving the benchmark: the best model reaches only $55.3\%$. E$^2$-Select achieves state-of-the-art performance of $58.2\%$ over frame-selection and RAG-based memory baselines. Further analysis reveals systematic view-preference conflicts between question framing and answer grounding, underscoring the novelty and challenge of cross-view memory reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了首个用于同步自我视角（egocentric）和外部视角（exocentric）视频的跨视角记忆推理基准EgoExoMem，并设计了无需训练的帧选择方法E²-Select，显著提升现有大模型在该任务上的表现，揭示了跨视角记忆推理的新挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有以自我为中心的记忆（egocentric memory）在空间-时间推理方面存在局限；受人类从场视角与观察者视角双重回忆机制启发，需构建支持跨视角记忆推理的基准与方法。
AI.method: 构建包含2.6K高质量多选题的EgoExoMem基准，覆盖8类时空与跨视角问答；提出无训练的E²-Select帧选择方法，结合相关性预算分配与每视角k-DPP采样，以应对视角不对称与跨视角时序一致性问题。
AI.result: 实验表明自我视角与外部视角提供互补记忆线索；当前最优MLLM仅达55.3%准确率；E²-Select达到58.2%，超越帧选择与RAG基线；进一步分析揭示问题表述与答案定位间存在系统性视角偏好冲突。
AI.conclusion: 跨视角记忆推理是具身智能中新兴且具挑战性的方向；EgoExoMem基准与E²-Select方法为该领域提供了基础支撑与有效技术路径。

title: Spectral Progressive Diffusion for Efficient Image and Video Generation
summary: Diffusion models have been shown to implicitly generate visual content autoregressively in the frequency domain, where low-frequency components are generated earlier in the denoising process while high-frequency details emerge only in later timesteps. This structure offers a natural opportunity for efficient generation, as high-resolution computation on noise-dominated frequencies is largely redundant. We propose Spectral Progressive Diffusion, a general framework that progressively grows resolution along the denoising trajectory of pretrained diffusion models. To this end, we develop a spectral noise expansion mechanism and derive an optimal resolution schedule from the model's power spectrum. Our framework supports training-free acceleration and a novel fine-tuning recipe that further improves efficiency and quality. We demonstrate significant speedups on state-of-the-art pretrained image and video generation models while preserving visual quality.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Spectral Progressive Diffusion的框架，通过在预训练扩散模型的去噪过程中逐步提升分辨率，利用频域中低频先生成、高频后出现的特性实现高效生成。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型在频域中隐式地自回归生成视觉内容，低频成分先生成，高频细节后出现，这为高效生成提供了自然机会，因为高频噪声主导区域的高分辨率计算是冗余的。
AI.method: 提出了Spectral Progressive Diffusion框架，开发了频谱噪声扩展机制，并基于模型功率谱推导出最优分辨率调度策略；支持无需训练的加速和一种可进一步提升效率与质量的新微调方法。
AI.result: 在最先进的预训练图像和视频生成模型上实现了显著加速，同时保持了视觉质量。
AI.conclusion: 该框架是一种通用且高效的扩散模型加速方法，兼顾速度与生成质量，适用于图像与视频生成任务。

title: LongLive-2.0: An NVFP4 Parallel Infrastructure for Long Video Generation
comment: Code, model, and demos are available at https://github.com/NVlabs/LongLive
summary: We present LongLive-2.0, an NVFP4-based parallel infrastructure throughout the full training and inference workflow of long video generation, addressing speed and memory bottlenecks. For training, we introduce sequence-parallel autoregressive (AR) training, instantiated as Balanced SP, which co-designs the efficient teacher-forcing layout with SP execution by pairing clean-history and noisy-target temporal chunks on each rank, enabling a natural teacher-forcing mask with SP-aware chunked VAE encoding. Combined with NVFP4 precision, it reduces GPU memory cost and accelerates GEMM computation during training, the proportion of which increases as video length grows. Moreover, we show that a high-quality infrastructure and dataset enable a remarkably clean training pipeline. Unlike existing Self-Forcing series methods that rely on ODE initialization and subsequent distribution matching distillation (DMD), LongLive-2.0 directly tunes a diffusion model into a long, multi-shot, interactive auto-regressive (AR) diffusion model. It can be further converted to real-time generation (4 to 2 denoising steps) with standalone LoRA weights. For inference on Blackwell GPUs, we enable W4A4 NVFP4 inference, quantize KV cache into NVFP4 for memory savings, and boost end-to-end throughput with asynchronous streaming VAE decoding. On non-Blackwell GPU architectures, we deploy SP inference to match the speed on Blackwell GPUs, while the quantized KV cache can lower inter-GPU communication of SP. Experiments show up to 2.15x speedup in training, and 1.84x in inference. LongLive-2.0-5B achieves 45.7 FPS inference while attaining strong performance on benchmarks. To our knowledge, LongLive-2.0 is the first NVFP4 training and inference system for long video generation.

AI.tldr: LongLive-2.0 是首个支持 NVFP4 精度的长视频生成训练与推理一体化系统，通过序列并行自回归训练、NVFP4 量化、SP 推理与异步流式 VAE 解码等技术，显著提升速度与内存效率。
AI.motivation: 解决长视频生成中训练与推理阶段的速度和显存瓶颈，尤其是随视频长度增长而加剧的计算与内存压力，并填补 NVFP4 在该任务中端到端应用的空白。
AI.method: 提出 NVFP4 基础设施 LongLive-2.0；训练端采用 Balanced SP（序列并行自回归训练），结合 clean-history/noisy-target 分块布局与 SP 感知的 chunked VAE 编码；推理端支持 Blackwell 架构上的 W4A4 NVFP4 推理、NVFP4 KV cache 量化与异步流式 VAE 解码，非 Blackwell 架构则采用 SP 推理并利用量化 KV cache 降低通信开销。
AI.result: 训练加速最高达 2.15×，推理加速最高达 1.84×；LongLive-2.0-5B 实现 45.7 FPS 推理速度，并在基准测试中表现优异。
AI.conclusion: LongLive-2.0 首次实现了长视频生成任务中 NVFP4 精度的全栈训练与推理，验证了其在效率与性能上的显著优势，为长视频建模提供了可扩展、高性能的基础架构。

title: Aurora: Unified Video Editing with a Tool-Using Agent
summary: Recent video editing models have converged on a unified conditioning design: a single diffusion transformer jointly consumes text, source video, and reference images, and one set of weights covers replacement, removal, style transfer, and reference-driven insertion. The design is flexible, but it assumes that the user already provides model-ready text, reference images, and spatial grounding for local edits, which real requests often omit. We present Aurora, an agentic video editing framework that pairs a tool-augmented vision-language model (VLM) agent with a unified video diffusion transformer. The VLM agent maps a raw user request to a structured edit plan aligned with the transformer's conditioning channels, thereby resolving textual and visual underspecification before generation. We train the VLM agent with supervised data for complete edit planning and reference-image selection, together with preference pairs for robust tool use and instruction refinement. We introduce AgentEdit-Bench to evaluate agent-enhanced video editing under textual and visual underspecification. Experiments on AgentEdit-Bench and two existing video editing benchmarks show that Aurora improves over instruction-only baselines and that the VLM agent transfers to compatible frozen video editing models. Project page: https://yeates.github.io/Aurora-Page

AI.tldr: Aurora 提出一种代理式视频编辑框架，通过工具增强的视觉语言模型（VLM）代理将用户原始请求自动转化为结构化编辑计划，弥补文本与视觉信息的不足，再驱动统一视频扩散模型生成结果。
AI.motivation: 现有统一视频编辑模型依赖用户已提供完备的文本提示、参考图像和空间定位，但真实用户请求常存在文本与视觉信息缺失（underspecification），限制实用性。
AI.method: 提出 Aurora 框架：1）训练一个工具增强的 VLM 代理，能解析原始用户请求、生成结构化编辑计划（含文本改写、参考图选取、空间 grounding 等），并调用工具辅助决策；2）采用监督数据（完整编辑规划+参考图选择）与偏好对（工具使用鲁棒性+指令优化）联合训练；3）构建新评测基准 AgentEdit-Bench，专用于评估代理在文本/视觉欠定场景下的表现。
AI.result: 在 AgentEdit-Bench 及两个主流视频编辑基准上，Aurora 显著优于仅依赖指令的基线；且其 VLM 代理可迁移到其他冻结的视频编辑模型，验证泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 引入代理机制可有效缓解视频编辑中普遍存在的用户输入欠定问题；VLM 代理作为‘前端编译器’，使统一视频扩散模型更实用、鲁棒、可扩展。

title: Can These Views Be One Scene? Evaluating Multiview 3D Consistency when 3D Foundation Models Hallucinate
summary: Multiview 3D evaluation assumes that the images being scored are observations of one static 3D scene. This assumption can fail in NVS and sparse-view reconstruction: inputs or generated outputs may contain artifacts, outlier frames, repeated views, or noise, yet still receive high 3D consistency scores. Existing reference-based metrics require ground truth, while ground-truth-free metrics such as MEt3R depend on learned reconstruction backbones whose failure modes are poorly characterized. We study this reliability problem by comparing neural reconstruction priors with classical geometric verification. We introduce \benchmark, a controlled robustness benchmark for multiview 3D consistency, and a parametric family that decomposes neural metrics into backbone, residual, and aggregation components. This family recovers MEt3R and yields variants up to $3\times$ more robust. Our analysis shows that VGGT, MASt3R, DUSt3R, and Fast3R can hallucinate dense geometry and cross-view support for unrelated scenes, repeated images, and random noise. We introduce COLMAP-based metrics that use matches, registration, dense support, and reconstruction failure as failure-aware consistency signals. On real NVS outputs and a structured human study, these metrics achieve up to $4\times$ higher correlation with human judgments than MEt3R.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的多视角3D一致性鲁棒性评测基准（ enchmark）和可分解的神经度量族，揭示了现有神经重建方法（如MASt3R、DUSt3R等）在面对噪声、重复视图或无关图像时易产生错误几何幻觉的问题；并基于COLMAP设计了更符合人类判断的无参考3D一致性指标。
AI.motivation: 现有3D评估方法在神经视图合成（NVS）与稀疏视角重建中可靠性不足：基于真值的指标不适用，而无真值指标（如MEt3R）依赖易失效的神经重建骨干网络，其失败模式缺乏系统分析。
AI.method: 构建可控鲁棒性基准\benchmark；提出可分解的参数化神经度量族（含backbone、residual、aggregation三部分）；对比神经先验与经典几何验证；设计基于COLMAP的失败感知指标（匹配数、配准结果、稠密支持、重建失败）。
AI.result: 所提COLMAP指标在真实NVS输出与人工评估中，与人类判断的相关性达MEt3R的4倍；新度量族衍生变体鲁棒性提升至3倍；发现VGGT、MASt3R、DUSt3R、Fast3R等模型会对无关场景、重复图像或噪声生成虚假稠密几何与跨视图支持。
AI.conclusion: 神经重建先验存在严重幻觉风险，应结合经典几何验证设计失败感知、可解释、高相关性的无参考3D一致性评估方法。
